original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T2.date, 5, 4) = '2018' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM FBI_Code AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T1.fbi_code_no = T2.fbi_code_no WHERE T1.crime_against = 'Property' AND SUBSTR(T2.date, 1, 1) = '1'

question: Please list all of the contact information for the police district Near West.
original_query: SELECT phone, fax, tty, twitter FROM District WHERE district_name = 'Near West'

question: How many domestic violence cases were brought in the ward that uses "ward13@cityofchicago.org"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.domestic = 'TRUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Ward AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T2.ward_no = T1.ward_no WHERE T1.ward_email = 'ward13@cityofchicago.org'

question: Please list the area name of the communities in the Far north side, which has a population of more than 50000 but less than 70000.
original_query: SELECT community_area_name, side FROM Community_Area WHERE side = 'Far North ' AND population BETWEEN 50000 AND 70000

question: Among the crimes in the Central, calculate the percentage of larceny incidents.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.title = 'Larceny' THEN T2.report_no END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.report_no) FROM Community_Area AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T2.community_area_no = T1.community_area_no INNER JOIN FBI_Code AS T3 ON T3.fbi_code_no = T2.fbi_code_no WHERE T1.side = 'Central'

question: Which community area has the least population?
original_query: SELECT community_area_name FROM Community_Area ORDER BY population ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list any three community areas with a population of more than 50,000.
original_query: SELECT community_area_name FROM Community_Area WHERE population > 50000 LIMIT 3

question: What is the fax number for the district with the most number of crimes in January, 2018?
original_query: SELECT T1.fax FROM District AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T1.district_no = T2.district_no WHERE T2.date LIKE '%1/2018%' GROUP BY T2.district_no ORDER BY COUNT(case_number) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which commander has had to deal with more cases of criminal sexual abuse?
original_query: SELECT T3.commander FROM IUCR AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T2.iucr_no = T1.iucr_no INNER JOIN District AS T3 ON T3.district_no = T2.district_no WHERE T1.secondary_description = 'CRIMINAL SEXUAL ABUSE' GROUP BY T3.commander ORDER BY COUNT(T1.secondary_description) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the difference in the average number of vehicular hijackings and aggravated vehicular hijackings in the districts.
original_query: SELECT ROUND(CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.secondary_description = 'VEHICULAR HIJACKING' THEN T1.iucr_no END) AS REAL) / CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.secondary_description = 'VEHICULAR HIJACKING' THEN T3.district_name END) AS REAL) - CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.secondary_description = 'AGGRAVATED VEHICULAR HIJACKING' THEN T1.iucr_no END) AS REAL) / CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.secondary_description = 'AGGRAVATED VEHICULAR HIJACKING' THEN T3.district_name END) AS REAL), 4) AS "difference" FROM IUCR AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T2.iucr_no = T1.iucr_no INNER JOIN District AS T3 ON T3.district_no = T2.district_no

question: Who is the alderman in the ward associated with the crime with report number 23769?
original_query: SELECT T2.alderman_first_name, T2.alderman_last_name FROM Crime AS T1 INNER JOIN Ward AS T2 ON T2.ward_no = T1.ward_no WHERE T1.report_no = 23769

question: How many neighborhoods are there in Near North Side?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.community_area_name = 'Near North Side' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Community_Area AS T1 INNER JOIN Neighborhood AS T2 ON T1.community_area_no = T2.community_area_no

question: What is the ward ID of the most crowded ward?
original_query: SELECT ward_no FROM Ward ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the short description of the crime committed the most by criminals in the least populated community?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM Community_Area AS T1 INNER JOIN Crime AS T2 ON T1.community_area_no = T2.community_area_no INNER JOIN FBI_Code AS T3 ON T2.fbi_code_no = T3.fbi_code_no GROUP BY T3.title ORDER BY T1.population ASC, T3.fbi_code_no DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the paper which is cited most times and the paper which is cited least times? Also, find the number of times each one is cited.
original_query: SELECT cited_paper_id, COUNT(cited_paper_id), ( SELECT cited_paper_id FROM cites GROUP BY cited_paper_id ORDER BY COUNT(cited_paper_id) ASC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT COUNT(cited_paper_id) FROM cites GROUP BY cited_paper_id ORDER BY COUNT(cited_paper_id) ASC LIMIT 1 ) FROM cites GROUP BY cited_paper_id ORDER BY COUNT(cited_paper_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the citation, what is the percentage of paper ID under the Agents classification?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN class_label = 'Agents' THEN paper_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(paper_id) FROM paper

question: Among the papers under DB classification, which paper has the highest number of words cited?
original_query: SELECT T1.paper_id FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id WHERE T1.class_label = 'DB' GROUP BY T1.paper_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.word_cited_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which paper ID cited the most word? In which class label does it belongs to?
original_query: SELECT T1.paper_id, T1.class_label FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id GROUP BY T1.paper_id, T1.class_label ORDER BY COUNT(T2.word_cited_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all paper ID and its class type with more than 20 cited words.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.paper_id, T1.class_label FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id GROUP BY T2.paper_id, T1.class_label HAVING COUNT(T2.word_cited_id) > 20

question: Under what classification do the papers that cited word1163 belong?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.class_label FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id WHERE T2.word_cited_id = 'word1163'

question: How many papers were cited by schmidt99advanced cited word3555?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.paper_id) FROM cites AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.cited_paper_id = T2.paper_id WHERE T1.citing_paper_id = 'schmidt99advanced' AND T2.word_cited_id = 'word3555'

question: List the words that are cited in both AI and IR class label.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.word_cited_id FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id WHERE T1.class_label = 'AI' OR T1.class_label = 'IR'

question: In the papers classified as ML, how many cited butz01algorithmic?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.paper_id) FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN cites AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.citing_paper_id WHERE T1.class_label = 'ML' AND T2.cited_paper_id = 'butz01algorithmic'

question: Calculate the percentage of words used in Agents class label.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.class_label = 'Agents' THEN T2.word_cited_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.word_cited_id) FROM paper AS T1 INNER JOIN content AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.paper_id

question: How many methods with solutions with path 'maravillas_linq-to-delicious\tasty.sln'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.SolutionId) FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.Path = 'maravillas_linq-to-delicious\tasty.sln'

question: How many watchers does the path "maff_se3ue7\US7.sln" have?
original_query: SELECT T1.Watchers FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T2.Path = 'maff_se3ue7US7.sln'

question: Among the repositories whose number of stars received are between 6,000 to 9,000, which repository has the highest number of solution paths and many of those solution paths needs to be compiled if user wants to implement it?
original_query: SELECT T2.RepoId, COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars BETWEEN 6000 AND 9000 AND T2.WasCompiled = 0 GROUP BY T2.RepoId ORDER BY COUNT(T2.RepoId) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Are the comments for the method "HtmlSharp.HtmlParser.Feed" in XML format?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN CommentIsXml = 0 THEN 'No' WHEN CommentIsXml = 1 THEN 'Yes' END isXMLFormat FROM Method WHERE Name = 'HtmlSharp.HtmlParser.Feed'

question:
Among the solutions that contain files within the repository followed by over 1000 people, how many of them can be
implemented without needs of compilation?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Forks > 1000 AND T2.WasCompiled = 1

question:
Among the solutions that contain files within the repository needing the longest processed time to download, how many of them doesn't need to be
compiled if user wants to implement it?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.ProcessedTime = ( SELECT MAX(ProcessedTime) FROM Repo ) AND T2.WasCompiled = 1

question: Give the number of solutions that the repository which has 3060 Stars contains.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = 3060

question: What is the task of method number 2?
original_query: SELECT SUBSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), '.') - 1) task FROM Method WHERE Id = 2

question: What is the linearized sequenced of API calls of the method whose solution path is "mauriciodeamorim_tdd.encontro2\Tdd.Encontro2.sln"?
original_query: SELECT T2.ApiCalls FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.Path = 'mauriciodeamorim_tdd.encontro2Tdd.Encontro2.sln'

question: Please provide the solution id of the respository among the respository that receive 238 forks.
original_query: SELECT T2.Id FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Forks = 238

question: What is the percentage of respositories that receive more than 2,000 stars?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Stars > 2000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Stars) FROM Repo

question: Give the repository ID for the solution of method "Kalibrasi.Data.EntityClasses.THistoryJadwalEntity.GetSingleTjadwal".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.RepoId FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'Kalibrasi.Data.EntityClasses.THistoryJadwalEntity.GetSingleTjadwal'

question: For the solution of the most 'sw' methods, what is its path?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Lang = 'sw'

question: Tell the path of the solution for the method "ExportToRTF.RTFStyleSheet.H6Write".
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'ExportToRTF.RTFStyleSheet.H6Write'

question: Which repository has the longest amount of processed time of downloading? Indicate whether the solution paths in the repository can be implemented without needs of compilation.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id, T2.WasCompiled FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.ProcessedTime = ( SELECT MAX(ProcessedTime) FROM Repo )

question: How many methods does solution 1 have? And please tell me if solution 1 needs to be compiled.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.SolutionId) , CASE WHEN T1.WasCompiled = 0 THEN 'Needs' ELSE 'NoNeeds' END needToCompile FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.SolutionId = 1

question: What is the average time needed for the solutions containing files within the repository whose url is "https://github.com/jeffdik/tachy.git" to be processd?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.ProcessedTime) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/jeffdik/tachy.git'

question: What is solution 1's processing time and how many methods have been using this solution?
original_query: SELECT T1.ProcessedTime, COUNT(T2.SolutionId) FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.SolutionId = 1

question: Please list the path of the solution that contains files found within the repository most people like.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Path FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = ( SELECT MAX(Stars) FROM Repo )

question: What is the most liked repository? Indicate its github address and the amount of stars it has received.
original_query: SELECT Url, Stars FROM Repo WHERE Stars = ( SELECT MAX(Stars) FROM Repo )

question: Please list the names of methods with the solution path "wallerdev_htmlsharp\HtmlSharp.sln".
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.Path = 'wallerdev_htmlsharpHtmlSharp.sln'

question: Please give the url of the repository whose files are contained in solution ID 9?
original_query: SELECT T1.Url FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T2.Id = 9

question: What is the id of the repository with the highest number of solution path?
original_query: SELECT RepoId FROM solution GROUP BY RepoId ORDER BY COUNT(Path) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please provide the id of the respository that the most people like.
original_query: SELECT Id FROM Repo WHERE Stars = ( SELECT MAX(Stars) FROM Repo )

question: How many solutions whose repository's stars are a third more than forks?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Forks < T1.Stars * 1 / 3

question: What is the repository id of the method with tokenized name "crc parameters get hash code"?
original_query: SELECT T1.RepoId FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.NameTokenized = 'crc parameters get hash code'

question: In "maxild_playground\Playground.sln", what is the time of sampling for the method "GitHubRepo.Cli.GitHubClientWrapper.GetReleases"?
original_query: SELECT T2.SampledAt FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.Path = 'maxild_playgroundPlayground.sln' AND T2.Name = 'GitHubRepo.Cli.GitHubClientWrapper.GetReleases'

question: How much is the processed time of downloading the most popular repository?
original_query: SELECT ProcessedTime FROM Repo WHERE Watchers = ( SELECT MAX(Watchers) FROM Repo )

question: What is the language of method number 28 that can be found in the repository number 3?
original_query: SELECT T2.Lang FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Id = 28 AND T1.RepoId = 3

question: How many solutions are there whose respositories received the number of stars more than one third of the number of forks?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars > CAST(T1.Forks AS REAL) / 3

question: List all the solutions of repositories with the Forks higher than half of the watchers.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Id FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Forks > T1.Watchers / 2

question: What is the solution's path of method "HtmlSharp.HtmlParser.Feed"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'HtmlSharp.HtmlParser.Feed'

question: For the method which got the tokenized name as 't jadwal entity get single mpic', what is the path time for its solution?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ProcessedTime FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.NameTokenized = 't jadwal entity get single mpic'

question: What is the name of the solution path with the highest processed time?
original_query: SELECT Path FROM Solution WHERE ProcessedTime = ( SELECT MAX(ProcessedTime) FROM Solution )

question: What are the paths of solutions in repository "https://github.com/ecoffey/Bebop.git"
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Path FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/ecoffey/Bebop.git'

question: Please state the API calls for method number 10 and its intended course of action.
original_query: SELECT T2.ApiCalls, T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Id = 10

question: What is the time of sampling of the solution with the highest sampling time? Indicate the id number of the solution.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT SampledAt, SolutionId FROM Method WHERE SampledAt = ( SELECT MAX(SampledAt) FROM Method )

question: Please provide the path of solution of method whose full comment is Feeds data into the parser.
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.FullComment = 'Feeds data into the parser'

question: What is the comment format of method number 50 with the solution path "managedfusion_managedfusion\ManagedFusion.sln"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.CommentIsXml = 0 THEN 'isNotXMLFormat' WHEN T2.CommentIsXml = 1 THEN 'isXMLFormat' END format FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Id = 50 AND T1.Path = 'managedfusion_managedfusionManagedFusion.sln'

question: What is the average processed time of the solution with a repository of 254 likes, 88 followers, and 254 watchers?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.ProcessedTime) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.ProcessedTime) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = 254 AND T1.Forks = 88 AND T1.Watchers = 254

question: What are the solution path of the tokenized name "matrix multiply"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.NameTokenized = 'matrix multiply'

question: How many stars does the repository of the solution No. 45997 have?
original_query: SELECT T1.Stars FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T2.Id = 45997

question: Among all the solution of the 'zh-cn' methods, which path is most often used?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Lang = 'zh-cn' GROUP BY T1.Path ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Path) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the path of solution of "spinachLexer.mT__55" method?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'spinachLexer.mT__55'

question: What is the github address of the "nofear_Mara\Mara.sln" solution path?
original_query: SELECT Url FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE Path = 'nofear_MaraMara.sln'

question: For the repository with '8094' watchers , how many solutions does it contain?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Watchers = 8094

question: List all the path of solution from all the "it" lang code method.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Lang = 'it'

question: What is the solution path for the method "IQ.Data.DbQueryProvider.CanBeEvaluatedLocally"?
original_query: SELECT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Name = 'IQ.Data.DbQueryProvider.CanBeEvaluatedLocally'

question: Please list all the paths of the solutions containing files within the repository whose url is "https://github.com/maxild/playground.git".
original_query: SELECT T2.Path FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/maxild/playground.git'

question: What format does the method number 8's comment have?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN CommentIsXml = 0 THEN 'isNotXMLFormat' WHEN CommentIsXml = 1 THEN 'isXMLFormat' END format FROM Method WHERE Id = 8

question: What is the average processed time of the solution paths inside the "https://github.com/zphingphong/DiscardCustomerApp.git"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.ProcessedTime) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/zphingphong/DiscardCustomerApp.git'

question: How many solutions contain files found within the repository most people like?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.RepoId) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Stars = ( SELECT MAX(Stars) FROM Repo )

question: How many percent more of the watchers for the repository of solution No.83855 than No.1502?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 83855 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 1502 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Id = 1502 THEN T1.Watchers ELSE 0 END) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId

question: For the method has the summary of "Refetches the Entity from the persistent storage. Refetch is used to re-load an Entity which is marked "Out-of-sync", due to a save action. Refetching an empty Entity has no effect.", what is its solution path?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Path FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T2.Summary = 'Refetches the Entity FROM the persistent storage. Refetch is used to re-load an Entity which is marked "Out-of-sync", due to a save action. Refetching an empty Entity has no effect.'

question: Among the repository "3", how many methods whose comments is XML format?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.SolutionId) FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.RepoId = 3 AND T2.CommentIsXml = 1

question: What is the task of the method whose tokenized name is "online median filter test median window filling"?
original_query: SELECT SUBSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(Name, INSTR(Name, '.') + 1), '.') - 1) task FROM Method WHERE NameTokenized = 'online median filter test median window filling'

question: Among the english methods,please list the tokenized names of methods whose solutions need to be compiled.
original_query: SELECT NameTokenized FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE Lang = 'en' AND WasCompiled = 0

question: What is the total processed time of all solutions from the repository with the most forks?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.ProcessedTime) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Forks = ( SELECT MAX(Forks) FROM Repo )

question: How many solution paths that needs to be compiled if user wants to implement it in "https://github.com/jeffdik/tachy.git"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Path) FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.Url = 'https://github.com/jeffdik/tachy.git' AND T2.WasCompiled = 0

question: List 5 github address that the solutions can be implemented without the need of compilation.
original_query: SELECT T1.Url FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T2.WasCompiled = 1 LIMIT 5

question:
List all the tokenized name of the solution path "jurney_P4Backup\P4Backup\P4Backup.sln
".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.NameTokenized FROM Solution AS T1 INNER JOIN Method AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.SolutionId WHERE T1.Path = 'jurney_P4BackupP4BackupP4Backup.sln'

question: List all the solutions ids of the repository with "636430969128176000" processed time
original_query: SELECT T2.Id FROM Repo AS T1 INNER JOIN Solution AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.RepoId WHERE T1.ProcessedTime = 636430969128176000

question: What is the detailed content of the comment of the post which was created on 7/19/2010 7:37:33 PM?
original_query: SELECT T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.CreationDate = '2010-07-19 19:37:33.0'

question: What is the comment's rating score of the post which was created on 7/19/2010 7:19:56 PM
original_query: SELECT T1.Score FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.CreationDate = '2010-07-19 19:19:56.0'

question: What are the name of badge that users who have the highest reputation obtained?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId ORDER BY T1.Reputation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Identify the latest badge awarded to the user with the display name Emmett.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Emmett' ORDER BY T1.Date DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many views did the post titled 'Integration of Weka and/or RapidMiner into Informatica PowerCenter/Developer' get?
original_query: SELECT ViewCount FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Integration of Weka and/or RapidMiner into Informatica PowerCenter/Developer'

question: State all the tags used by Mark Meckes in his posts that doesn't have comments.
original_query: SELECT T3.Tags FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND T3.CommentCount = 0

question: Mention the display name and location of the user who owned the excerpt post with hypothesis-testing tag.
original_query: SELECT T3.DisplayName, T3.Location FROM tags AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.ExcerptPostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.TagName = 'hypothesis-testing'

question: Identify the total number of posts with views above average.
original_query: SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE ViewCount > ( SELECT AVG(ViewCount) FROM posts )

question: How old is the most influential user?
original_query: SELECT Age FROM users WHERE Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users )

question: How many users were from New York?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users WHERE Location = 'New York'

question: How many comments were added to the post with the highest score?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId GROUP BY T1.Id ORDER BY SUM(T1.Score) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the id of the youngest user?
original_query: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE Age = ( SELECT MIN(Age) FROM users )

question: Identify the total views on the post 'Computer Game Datasets'. Name the user who posted it last time.
original_query: SELECT T2.ViewCount, T3.DisplayName FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.LastEditorUserId = T3.Id WHERE T1.Text = 'Computer Game Datasets'

question: User No.23853 gave a comment to a post at 9:08:18 on 2013/7/12, was that post well-finished?
original_query: SELECT IIF(T2.ClosedDate IS NULL, 'NOT well-finished', 'well-finished') AS resylt FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.UserId = 23853 AND T1.CreationDate = '2013-07-12 09:08:18.0'

question: Describe the post title which got positive comments and display names of the users who posted those comments.
original_query: SELECT T1.Title, T2.UserDisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T2.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score > 60

question: In posts with 1 comment, how many of the comments have 0 score?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.CommentCount = 1 AND T2.Score = 0

question: List the creation date and age of the user that commented with webiste.
original_query: SELECT T2.CreationDate, T2.Age FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.text LIKE '%http://%'

question: What is the average number of badges obtained by a user with over 200 views?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.DisplayName) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Views > 200

question: For the owner user of post No. 65041, what is his/her reputation points?
original_query: SELECT T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Id = 65041

question: From which post is the tag "bayesian" excerpted from? Please give the body of the post.
original_query: SELECT T2.Body FROM tags AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T2.Id = T1.ExcerptPostId WHERE T1.TagName = 'bayesian'

question: How many negative comments did Neil McGuigan get in his posts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Neil McGuigan' AND T3.Score < 60

question: Describe the display name of the parent ID for child post with the highest score.
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Among posts by Harvey Motulsky and Noah Snyder, which one has higher popularity?
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' OR T1.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' GROUP BY T1.DisplayName ORDER BY SUM(T3.ViewCount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the difference in view count from post posted by Mornington and view count from posts posted by Amos.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.DisplayName = 'Mornington', T3.ViewCount, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.DisplayName = 'Amos', T3.ViewCount, 0)) AS diff FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.PostId

question: Calculate the ratio of votes in 2010 and 2011.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010', 1, 0)) AS REAL) / SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011', 1, 0)) FROM votes

question: Describe the last accessed date and location of the users who received the outliers badge.
original_query: SELECT T1.LastAccessDate, T1.Location FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'outliers'

question: What is the display name of the user who has the most number of views?
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Views = ( SELECT MAX(Views) FROM users )

question: Among the comments with scores between 5 to 10, what is the percentage of the users with 0 up votes?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.UpVotes = 0, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100/ COUNT(T1.Id) AS per FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10

question: What is the average of the up votes and the average user age for users creating more than 10 posts?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.UpVotes), AVG(T1.Age) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT OwnerUserId, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM posts GROUP BY OwnerUserId HAVING post_count > 10) AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId

question: Among the badges obtained by csgillespie, how many of them were obtained in the year 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2011' AND T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: List out the name of badges that users obtained on 7/19/2010 7:39:08 PM.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM badges WHERE Date = '2010-07-19 19:39:08.0'

question: Identify the number of posts that have been viewed over 35000 times but have received no comments from other users.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM posts WHERE ViewCount > 35000 AND CommentCount = 0

question: Please list the display names of all the users whose accounts were created in the year 2011.
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011'

question: Please list the names of the badges obtained by csgillespie.
original_query: SELECT T1.`Name` FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: Among the posts owned by an elder user, how many of them have a score of over 19?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score >= 20 AND T2.Age > 65

question: Who has the highest reputation? Please give the display name.
original_query: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users )

question: List the post IDs and badge names of the user Samuel in 2013.
original_query: SELECT T1.PostId, T2.Name FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.UserId WHERE T1.UserDisplayName = 'Samuel' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2013' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013'

question: How many posts have a score of 10 on the list?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM posts WHERE Score = 10

question: For the user No.24, how many times is the number of his/her posts compared to his/her votes?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.UserId = 24

question: Identify the percentage of teenage users.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Id) FROM users

question: Describe the post history counts and last edit date of the post title "What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?"
original_query: SELECT T1.Id, T2.LastEditDate FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?'

question: How many users are awarded with more than 5 badges?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(UserId) FROM ( SELECT UserId, COUNT(Name) AS num FROM badges GROUP BY UserId ) T WHERE T.num > 5

question: What is the sum of favourite count gained by user ID 686 in 2011?
original_query: SELECT SUM(DISTINCT FavoriteCount) FROM posts WHERE Id IN ( SELECT PostId FROM postHistory WHERE UserId = 686 AND STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' )

question: How many users whose reputations are higher than 2000 and the number of views is higher than 1000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE Reputation > 2000 AND Views > 1000

question: Mention the reputation of users who had obtained the badge on 7/19/2010 7:39:08 PM.
original_query: SELECT T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Date = '2010-07-19 19:39:08.0'

question: Among the users located in United Kingdom, how many users whose post have a total favorite amount of 4 or more?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4

question: How many votes were made in 2010?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM votes WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010'

question: How many posts have a score less than 20?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM posts WHERE Score < 20

question: What is the excerpt post ID and wiki post ID of the tag named sample?
original_query: SELECT ExcerptPostId, WikiPostId FROM tags WHERE TagName = 'sample'

question: What is the display name of the user who acquired the first Autobiographer badge?
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.`Name` = 'Autobiographer' ORDER BY T2.Date LIMIT 1

question: Which users have posted the most comments. List out the user's badge?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.UserId = t2.UserId GROUP BY T2.UserId ORDER BY COUNT(T2.UserId) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the sum of score of the post on 2010-07-19?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Score) FROM posts WHERE LasActivityDate LIKE '2010-07-19%'

question: For the post which got 1910 view counts, how many comments does it get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.ViewCount = 1910

question: Among the users who have more than 100 upvotes, how many of them have more then 1 downvotes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users WHERE Upvotes > 100 AND Downvotes > 1

question: Based on posts posted by Community, calculate the percentage of posts that use the R language.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.TagName = 'r', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN tags AS T3 ON T3.ExcerptPostId = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Community'

question: Among the posts with views ranging from 100 to 150, what is the comment with the highest score?
original_query: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE PostId IN ( SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE ViewCount BETWEEN 100 AND 150 ) ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the titles of the posts owned by the user csgillespie?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: What are the display names and ages of user who got the highest in views?
original_query: SELECT DisplayName, Age FROM users WHERE Views = ( SELECT MAX(Views) FROM users )

question: How many users last accessed the website after 2014/9/1?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users WHERE date(LastAccessDate) > '2014-09-01'

question: In comments with score between 1 to 5, list down the display names of the users with 0 down votes.
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score BETWEEN 1 AND 5 AND T2.DownVotes = 0

question: How many posts with votes that were created in 2011 have a bounty of 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T2.BountyAmount = 50 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.CreationDate) = '2011'

question: What is the total number of comments of all the posts owned by csgillespie?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.CommentCount) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: When did 'chl' cast its first vote in a post?
original_query: SELECT T2.CreationDate FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'chl' ORDER BY T2.CreationDate LIMIT 1

question: Which user ID has the lowest view?
original_query: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE Views = ( SELECT MIN(Views) FROM users )

question: Among the tags with tag ID below 15, how many of them have 20 count of posts and below?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM tags WHERE Count <= 20 AND Id < 15

question: Calculate the average view count of each post tagged as 'humor' and list the title and the comment of each post.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.ViewCount), T2.Title, T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T2.Id = T1.PostId  WHERE T2.Tags = '<humor>' GROUP BY T2.Title, T1.Text

question: What is the display name of the user who last edited the post "Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation"?
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.LastEditorUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'

question: Give the number of "Revival" badges.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Revival'

question: What is the title of the post that is owned by csgillespie and has the highest popularity?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' ORDER BY T1.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the badge names received in 2011 for the user whose location is in the North Pole.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '2011' AND T1.Location = 'North Pole'

question: How much is the total bounty amount of the post titled about 'data'
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.BountyAmount) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title LIKE '%data%'

question: Among the posts with a score of over 5, what is the percentage of them being owned by an elder user?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Age > 65, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score > 5

question: For the user whose display name is "DatEpicCoderGuyWhoPrograms", what is his/her badge's name?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'DatEpicCoderGuyWhoPrograms'

question: In comments with 0 score, how many of the posts have view count lower than 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.ViewCount < 5 AND T2.Score = 0

question: How many posts by Matt Parker have more than 4 votes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id INNER JOIN votes AS T4 ON T4.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Matt Parker' GROUP BY T2.PostId, T4.Id HAVING COUNT(T4.Id) > 4

question: Which user made a post titled 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?' and how much is the reputation of the user?
original_query: SELECT T1.DisplayName, T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'

question: What is the display name of the user who is the owner of the most valuable post?
original_query: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many posts did Jay Stevens have in 2010?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.CreaionDate) = '2010' AND T1.DisplayName = 'Jay Stevens'

question: Write all the comments left by users who edited the post titled 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
original_query: SELECT T2.Comment FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'

question: State the number of views of users who obtained the badge on 7/19/2010 7:39:08 PM.
original_query: SELECT T1.Views FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Date = '2010-07-19 19:39:08.0'

question: List the title of posts which were edited by Vebjorn Ljosa.
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Vebjorn Ljosa'

question: Identify the number of adult users who have cast over 5000 upvotes.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users WHERE Age BETWEEN 19 AND 65 AND UpVotes > 5000

original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM postHistory WHERE date(CreationDate) = '2010-07-21'

question: How many comments and answers were left by the users on the post with the title 'Clustering 1D data'?

question: Provide the last edit date and last edit user ID for the post "Detecting a given face in a database of facial images".
original_query: SELECT LastEditDate, LastEditorUserId FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Detecting a given face in a database of facial images'

question: Provide the related post title of "How to tell if something happened in a data set which monitors a value over time".
original_query: SELECT T3.Title FROM postLinks AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T1.RelatedPostId = T3.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'How to tell if something happened in a data set which monitors a value over time'

question: How many badges has the user csgillespie obtained?

question: How many posts were created by Daniel Vassallo?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Daniel Vassallo'

question: Give the user's reputation and up vote number of the user that commented "fine, you win :)".
original_query: SELECT T2.Reputation, T2.UpVotes FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Text = 'fine, you win :)'

question: For all coins with average price more than $1000. State the current status of the coin.
original_query: SELECT T1.status FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id GROUP BY T1.name HAVING AVG(T2.price) > 1000

question: Name the coins that were not opened on May 2013.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T2.date) = '2013-05' AND T2.open IS NULL

question: When is the highest closed price of CHNCoin?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'CHNCoin' ORDER BY T2.close DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the descripition of BitBar?
original_query: SELECT description FROM coins WHERE name = 'BitBar'

question: What is the name of the coin with the highest price?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.price = ( SELECT MAX(price) FROM historical )

question: When is the highest price of Terracoin?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Terracoin' ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: When did Bitcoin reach its highest price on 2013/4/29?
original_query: SELECT T2.time_high FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-29' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: Please name the coin that ranked first among the coins traded on April 29, 2013.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-29' AND T2.cmc_rank = 1

question: List the price for Zetacoin on 13/11/1 and the next 7 consecutive days. What is the average price for these 7 days?
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Zetacoin' AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-11-01' AND '2013-11-07' UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T2.PRICE) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Zetacoin' AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-11-01' AND '2013-11-07'

question: Name the coin and date of transactions with the greatest decline in percent change in 1 hour.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.percent_change_1h = ( SELECT MIN(percent_change_1h) FROM historical )

question: Which crytocurrency had a bigger number of coins circulating in the market and in the general public's hands on 2013/4/28, Bitcoin or Litecoin?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T1.name IN ('Bitcoin', 'Litecoin') ORDER BY T2.circulating_supply DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the transaction date and the price when Bitcoin was bottomed?
original_query: SELECT T2.date, T2.price FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Bitcoin' ORDER BY T2.price LIMIT 1

question: List the names of the coins above the average price on April 28, 2013.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2018-04-28' AND T2.price > ( SELECT AVG(price) FROM historical WHERE date = '2018-04-28' )

question: Which crytocurrency was ranked the first by CoinMarketCap on 2013/4/28?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T2.cmc_rank = 1

question: When is the best time to purchase Bitcoin?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Bitcoin' ORDER BY T2.low LIMIT 1

question: What was the price of Bitcoin when it closed at the end of the day on 2013/4/29?
original_query: SELECT T2.close FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-29' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: What was the average price of a Bitcoin in the year 2013?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.price) FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '2013' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: Name the coin with the highest percentage price changed in 24 hours. State the transaction date and price.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T2.DATE, T2.price FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.percent_change_24h = ( SELECT MAX(percent_change_24h) FROM historical )

question: What was the number of Bitcoins verifiably burned until 2013/4/28?
original_query: SELECT T2.max_supply - T2.total_supply FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: How much dollars was a Bitcoin worth on 2013/4/28 according to the coin market?
original_query: SELECT T2.market_cap FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: List the names of the top five coins traded on January 1, 2014.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2014-01-01' AND T2.cmc_rank <= 5

question: When did Peercoin rank fifth?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T1.name = 'Peercoin' AND T2.cmc_rank = 5

question: How many coins were added in May 2013? Please list the names of coins.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) num FROM coins WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', date_added) = '2013-05' UNION ALL SELECT name FROM coins WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', date_added) = '2013-05'

question: What was the max profit a user can make on Bitcoin on 2013/4/28?
original_query: SELECT T2.high - T2.low FROM coins AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.coin_id WHERE T2.date = '2013-04-28' AND T1.name = 'Bitcoin'

question: What is the number of female graduate for all students cohort from Oakwood University in 2013?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2013 AND T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.race = 'X' AND T1.chronname = 'Oakwood University'

question: Between 2011 to 2013, what is the average number of male Hispanic degree-seeking students at 2-year institutions who graduated within 150 percent of normal/expected time in United Education Institute-Huntington Park Campus?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.grad_150) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'United Education Institute-Huntington Park Campus' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2011 AND 2013 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'H'

question: Among the black students in 2011, list the institution site and name of those who has 20 t0 30 degree-seeking students in the cohort.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.site, T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.race = 'B' AND T2.grad_cohort BETWEEN 20 AND 30

question: Tell the number of 4-year private not-for-profit schools in the home state of "Brevard Community College".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.chronname) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.level = '4-year' AND T2.control = 'Private not-for-profit' AND T1.chronname = 'Brevard Community College'

question: What is the total male graduates in 2012 in the state whereby the institute with the highest average amount of student aid going to undergraduate recipients is located?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2012 AND T2.gender = 'M' ORDER BY T1.aid_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the all the institutes from the state with the most number of American Indian in 2007.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2007 AND T2.race = 'Ai' GROUP BY T1.chronname ORDER BY COUNT(T1.chronname) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of the institutes in the state of Alabama whose all graduates in total exceeded 500 in 2011?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.state = 'Alabama' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.race = 'X' AND T2.grad_cohort > 500

question: What is the institution's name of american students within the number of degree-seeking students in the cohort that ranges from 1 to 3?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.grad_cohort BETWEEN 1 AND 3 AND T2.race = 'Ai'

question: How many students for both genders graduated from a 2-year institute in Alabama in 2011?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE  T2.cohort = '2y all' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T1.state = 'Alabama'

question: Among the states that start with letter A and attained a national sector average of 16.5, give the number of degree-seeking students in the cohort of those students in 2012 .
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.state LIKE 'A%' AND T1.awards_per_natl_value = 16.5 AND T2.year = 2012

question: Calculate the percentage of Black students in all private for profit institutions.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.race = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.race = 'B' AND T1.control = 'Private for-profit'

question: Which state is "Mercer University" located in?
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN chronname = 'Mercer University' THEN state ELSE NULL END AS T FROM institution_details ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: List all the public institutes from the state with the least number of graduate cohort in 2013.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2013 AND T1.control = 'Public' ORDER BY T2.grad_cohort LIMIT 1

question: Give the web site address for the school in "PA" state with the highest latitude.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.site FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'PA' AND T1.lat_y = ( SELECT MAX(T1.lat_y) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'PA' )

question: In the state with the highest state appropriations to higher education in fiscal year 2011 per resident, which institution has the lowest number of undergraduates in 2010?
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T3 ON T3.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.student_count = ( SELECT MIN(T1.student_count) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T3 ON T3.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T3.year = 2010 ) AND T3.year = 2010 GROUP BY T1.state ORDER BY SUM(T2.state_appr_value) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In 2012, how many Asian female graduates were seeking another type of degree or certificate at the 4-year institution at University of Alaska at Anchorage?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.race = 'A' AND T1.chronname = 'University of Alaska at Anchorage' AND T2.cohort = '4y other'

question: Among the public institutes in the state of Alabama, how many of them have over 30 students who graduated within 100 percent of normal/expected time in 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.chronname) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.state = 'Alabama' AND T1.control = 'Public' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.grad_100 > 30

question: In the state with the highest number of schools, how many institutions have a percentage of no less than 90 of undergraduates who attend full-time? List all of the institutions' names.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(t1.unitid), t1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON t1.state = t2.state WHERE t1.ft_pct > 90 ORDER BY t2.schools_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the school with the highest number of first-time, full-time, degree-seeking female students in the cohort being tracked, minus any exclusions who were seeking another type of degree or certificate at a 4-year institution?
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.cohort = '4y other' ORDER BY T2.grad_cohort DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the states in 2011 with a national sector average of 20 and below.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.state FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T1.awards_per_natl_value <= 20

question: How many institutes are private and not-for profit?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM institution_details WHERE control = 'Private not-for-profit'

question: In Yale University, what is the average number of Black students per year who were bachelor's/equivalent-seeking cohort at 4-year institutions between 2002 to 2005?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Yale University' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2002 AND 2005 AND T2.race = 'B' AND T2.cohort = '4y bach'

question: Please list the names of the institutes with the percentage of male White students graduating in 2011 within 150 percent of normal/expected time over 20.
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.grad_150 > 20 THEN T1.chronname ELSE NULL END AS T FROM institution_details T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.year = 2011 AND T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'W' ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: Give the name of the 4-year public school in "ID" with the lowest graduation 100 value.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'ID' AND T1.level = '4-year' AND T1.control = 'Public' GROUP BY T1.chronname ORDER BY SUM(T1.grad_100_value) ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the state name of male graduate in 2011 from a private for profit institution with black students?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.state FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.gender = 'M' AND T2.race = 'B' AND T1.control = 'Private for-profit' AND T2.year = 2011

question: Give the cohort name for the school with biggest cohort size.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.cohort_size = ( SELECT MAX(T1.cohort_size) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid )

question: What's the average number of graduates for Central Alabama Community College in the 3 consecutive years from 2011 to 2013?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.grad_cohort) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College' AND T2.year IN (2011, 2012, 2013) AND T2.gender = 'B' AND T2.race = 'X'

question: How many students that graduated from Lincoln College in 2011 belong to the cohort type of Bachelor's/equivalent seeking cohort at 4-year institutions?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.unitid) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T1.unitid = T2.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Lincoln College' AND T2.year = 2011 AND T2.cohort = '4y bach'

question: In female students in year 2012, how many of them from a state with number of schools ranges from 10 to 20?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.race) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND schools_count BETWEEN 10 AND 20 AND T2.year = 2012

question: What is the name of the school with the highest difference in the average completion rate for the national in which it belongs? Indicate the state appropriations to higher education in fiscal year 2011 per resident to which the school belongs.
original_query: SELECT T1.chronname, T2.state_appr_value FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_details AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state ORDER BY T1.awards_per_value - T2.awards_per_natl_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many more students in total graduated from Central Alabama Community College in 2012 than in 2011?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 2012 THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.year = 2011 THEN T2.grad_cohort ELSE 0 END) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Central Alabama Community College'

question: Give the state and name of institutions in year of data release from 2010 to 2012 with black students.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.state, T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.race = 'B' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2010 AND 2012

question: Among the race of all students, what is the control of institution and level of institution with highest number of students?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.control, T1.level FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.race = 'X' AND T1.student_count = ( SELECT MAX(T1.student_count) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T2.race = 'X' )

question: For the state which has the 113 2-year public schools, tell the number of graduated Asian students who seeks another type of degree or certificate at a 2-year institution in 2013.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.grad_cohort) FROM state_sector_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.stateid = T1.stateid WHERE T2.level = '2-year' AND T2.control = 'Public' AND T2.gender = 'B' AND T2.race = 'A' AND T2.cohort = '2y all' AND T1.schools_count = 113

question: Tell the name of school in "NJ" that could get the bachelor's degree with highest students number.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.chronname FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'NJ' AND T1.level = '4-year' AND T1.student_count = ( SELECT MAX(T1.student_count) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T2.state = T1.state WHERE T2.state_abbr = 'NJ' AND T1.level = '4-year' )

question: In Harvard University, which year recorded the highest number of first-time, full-time, degree-seeking students in the cohort being tracked, minus any exclusions?
original_query: SELECT T2.year FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN institution_grads AS T2 ON T2.unitid = T1.unitid WHERE T1.chronname = 'Harvard University' GROUP BY T2.year ORDER BY SUM(T2.grad_cohort) DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the average median SAT value for institutes in the state with the most male graduate cohort in 2013.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.med_sat_value) FROM institution_details AS T1 INNER JOIN state_sector_grads AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.year = 2013 AND T2.gender = 'M' GROUP BY T2.grad_cohort ORDER BY COUNT(T2.grad_cohort) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the post name of "Idaho" state.
original_query: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN state = 'Idaho' THEN state_post ELSE NULL END AS T FROM state_sector_details ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: Find the professor ID and position in faculty who taught high-level undergraduate course of less than 10 in ID.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T1.hasPosition FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T3.courseLevel = 'Level_400' AND T2.course_id < 10

question: List down the advised student IDs and IDs of employing professor in faculty.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T2.p_id FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id_dummy = T2.p_id WHERE hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme'

question: How many people teaches course no.11?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM taughtBy WHERE course_id = 11

question: How many non-faculty members are not undergoing the phase of qualifications?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person WHERE hasPosition = 0 AND inPhase = 0

question: What is the position in the faculty of the professor who teaches the highest number of courses?
original_query: SELECT T1.hasPosition FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.professor = 1 GROUP BY T1.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the position status and IDs of professor who advised student ID "303".
original_query: SELECT T2.hasPosition, T1.p_id_dummy FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id_dummy = T2.p_id WHERE T1.p_id = 303

question: Which are the courses with the most number of professors? State the course ID and the level of the course.
original_query: SELECT T1.course_id, T1.courseLevel FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id GROUP BY T1.course_id, T1.courseLevel ORDER BY COUNT(T1.course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which professor taught the least amount of courses?
original_query: SELECT p_id FROM taughtBy GROUP BY p_id ORDER BY COUNT(course_id) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which courses were taught by a professor who is not a faculty member?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.course_id FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.professor = 1 AND T1.hasPosition = 0

question: How many professional or master/graduate courses are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: Which professor teaches the highest number of professional or master/graduate courses?
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_500' GROUP BY T2.p_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the professor who advised student no.6, please list the IDs of the courses he or she teaches.
original_query: SELECT T2.course_id FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN advisedBy AS T3 ON T3.p_id = T1.p_id WHERE T1.p_id = 9

question: List the ID and years in program for students taught by advisor with ID 5.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T2.yearsInProgram FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.p_id_dummy = 5

question: Among the courses that are basic or medium undergraduate courses, how many of them are taught by a faculty member?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.p_id = T3.p_id WHERE T3.professor = 1 AND T1.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

question: Please list the IDs of all the faculty employees who teaches a basic or medium undergraduate course.
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T3.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_300' AND T3.hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme'

question: How many students are advised to teach by a professor teaching basic or medium undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T4.p_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN advisedBy AS T4 ON T4.p_id = T1.p_id WHERE T1.professor = 1 AND T3.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

question: What is the average number of courses taught by a professor?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.course_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.p_id) AS num FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.professor = 1

question: How many professors teaches no more than two high-level or harder undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(T2.p_id) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_400' GROUP BY T2.p_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.course_id) <= 2 )

question: How many advisors are in charge of advising all the students in 1st year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.p_id_dummy) FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_1' AND T2.student = 1

question: Please list the IDs of the professors that teaches more than 3 courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.professor = 1 GROUP BY T1.p_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.course_id) > 3

question: List the professor ID who taught the course ID from 121 to 130 of basic undergraduate courses.
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_300' AND T1.course_id > 121 AND T1.course_id < 130

question: What are the courses taught by the advisors who gave advice to student with ID 376?
original_query: SELECT T3.course_id FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T3 ON T2.p_id = T3.p_id WHERE T1.p_id = 141

question: List any five of course IDs with professor IDs who taught master courses.
original_query: SELECT T1.course_id, T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_500' LIMIT 5

question: Provide the ID of professors who are teaching high-level or harder undergraduate course.
original_query: SELECT T2.p_id FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_400'

question: Is the teacher who teaches course no.9 a faculty member?
original_query: SELECT T2.hasPosition FROM taughtBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T1.course_id = 9

question: Please list the IDs of the advisors of the students who are in the 5th year of their program.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id_dummy FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_5'

question: List the person IDs and course levels of the affiliated professors in faculty.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id, T3.courseLevel FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.hasPosition = 'Faculty_aff'

question: What is the average number of students for each advisor?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(p_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT p_id_dummy) AS avgnum FROM advisedBy GROUP BY p_id_dummy

question: Which course has more teachers, course no.16 or course no.18?
original_query: SELECT course_id FROM taughtBy WHERE course_id = 11 OR course_id = 18 GROUP BY course_id ORDER BY COUNT(course_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the advisors for students in Year 3 of the program.
original_query: SELECT T1.p_id FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.yearsInProgram = 'Year_3'

question: Among the faculty affiliated professor, how many professors teaches professional or master/undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T3.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.hasPosition = 'Faculty_aff' AND T1.professor = 1 AND T3.courseLevel = 'Level_500'

question: How many professors teaches basic or medium undergraduate courses?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

question: How many teachers are faculty employees?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person WHERE hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme'

question: Among the students being advised by advisors, which students' year in the program do the advisors advise the majority of?
original_query: SELECT T2.yearsInProgram FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.student = 1 GROUP BY T2.yearsInProgram ORDER BY COUNT(T1.p_id_dummy) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many students that are undergoing the pre-phase of qualification have advisors?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.p_id_dummy) FROM advisedBy AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.inPhase = 'Pre_Quals' AND T2.student = 1

question: What is the level of the course with the most number of teachers?
original_query: SELECT T1.courseLevel FROM course AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id GROUP BY T2.course_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.p_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the ingredients that need to be cook in beef broth?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T2.preparation = 'cooked in beef broth'

question: What is the title of the recipe that is most likely to gain weight?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.total_fat DESC LIMIT 1

question: What kind of preparation is needed for apple juice to make a raspberry-pear couscous cake?
original_query: SELECT T2.preparation FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry-Pear Couscous Cake' AND T3.name = 'apple juice'

question: How many calories from fat are there in the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie"?
original_query: SELECT T2.calories * T2.pcnt_cal_fat FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: How many ingredients are there in the recipe that is best in helping your body's natural defence against illness and infection?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Nutrition AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.vitamin_a > 0

question: What ingredients does the longest cooking time recipe have?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id ORDER BY T1.cook_min DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the ingredients which measure in slices.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T2.unit = 'slice(s)'

question: What is the average calorie count for all recipes using coarsely ground black pepper?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.calories) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T2.ingredient_id = T1.ingredient_id INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T3 ON T3.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.name = 'coarsely ground black pepper'

question: Give the name of the most widely used ingredient.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many calories does the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie" contain?
original_query: SELECT T2.calories FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: How much fat does the Raspberry Chiffon Pie have?
original_query: SELECT T2.total_fat FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: How many recipes are non-dairy?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.recipe_id) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T2.ingredient_id = T1.ingredient_id INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T3 ON T3.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.category NOT LIKE '%dairy%'

question: What are the optional ingredients for Warm Chinese Chicken Salad?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Warm Chinese Chicken Salad' AND T2.optional = 'TRUE'

question: How many ingredients must be rationed in the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' AND T2.max_qty = T2.min_qty

question: State the title of the recipe with most kinds of ingredients.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id GROUP BY T1.title ORDER BY COUNT(title) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the title and total time of the recipe which can be made with only lima beans.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.prep_min + T1.cook_min + T1.stnd_min FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.name = 'lima beans'

question: Please list the names of all the ingredients needed for the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie" that do not need preprocessing.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' AND T2.preparation IS NULL

question: List the names of alcohol free recipes.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.alcohol = 0

question: Is the ingredient "graham cracker crumbs" optional in the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie"?
original_query: SELECT T2.optional FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' AND T3.name = 'graham cracker crumbs'

question: How many recipes can be made with canned dairy?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.category = 'canned dairy'

question: List the names of recipes that can lead to constipation.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.iron > 20

question: Which recipe has the highest number of ingredients? Calculate the said recipe's total time of cooking.
original_query: SELECT T2.recipe_id, T1.prep_min + T1.cook_min + T1.stnd_min FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id GROUP BY T2.recipe_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.ingredient_id) DESC LIMIT 1
