question: Calculate the percentage of recipes with no cholesterol included and have a cooking time less than 20 minutes among all recipes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.cook_min < 20 AND T2.cholestrl = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id

question: Among the recipes with alcohol content over 10, which recipe takes the longest to prepare?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.alcohol > 10 ORDER BY T1.prep_min DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many ingredients are required to make the Raspberry Chiffon Pie?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie'

question: Among the recipes whose source is the National Potato Board, which recipe has the highest calories?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.source = 'National Potato Board' ORDER BY T2.calories DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many ingredients are needed to prepare Idaho Potato Supreme?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T1.title = 'Idaho Potato Supreme'

question: Which recipe needs the most frozen raspberries in light syrup? State its title.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.name = 'frozen raspberries in light syrup' AND T2.max_qty = T2.min_qty

question: How many servings does the recipe with the highest unsaturated fat have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.title) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id ORDER BY T2.total_fat - T2.sat_fat DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many baking product ingredients are there in the No-Bake Chocolate Cheesecake?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.category = 'baking products' AND T1.title = 'No-Bake Chocolate Cheesecake'

question: Provide the ingredients that are rationed in the recipe with the highest carbohydrate content.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Ingredient AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T3 ON T3.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id WHERE T2.max_qty = T2.min_qty ORDER BY T3.carbo DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many cups of almonds do you need for a chicken pocket sandwich?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Chicken Pocket Sandwich' AND T3.name = 'almonds' AND T2.unit = 'cup(s)'

question: How many times is the sodium content in Lasagne-Spinach Spirals to Beef and Spinach Pita Pockets?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'Lasagne-Spinach Spirals' THEN T2.sodium ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'Beef and Spinach Pita Pockets' THEN T2.sodium ELSE 0 END) FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id

question: At least how many cups of graham cracker crumbs does the recipe "Raspberry Chiffon Pie" need?
original_query: SELECT T2.min_qty FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T1.title = 'Raspberry Chiffon Pie' AND T3.name = 'graham cracker crumbs'

question: Which recipes contain almond extract?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T3.ingredient_id = T2.ingredient_id WHERE T3.name = 'almond extract'

question: When compared to the total number of breweries in the US producing American Blonde Ale, how many in the state of Wisconsin produces American Blonde Ale? Indicate your answer in percentage (%).
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.state = 'WI', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM beers AS T1 INNER JOIN breweries AS T2 ON T1.brewery_id = T2.id WHERE T1.style = 'American Blonde Ale'

question: Of all the beer styles produced by Stevens Point Brewery, how many percent do they allot for American Adjunct Lager?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.style = 'American Adjunct Lager', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.brewery_id) FROM beers AS T1 INNER JOIN breweries AS T2 ON T1.brewery_id = T2.id WHERE T2.name = 'Stevens Point Brewery'

question: Where in New York can you locate the brewery that makes the bitterest beer? List both the brewery's name and the name of the city.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T2.city FROM beers AS T1 INNER JOIN breweries AS T2 ON T1.brewery_id = T2.id WHERE T2.state = 'NY' ORDER BY T1.ibu DESC LIMIT 1

question: Describe the full names and graduated universities of the professors who advised Olia Rabier.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.graduate_from FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.f_name = 'Olia' AND T3.l_name = 'Rabier'

question: What is the first and last name of students with highest gpa?
original_query: SELECT f_name, l_name FROM student WHERE gpa = ( SELECT MAX(gpa) FROM student )

question: Among the easiest courses, what is the name of the course where most students got an A?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.grade = 'A' AND T2.diff = 1 GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.student_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the student's email with grade of B in a course with difficulty greater than the 80% of average difficulty of all courses.
original_query: SELECT T2.email FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.grade = 'B' GROUP BY T3.diff HAVING T3.diff > AVG(T3.diff) * 0.8

question: How many courses does the student with the highest GPA this semester take?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(course_id) FROM registration WHERE student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE gpa = ( SELECT MAX(gpa) FROM student ) )

question: Who were the students who failed the course "Applied Deep Learning"? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Applied Deep Learning ' AND T2.grade IS NULL

question: Of courses with 3 credit, how many students have GPA of 3.2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.credit = 3 AND T1.gpa = 3.2

question: How many of the professors are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(prof_id) FROM prof WHERE gender = 'Female'

question: List the courses' IDs and students' IDs who failed to pass the course.
original_query: SELECT course_id, student_id FROM registration WHERE grade IS NULL OR grade = ''

question: List the professors' IDs and students' IDs with the lowest research ability.
original_query: SELECT prof_id, student_id FROM RA WHERE capability = ( SELECT MIN(capability) FROM RA )

question: Which student failed the course Intro to Database 2? Please give his or her full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T2.grade IS NULL AND T3.name = 'Intro to Database 2'

question: Mention the names and credits of course registered by the students who were under the supervision of female professor with the highest teaching ability.
original_query: SELECT T5.name, T5.credit FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id INNER JOIN registration AS T4 ON T3.student_id = T4.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T5 ON T4.course_id = T5.course_id WHERE T2.gender = 'Female' ORDER BY T2.teachingability DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among undergraduate students, list the name of the course with the highest student satisfaction.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.type = 'UG' ORDER BY T2.sat DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the students who got a B in the course Machine Learning Theory, how many of them have a gpa of over 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(student_id) FROM registration WHERE grade = 'B' AND student_id IN ( SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE gpa > 3 AND course_id IN ( SELECT course_id FROM course WHERE name = 'Machine Learning Theory' ) )

question: What is the average gpa of Ogdon Zywicki's research assistants?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.gpa) / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Ogdon' AND T2.last_name = 'Zywicki'

question: Name the professor who got graduation from the University of Boston.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM prof WHERE graduate_from = 'University of Boston'

question: Please give the name of the course in which most numbers of the students got an A. Also, list the full name of the students who got an A in this course.
original_query: SELECT T3.name, T2.f_name, T2.l_name FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T1.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.grade = 'A' GROUP BY T3.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.student_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of Professor Ogdon Zywicki's research assistants are taught postgraduate students?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.type = 'TPG' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Ogdon' AND T2.last_name = 'Zywicki'

question: For the students with an intelligence of 5, list the full name and courses taken by them who have less than a 3 GPA.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name, T3.name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.intelligence = 5 AND T1.gpa < 3

question: Among research postgraduate students, give the name of the course with the student satisfaction value of 1.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T2.sat = 1 AND T1.type = 'RPG'

question: How many research assistants does the female professor with the lowest teaching ability have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.teachingability = '1' AND T2.gender = 'Female'

question: What is the difference in the average GPA of students who took the hardest and easiest courses?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.gpa) FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.diff IN (2, 1) GROUP BY T3.diff

question: In students with a grade of B, how many of them have an intellegence level of 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.grade = 'B' AND T2.intelligence = 3

question: For the professor who is working with Harrietta Lydford, how is his popularity?
original_query: SELECT T1.popularity FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.f_name = 'Harrietta' AND T3.l_name = 'Lydford'

question: Describe the names and credits of the least difficult courses.
original_query: SELECT name, credit FROM course WHERE diff = ( SELECT MIN(diff) FROM course )

question: Among students with low salary, how many of them have a gpa of 3.5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.gpa = 3.5 AND T1.salary = 'low'

question: Among the professors who have more than 3 research assistants, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T2.prof_id FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.gender = 'Male' GROUP BY T1.prof_id HAVING COUNT(T1.student_id) > 3 )

question: Which professor advised Willie Rechert to work as a research assistant? Please give his or her full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.f_name = 'Willie' AND T3.l_name = 'Rechert'

question: Name the students of the Advanced Database Systems course with the highest satisfaction.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Advanced Database Systems' ORDER BY T2.sat DESC LIMIT 1

question: Describe the students' full names and grades in Intro to BlockChain course.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name, T2.grade FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Intro to BlockChain'

question: Among professors with the highest popularity, how many of their students have research capability of 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T1.capability = 5 ORDER BY T2.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Describe the students' full names and GPAs under the supervision of the most popular professor.
original_query: SELECT T3.f_name, T3.l_name, T3.gpa FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id ORDER BY T1.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many research assistants of Ogdon Zywicki have an average salary?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.prof_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Ogdon' AND T1.salary = 'med' AND T2.last_name = 'Zywicki'

question: What is the name of the course with the highest satisfaction from students?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.sat = 5

question: Give the phone number of the only student who obtained "A" in the course "Intro to BlockChain".
original_query: SELECT T1.phone_number FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Intro to BlockChain' AND T2.grade = 'A'

question: What is the male and female ratio among the professors?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM prof

question: Which of the two courses, "Advanced Operating System" or "Intro to BlockChain', did most of the students receive an A in?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.grade = 'A' AND T2.name IN ('Advanced Operating System', 'Intro to BlockChain') GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.student_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many courses have the highest difficulty?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(course_id) FROM course WHERE diff = 5

question: Among the students who took the course Machine Learning Theory, how many of them are undergraduates?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.name = 'Machine Learning Theory' AND T1.type = 'UG'

question: For the professors who advise more than 2 students, which professor has a higher teaching ability? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T.first_name, T.last_name FROM ( SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T2.teachingability FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id GROUP BY T1.prof_id HAVING COUNT(student_id) > 2 ) T ORDER BY T.teachingability DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among courses with difficulty of 3, how many students have intellegence level of 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN registration AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T3.diff = 3 AND T1.intelligence = 2

question: Find the full name and popularity of the professor who advises the most number of students.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.popularity FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id GROUP BY T1.prof_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.student_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of the professor who graduated from an Ivy League School?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM prof WHERE graduate_from IN ( 'Brown University',  'Columbia University',  'Cornell University',  'Dartmouth College',  'Harvard University',  'Princeton University',  'University of Pennsylvania',  'Yale University' )

question: Please list the full names of all the students who are research assistants with the highest research capability.
original_query: SELECT T1.f_name, T1.l_name FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T2.capability = 5

question: Among the professors with more than average teaching ability, list the full name and email address of the professors who advise two or more students.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T2.email FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.teachingability > ( SELECT AVG(teachingability) FROM prof ) GROUP BY T2.prof_id HAVING COUNT(T1.student_id) >= 2

question: How many research assistants does Sauveur Skyme have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Sauveur' AND T2.last_name = 'Skyme'

question: What is the phone number of Kerry Pryor?
original_query: SELECT phone_number FROM student WHERE l_name = 'Pryor' AND f_name = 'Kerry'

question: How many students took the hardest course?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.diff = 5

question: List the full name of the professors who advised students with intelligence 1.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T3.intelligence = 1

question: Find the most important and most difficult courses.
original_query: SELECT name FROM course WHERE credit = ( SELECT MAX(credit) FROM course ) AND diff = ( SELECT MAX(diff) FROM course )

question: What is the capability on research of the student named Alvera McQuillin?
original_query: SELECT T2.capability FROM student AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.f_name = 'Alvera' AND T1.l_name = 'McQuillin'

question: State the name of research postgraduate student among Professor Zhihua Zhou's research assistants.
original_query: SELECT T3.f_name, T3.l_name FROM prof AS T1 INNER JOIN RA AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T2.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Zhihua' AND T3.type = 'RPG' AND T1.last_name = 'Zhou'

question: Among the students with a capability below 3, what is the difference of undergraduate students from research postgraduate students?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.type = 'UG' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.type = 'RPG' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.capability < 3

question: Among the students with less than four intelligence, list the full name and phone number of students with a greater than 3 GPA.
original_query: SELECT f_name, l_name, phone_number FROM student WHERE gpa > 3 AND intelligence < 4

question: What percentage of students are highly satisfied with the Intro to Database 2 course?
original_query: SELECT CAST(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE name = 'Intro to Database 2' AND course_id IN ( SELECT course_id FROM registration WHERE sat = ( SELECT MAX(sat) FROM registration ) ) ) AS REAL) * 100  / COUNT(T1.student_id) FROM registration AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.name = 'Intro to Database 2'

question: What is the average GPA of the students with the highest research capability and high salary? List the full names of the students.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.gpa), T2.f_name, T2.l_name FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN student AS T2 ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id WHERE T1.salary = 'high' AND T1.capability = 5 GROUP BY T2.student_id

question: What is the popularity of the professor who advises the highest number of students with the highest research ability?
original_query: SELECT T2.popularity FROM RA AS T1 INNER JOIN prof AS T2 ON T1.prof_id = T2.prof_id GROUP BY T1.prof_id, T1.capability ORDER BY COUNT(T1.student_id) DESC, T1.capability DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the deal happened at 2012/8/24 12:42:00, which country was it?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-24' AND T1.Time = '12:42:00'

question: In 2012, who had the least consumption in LAM?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

question: For the customer who paid 124.05 in 2012/8/24, how much did he/she spend during the January of 2012? And what is the date and expenses exactly?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID, T2.Date, T2.Consumption FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-24' AND T1.Price = 124.05 AND T2.Date = '201201'

question: There's one customer spent 214582.17 in the June of 2013, which currency did he/she use?
original_query: SELECT T2.Currency FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '201306' AND T1.Consumption = 214582.17

question: How many transactions were paid in CZK in the morning of 2012/8/26?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-26' AND T1.Time < '13:00:00' AND T2.Currency = 'CZK'

question: Please list the product description of the products bought in transactions in euro.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ProductID, T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Currency = 'EUR'

question: Which SME customer consumed the least in June 2012?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Date = '201206' AND T1.Segment = 'SME' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which segment had the least consumption?
original_query: SELECT T1.Segment FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID GROUP BY T1.Segment ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the countries of the gas stations with transactions taken place in June, 2013.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Country FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T3.Date = '201306'

question: Please list the disparate time of the transactions taken place in the gas stations from chain no. 11.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Time FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T2.ChainID = 11

question: What was the average monthly consumption of customers in SME for the year 2013?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Consumption) / 12 FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND T1.Segment = 'SME'

question: Please list the product descriptions of the transactions taken place in the gas stations in the Czech Republic.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Country = 'CZE'

question: Who is the top spending customer and how much is the average price per single item purchased by this customer? What currency was being used?
original_query: SELECT T2.CustomerID, SUM(T2.Price / T2.Amount), T1.Currency FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.CustomerID = ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth ORDER BY Consumption DESC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY T2.CustomerID, T1.Currency

question: Which LAM customer used the Euro as their currency and had the highest consumption in October 2013?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date = '201310' AND T1.Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the difference in gas consumption between CZK-paying customers and EUR-paying customers in 2012?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'CZK', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'EUR', T2.Consumption, 0)) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'

question: Which year recorded the most gas use paid in EUR?
original_query: SELECT SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY SUBSTRING(T2.Date, 1, 4) ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In February 2012, what percentage of customers consumed more than 528.3?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Consumption > 528.3, 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(CustomerID) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date = '201202'

question: What percentage of Slovakian gas stations are premium?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Segment = 'Premium', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(GasStationID) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK'

question: What percentage of KAM customers pay in euros?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(Currency = 'EUR') AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(CustomerID) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM'

question: How much did customer 6 consume in total between August and November 2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

question: How many percent of LAM customer consumed more than 46.73?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Consumption > 46.73, 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM'

question: Is it true that more SMEs pay in Czech koruna than in euros? If so, how many more?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Currency = 'CZK') - SUM(Currency = 'EUR') FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME'

question: Which client segment consumed the least in September 2013?
original_query: SELECT T1.Segment FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Date = '201309' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of "premium" against the overall segment in Country = "SVK"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Premium', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK', 1, 0)) FROM gasstations

question: Which country has more "value for money" gas stations? Please give a total number of "value for money" gas stations in each country.
original_query: SELECT Country , ( SELECT COUNT(GasStationID) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Value for money' ) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Value for money' GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(GasStationID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the product description of the products consumed in September, 2013.
original_query: SELECT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Date = '201309'

question: What is the highest monthly consumption in the year 2012?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which customers, paying in CZK, consumed the most gas in 2011?
original_query: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' AND T2.Date BETWEEN 201101 AND 201112 GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the difference in the annual average consumption of the customers with the least amount of consumption paid in CZK for 2013 between SME and LAM, LAM and KAM, and KAM and SME?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' AND T2.Consumption = ( SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth ) AND T2.Date BETWEEN 201301 AND 201312

question: What segment did the customer have at 2012/8/23 21:20:00?
original_query: SELECT T2.Segment FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.date = '2012-08-23' AND T1.time = '21:20:00'

question: Please list the chains of the gas stations with transactions in euro.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.ChainID FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN gasstations AS T3 ON T1.GasStationID = T3.GasStationID WHERE T2.Currency = 'EUR'

question: What is the biggest monthly consumption of the customers who use euro as their currency?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Consumption) / 12 AS MonthlyConsumption FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY MonthlyConsumption DESC LIMIT 1

question: Determine Disney's total box office gross between 2010 and 2016.
original_query: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM revenue WHERE `Year` BETWEEN 2010 AND 2016

question: What are the total grosses for the movies with Jim Cummings as the voice actor?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T2 ON T2.movie_title = T1.movie WHERE T1.`voice-actor` = 'Jim Cummings' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(trim(T2.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the main character of Disney's most popular adventure movie based on its inflation-adjusted gross.
original_query: SELECT T2.hero FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.genre = 'Adventure' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.inflation_adjusted_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Determine the average gross for Disney's PG-13-rated action movies.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(trim(total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL)) / COUNT(movie_title) FROM movies_total_gross WHERE MPAA_rating = 'PG-13'

question: Describe the hero, director, and the release date of Mulan.
original_query: SELECT T1.hero, T2.director, T1.release_date FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T1.movie_title = 'Mulan'

question: Among the movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman, which one of them was the most popular?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman' ORDER BY T2.total_gross DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the director of the adventure movie which was released on 2007/3/30?
original_query: SELECT T1.director FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T2 ON T2.movie_title = T1.name WHERE T2.genre = 'Adventure' AND T2.release_date = 'Mar 30, 2007'

question: What is Disney's highest grossing action movie?
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies_total_gross WHERE genre = 'Action' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(trim(total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the voice actor of the hero character from the movie The Little Mermaid?
original_query: SELECT T2.`voice-actor` FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T2.movie = T1.movie_title WHERE T1.movie_title = 'The Little Mermaid' AND T2.character = T1.hero

question: How many voice actors for the movie Aladdin?
original_query: SELECT COUNT('voice-actor') FROM `voice-actors` WHERE movie = 'Aladdin'

question: What genre of movie has Taran as the main character?
original_query: SELECT T1.genre FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title WHERE T2.hero = 'Taran'

question: Who directed the movie with the most voice actors?
original_query: SELECT T2.director, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`voice-actor`) FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.name GROUP BY T2.director ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`voice-actor`) DESC LIMIT 1

question: From 2000 to 2010, in which year did the studio entertainment segment make the most revenue?
original_query: SELECT `Year` FROM revenue WHERE `Year` BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 ORDER BY `Studio Entertainment[NI 1]` DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the names of voice actors for the characters of films directed by Wolfgang Reitherman.
original_query: SELECT T2.hero, T1.`voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.movie_title INNER JOIN director AS T3 ON T3.name = T2.movie_title WHERE T3.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'

question: Among the movies released from 2001 to 2005, list down the titles and directors of the movies which had a total gross of more than 100% above the average.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T2.director FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE SUBSTR(T1.release_date, LENGTH(T1.release_date) - 3, LENGTH(T1.release_date)) BETWEEN '2001' AND '2005' AND CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) / ( SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(trim(T3.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL)) / COUNT(T3.movie_title) AS avg_gross FROM movies_total_gross AS T3 INNER JOIN director AS T4 ON T3.movie_title = T4.name WHERE SUBSTR(T3.release_date, LENGTH(T3.release_date) - 3, LENGTH(T3.release_date)) BETWEEN '2001' AND '2005' ) - 1 > 1

question: In which segment did the Walt Disney Company earned a bigger revenue in 1998, Studio Entertainment or Disney Media Networks?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN 'Studio Entertainment[NI 1]' > 'Disney Media Networks' THEN 'Studio Entertainment[NI 1]' ELSE 'Disney Media Networks' END FROM revenue WHERE `Year` = 1998

question: What is the most popular movie directed by Ron Clements?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.movie_title WHERE T2.director = 'Ron Clements' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(total_gross, 2), ',', '') AS int) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How much is the total gross of the movie with a song titled "Little Wonders"?
original_query: SELECT T1.total_gross FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T2.movie_title = T1.movie_title WHERE T2.song = 'Little Wonders'

question: Please list the release dates of all the movies in which Alan Tudyk is a voice actor.
original_query: SELECT T2.release_date FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.`voice-actor` = 'Alan Tudyk'

question: Which director did Bill Thompson work the most with?
original_query: SELECT director FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.movie WHERE T2.`voice-actor` = 'Bill Thompson' GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(director) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which actor voices Akela from The Jungle Book?
original_query: SELECT `voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` WHERE character = 'Akela'

question: Among Frank Welker's voice-acted movies, list the movie titles and the total gross when the estimated inflation rate was less than 2.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title, T1.total_gross FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie WHERE T2.`voice-actor` = 'Frank Welker' AND CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.inflation_adjusted_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) * 1.0 / CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) * 1.0 < 2

question: List all of Wolfgang Reitherman's movies and their voice actors.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T2.`voice-actor` FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.movie WHERE T1.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'

question: Who voiced the villain in "The Rescuers"?
original_query: SELECT T1.`voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T2.movie_title = T1.movie WHERE T2.movie_title = 'The Rescuers' AND T1.character = T2.villian

question: Name the most recent movie directed by Chris Buck. Which of his movies was more successful in terms of grossing? Use the current gross for comparison.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title, MAX(T1.release_date), MAX(T1.inflation_adjusted_gross) FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T2.director = 'Chris Buck'

question: List all the voice actors in the movie directed by Ben Sharpsteen which was released on February 9, 1940.
original_query: SELECT T2.`voice-actor` FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T3 ON T1.name = T2.movie AND T2.movie = T3.movie_title WHERE T1.director = 'Ben Sharpsteen' AND T3.release_date = 'Feb 9, 1940' AND T2.`voice-actor` != 'None' GROUP BY T2.`voice-actor`

question: Please list the movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman that can be watched by the general audience.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title FROM `movies_total_gross` AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T1.MPAA_rating = 'G' AND T2.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'

question: List the movie titles and character names by Bill Thompson.
original_query: SELECT movie, character FROM `voice-actors` WHERE 'voice-actor' = 'Bill Thompson'

question: Among the movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman, how many of them are Comedies?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.name) FROM ( SELECT T2.name FROM `movies_total_gross` AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T2.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman' AND T1.genre = 'Comedy' GROUP BY T2.name ) T3

question: Name the first movie released by Disney.
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM characters ORDER BY SUBSTR(release_date, LENGTH(release_date) - 1, LENGTH(release_date)) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Among the movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman, how many of them were released in December?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_title) FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE SUBSTR(release_date, INSTR(release_date, '-') + 1, 3) = 'Dec' AND T2.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'

question: Who is the voice actor of the character "Binkie Muddlefoot"?
original_query: SELECT `voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` WHERE character = 'Binkie Muddlefoot'

question: How many movies were released between 1937 and 1950?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_title) FROM characters WHERE SUBSTR(release_date, LENGTH(release_date) - 1, LENGTH(release_date)) BETWEEN '37' AND '50'

question: Among all Disney movies directed by Gary Trousdale, determine the percentage that earned over USD100m based on actual grossing.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) > 100000000 THEN T1.movie_title ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movie_title) FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T2.director = 'Gary Trousdale'

question: Which director has made the most movies?
original_query: SELECT director, COUNT(name) FROM director GROUP BY director ORDER BY COUNT(name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: The song "Once Upon a Dream" is associated with the movie directed by whom?
original_query: SELECT T2.director FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T1.song = 'Once Upon a Dream'

question: Which of the movies directed by Ron Clements has the highest total gross?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.director = 'Ron Clements' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(trim(T2.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the characters in the PG movies?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.character FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie WHERE T1.MPAA_rating = 'PG'

question: What is the highest grossing movie without a song?
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T2.movie_title = T1.movie_title WHERE T2.song IS NULL ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(trim(T1.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the villain of the movie with Scott Weinger and Brad Kane as voice actors.
original_query: SELECT T1.villian FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie WHERE T2.`voice-actor` = 'Scott Weinger Brad Kane'

question: Who was the first ever Disney villain?
original_query: SELECT villian FROM characters ORDER BY SUBSTR(release_date, LENGTH(release_date) - 1, LENGTH(release_date)) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the movie which the song "I Thought I Lost You" is associated with.
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM characters WHERE song = 'I Thought I Lost You'

question: For the movie in which Tress MacNeille was the voice actor for its character "Hyacinth Hippo", what was the release date of that movie?
original_query: SELECT T1.release_date FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T2.movie = T1.movie_title WHERE T2.character = 'Hyacinth Hippo' AND T2.`voice-actor` = 'Tress MacNeille'

question: What movies did director Jack Kinney direct?
original_query: SELECT name FROM director WHERE director = 'Jack Kinney'

question: How many movies did Wolfgang Reitherman direct?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM director WHERE director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'

question: Please list the villains of all the movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman.
original_query: SELECT T2.villian FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman' AND T2.villian IS NOT NULL

question: The main character Elsa is voiced by which actor and who is the director of the movie?
original_query: SELECT T1.`voice-actor`, T3.director FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.movie_title INNER JOIN director AS T3 ON T2.movie_title = T3.name WHERE T2.hero = 'Elsa'

question: What is the average total gross for the movies featuring Sterling Holloway?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(trim(T2.total_gross, '$'), ',', '') AS REAL)) / COUNT(T2.movie_title) FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN movies_total_gross AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.`voice-actor` = 'Sterling Holloway'

question: List the movie titles with the voice actor Jeff Bennet
original_query: SELECT movie FROM `voice-actors` WHERE 'voice-actor' = 'Jeff Bennett'

question: Who is the voice actor for the villain of the movie "Alice in Wonderland"?
original_query: SELECT T1.`voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie = T2.movie_title WHERE T1.character LIKE '%' OR T2.villian OR '%' AND T2.movie_title = 'Alice in Wonderland'

question: Who is the villain in Little Mermaid?
original_query: SELECT villian FROM characters WHERE movie_title = 'Little Mermaid'

question: List the movie titles and associated songs directed by Ron Clements.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title, T1.song FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T2.director = 'Ron Clements'

question: Provide the title, total gross, and MPAA rating of the movie which has a hero named Elsa.
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title, T1.total_gross, T1.MPAA_rating FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title INNER JOIN director AS T3 ON T3.name = T1.movie_title WHERE T2.hero = 'Elsa'

question: Which song is associated with the most popular Disney movie in 1970s?
original_query: SELECT T2.song FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(T1.release_date, INSTR(T1.release_date, ', ') + 1) AS int) BETWEEN 1970 AND 1979 ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.total_gross, 2), ',', '') AS float) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the director of the movie in which Verna Felton was the voice actor for its character "Aunt Sarah".
original_query: SELECT T1.director FROM director AS T1 INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T2 ON T2.movie = T1.name WHERE T2.character = 'Aunt Sarah' AND T2.`voice-actor` = 'Verna Felton'

question: Name the voice actor of the character Calliope in the movie Hercules.
original_query: SELECT `voice-actor` FROM `voice-actors` WHERE movie = 'Hercules' AND character = 'Calliope'

question: Wolfgang Reitherman has directed several Disney movies, which one has the highest grossing after accounting for inflation?
original_query: SELECT T1.movie_title FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN director AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.name WHERE T2.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman' ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(inflation_adjusted_gross, 2), ',', '') AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the percentage of voice actors whose main character in the movie is in the Drama genre.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.genre = 'Drama' THEN T3.`voice-actor` ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.`voice-actor`) FROM movies_total_gross AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title INNER JOIN `voice-actors` AS T3 ON T3.movie = T1.movie_title

question: What is the essay title of the project that have the highest total price excluding optional support and who is the biggest donor? Identify the donor and calculate how many percent did he/she donated in the project.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T3.donor_acctid, CAST(T3.donation_to_project AS REAL) / T2.total_price_excluding_optional_support FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid ORDER BY T3.donation_to_project DESC LIMIT 1

question: Is the donor who donated to school "d4af834b1d3fc8061e1ee1b3f1a77b85" a teacher?
original_query: SELECT T2.is_teacher_acct FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.schoolid = 'd4af834b1d3fc8061e1ee1b3f1a77b85'

question: On how many projects where the teacher has ordered between 5 to 10 items are from are from Quill.com?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(projectid) FROM resources WHERE vendor_name = 'Quill.com' AND item_quantity BETWEEN 5 AND 10

question: Among the schools donated by donor "000eebf28658900e63b538cf8a73afbd",how many schools whose poverty level are highest?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.schoolid) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.poverty_level = 'highest poverty' AND T2.donor_acctid = '000eebf28658900e63b538cf8a73afbd'

question: Among the donations with a portion using account credits redemption, how many of them are for projects created by teachers working in a public year-round school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.projectid) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.payment_included_acct_credit = 't' AND T1.school_year_round = 't'

question: How many donors in Los Angeles donated to school in another city?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.schoolid) FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.donor_city = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.school_city NOT LIKE 'Los Angeles'

question: What is the total amount of all the donations made by the donor who made the highest donation in a single amount? Indicate the essay title to where he/she made his/her biggest donation.
original_query: SELECT T2.donation_total, T1.title FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.donation_total = ( SELECT MAX(donation_total) FROM donations )

question: From which state do the 5 biggest donor, who gave the highest cost of optional support, come from? List their donor_acctid and calculate for their average cost of optional support for every donations they make and identtify the project's type of resource to which they gave the hightest optional support.
original_query: SELECT T1.school_state, T2.donor_acctid, AVG(T2.donation_optional_support), T1.resource_type FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid ORDER BY T2.donation_optional_support DESC LIMIT 5

question: Of the projects whose resources are provided by the vendor Lakeshore Learning Materials, the school of which project has the highest cost of labor fulfillment? Please give its school ID.
original_query: SELECT T2.schoolid FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.vendor_name = 'Lakeshore Learning Materials' ORDER BY T2.fulfillment_labor_materials DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most requested item under the resource type "Supplies" for projects whose main subject area is Literacy & Language?
original_query: SELECT T1.item_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.primary_focus_area = 'Literacy & Language' AND T1.project_resource_type = 'Supplies' ORDER BY T1.item_quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many schools with the highest level of poverty have received a portion of a donation included corporate sponsored gift card?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.schoolid) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.payment_included_campaign_gift_card = 't' AND T1.poverty_level = 'highest poverty'

question: For the teacher who wrote the project 'ABC Read', which city was he/she in?
original_query: SELECT T2.school_city FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title = 'ABC Read'

question: Which item provided to a project whose main subject area is Literacy & Language has the highest unit price?
original_query: SELECT T1.item_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.primary_focus_area = 'Literacy & Language' ORDER BY T1.item_unit_price DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the prefix for the teacher who handled the 'Reading About Other Cultures' project?
original_query: SELECT T2.teacher_prefix FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Reading About Other Cultures'

question: Write down the need statement of Family History Project.
original_query: SELECT need_statement FROM essays WHERE title = 'Family History Project'

question: Which payment method is most comonly used by the schools in the state of Georgia for the payment of donations?
original_query: SELECT T1.payment_method FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.school_state = 'GA' GROUP BY T2.school_state ORDER BY COUNT(T1.payment_method) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many projects have their resources provided by the vendor Lakeshore Learning Materials and are created by a teacher with a doctor degree?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.projectid) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.vendor_name = 'Lakeshore Learning Materials' AND T2.teacher_prefix = 'Dr.'

question: What are the favorite project types of each of the top 10 donors?
original_query: SELECT project_resource_type FROM ( SELECT T1.donor_acctid, T3.project_resource_type FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN resources AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid ORDER BY T1.donation_total DESC LIMIT 10 ) GROUP BY project_resource_type ORDER BY COUNT(project_resource_type) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name all the project titles whereby project materials are intended mainly for literary.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.primary_focus_subject = 'Literacy'

question: Among all the donors from New York, how many of them are teachers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(donationid) FROM donations WHERE is_teacher_acct = 't' AND donor_city = 'New York'

question: State the short description for the project which got the donation at 14:44:29 on 2012/9/6.
original_query: SELECT T1.short_description FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.donation_timestamp LIKE '2012-09-06 14:44:29'

question: What is the total amount of donations in 2012.
original_query: SELECT SUM(donation_total) FROM donations WHERE donation_timestamp LIKE '2012%'

question: Name the project that costs the most. How much has been collected from donation and what is the percentage amount still lacking?
original_query: SELECT T1.title, SUM(T3.donation_to_project), CAST((T2.total_price_excluding_optional_support - SUM(T3.donation_to_project)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T3.donation_to_project) FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid ORDER BY T2.total_price_excluding_optional_support DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the vendors serving material for projects for grades 9-12?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.vendor_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.grade_level = 'Grades 9-12'

question: List all the items from "Sax Arts & Crafts" and the zip code of the schools that received them.
original_query: SELECT T2.school_zip, T1.item_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.vendor_name = 'Sax Arts & Crafts'

question: Which city does the school that project "iMath" donated to in?
original_query: SELECT T1.school_city FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.title LIKE 'iMath'

question: List the primary subject of all the donations with a corporate sponsored giftcard.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.primary_focus_subject FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.payment_included_campaign_gift_card = 't'

question: How many donations were paid via credit card to Memphis City School District?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.projectid) FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.payment_method = 'creditcard' AND T2.school_district = 'Memphis City School District'

question: Among the projects whose donators are teachers, what is the percentage of projects that affected more than 30 students?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.students_reached > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.projectid) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.is_teacher_acct = 't'

question: In the schools donated by the project of the resources provided by ABC School Supply, how many schools are public magnet schools?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.schoolid) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.school_magnet = 't' AND T1.vendor_name = 'ABC School Supply'

question: Which school county in the state of New York has a high number of low poverty levels?
original_query: SELECT school_county FROM projects WHERE poverty_level = 'low poverty' AND school_state = 'NY' GROUP BY school_state ORDER BY COUNT(poverty_level) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total price of items brought from ABC School Supply with a listed type of Other? Also include the list of the buyers' coordinates and school districts they belong to.
original_query: SELECT T2.item_unit_price * T2.item_quantity price, T1.school_latitude, T1.school_longitude FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN resources AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.vendor_name = 'ABC School Supply' AND T2.project_resource_type = 'Other' AND T1.school_district = 'Hillsborough Co Pub Sch Dist'

question: Give the coordinates of the buyer of R & A Plant Genetics from Benchmark Education.
original_query: SELECT T2.school_latitude, T2.school_longitude FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.item_name = 'R & A Plant Genetics' AND T1.vendor_name = 'Benchmark Education'

question: What is the total donated amount for projects created by a teacher working in a school in Brooklyn?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.donation_total) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.school_city = 'Brooklyn'

question: Please list the types of resources that the vendor Lakeshore Learning Materials has provided for the projects.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT project_resource_type FROM resources WHERE vendor_name = 'Lakeshore Learning Materials'

question: Which donor has donated the most for a project whose main subject area is Literacy & Language? Please give his or her ID.
original_query: SELECT T2.donor_acctid FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.primary_focus_area = 'Literacy & Language' ORDER BY T2.donation_total DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the school districts that have bought resources from Barnes and Noble.
original_query: SELECT T2.school_district FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.vendor_name = 'Barnes and Noble'

question: From the total amount of donation to projects, what is the percentage of the amount is for school projects located in the rural area?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.school_metro = 'rural' THEN T1.donation_to_project ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(donation_to_project) FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid

question: List the poverty level of all the schools that received donations with the zip code "7079".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.poverty_level FROM donations AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.donor_zip = 7079

question: Name the vendors who provide resources for project 'Lights, Camera, Action!'. List all the item names and unit price for each.
original_query: SELECT T1.vendor_name, T1.item_name, T1.item_unit_price FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN essays AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid WHERE T3.title = 'Lights, Camera, Action!'

question: Write the message of the donor of the project with the title of Lets Share Ideas who paid with a credit card.
original_query: SELECT T3.donation_message FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid WHERE T1.title = 'Lets Share Ideas' AND T3.payment_method = 'creditcard'

question: For what grade was the project "Too Close for Comfort" for?
original_query: SELECT T1.grade_level FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.title LIKE 'Too Close for Comfort'

question: What is the total number of projects that was created by the teachers that teach 3-5 grades in Boston Public School District?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(projectid) FROM projects WHERE school_district = 'Boston Public School District' AND grade_level = 'Grades 3-5'

question: How many teachers in Twin Falls have Math & Science as their primary focus area?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(teacher_acctid) FROM projects WHERE school_county = 'Twin Falls' AND primary_focus_area = 'Math & Science'

question: What is the title of project that have the most expensive funds?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.projectid = ( SELECT projectid FROM resources ORDER BY item_unit_price * item_quantity DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What percentage of projects in the City of Santa Barbara are in suburban metro?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN school_metro = 'suburban' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(projectid) FROM projects WHERE school_city = 'Santa Barbara'

question: Please list the resource names of project that teacher "822b7b8768c17456fdce78b65abcc18e" created.
original_query: SELECT T1.item_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.teacher_acctid = '822b7b8768c17456fdce78b65abcc18e'

question: Name the project titles created by teacher who acquired a doctor degree.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.donation_message LIKE 'Donation on behalf of Matt Carpenter because I''m a strong believer in education.'

question: Among the schools' projects whose donation didn't use account credits redemption,how many schools are public magnet schools?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.schoolid) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.school_magnet = 't' AND T2.payment_included_acct_credit = 'f'

question: Which school requested the highest amount of resources from Amazon? State the school's ID.
original_query: SELECT T2.schoolid FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.vendor_name LIKE 'Amazon' GROUP BY T2.schoolid ORDER BY COUNT(T1.vendor_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the title for the project which got the biggest donation?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.donation_total = ( SELECT MAX(donation_total) FROM donations )

question: Did the project 'I Can't See It...Can You Help Me???' get the tip for the donation?
original_query: SELECT T2.donation_included_optional_support FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'I Can''t See It...Can You Help Me???'

question: How many schools in Brooklyn with urban metro and donations for an honoree have requested TT992 - Refill Pack for Safety Name Tags as a resource?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.schoolid) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid WHERE T2.school_city = 'Brooklyn' AND T2.school_metro = 'urban' AND T3.for_honoree = 't' AND T1.item_name = 'TT992 - Refill Pack for Safety Name Tags'

question: If funded, which are the projects that could impact at least 600 students for a school with moderate level of poverty? Name the projects and state the project cost.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title, T1.total_price_excluding_optional_support FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.students_reached >= 600 AND T1.poverty_level LIKE 'moderate poverty'

question: State the name of vendor that supplies book resources to all school with literacy subject as their primary focus.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.vendor_name FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.primary_focus_subject LIKE 'Literacy'

question: For project titled 'Toot Your Flute!', what is the main subject of the project materials intended for? Name the other projects with the similar focus.
original_query: SELECT T2.primary_focus_subject FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title = 'Toot Your Flute!'

question: Who is the largest donor by amount? Give the donation id and the total amount of the donation.
original_query: SELECT donationid, donation_total FROM donations ORDER BY donation_total DESC LIMIT 1

question: What were the resources that were requested by the teacher for project "d6ef27c07c30c81f0c16c32b6acfa2ff"? Indicate the quantities as well and whether or not the teacher acquired P.h.D or doctor degree.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.item_name, T1.item_quantity, T2.teacher_prefix FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.projectid = 'd6ef27c07c30c81f0c16c32b6acfa2ff'

question: What is the total donation amount made for projects whose main subject area are Literacy & Language?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.dollar_amount) FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.primary_focus_area = 'Literacy & Language'

question: What percentage of projects that have not received a cash donation have received a portion of a donation included corporate sponsored giftcard?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_included_campaign_gift_card = 't' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(donationid) FROM donations WHERE payment_method = 'no_cash_received'

question: What is the teacher prefix for the teacher who wrote the project 'Creating Memories and Inspiring Dreams'?
original_query: SELECT T2.teacher_prefix FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Creating Memories and Inspiring Dreams%'

question: Is donor “22cbc920c9b5fa08dfb331422f5926b5” a teacher?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT is_teacher_acct FROM donations WHERE donor_acctid = '22cbc920c9b5fa08dfb331422f5926b5'

question: Show the school id for the project 'Virtual Aquarium Needs Help!'.
original_query: SELECT T2.schoolid FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Virtual Aquarium Needs Help!'

question: Please list the donation messages of the donations for the projects created by a teacher working in a public magnet school in Brooklyn.
original_query: SELECT T2.donation_message FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.school_city = 'Brooklyn' AND T1.school_magnet = 't'

question: What is the most expensive book item? Please provide a short description of projects related to those.
original_query: SELECT T1.item_name, T2.short_description FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.project_resource_type = 'Books' ORDER BY T1.item_unit_price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the total amount of donations made in 2011 for an honoree with payment via campaign page.
original_query: SELECT SUM(donation_total) FROM donations WHERE donation_timestamp LIKE '2011%' AND via_giving_page = 't' AND for_honoree = 't'

question: Where is the school that needs a "Viewscreen LCD from Texas Instruments, TI-84 Plus"? Provide the latitude and longitude of that school.
original_query: SELECT T2.school_city, T2.school_latitude, T2.school_longitude FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.item_name = 'Viewscreen LCD FROM Texas Instruments, TI-84 Plus'

question: What was the donation optional support amount for the project 'Armenian Genocide'?
original_query: SELECT T2.donation_optional_support FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Armenian Genocide'

question: Please list the titles of projects by which schools in Abington was donated.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.school_city LIKE 'Abington'

question: What are the coordinates of the school with the project "Wiping Away Bad Grades"?
original_query: SELECT T1.school_longitude, T1.school_latitude FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN essays AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.title LIKE 'Wiping Away Bad Grades'

question: List the resource types available at Sax Arts & Crafts.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT project_resource_type FROM resources WHERE vendor_name = 'Sax Arts & Crafts'

question: How many resources with a unit price less than 15 are not technology type? List them by vendor id
original_query: SELECT vendorid FROM resources WHERE project_resource_type = 'Technology' AND item_unit_price <= 15

question: Please provide the type of resource that donation "b39547f29dfc25fb13c6e9e8d940dc43" contain.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.project_resource_type FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid WHERE T3.donationid LIKE 'b39547f29dfc25fb13c6e9e8d940dc43'

question: How many number of donations did the project 'A Rug For Reaching Readers' get?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.donation_total) FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.title LIKE 'A Rug For Reaching Readers'

question: What is the average amount of resources from projects that have received donations per honoree?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.item_quantity) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN donations AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.for_honoree = 't'

question: Among the technology items, what percentage of them are from Best Buy for Business? Provide the date of the project related to those items.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.vendor_name = 'Best Buy for Business' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.projectid) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T1.project_resource_type = 'Technology' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT T1.date_posted FROM projects AS T1 INNER JOIN resources AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.vendor_name = 'Best Buy for Business' AND T2.project_resource_type = 'Technology'

question: What payment method was used for Needed Resource Materials For My Students?
original_query: SELECT T3.payment_method FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid INNER JOIN donations AS T3 ON T2.projectid = T3.projectid WHERE T1.title = 'Needed Resource Materials For My Students'

question: How many schools in urban area requested for books resources?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.schoolid) FROM resources AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.resource_type = 'Books' AND T2.school_metro = 'urban'

question: Name and describe all projects created by New York teachers.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.short_description FROM essays AS T1 INNER JOIN projects AS T2 ON T1.projectid = T2.projectid WHERE T2.teacher_ny_teaching_fellow = 't'

question: For each donation not from a teacher, state the donor account id and calculate the percentage of donation given for optional support.
original_query: SELECT donor_acctid, donation_optional_support / donation_total FROM donations WHERE is_teacher_acct = 'f'

question: How many teams that played in the 2012 season belong to any of the English divisions and what percentage play in each of the divisions?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(T1.Div) AS total FROM matchs T1 INNER JOIN divisions T2 ON T2.division = T1.Div WHERE T2.country = 'England' AND T1.season = 2012 ) AS num , CASE WHEN 1 THEN T.result END AS percentage FROM ( SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(T1.Div) / ( SELECT COUNT(T1.Div) FROM matchs T1 INNER JOIN divisions T2 ON T2.division = T1.Div WHERE T2.country = 'England' AND T1.season = 2012 ) AS result FROM matchs T1 INNER JOIN divisions T2 ON T2.division = T1.Div WHERE T2.country = 'England' AND T1.season = 2012 GROUP BY T2.division ) AS T

question: What is the name of all the teams that played in the EFL League One division?
original_query: SELECT T1.HomeTeam,T1.AwayTeam FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div=T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'EFL League One' and T1.Div = 'E2'

question: What's the name of the football division in the Netherlands?
original_query: SELECT name FROM divisions WHERE country = 'Netherlands'

question: How many matches were played in the Scottish Premiership division from 2006 to 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Div) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Scottish Premiership' AND (T1.season BETWEEN 2006 AND 2008)

question: What is the percentage whereby the away team scored 2 goals during the 2017 seasons?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FTAG = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(FTAG) AS REAL) * 100 FROM matchs WHERE season = 2017

question: How many home victories does the Bundesliga division have in more or less than the Premier League division in the 2021 season?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.name = 'Bundesliga' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.name = 'Premier League' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.season = 2021 AND T1.FTR = 'H'

question: Please list the home teams in the matches of the Bundesliga division that ended with a home victory in the 2021 season.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.HomeTeam FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.season = 2021 AND T1.FTR = 'H' AND T2.name = 'Bundesliga'

question: What is the most consecutive games tied by Ebbsfleet as an away team in the 2008 season?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM matchs WHERE season = 2008 AND AwayTeam = 'Ebbsfleet' AND FTR = 'D'

question: Which team has the most victories as the home team in matches of the Bundesliga division?
original_query: SELECT T1.HomeTeam FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Bundesliga' AND T1.FTR = 'H' GROUP BY T1.HomeTeam ORDER BY COUNT(T1.FTR) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Eredivisie teams have played in 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.HomeTeam) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Eredivisie' AND T1.season = 2008

question: What is the highest final-time score across all divisions in the 2021 season? Which team was the team that made up that score?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT MAX(MAX(FTAG), MAX(FTHG)) FROM matchs WHERE season = 2021 ) AS T1, AwayTeam FROM matchs WHERE season = 2021 AND FTHG = T1 OR FTAG = T1

question: How many matches played in the 2019 season of Scottish Championship league were ended with an equal result of 2-2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Div) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.season = 2019 AND T2.name = 'Scottish Championship' AND T1.FTAG = 2 AND T1.FTHG = 2

question: What is the name of the home team in division P1 with the highest final time goal in all seasons?
original_query: SELECT HomeTeam FROM matchs WHERE Div = 'P1' AND season = 2021 ORDER BY FTHG DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the home win ratio of the Bundesliga division in 2021?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.FTR = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.FTR) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.season = 2021 AND T2.name = 'Bundesliga'

question: When did the first match that score more than 10 goals happen?
original_query: SELECT MIN(Date) FROM matchs WHERE FTHG + FTAG > 10

question: How many times did the team Werder Bremen win as the away team in matches of the Bundesliga division?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Div) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Bundesliga' AND T1.AwayTeam = 'Werder Bremen' AND T1.FTR = 'A'

question: What percentage of all tied games did the Sassuolo team play in?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Sassuolo' OR AwayTeam = 'Sassuolo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(FTR) FROM matchs WHERE FTR = 'D'

question: Who is the winner of the game happened on 2009/10/10, between "East Fife" and "Dumbarton"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN FTR = 'H' THEN 'East Fife' ELSE 'Dumbarton' END WINNER FROM matchs WHERE Date = '2009-10-10' AND HomeTeam = 'East Fife' AND AwayTeam = 'Dumbarton'

question: For the Ligue 2 game that made the most goals, who is the winner of that game?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T1.FTR = 'H' THEN T1.HomeTeam ELSE T1.AwayTeam END WINNER FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Ligue 2' ORDER BY T1.FTAG + T1.FTHG DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the division in which Club Brugge and Genk competed on September 13, 2009?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.Date = '2009-09-13' and T1.HomeTeam = 'Club Brugge' AND T1.AwayTeam = 'Genk'

question: What was the final score for the game Bursaspor vs Denizlispor on 2009/4/26?
original_query: SELECT FTHG, FTAG FROM matchs WHERE Date = '2009-04-26' AND HomeTeam = 'Bursaspor' AND AwayTeam = 'Denizlispor'

question: Of all the teams that played as a team away against Caen in the 2010 season, which one has the highest winning percentage?
original_query: SELECT AwayTeam FROM matchs WHERE HomeTeam = 'Caen' AND season = 2010 AND FTR = 'A' GROUP BY AwayTeam ORDER BY COUNT(AwayTeam) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times did Valencia's home team win in the LaLiga division?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.HomeTeam) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'LaLiga' AND T1.HomeTeam = 'Valencia' AND T1.FTR = 'H'

question: Please provide the names of any three away teams that competed in the Italian divisions.
original_query: SELECT T1.AwayTeam FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div=T2.division WHERE T2.country = 'Italy' LIMIT 3

question: From the Spanish LaLiga division in the 2017 season, which team won the most times as a local team and by what percentage?
