original_query: SELECT T1.HomeTeam HWHT , CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.FTR = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(HomeTeam) FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'LaLiga' AND T2.country = 'Spain' AND T1.season = 2017

question: Which away team in the division of Bundesliga has the highest final time goals?
original_query: SELECT T1.AwayTeam FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div=T2.division WHERE T2.name = 'Bundesliga' ORDER BY T1.FTAG DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country did Bradford Team belongs to?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.country FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.HomeTeam = 'Bradford' OR T1.AwayTeam = 'Bradford'

question: Which division had the most games with more than 5 total field goals on 2020/2/22? Give the full name of the division?
original_query: SELECT T2.division, T2.name FROM matchs AS T1 INNER JOIN divisions AS T2 ON T1.Div = T2.division WHERE T1.Date = '2020-02-22' AND T1.FTAG + T1.FTHG > 5 ORDER BY T1.FTAG + T1.FTHG DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of matches played on 2005/07/30 belong to the F1 division?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Div = 'F1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(Div) FROM matchs WHERE Date = '2005-07-30'

question: Locate players with vision scores of 90 and above, state the country of these players.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t4.name FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id INNER JOIN Match AS t3 ON t2.player_api_id = t3.home_player_8 INNER JOIN Country AS t4 ON t3.country_id = t4.id WHERE t1.vision > 89

question: Tell the defensive work rate for Kevin Berigaud on 2013/2/22.
original_query: SELECT t2.defensive_work_rate FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-02-22' AND t1.player_name = 'Kevin Berigaud'

question: For the teams with normal build-up play dribbling class in 2014, List the names of the teams with less than average chance creation passing, in descending order of chance creation passing.
original_query: SELECT t3.team_long_name FROM Team AS t3 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t4 ON t3.team_api_id = t4.team_api_id WHERE t4.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal' AND t4.chanceCreationPassing < ( SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.chanceCreationPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 4) = '2014') ORDER BY t4.chanceCreationPassing DESC

question: Please list player names which are higher than 180.
original_query: SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE height > 180

question: What percentage is Landon Donovan's overall rating higher than Jordan Bowery on 2013/7/12?
original_query: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 - SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) LvsJ_percent FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-07-12'

question: Which teams have build up play passing more than 70? Please list their short names.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlayPassing > 70

question: Who are the players that tend to be attacking when their mates were doing attack moves? List down their name.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.attacking_work_rate = 'high'

question: List down most tallest players' name.
original_query: SELECT player_name FROM (SELECT player_name, height, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY height DESC) as rank FROM Player) WHERE rank = 1

question: Find the average number of long-shot done by Ahmed Samir Farag.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.`date`) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

question: What was the highest score of the home team in the Netherlands Eredivisie league?
original_query: SELECT MAX(t2.home_team_goal) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Netherlands Eredivisie'

question: Please name one player whose overall strength is the greatest.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.overall_rating = ( SELECT MAX(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes)

question: State the chance creation passing class for "PEC Zwolle" on 2013/9/20.
original_query: SELECT t2.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-09-20'

question: How much higher in percentage is Ariel Borysiuk's overall rating than that of Paulin Puel?
original_query: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 - SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id

question: What is the percentage of players that are under 180 cm who have an overall strength of more than 70?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t2.overall_rating > 70 THEN t1.id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t1.id) percent FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.height < 180

question: What is the name of players with the highest potential?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.potential DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the top 5 players who perform better in crossing actions? Indicate their player id.
original_query: SELECT id FROM Player_Attributes ORDER BY crossing DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the name of the football league in the country of Netherlands?
original_query: SELECT t2.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t1.name = 'Netherlands'

question: How many matches in the 2008/2009 season were held in Belgium?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t1.name = 'Belgium' AND t2.season = '2008/2009'

question: What is the average overall rating of the football player Aaron Doran?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran'

question:
How many matches in the 2015/2016 season were held in Scotland Premier League
?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.name = 'Scotland Premier League'

question: List the name of leagues in which the average goals by the home team is higher than the away team in the 2009/2010 season.
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY t1.name HAVING (CAST(SUM(t2.home_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT t2.id)) - (CAST(SUM(t2.away_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT t2.id)) > 0

question: At present, calculate for the player's age who have a sprint speed of no less than 97 between 2013 to 2015.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT DATETIME() - T2.birthday age FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t1.`date`) >= '2013' AND STRFTIME('%Y',t1.`date`) <= '2015' AND t1.sprint_speed >= 97

question: List the football team that has a build up play speed of 31, build up plan dribbling of 53, and build up play passing of 32. Only indicate the short name of the team.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlaySpeed = 31 AND t2.buildUpPlayDribbling = 53 AND t2.buildUpPlayPassing = 32

question: List the long name of teams with above-average build-up play passing in 2012.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t4.team_long_name FROM Team_Attributes AS t3 INNER JOIN Team AS t4 ON t3.team_api_id = t4.team_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t3.`date`, 1, 4) = '2012' AND t3.buildUpPlayPassing > ( SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.buildUpPlayPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t2.`date`) = '2012')

question: List the football players with a birthyear of 1970 and a birthmonth of October.
original_query: SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 7) = '1970-10'

question: What are Alexis Blin's sprint speed, agility, and acceleration scores?
original_query: SELECT sprint_speed, agility, acceleration FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id IN ( SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Alexis Blin' )

question:
What is the difference of the average ball control score between Abdou Diallo and Aaron Appindangoye
?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN t2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN t2.id ELSE NULL END) - CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN t2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN t2.id ELSE NULL END) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id

question: What is the ADO Den Haag team freedom of movement in the 1st two thirds of the pitch?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t2.buildUpPlayPositioningClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_fifa_api_id = t2.team_fifa_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag'

question: Which top 4 leagues had the most games in the 2015-2016 season?
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY t1.name ORDER BY COUNT(t2.id) DESC LIMIT 4

question: How many home team goal have been scored by Aaron Lennon?
original_query: SELECT SUM(t2.home_team_goal) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN match AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.away_player_9 WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Lennon'

question: Which home team had lost the fewest matches in the 2016 season?
original_query: SELECT teamDetails.team_long_name FROM Match AS matchData INNER JOIN Team AS teamDetails ON matchData.home_team_api_id = teamDetails.team_api_id WHERE matchData.season = '2015/2016' AND matchData.home_team_goal - matchData.away_team_goal < 0 GROUP BY matchData.home_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

question: When was the first time did Kevin Constant have his highest crossing score? Give the date.
original_query: SELECT `date` FROM ( SELECT t2.crossing, t2.`date` FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Kevin Constant' ORDER BY t2.crossing DESC) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Indicate the full names of the top 10 players with the highest number of penalties.
original_query: SELECT t2.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id ORDER BY t1.penalties DESC LIMIT 10

question: List the football teams that has a chance creation passing class of Risky. Inidcate its short name only.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.chanceCreationPassingClass = 'Risky'

question: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
original_query: SELECT teamInfo.team_long_name FROM League AS leagueData INNER JOIN Match AS matchData ON leagueData.id = matchData.league_id INNER JOIN Team AS teamInfo ON matchData.away_team_api_id = teamInfo.team_api_id WHERE leagueData.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND matchData.season = '2009/2010' AND matchData.away_team_goal - matchData.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY matchData.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the short name of the football team Queens Park Rangers?
original_query: SELECT team_short_name FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Queens Park Rangers'

question: In what country did the Poland Ekstraklasa take place?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Country WHERE id IN ( SELECT country_id FROM League WHERE name = 'Poland Ekstraklasa' )

question: List the players' api id who had the highest above average overall ratings in 2010.
original_query: SELECT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes WHERE SUBSTR(`date`, 1, 4) = '2010' ORDER BY overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the overall rating of the football player Gabriel Tamas in year 2011?
original_query: SELECT t2.overall_rating FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Gabriel Tamas' AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) = '2011'

question: What is Aaron Doran's potential score?
original_query: SELECT t2.potential FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran'

question: Please provide top five football players' IDs who are among the lowest potential players and prefer to use the right foot when attacking.
original_query: SELECT id FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'right' ORDER BY potential DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average overall rating of the players born before the year 1986?
original_query: SELECT SUM(t2.overall_rating) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t1.birthday, 1, 4) < '1986'

question: When is the birthday of the football player who has the highest overall rating?
original_query: SELECT t1.birthday FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: List out of players whose preferred foot is left.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.preferred_foot = 'left'

question: Please list the names of the players whose volley score and dribbling score are over 70.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.volleys > 70 AND t2.dribbling > 70

question: State the name of the most strongest player.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.overall_rating = (SELECT MAX(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes)

question: Which country is the Belgium Jupiler League from?
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t2.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'

question: Which country is the league Italy Serie A from?
original_query: SELECT t1.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t2.name = 'Italy Serie A'

question: In the 2015–2016 season, how many games were played in the Italian Serie A league?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Italy Serie A' AND t2.season = '2015/2016'

question: What was the final score for the match on September 24, 2008, in the Belgian Jupiler League between the home team and the away team?
original_query: SELECT t2.home_team_goal, t2.away_team_goal FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League' AND t2.`date` LIKE '2008-09-24%'

question: Which player is older, Aaron Lennon or Abdelaziz Barrada?
original_query: SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE player_name IN ('Aaron Lennon', 'Abdelaziz Barrada') ORDER BY birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: For the players who had a 77 points overall rating on 2016/6/23, who was the oldest? Give the name of the player.
original_query: SELECT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2016-06-23' AND t2.overall_rating = 77 ORDER BY t1.birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is Ajax's highest chance creation passing score and what is it classified as?
original_query: SELECT t2.chanceCreationPassing, t2.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'Ajax' ORDER BY t2.chanceCreationPassing DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please provide the full name of the away team that scored the most goals.
original_query: SELECT t2.team_long_name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.away_team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.away_team_goal DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average heights of Italy players?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.height) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.country_id = T3.ID WHERE T3.NAME = 'Italy'

question: Among the players whose height is over 180, how many of them have a volley score of over 70?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.height > 180 AND t2.volleys > 70

question: Which player has the strongest overall strength?
original_query: SELECT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the short name of team who played safe while creating chance of passing?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.chanceCreationPassingClass = 'Safe'

question: Among the players born before the year 1986, how many of them would remain in his position and defense while the team attacked?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.player_name) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t1.birthday) < '1986' AND t2.defensive_work_rate = 'high'

question: What's the long name for the team GEN?
original_query: SELECT team_long_name FROM Team WHERE team_short_name = 'GEN'

question: What is the highest overall rating received by Dorlan Pabon?
original_query: SELECT MAX(t2.overall_rating) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Dorlan Pabon'

question: What is the average height of players born between 1990 and 1995?
original_query: SELECT SUM(height) / COUNT(id) FROM Player WHERE SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1995'

question: Calculate the average home team goal in the 2010/2011 season in the country of Poland.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.home_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t1.name = 'Poland' AND t2.season = '2010/2011'

question: How was Francesco Migliore's attacking work rate on 2015/5/1?
original_query: SELECT t2.attacking_work_rate FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.`date` LIKE '2015-05-01%' AND t1.player_name = 'Francesco Migliore'

question: List down the name of players who are 35 years old and above.
original_query: SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE CAST((JULIANDAY('now') - JULIANDAY(birthday)) AS REAL) / 365 >= 35

question: What is the average loan amount by male borrowers?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T4.amount) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M'

question: How many accounts in Beroun were opened after 1996?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) > '1996' AND T2.A2 = 'Beroun'

question: The average unemployment ratio of 1995 and 1996, which one has higher percentage?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT IIF(AVG(A13) > AVG(A12), '1996', '1995') FROM district

question: How many accounts who have region in Prague are eligible for loans?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A3 = 'Prague'

question: List out the account numbers of clients who are youngest and have highest average salary?
original_query: SELECT T1.account_id  FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 on T4.district_id = T1.district_id WHERE T2.client_id = ( SELECT client_id FROM client ORDER BY birth_date DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY T4.A11, T1.account_id

question: Between 1/1/1995 and 12/31/1997, how many loans in the amount of at least 250,000 per account that chose monthly statement issuance were approved?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T2.amount >= 250000

question: Which client issued his/her card in 1994/3/3, give his/her client id.
original_query: SELECT T2.client_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T3.issued = '1994-03-03'

question: How many customers who choose statement of weekly issuance are Owner?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.type = 'OWNER' AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

question: Please provide a list of clients who were born between 1983 and 1987 and whose account branch is in East Bohemia, along with their IDs.
original_query: SELECT T1.client_id, T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id and T4.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'east Bohemia' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date) BETWEEN '1983' AND '1987'

question: What was the difference in the number of crimes committed in East and North Bohemia in 1996?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(A3 = 'east Bohemia', A16, 0)) - SUM(IIF(A3 = 'north Bohemia', A16, 0)) FROM district

question: How many of the account holders in South Bohemia still do not own credit cards?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND T3.type != 'OWNER'

question: What was the growth rate of the total amount of loans across all accounts for a male client between 1996 and 1997?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T4.gender = 'M' AND T3.type = 'OWNER'

question: Which are the top ten withdrawals (non-credit card) by district names for the month of January 1996?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T3.date LIKE '1996-01%' ORDER BY A2 ASC LIMIT 10

question: How many owner and disponent dispositions are there from account number 1 to account number 10?
original_query: SELECT SUM(type = 'OWNER') , SUM(type = 'DISPONENT') FROM disp WHERE account_id BETWEEN 1 AND 10

question: List all the withdrawals in cash transactions that the client with the id 3356 makes.
original_query: SELECT T4.trans_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 3356 AND T4.operation = 'VYBER'

question: For loans contracts which are still running where client are in debt, list the district of the and the state the percentage unemployment rate increment from year 1995 to 1996.
original_query: SELECT CAST((T3.A13 - T3.A12) AS REAL) * 100 / T3.A12 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'

question: What is the disposition id of the client who made 5100 USD transaction in 1998/9/2?
original_query: SELECT T1.disp_id FROM disp AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.date='1997-08-20' AND T3.amount = 5100

question: How many of the accounts are from Jesenik district?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A2 = 'Jesenik'

question: List the loan ID, district and average salary for loan with duration of 60 months.
original_query: SELECT T3.loan_id, T2.A2, T2.A11 FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN loan AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.duration = 60

question: For the client whose loan was approved first in 1993/7/5, what is the increase rate of his/her account balance from 1993/3/22 to 1998/12/27?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1998-12-27', T3.balance, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1993-03-22', T3.balance, 0))) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1993-03-22', T3.balance, 0)) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.date = '1993-07-05'

question: What is the district Id of the account that placed the order with the id 33333?
original_query: SELECT T3.district_id FROM `order` AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.order_id = 33333

question: How many 'classic' cards are eligible for loan?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.card_id) FROM card AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'classic' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

question: State different accounts who have account opening date before 1997 and own an amount of money greater than 3000USD
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.account_id FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) < '1997' AND T1.amount > 3000

question: What is the sum that client number 4's account has following transaction 851? Who owns this account, a man or a woman?
original_query: SELECT T4.balance, T1.gender FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id =T3.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 4 AND T4.trans_id = 851

question: How much, in total, did client number 617 pay for all of the transactions in 1998?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.amount) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T4.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T3.date)= '1998' AND T1.client_id = 617

question: List out the no. of districts that have female average salary is more than 6000 but less than 10000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.district_id)  FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.A11 BETWEEN 6000 AND 10000

question: What is the average amount of loan which are still on running contract with statement issuance after each transaction?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.amount) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

question: After making a credit card withdrawal, how many account/s with monthly issuance has a negative balance?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.balance < 0 AND T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'

question: Among the accounts who have loan validity more than 24 months, list out the accounts that have the lowest approved amount and have account opening date before 1997.
original_query: SELECT T1.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.duration > 24 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) < '1997' ORDER BY T1.amount ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many accounts are there in the district of "Pisek"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'Pisek'

question: There was a loan approved in 1994/8/25, where was that account opened, give the district Id of the branch.
original_query: SELECT T1.district_id FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.date = '1994-08-25'

question: Who is the owner of the account with the largest loan amount?
original_query: SELECT T1.client_id FROM disp AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.type = 'OWNER' ORDER BY T2.amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: List out the accounts who have the earliest trading date in 1995 ?
original_query: SELECT account_id FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '1995' ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of loan amount that has been fully paid with no issue.
original_query: SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / SUM(amount) FROM loan

question: For the branch which located in the south Bohemia with biggest number of inhabitants, what is the percentage of the male clients?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.gender = 'M') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'south Bohemia' GROUP BY T2.A4 ORDER BY T2.A4 DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who placed the order with the id 32423?
original_query: SELECT T3.client_id FROM `order` AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T4.account_id = T2.account_id  INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.order_id = 32423

question: For the client who applied 98832 USD loan in 1996/1/3, when was his/her birthday?
original_query: SELECT T4.birth_date FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T1.date = '1996-01-03' AND T1.amount = 98832

question: List account ID and account opening date for accounts from 'Prachatice'.
original_query: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.date FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'Prachatice'

question: Please list the account types that are not eligible for loans, and the average income of residents in the district where the account is located exceeds $8000 but is no more than $9000.
original_query: SELECT T3.type FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type != 'OWNER' AND T1.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000

question: Who are the account holder identification numbers whose who have transactions on the credit card with the amount is less than the average, in 1998?
original_query: SELECT T1.account_id FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1998' AND T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND T1.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '1998')

question: How many percent of 'Gold' cards were issued prior to 1998?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(type = 'gold' AND STRFTIME('%Y', issued) < '1998') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(card_id) FROM card

question: What is the amount of debt that client number 992 has, and how is this client doing with payments?
original_query: SELECT T4.amount, T4.status FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 on T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 992

question: How many clients opened their accounts in Jesenik branch were women?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.A2 = 'Jesenik'

question: For accounts in 1993 with statement issued after transaction, list the account ID, district name and district region.
original_query: SELECT T1.account_id, T2.A2, T2.A3 FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date)= '1993'

question: Which district has highest active loan?
original_query: SELECT T2.A3 FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN loan AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.status IN ('C', 'D') GROUP BY T2.A3 ORDER BY SUM(T3.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the number of committed crimes in 1995 in the district of the account with the id 532?
original_query: SELECT T1.A15 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN `account` AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.account_id = 532

question: Name the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and have lowest average salary?
original_query: SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id AND T4.account_id = T3.account_id  WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T2.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the accounts whose district is Tabor that are eligible for loans.
original_query: SELECT T2.account_id FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'OWNER' AND T1.A2 = 'Tabor'

question: How many high-level credit cards have "OWNER" type of disposition?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.card_id) FROM card AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

question: For the female client who was born in 1976/1/29, which district did she opened her account?
original_query: SELECT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.birth_date = '1976-01-29' AND T2.gender = 'F'

question: Which district has the most accounts with loan contracts finished with no problems?
original_query: SELECT T1.A2 FROM District AS T1 INNER JOIN Account AS T2 ON T1.District_id = T2.District_id INNER JOIN Loan AS T3 ON T2.Account_id = T3.Account_id WHERE T3.status = 'A' GROUP BY T1.District_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Account_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the account IDs with monthly issuance of statements.
original_query: SELECT account_id FROM account WHERE Frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'

question: Provide the IDs and age of the client with high level credit card, which is eligible for loans.
original_query: SELECT T1.client_id, STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T3.birth_date) FROM disp AS T1 INNER JOIN card AS T2 ON T2.disp_id = T1.disp_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T2.type = 'gold' AND T1.type = 'OWNER'

question: Between 2014 to 2016, what is the average inpsection score of the establishment owned by Yiu Tim Chan in 808 Pacific Ave, San Francisco?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.score) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) BETWEEN '2014' AND '2016' AND T2.owner_name = 'Yiu Tim Chan' AND T2.address = '808 Pacific Ave' AND T2.city = 'San Francisco'

question: List down the eateries' IDs with structural inspection type in February 2016.
original_query: SELECT business_id FROM inspections WHERE type = 'Structural Inspection' AND `date` LIKE '2016-02%'

question: Among the violations in 2016, how many of them have unscheduled inspections?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2016' AND T2.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled'

question: Please list the names of the restaurants that had a low risk violation in inspections in 2014.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2014' AND T1.risk_category = 'Low Risk'

question: How many eateries had low risk for violation with unpermitted food facility description?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT business_id) FROM violations WHERE risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND description = 'Unpermitted food facility'

question: What is the name of the establishment with the highest number of low risk violations in 2014?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2014' AND T1.risk_category = 'Low Risk' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the routine inspections of Tiramisu Kitchen, how many of them have a score of over 70?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.name = 'Tiramisu Kitchen' AND T1.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND T1.score > 70

question: What is the total number of businesses with a tax code H25?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(tax_code) FROM businesses WHERE tax_code = 'H25'

question: What was the inspection type when El Aji Peruvian Restaurant got highest inspection score?
original_query: SELECT T1.type FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.name = 'El Aji Peruvian Restaurant' ORDER BY T1.score DESC LIMIT 1

question: In businesses that violates 103157 on May 27, 2016 , what is the name of the business that has an unscheduled inspection?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN businesses AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.`date` = '2016-05-27' AND T1.violation_type_id = 103157 AND T2.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled'

question: Which establishment has the highest number of inspections done? Give the name of the establishment and calculate for its average score per inspection.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, AVG(T1.score) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many of the businesses are located at 1825 POST St #223, San Francisco?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM businesses WHERE address = '1825 POST St #223' AND city = 'SAN FRANCISCO'

question: Among the establishments with a postal code of 94102, how many establishments have a score of 90 or more in 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.business_id) FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN inspections AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2015' AND T2.postal_code = '94102' AND T3.score > 90

question: How many unscheduled routine inspections did "Soma Restaurant And Bar" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.business_id) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.name = 'Soma Restaurant And Bar' AND T1.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled'

question: Mention the violation type ID and description of high risk category for STARBUCKS.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.violation_type_id, T1.description FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.name = 'STARBUCKS' AND T1.risk_category = 'High Risk'

question: For the business whose business certificate number is 304977, how many violations did it have on 2013/10/7?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.business_id) FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.business_certificate = '304977' AND T1.`date` = '2013-10-07'

question: Among the businesses within the postal code 94117, what is total number of businesses with a high risk category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.business_id) FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.postal_code = 94117 AND T1.risk_category = 'High Risk'

question: What is the average score of the establishments owned by the owner with the highest number of establishments?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.score) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id GROUP BY T2.owner_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the description of the moderate risk violation which "Chez Fayala, Inc." had on 2016/7/1.
original_query: SELECT T1.description FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.name = 'Chez Fayala, Inc.' AND T1.`date` = '2016-07-01' AND T1.risk_category = 'Moderate Risk'

question: What was the type of inspection Tiramisu Kitchen had on 2014/1/14?
original_query: SELECT T1.type FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.`date` = '2014-01-14' AND T2.name = 'Tiramisu Kitchen'

question: Provide the name of the business which had the most number of inspections because of complaint.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.type = 'Complaint' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many eateries applied in 2012?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM businesses WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', application_date) = '2012'

question: When did eateries from San Bruno city get highest score in inspection?
original_query: SELECT T1.`date` FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.city = 'SAN BRUNO' ORDER BY T1.score DESC LIMIT 1

question: In 2016, which city has the highest number of establishments with the highest health and safety hazards?
original_query: SELECT T2.city FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2016' AND T1.risk_category = 'High Risk' GROUP BY T2.city ORDER BY COUNT(T2.city) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the owner's name of the of the business that violates 103156 on June 12, 2014?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.owner_name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.violation_type_id = 103156 AND T1.`date` = '2014-06-12'

question: In 2013, what are the names of the establishments with contaminated or adulterated food?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`date`) = '2013' AND T1.description = 'Contaminated or adulterated food'

question: Describe the violation dates, risk categories, descriptions and names of the eateries under Jade Chocolates LLC.
original_query: SELECT T1.`date`, T1.risk_category, T1.description, T2.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.owner_name = 'Jade Chocolates LLC'

question: Give the address of the business with the most number of the low risk violations.
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.risk_category = 'Low Risk' GROUP BY T2.address ORDER BY COUNT(T1.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the inspection dates, scores and inspection types for the eateries with tax code AA.
original_query: SELECT T1.`date`, T1.score, T1.type FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.tax_code = 'AA'

question: Which business had the most number of high risk violations? Give the name of the business.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.risk_category = 'High Risk' GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of the violations for "Melody Lounge" are moderate risks?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.risk_category = 'Moderate Risk' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM businesses AS T1 INNER JOIN violations AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.name = 'Melody Lounge'

question: List the tax code and inspection type of the business named "Rue Lepic".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.tax_code, T2.type FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN businesses AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T3.name = 'Rue Lepic'

question: How many establishments have an inspection score of no more than 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT business_id) FROM inspections WHERE score < 50

question: How many restaurants have met all requirements in the inspection?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(score) FROM inspections WHERE score = 100

question: How many establishments with the tax code H24 have complaint inspections of 5 or more?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.business_id FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.tax_code = 'H24' AND T1.type = 'Complaint' GROUP BY T1.business_id HAVING COUNT(T1.business_id) > 5 ) T3

question: Who were the owners of eateries which had highest health hazard by improper cooking time or temperatures?
original_query: SELECT T2.owner_name FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.risk_category = 'High Risk' AND T1.description = 'Improper cooking time or temperatures'

question: How many owners have 5 or more establishments?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.owner_name) FROM ( SELECT owner_name FROM businesses GROUP BY owner_name HAVING COUNT(owner_name) > 5 ) T1

question: What is the average score for "Chairman Bao" in all its unscheduled routine inspections?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.name = 'Chairman Bao' THEN T1.score ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' THEN T1.score ELSE 0 END) FROM inspections AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id

question: List the violation type ID of business with business ID from 30 to 50 and located at 747 IRVING St, San Francisco.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.violation_type_id FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.business_id BETWEEN 30 AND 50 AND T2.address = '747 IRVING St' AND T2.city = 'San Francisco'

question: In businesses with a score lower than 95 and located around the postal code of 94110, what is the percentage of businesses with a risk category of low risk?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.risk_category = 'Low Risk' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.risk_category) FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN businesses AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T2.score < 95 AND T3.postal_code = 94110

question: Among the businesses with score that ranges from 70 to 80, list their violation type ID and risk category.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.violation_type_id, T1.risk_category FROM violations AS T1 INNER JOIN businesses AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN inspections AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T3.score BETWEEN 70 AND 80

question: How many foodborne illness investigations were done in 2014?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM inspections WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', `date`) = '2014' AND type = 'Foodborne Illness Investigation'

question: What is the full name of the employee who was responsible for the most inspection in March 2016?
original_query: SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM ( SELECT T1.employee_id, COUNT(T1.inspection_id) FROM inspection AS T1 WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', T1.inspection_date) = '2016-03' GROUP BY T1.employee_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.inspection_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 INNER JOIN employee AS T3 ON T2.employee_id = T3.employee_id

question: Among the employees that receive a salary between $75000 to $85000, what is the difference between the number of employees which undergone an inspection that fined 100 and 500?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.fine = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T3.fine = 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T1.salary BETWEEN 75000 AND 80000

question: What is the average number of inspections did risk level 3 taverns have?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.inspection_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.risk_level = 3 AND T1.facility_type = 'TAVERN'

question: State the name of dbas with verified quality.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.results LIKE '%Pass%'

question: Among the facilities that have undergone at least one inspection in 2010, how many of them are in ward no.42?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.license_no) FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN establishment AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.inspection_date) = '2010' AND T2.ward = 42

question: What is the percentage of establishments with a risk level of 1 among all of the establishments that passed the inspection?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.risk_level = 1 THEN T1.license_no END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.results = 'Pass'

question: Name the food businesses that passed the inspection in 2010.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.inspection_date) = '2010' AND T2.results = 'Pass' AND T1.facility_type = 'Liquor'

question: Provide the fine paid and the complete address of the establishment with inspection ID 48216.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.fine, T1.state, T1.city, T1.address FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 48216

question: How many employees are under Gregory Cardenas?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.employee_id) FROM employee AS T1 WHERE T1.supervisor = ( SELECT employee_id FROM employee WHERE first_name = 'Gregory' AND last_name = 'Cardenas' )

question: Which establishments did Joshua Rosa inspect?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.dba_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id INNER JOIN establishment AS T3 ON T2.license_no = T3.license_no WHERE T1.first_name = 'Joshua' AND T1.last_name = 'Rosa'

question: What is the title of the employee that inspected the establishment with license number 1576687?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.license_no = 1576687

question: Among the facilities that had undergone at least one inspection in 2010, how many of them have the most serious food safety issues?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.license_no) FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN establishment AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.inspection_date) = '2010' AND T2.risk_level = 3

question: What is the inspection ID of the inspection with critical point level, $500 fine, and inspector comment "CDI ON 5-17-10"?
original_query: SELECT T2.inspection_id FROM inspection_point AS T1 INNER JOIN violation AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id WHERE T2.fine = 500 AND T1.point_level = 'Critical' AND T2.inspector_comment = 'CDI ON 5-17-10'

question: What are the comments of the inspector during the inspection of Taqueria La Fiesta on 1/25/2010?
original_query: SELECT T3.inspector_comment FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T2.inspection_date = '2010-01-25' AND T1.dba_name = 'TAQUERIA LA FIESTA'

question: How many inspections done in 2010 had serious food safety issue?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.inspection_id) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.inspection_date) = '2010' AND T1.risk_level = 3

question: Among the establishments that paid a 500 fine, what is the percentage of restaurants?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant' THEN T1.license_no END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.facility_type) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T3.fine = 500

question: What are the inspection description and inspector's comments in the inspection ID 164795?
original_query: SELECT T1.Description, T2.inspector_comment FROM inspection_point AS T1 INNER JOIN violation AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 44247

question: Provide the names and locations of the facilities that failed inspections on 29th July 2013.
original_query: SELECT T2.dba_name, T2.longitude, T2.latitude FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN establishment AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.inspection_date = '2013-07-29' AND T1.results = 'Fail'

question: Out of all the short form complaint inspections done by David Hodges, how many businesses passed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.license_no) FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'David' AND T1.last_name = 'Hodges' AND T1.employee_id = 153225 AND T2.inspection_type = 'Short Form Complaint' AND T2.results = 'Pass'

question: When did Wing Hung Chop Suey Restaurant have its first inspection?
original_query: SELECT MIN(T2.inspection_date) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.aka_name = 'WING HUNG CHOP SUEY RESTAURANT'

question: How many inspections did All Style Buffet Restaurant have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.inspection_id) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant' AND T1.dba_name = 'All Style Buffet'

question: What is the result of the February 24, 2010 inspection involving the employee named "Arnold Holder"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.results FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_date = '2010-02-24' AND T1.first_name = 'Arnold' AND T1.last_name = 'Holder'

question: Tell the address of employee who did inspection ID 52238?
original_query: SELECT T1.address FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 52238

question: How many sanitarian employees in Chicago are from the zip code 60617?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(employee_id) FROM employee WHERE zip = '60617'

question: Among the establishments that failed in the inspection, what is the percentage of establishments with the highest risk level?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.risk_level = 3 THEN T1.license_no END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.risk_level) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.results = 'Fail'

question: List point level of inspections with no fine.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.point_level FROM inspection_point AS T1 INNER JOIN violation AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id WHERE T2.fine = 0

question: Give the address of the schools that passed the inspection in March 2010.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.address FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', T2.inspection_date) = '2010-03' AND T2.results = 'Pass' AND T1.facility_type = 'School'

question: State the salary of the employee who did the most inspections.
original_query: SELECT T1.salary FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T.employee_id, COUNT(T.inspection_id) FROM inspection AS T GROUP BY T.employee_id ORDER BY COUNT(T.inspection_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id

question: What is the title of the employee involved in inspection ID 60332?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 60332

question: Name the taverns that failed the inspection in January 2010.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', T2.inspection_date) = '2010-01' AND T2.results = 'Fail' AND T1.facility_type = 'TAVERN'

question: List down the dba name of restaurants that were inspected due to license.
original_query: SELECT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.inspection_type = 'License'

question: List the full names of the employees who were responsible for inspecting Taqueria La Paz.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN employee AS T3 ON T2.employee_id = T3.employee_id WHERE T1.dba_name = 'TAQUERIA LA PAZ'

question: How many grocery stores paid $250 fine upon their inspection?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T1.facility_type = 'Grocery Store' AND T3.fine = 250

question: Please list the full names of all the sanitarians who have inspected the facility Burbank.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id INNER JOIN establishment AS T3 ON T2.license_no = T3.license_no WHERE T3.dba_name = 'Burbank' AND T1.title = 'Sanitarian'

question: Among the list of employees, what is the total number of supervisors?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(employee_id) FROM employee WHERE title = 'Supervisor'

question: For the grocery store located at "3635 W DIVERSEY AVE", how many inspections did it have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.inspection_id) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.address = '3635 W DIVERSEY AVE ' AND T1.facility_type = 'Grocery Store'

question: List down the phone numbers of employees who did Canvass inspection.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.phone FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_type = 'Canvass'

question: Compare the number of inspections under toxic items and no-smoking regulations.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.category = 'Toxic Items' THEN T1.inspection_id END) AS Tox_nums , COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.category = 'No Smoking Regulations' THEN T1.inspection_id END) AS NosmoNums FROM violation AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection_point AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id

question: How many restaurants failed the inspection in April 2010?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', T2.inspection_date) = '2010-04' AND T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant' AND T2.results = 'Fail'

question: What is the precise location of the establishment with the highest number of failed inspections?
original_query: SELECT T1.latitude, T1.longitude FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT license_no FROM inspection WHERE results = 'Fail' GROUP BY license_no ORDER BY COUNT(results) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no

question: Please list the names of taverns that paid a $100 fine upon inspection.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T1.facility_type = 'Tavern' AND T3.fine = 100

question: How many employees are living in Hoffman Estates, IL?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(employee_id) FROM employee WHERE state = 'IL' AND city = 'Hoffman Estates'

question: Where in Chicago does the restaurant named "Old Timers Rest & Lounge" located?
original_query: SELECT address FROM establishment WHERE city = 'CHICAGO' AND dba_name = 'OLD TIMERS REST & LOUNGE' AND facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: For the sanitarian who lives on 5000 N Wolcott Ave, how many establishments did he/she inspect in the May of 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.inspection_id) FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.address = '5000 N Wolcott Ave' AND T2.title = 'Sanitarian' AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.inspection_date) = '2011-05'

question: How many establishments that are doing business as Homemade Pizza have a risk level of 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(license_no) FROM establishment WHERE risk_level = 2 AND dba_name = 'HOMEMADE PIZZA'

question: What is the full name of the sanitarian who inspected Amundsen High School on 2010/5/11?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id INNER JOIN establishment AS T3 ON T2.license_no = T3.license_no WHERE T2.inspection_date = '2010-05-11' AND T3.dba_name = 'AMUNDSEN HIGH SCHOOL' AND T1.title = 'Sanitarian'

question: Who is the employee that receives 82700 as their salary?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM employee WHERE salary = 82700

question: What is the restaurant's name at "41.9532864854" latitude and "-87.7673790701422" longitude?
original_query: SELECT dba_name FROM establishment WHERE latitude = 41.9532864854 AND longitude = -87.7673790701422 AND facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: How much salary does Jessica Anthony receive?
original_query: SELECT salary FROM employee WHERE first_name = 'Jessica' AND last_name = 'Anthony'

question: Calculate the total salary for employees who did inspection from ID 52270 to 52272.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.salary) FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T1.inspection_id BETWEEN 52270 AND 52272

question: List down the names of the establishments with the highest risk level and failed the inspection.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dba_name FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.risk_level = 3 AND T2.results = 'Fail'

question: How many of the inspections with serious point levels have no fines?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.inspection_id) FROM inspection_point AS T1 INNER JOIN violation AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id WHERE T1.point_level = 'Serious ' AND T2.fine = 0

question: How many inspections were done under the personnel category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.inspection_id) FROM violation AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection_point AS T2 ON T1.point_id = T2.point_id WHERE T2.category = 'Personnel'

question: What is the employee's full name involved in the canvass inspection type on March 09, 2010?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_date = '2010-03-09' AND T2.inspection_type = 'Canvass'

question: Calculate the percentage of inspections with the fine for a minor food safety problem.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fine = 100 THEN inspection_id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(inspection_id) FROM violation

question: Provide the last name of the employee involved in the inspection ID 52256.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.last_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 52256

question: Please list the full names of all the sanitarians under the supervision of Darlisha Jacobs.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM employee WHERE title = 'Sanitarian' AND supervisor = ( SELECT employee_id FROM employee WHERE first_name = 'Darlisha' AND last_name = 'Jacobs' )

question: What is the facility type of the establishment named "Kinetic Playground"?
original_query: SELECT facility_type FROM establishment WHERE dba_name = 'Kinetic Playground'

question: How much did Hacienda Los Torres from ward 36 fine for failing an inspection?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.fine) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id WHERE T1.dba_name = 'HACIENDA LOS TORRES' AND T1.ward = 36 AND T2.results = 'Fail'

question: What is the average number of inspections done by the top 5 employees with the highest salary? List the names of the said employees.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T2.inspection_id) AS REAL) / 5, T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sanitarian' ORDER BY T1.salary DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the assumed name of the business located at 2903 W Irving Park Rd?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT dba_name FROM establishment WHERE address = '2903 W IRVING PARK RD '

question: State the inspection pass rate of Pockets Restaurant.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.results = 'Pass' THEN T2.inspection_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.inspection_id) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T1.dba_name = 'POCKETS' AND T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: What is the category of the inspection of the establishment named "J & J FOOD"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T4.category FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no INNER JOIN violation AS T3 ON T2.inspection_id = T3.inspection_id INNER JOIN inspection_point AS T4 ON T3.point_id = T4.point_id WHERE T1.dba_name = 'J & J FOOD'

question: How many inspections done by Lisa Tillman ended up with the result of "Out of Business"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.inspection_id) FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Lisa' AND T2.last_name = 'Tillman' AND T1.results = 'Out of Business'

question: How many inspections failed in 2014?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(inspection_id) FROM inspection WHERE strftime('%Y', inspection_date) = '2014' AND results = 'Fail'

question: Provide the first name of employee who did inspection ID 48225?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T2.inspection_id = 48225

question: Show the phone number of the sanitarian who was responsible for inspection no.634597.
original_query: SELECT T2.phone FROM inspection AS T1 INNER JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id WHERE T1.inspection_id = 634597 AND T2.title = 'Sanitarian'

question: How many restaurants were inspected on 2015/5/8?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.inspection_date = '2015-05-08' AND T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: What is the difference in the number of restaurants that passed and failed the canvass inspection type?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.results = 'Pass' THEN T1.license_no END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.results = 'Fail' THEN T1.license_no END) AS diff FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.inspection_type = 'Canvass' AND T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: Which establishments did Bob Benson inspect in 2010 and what was the results?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.dba_name, T2.results FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id INNER JOIN establishment AS T3 ON T2.license_no = T3.license_no WHERE T1.first_name = 'Bob' AND T1.last_name = 'Benson' AND strftime('%Y', T2.inspection_date) = '2010'

question: Which country is the oldest driver from?
original_query: SELECT nationality FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the location coordinates of the US circuits.
original_query: SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE country = 'USA'

question: Please list the constructor names with 0 points at race 291.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM constructorStandings AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.points = 0 AND T1.raceId = 291

question: On what year did the youngest driver had his first qualifying race? Also state the name, date and time of the race.
original_query: SELECT T3.year, T3.name, T3.date, T3.time FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 on T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM drivers ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY T3.date ASC LIMIT 1

question: In the race No. 45, for the driver who had the Q3 time as 0:01:33, what is his abbreviated code?
original_query: SELECT T2.code FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 45 AND T1.q3 LIKE '1:33%'

question: In which country was the first European Grand Prix hosted? Name the circuit and location.
original_query: SELECT T1.country, T1.location FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'European Grand Prix' ORDER BY T2.year ASC LIMIT 1

question: What was Lewis Hamilton's final rank in the 2008 Chinese Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT T2.positionOrder FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T1.year = 2008

question: List all races in 2017 and the hosting country order by date of the event.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name, T1.country FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2017 ORDER BY T2.date ASC

question: What is the website of the constructor who tallied the most total wins.
original_query: SELECT T1.url FROM constructors AS T1 INNER JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId ORDER BY T2.wins DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which of these circuits is located at a higher latitude, Silverstone Circuit, Hockenheimring or Hungaroring?
original_query: SELECT name FROM circuits WHERE name IN ('Silverstone Circuit', 'Hockenheimring', 'Hungaroring') ORDER BY lat DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list all the years that Silverstone Circuit was used in a Formula_1 race.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.year FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Silverstone Circuit'

question: What's Bruno Senna's Q1 result in the qualifying race No. 354?
original_query: SELECT T1.q1 FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 354 AND T2.forename = 'Bruno' AND T2.surname = 'Senna'

question: In which race did the fastest 1st lap time was recorded? Please indicate the time in milliseconds.
original_query: SELECT T1.milliseconds FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.lap = 1 ORDER BY T1.time LIMIT 1

question: How many drivers from the UN participated in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.nationality = 'British' AND T3.year = 2008

question: For the drivers who took part in the race in 1983/7/16, what's their race completion rate?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN T2.driverId END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16'

question: Please list the exact dates on which a Formula_1 race took place on the Barcelona-Catalunya circuit.
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya'

question: Please list the location coordinates of the circuits whose lap record is 1:29.488.
original_query: SELECT T3.lat, T3.lng FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T1.time = '1:29.488'

question: For all the drivers who finished the game in race No. 592, who is the oldest?
original_query: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 592 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL AND T1.dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.dob ASC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the season page of year when the race No. 901 took place.
original_query: SELECT T2.url FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN seasons AS T2 ON T2.year = T1.year WHERE T1.raceId = 901

question: How many times did Michael Schumacher won from races hosted in Sepang International Circuit?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.wins) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T4 ON T4.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T1.forename = 'Michael' AND T1.surname = 'Schumacher' AND T4.name = 'Sepang International Circuit'

question: How many seasons has Silverstone Circuit hosted the United Kindom grand prix?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.circuitid) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Silverstone Circuit' AND T2.name = 'British Grand Prix'

question: For the Bahrain Grand Prix in 2007, how many drivers not finished the game?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.year = 2007 AND T1.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND T2.time IS NULL

question: For the constructor which got the highest point in the race No. 9 , what is its introduction website?
original_query: SELECT T2.url FROM constructorResults AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T2.constructorId = T1.constructorId WHERE T1.raceId = 9 ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is his number of the driver who finished 0:01:54 in the Q3 of qualifying race No.903?
original_query: SELECT T2.number FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 903 AND T1.q3 LIKE '1:54%'

question: How many drivers managed to finish the race in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.year = 2008 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL

question: Please list the surnames of all the Italian drivers.
original_query: SELECT surname FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Italian'

question: What was the position of the circuits during Lewis Hamilton's fastest lap in a Formula_1 race?
original_query: SELECT T1.position FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY T1.time ASC LIMIT 1

question: In terms of number of points acquired, how many victories did the driver who ranked 91st acquired?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN points = 91 THEN wins ELSE 0 END) FROM driverStandings

question: List the driver's ID of the top five driver, by descending order, the fastest time during the first lap of the race.
original_query: SELECT driverId FROM lapTimes WHERE lap = 1 ORDER BY time LIMIT 5

question: What is the average fastest lap time of the top 10 drivers in the 2006 United States Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.fastestLapTime) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.rank < 11 AND T2.year = 2006 AND T2.name = 'United States Grand Prix'

question: Please list the positions of the circuits built by the constructor Renault.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.position FROM constructorStandings AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T2.constructorId = T1.constructorId WHERE T2.name = 'Renault'

question: Which drivers who were born in 1971 and has the fastest lap time on the race? Give id and code of these drivers.
original_query: SELECT T2.driverId, T2.code FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) = '1971' AND T1.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL

question: For all the drivers who finished the game in race No. 872, who is the youngest?
original_query: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 872 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.dob DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is reference name of Robert Kubica?
original_query: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Robert' AND surname = 'Kubica'

question: Please state the reference name of the oldest German driver.
