original_query: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'German' ORDER BY JULIANDAY(dob) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Name the races in year 2017 that are not hosted in year 2000.
original_query: SELECT name FROM races WHERE year = 2017 AND name NOT IN ( SELECT name FROM races WHERE year = 2000 )

question: What time did the the 2010's Formula_1 race took place on the Abu Dhabi Circuit?
original_query: SELECT T2.date, T2.time FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2010 AND T2.name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix'

question: Paul di Resta was in the No. 853 race, what percent faster did he finish in the 853rd race than the next race for the fastest lap speed?
original_query: SELECT (SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 854, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0))) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

question: State the racing year which has the fastest lap time?
original_query: SELECT T2.year FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL

question: Which of the Italian constructor got the highest point to date? Give its introduction website?
original_query: SELECT T1.url FROM constructors AS T1 INNER JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.nationality = 'Italian' ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the actual finish time for Bruce McLaren in the race No.743?
original_query: SELECT T2.time FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 743 AND T1.forename = 'Bruce' AND T1.surname = 'McLaren'

question: What is the surname of the driver with the best lap time in race number 19 in the second qualifying period?
original_query: SELECT T2.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 19 ORDER BY T1.q2 ASC LIMIT 1

question: Name the races along with its circuit name and location for f1 races hosted in September 2005.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name, T1.name, T1.location FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2005 AND STRFTIME('%m', T2.date) = '09'

question: What is the lap record for the Austrian Grand Prix Circuit?
original_query: WITH fastest_lap_times AS ( SELECT T1.raceId, T1.fastestLapTime FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL) SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.fastestLapTime) as lap_record FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 on fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'

question: How many French drivers who obtain the laptime less than 02:00.00?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.nationality = 'French' AND (CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 7, 2) AS REAL) / 1000) < 120

question: How many driver participated in race ID number 18?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(driverId) FROM driverStandings WHERE raceId = 18

question: How many accidents did the driver who had the highest number accidents in the Canadian Grand Prix have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN status AS T3 on T1.statusId = T3.statusId WHERE T3.statusId = 3 AND T2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' GROUP BY T1.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(T1.driverId) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the reference names of the drivers who are eliminated in the first period in race number 20.
original_query: SELECT T2.driverRef FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 20 ORDER BY T1.q1 DESC LIMIT 5

question: In which Formula_1 race did Lewis Hamilton rank the highest?
original_query: SELECT name FROM races WHERE raceId IN ( SELECT raceId FROM results WHERE rank = 1 AND driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton' ) )

question: How many French constructors have a lap number of over 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.constructorId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.laps > 50 AND T2.nationality = 'French'

question: What was the longest time that Lewis Hamilton had spent at a pit stop?
original_query: SELECT T1.duration FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY T1.duration DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the race happened in 2015/11/29, how many drivers did not finish the game?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.date = '2015-11-29' AND T2.time IS NULL

question: Which driver created the fastest lap speed in a Formula_1 race? Please give both his forename and surname.
original_query: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the annual average number of races held during the first 10 years of the 21st century?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 10 FROM races WHERE date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'

question: From 2000 to 2005, what percentage of drivers who were born before 1985 and the lap numbers were over 50?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%Y', T3.dob) < '1985' AND T1.laps > 50, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 on T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T2.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005

question: Who finished second in the San Marino Grand Prix in 2006?
original_query: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.year = 2006 AND T1.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND T2.position = 2

question: Among all European Grand Prix races, what is the percentage of the races were hosted in Germany?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.country = 'Germany' THEN T2.circuitID END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.circuitId) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'European Grand Prix'

question: Which year has the lowest speed of lap time?
original_query: SELECT T2.year FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId ORDER BY T1.time DESC LIMIT 1

question: List out the Id number of races which were hold in 2009.
original_query: SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2009

question: Please give the names of the races held on the circuits in Spain.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Spain'

question: Which year was the first Singapore Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT year FROM races WHERE name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT 1

question: For the driver who set the fastest lap speed, what is his nationality?
original_query: SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many wins was achieved by the oldest racer? Indicate his/her full name.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.wins),T2.forename, T2.surname FROM driverStandings AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.dob ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is Eddie Irvine's average points scored in year 2000?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.points) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Eddie' AND T1.surname = 'Irvine' AND T3.year = 2000

question: What's the reference name of Marina Bay Street Circuit?
original_query: SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'

question: List out the code for drivers who have nationality in America.
original_query: SELECT code FROM drivers WHERE Nationality = 'American'

question: State the race and year of race in which Michael Schumacher had his fastest lap.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T1.year FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Michael' AND T3.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which top 20 driver created the shortest lap time ever record in a Formula_1 race? Please give them full names.
original_query: WITH lap_times_in_seconds AS (SELECT driverId, (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':') - 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1, INSTR(time, '.') - INSTR(time, ':') - 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1, INSTR(time, '.') - INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, '.') + 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000 ELSE 0 END) AS time_in_seconds FROM lapTimes) SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, T1.driverId FROM (SELECT driverId, MIN(time_in_seconds) AS min_time_in_seconds FROM lap_times_in_seconds GROUP BY driverId) AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T1.min_time_in_seconds ASC LIMIT 20

question: What is the lap record set by Lewis Hamilton in a Formula_1 race?
original_query: SELECT T1.time FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton'

question: What is the fastest lap number of the champion in 2009?
original_query: SELECT T1.fastestLap FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'

question: Which race was Alex Yoong in when he was in track number less than 20?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Alex' AND T3.surname = 'Yoong' AND T2.position < 20

question: Among the drivers that finished the race in the 2008 Chinese Grand Prix, how many of them have participated in Formula_1 races?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.driverId FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.driverId HAVING COUNT(T2.raceId) > 0 )

question: For the driver who had the Q2 time as 0:01:40 in the qualifying race No. 355, what is his nationality?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.nationality FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 355 AND T1.q2 LIKE '1:40%'

question: How many times the circuits were held in Austria? Please give their location and coordinates.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT location, lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE country = 'Austria'

question: How much faster in percentage is the champion than the driver who finished the race last in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
original_query: WITH time_in_seconds AS ( SELECT T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 3, 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 6) AS REAL) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 2) AS REAL) END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T2.year = 2008 ), champion_time AS ( SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1), last_driver_incremental AS ( SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) FROM time_in_seconds) ) SELECT (CAST((SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) AS REAL) * 100) / (SELECT time_seconds + (SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) FROM champion_time)

question: What is the average time in seconds of champion for each year, before year 1975?
original_query: WITH time_in_seconds AS ( SELECT T2.year, T2.raceId, T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 3, 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 6,2) AS REAL )   + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 9) AS REAL)/1000 ELSE 0 END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.time IS NOT NULL ), champion_time AS ( SELECT year, raceId, time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1 ) SELECT year, AVG(time_seconds) FROM champion_time WHERE year < 1975 GROUP BY year HAVING AVG(time_seconds) IS NOT NULL

question: Which constructor scored most points from Monaco Grand Prix between 1980 and 2010? List the score, name and nationality of this team.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.points), T2.name, T2.nationality FROM constructorResults AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceid = T1.raceid WHERE T3.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T3.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(T1.points) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the finish time for the driver who ranked second in 2008's AustChineseralian Grand Prix?
original_query: SELECT T1.time FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.rank = 2 AND T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008

question: State code numbers of top 3 yougest drivers. How many Netherlandic drivers among them?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 ORDER BY JULIANDAY(T1.dob) DESC LIMIT 3) AS T3 WHERE T3.nationality = 'Dutch'

question: State the name and date of the last round of race in year 1999.
original_query: SELECT name, date FROM races WHERE year = 1999 ORDER BY round DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the lap records for the circuits in Italy.
original_query: WITH fastest_lap_times AS (SELECT T1.raceId, T1.FastestLapTime, (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) as time_in_seconds FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ) SELECT T1.FastestLapTime as lap_record FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN (SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.time_in_seconds) as min_time_in_seconds FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 on fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T3.country = 'Italy' ) AS T4 ON (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) = T4.min_time_in_seconds LIMIT 1

question: In terms of the fastest lap time, what is the name of the race which recorded the fastest lap speed by a racer?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapTime ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name and date of birth of Austrian drivers born between 1981 and 1991?
original_query: SELECT forename, surname, dob FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Austrian' AND STRFTIME('%Y', dob) BETWEEN '1981' AND '1991'

question: What's Lewis Hamilton's reference name?
original_query: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'

question: State the driver with the most points scored. Find his full name with that points.
original_query: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname, T2.points FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the percentage whereby Hamilton was not at the 1st track of the the f1 circuit since 2010.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.position <> 1 THEN T2.position END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverStandingsId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.year >= 2010

question: Please list the Formula_1 races that Lewis Hamilton participated.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton'

question: Taking all the essential genes of the transcription factors class located in the nucleus as a reference, how many of them carry out a genetic-type interaction with another gene? List them.
original_query: SELECT T2.GeneID1 FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T1.Localization = 'nucleus' AND T1.Class = 'Transcription factors' AND T1.Essential = 'Essential' AND T2.Expression_Corr != 0

question: How many pairs of positively correlated genes are both non-essential?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.GeneID2) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T2.Expression_Corr > 0 AND T1.Essential = 'Non-Essential'

question: What kind of expression correlation occurs in physical type interacting gene pairs and what percentage of these are negatively correlated?
original_query: SELECT Expression_Corr FROM Interactions WHERE Type = 'Physical' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(SUM(Expression_Corr < 0) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Interactions WHERE Type = 'Physical'

question: Among the pairs of genes that are both located in the nucleus, what is the highest expression correlation score?
original_query: SELECT T2.Expression_Corr FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 INNER JOIN Genes AS T3 ON T3.GeneID = T2.GeneID2 WHERE T1.Localization = 'nucleus' AND T3.Localization = 'nucleus' ORDER BY T2.Expression_Corr DESC LIMIT 1

question: If a pair of genes is positively correlated, what is the possibility of it being composed of two genes both with over 10 chromosomes?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Chromosome > 10 AND T3.Chromosome > 10, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.GeneID) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 INNER JOIN Genes AS T3 ON T3.GeneID = T2.GeneID2 WHERE T2.Expression_Corr > 0

question: Please list the location of the genes that have the most chromosomes.
original_query: SELECT T2.Localization FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Classification AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID ORDER BY T1.Chromosome DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the genes with nucleic acid metabolism defects, how many of them can be found in the vacuole?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.GeneID) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Classification AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID WHERE T2.Localization = 'vacuole' AND T1.Phenotype = 'Nucleic acid metabolism defects'

question: Of the genes whose phenotype and motif are nucleic acid metabolism defects, PS00107, what percentage perform positive interaction with another gene?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Expression_Corr > 0, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.GeneID1) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T1.Phenotype = 'Nucleic acid metabolism defects' AND T1.Motif = 'PS00107'

question: Which negatively correlated, genetically interacting genes are non-essential? What percentage do they represent with respect to those that are essential?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.GeneID) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(T1.GeneID) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T2.Expression_Corr < 0 ) FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T2.Expression_Corr < 0 AND T1.Essential = 'Non-Essential'

question: Please list the motif of the genes that are located in the cytoplasm and have 7 chromosomes.
original_query: SELECT T2.GeneID1, T2.GeneID2 FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T1.Localization = 'cytoplasm' AND T1.Chromosome = 7

question: What type of interactions occurs in genes whose function is cellular transport and transport medicine and are classified as non-essential?
original_query: SELECT T2.Type FROM Genes AS T1 INNER JOIN Interactions AS T2 ON T1.GeneID = T2.GeneID1 WHERE T1.Function = 'TRANSCRIPTION' AND T1.Essential = 'Non-Essential'

question: What percentage of genes located in the cytoskeleton are of unknown class? And of these, how many are not conditional phenotypes?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Localization = 'cytoskeleton' AND Phenotype = 'Conditional phenotypes') , CAST(SUM(Localization = 'cytoskeleton') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(GeneID) FROM Genes;

question: In 2010, how many loses made by team 'BOS' and how many assists were made by the players?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.L), SUM(T2.A) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.tmID = 'BOS' AND T1.year = 2010

question: Between 1917 to 1920, what are the names of the team who ranked first in the first half of the season each year?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM TeamsHalf AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.half = 1 AND T1.rank = 1 AND T1.year BETWEEN 1917 AND 1920

question: Please list the first name of the players who are good at both left hands and right hands for goalie and have gotten in the Hall of Fame.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID WHERE T1.shootCatch IS NULL

question: Please list the names of the teams that had a tie in 1909.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T3.name FROM TeamVsTeam AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.year = T3.year AND T1.oppID = T3.tmID WHERE T1.year = 1909 AND T1.T = 1

question: Name the goaltenders who had played in both PCHA and NHL league.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.lgID IN ('PCHA', 'NHL') GROUP BY T2.playerID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.lgID) > 1

question: What is given name for player 'aebisda01'. Calculate the average time in minutes for the all his games played as goaltender.
original_query: SELECT T1.nameGiven, CAST(SUM(T2.Min) AS REAL) / SUM(T2.GP) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.playerID = 'aebisda01' GROUP BY T1.nameGiven

question: What is the average height of player who were born in 1990 and after? Compare the average height with players who were born before 1990.
original_query: SELECT AVG(IIF(birthYear < 1990, height, NULL)) - AVG(IIF(birthYear >= 1990, height, NULL)) FROM Master

question: Among the players whose short handed assists are greater or equal to 7, what is the final standing of the team with the most number of assists? Indicate the year to which the most number of assists was achieved and the name of the team.
original_query: SELECT T2.rank, T2.year, T2.name FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.SHA >= 7 ORDER BY T1.A DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the coaches who have taught teams from the NHL League, how many of them are from Canada?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.lgID = 'NHL' AND T1.birthCountry = 'Canada'

question: Please list the first names of the coaches whose team played in 1922's Stanley Cup finals.
original_query: SELECT T3.firstName FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.year = 1922

question: Calculate the total points scored by team ID ANA and list down the coashes of the team.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Pts), T1.coachID FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T2.tmID = T1.tmID WHERE T2.tmID = 'ANA' GROUP BY T1.coachID

question: How many wins did the Philadelphia Flyers have over the Boston Bruins in 1985?
original_query: SELECT T1.W FROM TeamVsTeam AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = 1985 AND T1.tmID = ( SELECT DISTINCT tmID FROM Teams WHERE name = 'Philadelphia Flyers' ) AND T1.oppID = ( SELECT DISTINCT tmID FROM Teams WHERE name = 'Boston Bruins' )

question: Who is the youngest goalie among those who had more than 150 goal againsts in 2002 season?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 2002 AND T2.GA > 150 GROUP BY T2.playerID, T1.birthYear, T1.birthMon, T1.birthMon HAVING SUM(T2.GA) ORDER BY T1.birthYear DESC, T1.birthMon DESC, SUM(T1.birthDay) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many players born in Toronto have won the All-Rookie award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.playerID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'All-Rookie' AND T1.birthCity = 'Toronto'

question: How many games did the coach who received the first-ever Second Team All-Star award play before receiving such award?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.g) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT coachID, year FROM AwardsCoaches WHERE award = 'Second Team All-Star' ORDER BY year LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID AND T1.year < T2.year

question: Among the coaches who have received an award in 1940, how many of them are born in Toronto?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year = 1940 AND T1.birthCity = 'Toronto'

question: Which year recorded the most number of goals by a player and how old was the player at the time the most number of goals was achieved by him?
original_query: SELECT T1.year, T1.year - T2.birthYear FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T1.year, T1.year - T2.birthYear ORDER BY SUM(T1.G) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Haileybury Hockey Club goalies became a hall of famer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.tmID = T3.tmID AND T1.year = T3.year WHERE T3.name = 'Haileybury Hockey Club' AND T2.hofID IS NOT NULL

question: What was the number of goals did player Id "dyeba01" make in the 1921 Stanley Cup finals?
original_query: SELECT G FROM ScoringSC WHERE playerID = 'dyeba01' AND year = 1921

question: What is the name of the team that got more wins than loses in the Stanley Cup finals in 1917?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM TeamsSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = '1917' AND T1.W > T1.L

question: For he who had the highest plus / minus on the court in the 1981 season, what's his full name?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1981 GROUP BY T2.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.`+/-`) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the coach whose team placed 4th in the 1969 game? Indicate their coachID.
original_query: SELECT T1.coachID FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = 1969 AND T2.rank = 4

question: Which team has the highest winning rate in year 2000? State the team ID and list down the birth country of it's players.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.tmID, T1.birthCountry FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN ( SELECT year, tmID FROM Teams WHERE year = 2000 ORDER BY W / (W + L) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T3 ON T2.tmID = T3.tmID AND T2.year = T3.year

question: In the history of team id NJD, which goalie saved the most goal attempts? Give his full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.tmID = 'NJD' GROUP BY T2.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.SA - T2.GA) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many coaches who have taught the Buffalo Sabres have died?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.coachID) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Buffalo Sabres' AND T3.deathYear IS NOT NULL

question: What is the full name of players origin from Finland?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT firstName, lastName FROM Master WHERE birthCountry = 'Finland'

question: What are the awards won by the coach who coached the team with the most number of victories of all time? Indicate the choach ID.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.coachID, T1.award FROM AwardsCoaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID GROUP BY T2.coachID, T1.award ORDER BY SUM(T2.w) DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the player ID of player with average height of 75.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Master GROUP BY playerID HAVING AVG(height) = 75

question: Which position has won the most awards and who is the most recent player that was awarded with an award in that position? Indicate the name of the award and the full name of the player.
original_query: SELECT T1.pos, T2.award, T1.nameGiven, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T2.coachID = T1.coachID GROUP BY T1.pos, T2.award, T1.nameGiven, T1.lastName ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award) LIMIT 1

question: Who was the most clutch player in 1986? Give his full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1986 GROUP BY T2.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.GWG) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the players played both in NHL and WHA. List the given name and first year they were in NHL and first year in WHA.
original_query: SELECT nameGiven, firstNHL, firstWHA FROM Master WHERE firstNHL IS NOT NULL AND firstWHA IS NOT NULL

question: How many teams scored against their opponent who had pulled their goalie in the year 2005?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(tmID) FROM Goalies WHERE year = 2005 AND ENG IS NULL

question: For the goalie whose legendsID is "P196402" , how many games did he play in the league?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.GP) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.legendsID = 'P196402'

question: How many goalies played for Calgary Flames?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT playerID) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.name = 'Calgary Flames'

question: In 1998, How many wins were made by team 'CAR' per game played? Who contributed the most goals? State the player ID.
original_query: SELECT CAST(T1.W AS REAL) / T1.G, T2.playerID FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.tmID = 'CAR' AND T1.year = 1998 GROUP BY T1.W / T1.G, T2.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.G) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the goalies whose weight are above 190, who had most goal againsts in 1978 season?
original_query: SELECT T1.playerID FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.year = '1978' AND T2.weight > 190 ORDER BY T1.GA DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of all the teams that have played against the Buffalo Sabres.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.name FROM TeamVsTeam AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.oppID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.year = T3.year AND T1.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T2.name = 'Buffalo Sabres'

question: List all players' given name who are good at both left and right hand and playing the forward position.
original_query: SELECT nameGiven FROM Master WHERE shootCatch IS NULL AND pos = 'F'

question: Among the players who have won the All-Rookie award, how many of them have died?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.playerID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'All-Rookie' AND T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL

question: In 1976, how many goals achieved by team 'BIR' in Division 'EW'?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.G) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.divID = 'EW' AND T1.tmID = 'BIR' AND T1.year = 1976

question: List all living goalies who have greater than 50% wins among all games played. State their last name and first name.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.playerID HAVING CAST(SUM(T2.Min) AS REAL) / SUM(T2.GP) > 0.5

question: In 1997, how many loss did the coach have who temporary coached Tampa Bay Lightning? Indicate his/her coach ID.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.l), T1.coachID FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.notes = 'interim' AND T1.year = '1997' AND T2.name = 'Tampa Bay Lightning' GROUP BY T1.coachID

question: What is the total number of game played for players from USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.GP) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthCountry = 'USA'

question: Please list the awards won by coaches who were born in 1952.
original_query: SELECT T2.award FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.birthYear = 1952

question: What is the power play percentage of the team with the least number of penalty kill chances and to which team were they playing against? Indicate whether the team lost or victorious.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.A), T2.firstName, T2.lastName FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.lgID = 'NHL' GROUP BY T2.firstName, T2.lastName ORDER BY SUM(T1.A) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many shoutouts are there in the regular season of 1977?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(year) FROM CombinedShutouts WHERE year = 1977 AND `R/P` = 'R'

question: How many hall of famers both played and coached in the league?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(playerID) FROM Master WHERE hofID IS NOT NULL AND playerID IS NOT NULL AND coachID IS NOT NULL

question: Which country is the most award-winning player from?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthCountry FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T1.birthCountry ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award) DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the nick name of the tallest player? If the player had left NHL, mention the last season he was with NHL.
original_query: SELECT nameNick, lastNHL FROM Master ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the coaches who have gotten in the Hall of Fame, how many of them have a weight of over 195?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID WHERE T1.weight > 195

question: Which team had the highest penalty kill chances in 1995, Florida Panthers, Edmonton Oilers or Los Angeles Kings?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Teams WHERE year = 1995 AND name IN ('Florida Panthers', 'Edmonton Oilers', 'Los Angeles Kings') ORDER BY PKC DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of winning rate of improvement since Alain Vigneault became the coach of Vancouver Canucks in 2006 season?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.year = 2006 THEN CAST(T1.W AS REAL) * 100 / (T1.W + T1.L) ELSE 0 END) - ( SELECT CAST(W AS REAL) * 100 / (W + L) FROM Teams WHERE year = '2005' AND name = 'Vancouver Canucks' ) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T2.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T1.name = 'Vancouver Canucks' AND T3.firstName = 'Alain' AND T3.lastName = 'Vigneault'

question: For the coach who co-coached with Dave Lewis in 1998, where was his birth place?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthCountry FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year = 1998 AND T2.notes = 'co-coach with Dave Lewis'

question: How many penalty minutes did the Montreal Canadiens have on average in the Stanley Cup Finals?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.PIM) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.PIM) FROM Teams AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.name = 'Montreal Canadiens'

question: Among the coaches who have received an award after the year 1940, how many of them have already died?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL AND T2.year > 1940

question: List all goalies from year 2000 to 2010 for team COL. State their given name, height, weight and age of today.
original_query: SELECT T1.nameGiven, T1.height , T1.weight, STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - birthYear FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.tmID = 'COL' AND T2.year >= 2000 AND T2.year <= 2010 GROUP BY T1.playerID

question: What is the position of the 9th oldest hockey player?
original_query: SELECT pos FROM Master WHERE birthYear IS NOT NULL ORDER BY birthYear, birthMon, birthDay LIMIT 8

question: Who is the youngest player who is still living. State the given name and date of birth.
original_query: SELECT nameGiven , nameGiven , birthYear, birthMon, birthDay FROM Master WHERE deathYear IS NULL ORDER BY birthYear DESC, birthMon DESC, birthday DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average winning rate of the Buffalo Sabres in 2000?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(T2.W AS REAL) / T2.G) / COUNT(T1.oppID) FROM TeamVsTeam AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T2.name = 'Buffalo Sabres' AND T1.year = 2000

question: How many years did player Id "cleghsp01" make to the Stanley Cup finals?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(year) FROM ScoringSC WHERE playerID = 'cleghsp01'

question: Please list the name of the person who was in the Hall of Fame in the year 1978.
original_query: SELECT name FROM HOF WHERE year = 1978

question: State the goalie who has the lowest percentage of goals against among all the shots against recorded. Name the players and season where he played.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE CAST(T2.GA AS REAL) / T2.SA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T2.GA AS REAL) / T2.SA LIMIT 1

question: How many players, whose shooting/catching hand is both left and right, debuted their first NHL in 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(playerID) FROM Master WHERE shootCatch IS NULL AND firstNHL = '2011'

question: In the year 2000, which team has played the most games against the Buffalo Sabres?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM TeamVsTeam AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.oppID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.year = T3.year AND T1.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T1.year = 2000 AND T2.name = 'Buffalo Sabres' GROUP BY T3.name ORDER BY SUM(T2.G) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For all players who becomes coach after retirement, state the given name of coach and which teams and years did they coach?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.nameGiven, T3.name, T3.year FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.coachID = T1.coachID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.lgID = T3.lgID WHERE T2.playerID IS NOT NULL AND T2.coachID IS NOT NULL

question: In how many games did player Id "vernomi01" end up with a tie or an overtime loss in the 1998 season?
original_query: SELECT `T/OL` FROM Goalies WHERE playerID = 'vernomi01' AND year = 1998

question: Among the teams that had more wins than loses in the year 2006, how many of them have over 100 points?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(tmID) FROM Teams WHERE year = 2006 AND W > L AND Pts > 100

question: Which is the catching hand for the goaltender who had the most shutouts in 1996?
original_query: SELECT T1.shootCatch FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1996 ORDER BY T2.SHO DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the goalie whose last name is "Young", how many teams did he play in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.tmID) FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.lastName = 'Young'

question: How many teams have the same total number of postseason wins and postseason loses?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(tmID) FROM Goalies WHERE PostW = PostL

question: Among the coaches who taught the teams in 1922's Stanley Cup finals, how many of them are from the USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.coachID) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN TeamsSC AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.year = 1922 AND T3.birthCountry = 'USA'

question: What were the penalty minutes in 1923's Stanley Cup finals of the team that ranked second in that year?
original_query: SELECT T1.PIM FROM TeamsSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = '1923' AND T2.rank = 2

question: What's the weight of the player who had the most Power Play Goals in the 21st century?
original_query: SELECT T1.weight FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Scoring AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year > 2000 GROUP BY T1.playerID, T1.weight ORDER BY SUM(T2.PPG) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the heaviest player? State player ID of 5 heaviest players.
original_query: SELECT playerID FROM Master ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Who was the latest non player/builder to become the hall of famer? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT name FROM HOF WHERE category IN ('Player', 'Builder') ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average BMI of all the coaches who have gotten in the Hall of Fame?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.weight / (T1.height * T1.height)) / COUNT(T1.coachID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID

question: How many coaches worked a temporary term in the year 2007?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(coachID) FROM Coaches WHERE year = 2007 AND notes = 'interim'

question: What is the percentage of American players among all the players who have gotten in the Hall of Fame?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.birthCountry = 'USA' THEN T1.playerID ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.playerID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN HOF AS T2 ON T1.hofID = T2.hofID

question: Which Minnesota North Stars' goalkeeper had the most Goal Againsts in his play time?
original_query: SELECT playerID FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.name = 'Minnesota North Stars' GROUP BY T1.playerID ORDER BY SUM(T1.GA) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the team which had the most postseason shutouts in 1995, how many points did they have that year?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.SHO) FROM Scoring AS T1 INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1995 GROUP BY T2.tmID ORDER BY SUM(T2.PostSHO) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In the Stanley Cup finals history, how many games did player id "broadpu01" play in 1922?
original_query: SELECT GP FROM ScoringSC WHERE playerID = 'broadpu01' AND YEAR = 1922

question: Among the coaches who have taught the Philadelphia Flyers, how many of them are born in March?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.coachID) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Philadelphia Flyers' AND T3.birthMon = 3

question: For all the referees, who became a hall of famer in the 1970s? What's his hofID?
original_query: SELECT name, hofID FROM HOF WHERE category = 'Builder' AND year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1979

question: Who are the players who were not in the Hall of Fame list.
original_query: SELECT firstName, lastName FROM Master WHERE hofID IS NULL

question: Please list the nicknames of the players who have won the All-Rookie award and are born in March.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.nameNick FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'All-Rookie' AND T1.birthMon = 3

question: Name the goalie and the season he played where he had 5% shutouts among the number of goals recorded while the goalie was on the ice.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T2.year FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT playerID, year FROM Goalies WHERE CAST(SHO AS REAL) / GA > 0.05 ) AS T2 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID

question: How old was the goaltender who scored the fewest goals while on the ice when he retired from the NHL?
original_query: SELECT T2.lastNHL - T2.birthYear FROM GoaliesSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.lastNHL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T2.lastNHL, T2.birthYear ORDER BY SUM(GA) LIMIT 1

question: Among the coaches who was never a player, who has highest percentage of game winning? Provide the given name of the coach and team he coached.
original_query: SELECT T2.nameGiven, T3.name FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T2.coachID = T1.coachID INNER JOIN Teams AS T3 ON T1.lgID = T3.lgID WHERE T1.coachID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T1.w AS REAL) / T1.g DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the team that Scotty Bowman coached in 1982, how many bench minor penalties did they have that year?
original_query: SELECT T2.BenchMinor FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T3.firstName = 'Scotty' AND T3.lastName = 'Bowman' AND T1.year = 1982

question: Which team got the most bench minor penalties in 2006?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Teams WHERE year = 2006 GROUP BY tmID, name ORDER BY CAST(SUM(BenchMinor) AS REAL) / 2 DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the people who got into the Hall of Fame after the year 1980, how many of them belong to the category of "Player"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(hofID) FROM HOF WHERE year > 1980 AND category = 'Player'

question: Among the players who died in Massachussets, how many of them have won an award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.deathState = 'MA'

question: Please list the teams that have played in 1922's Stanley Cup finals.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM TeamsSC AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = '1922'

question: Players born in which year have received the most awards in total?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthYear FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsPlayers AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T1.birthYear ORDER BY COUNT(T2.award) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many people were in the Hall of Fame's Builder category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(hofID) FROM HOF WHERE category = 'Builder'

question: Please list the awards won by coaches who taught the NHL League and have already died.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.award FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T1.deathYear IS NOT NULL AND T2.lgID = 'NHL'

question: List down the first name of coaches who still coach after year 2000.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName FROM Master AS T1 INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID WHERE T2.year > 2000

question: List down player ID of players who have passed away.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Master WHERE deathYear IS NOT NULL AND playerID IS NOT NULL

question: Among the coaches who are born in the USA, how many of them used to train the Philadelphia Flyers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.coachID) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Philadelphia Flyers' AND T3.birthCountry = 'USA'

question: Which teams had the most postseason empty net goals in 2010 season? List their team names.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T1.year = 2010 GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(PostENG) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What position did player id "hartgi01" play in his Stanley Cup finals performance?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT pos FROM ScoringSC WHERE playerID = 'hartgi01'

question: Which was the dominant hand for the goaltender who played 32 games for QUN in 1973? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.shootCatch, T2.firstName, T2.lastName FROM Goalies AS T1 INNER JOIN Master AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID AND T1.year = 1973 WHERE T1.tmID = 'QUN' AND T1.GP = 32

question: How many coaches of the Montreal Canadiens have gotten in the Hall of Fame?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hofID) FROM Coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN Teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year AND T1.tmID = T2.tmID INNER JOIN Master AS T3 ON T1.coachID = T3.coachID WHERE T2.name = 'Montreal Canadiens'

question: What is the office phone number of the location at which Sandy Adams works?
original_query: SELECT T2.officephone FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.lastname = 'Adams' AND T1.firstname = 'Sandy'

question: Among the employees working at the office in New York, how many of them have a good job performance?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.state = 'NY' AND T1.performance = 'Good'

question: How many employees are there in the "Miami" office?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.locationcity = 'Miami'

question: How many employees work as an Account Representative?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.positiontitle = 'Account Representative'

question: How much is the minimum salary given to the position with the most complex work?
original_query: SELECT minsalary FROM position ORDER BY educationrequired DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which position has the highest amount of poor performing employees?
original_query: SELECT T2.positiontitle FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.performance = 'Poor' GROUP BY T2.positiontitle ORDER BY COUNT(T2.positiontitle) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the monthly average salary of the employee with highest salary. Mention his name, position title and location city.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) / 12 AS avg, T1.firstname, T1.lastname , T2.positiontitle, T3.locationcity FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID INNER JOIN location AS T3  ON T1.locationID = T3.locationID WHERE CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) = ( SELECT MAX(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID INNER JOIN location AS T3  ON T1.locationID = T3.locationID )

question: What is the average salary of all employees with a 2 year degree position?
original_query: SELECT AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.educationrequired = '2 year degree'

question: Who is the highest paid employee in "Boston"? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.locationcity = 'Boston' ORDER BY T1.salary DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the name of the city where Jose Rodriguez works.
original_query: SELECT T2.locationcity FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Jose' AND T1.lastname = 'Rodriguez'

question: Among the employees who are Trainees, how many of them work in New York?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T3.positiontitle = 'Trainee' AND T2.state = 'NY'

question: What is the education required for David Whitehead to reach his current position?
original_query: SELECT T2.educationrequired FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'David' AND T1.lastname = 'Whitehead' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: Among the employees who work as a Trainee, how many of them have a salary of over &20,000 a year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) > 20000 AND T2.positiontitle = 'Trainee'

question: How many emplyees have a good job performance?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE performance = 'Good'

question: List the full name and social security number of the account representative with average performance.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T1.ssn FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.performance = 'Average'

question: How many male employees work at the address 450 Peachtree Rd?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.address = '450 Peachtree Rd' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: Which employee's job position requires a higher education level, Jose Rodriguez or Sandy Adams?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE (T1.lastname = 'Adams' AND T1.firstname = 'Sandy') OR (T1.lastname = 'Rodriguez' AND T1.firstname = 'Jose') ORDER BY T2.educationrequired DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the employee in “New York City” with a good performance? Give the social security number of the employee.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T1.ssn FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.locationcity = 'New York City' AND T1.performance = 'Good'

question: When was Emily Wood hired? Mention her position and salary.
original_query: SELECT T1.hiredate, T2.positiontitle, T1.salary FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Emily' AND T1.lastname = 'Wood'

question: By what percentage is the average salary of Trainees higher than the minimum salary of this postion?
original_query: SELECT 100 * (AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) - CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T2.minsalary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) / CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T2.minsalary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) AS per FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.positiontitle = 'Trainee'

question: In which city's office does Sandy Adams work at?
original_query: SELECT T2.locationcity FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T1.lastname = 'Adams' AND T1.firstname = 'Sandy'

question: Which employee has the highest salary? Please give his or her full name.
original_query: SELECT firstname, lastname FROM employee ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the max salary for 'Tracy Coulter' if he/she stays on his/her position?
original_query: SELECT T2.maxsalary FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.firstname = 'Tracy' AND T1.lastname = 'Coulter'

question: Who is the employee with the highest salary? Specify his/her full name.
original_query: SELECT firstname, lastname FROM employee WHERE CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) = ( SELECT MAX(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) FROM employee )

question: Please list the full names of the employees who are working as a Trainee.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.positiontitle = 'Trainee'

question: How much higher is James Johnson's salary from the minimum salary of his title?
original_query: SELECT CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) - CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T2.minsalary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) AS diff FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T1.lastname = 'Johnson' AND T1.firstname = 'James'

question: What is the maximum salary of position "Trainer"?
original_query: SELECT maxsalary FROM position WHERE positiontitle = 'Trainee'

question: Please list the social security numbers of the male employees with a salary of over $70,000 a year.
original_query: SELECT ssn FROM employee WHERE gender = 'M' AND CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL) > 70000

question: What is the average salary of the employees who work as a Trainee?
original_query: SELECT AVG(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.salary, 4), ',', '') AS REAL)) AS avg FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN position AS T2  ON T1.positionID = T2.positionID WHERE T2.positiontitle = 'Trainee'

question: List the full names, gender and positions who's location is in New York city.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstname, T1.lastname, T1.gender, T3.positiontitle FROM employee AS T1  INNER JOIN location AS T2  ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID INNER JOIN position AS T3  ON T3.positionID = T1.positionID WHERE T2.locationcity = 'New York City'

question: How many playoffs did Per Mars participate in?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.GP) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'Per Mars' AND T2.GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs'

question: What is the weight in kilograms of the player with the highest number of goal differential of all time?
original_query: SELECT T3.weight_in_kg FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN weight_info AS T3 ON T2.weight = T3.weight_id ORDER BY T1.PLUSMINUS DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average height in centimeter of all players who played in Acadie-Bathurst Titan during regular season.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.height_in_cm) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T3 ON T2.ELITEID = T3.ELITEID WHERE T3.TEAM = 'Acadie-Bathurst Titan' AND T3.GAMETYPE = 'Regular Season'

question: Who is the youngest player to have played during the 1997-1998 season for OHL League?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '1997-1998' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'OHL' ORDER BY T2.birthdate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who among the players in season 2000-2001 has committed the highest rule violations or penalty minutes?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' ORDER BY T1.PIM DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the players that weigh more than 90 kg, how many of them have a position of defense?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90 AND T1.position_info = 'D'

question: What is the weight in pounds of the heaviest player?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.weight_in_lbs) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id

question: Who is the most valuable player who played in the 2000-2001 season of the International league?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'International' ORDER BY T1.P DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who has played the most game plays in the 2000-2001 season of the International league?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'International' ORDER BY T1.GP DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many players were born in 1982 and have a height above 182cm?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T1.height_in_cm > 182 AND strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) = '1982'

question: Among the USA players, who has the lightest weight?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM weight_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.weight_id = T2.weight WHERE T2.nation = 'USA' ORDER BY T1.weight_in_lbs ASC LIMIT 1

question: How much taller is David Bornhammar than Pauli Levokari in centimeters?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT T2.height_in_cm FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'David Bornhammar' ) - ( SELECT T2.height_in_cm FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'Pauli Levokari' )

question: How many players who were born in 1980 weigh 185 in pounds?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM weight_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.weight_id = T2.weight WHERE T1.weight_in_lbs = 185 AND strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) = '1980'

question: Name the player who scored the most goals in a single game in the 2007-2008 season of WHL?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2007-2008' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'WHL' ORDER BY T1.G DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the players who played for Acadie-Bathurst Titan during the regular season in 1998-1999?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '1998-1999' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Regular Season' AND T1.TEAM = 'Acadie-Bathurst Titan'

question: Mention the type of game that Matthias Trattnig played.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.GAMETYPE FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Matthias Trattnig'

question: Among the players with a height of over 6'2" inches, how many of them were born in Sweden?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T2.height_in_inch > '6''2"' AND T1.nation = 'Sweden'

question: How much does David Bornhammar weigh in kilograms?
original_query: SELECT T2.weight_in_kg FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'David Bornhammar'

question: How many right-shooted players have a height of 5'7''?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T2.height_in_inch = '5''7"' AND T1.shoots = 'R'

question: What is the BMI of David Bornhammar?
original_query: SELECT CAST(T2.weight_in_kg AS REAL) / (CAST(T3.height_in_cm AS REAL) / 100 * (CAST(T3.height_in_cm AS REAL) / 100)) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id INNER JOIN height_info AS T3 ON T1.height = T3.height_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'David Bornhammar'

question: Among all players drafted by the Toronto Maple Leafs, identify the percentage who are from Eastern Europe.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN nation IN ('Belarus', 'Czech Rep.', 'Slovakia', 'Ukraine') THEN ELITEID ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo WHERE overallby = 'Toronto Maple Leafs'

question: List out the nation of players who played for the 1997-1998 season .
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.nation FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '1997-1998'

question: Indicate the height of all players from team Oshawa Generals in inches.
original_query: SELECT T3.height_in_inch FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID INNER JOIN height_info AS T3 ON T1.height = T3.height_id WHERE T2.TEAM = 'Oshawa Generals'

question: Among the players that weigh more than 90 kg, what is the name of the player that has the most attendance in the player's first 7 years of NHL career?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90 AND T1.sum_7yr_GP = ( SELECT MAX(T1.sum_7yr_GP) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90 )

question: List out the name of players who weight 190 lbs.
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_lbs = 190

question: Name the player who has the most NHL points in draft year.
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.P = ( SELECT MAX(P) FROM SeasonStatus )

question: What is the height of David Bornhammar in inches?
original_query: SELECT T2.height_in_inch FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T1.PlayerName = 'David Bornhammar'

question: Who is the most valuable player in QMJHL league during the 2004-2005 season?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON BETWEEN '2004' AND '2005' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'QMJHL' ORDER BY T1.P DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the tallest player?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id ORDER BY T2.height_in_cm DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the highest point highest point of Per Mars in the draft year?
original_query: SELECT T1.P FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.PlayerName = 'Per Mars' ORDER BY T1.P DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of Russian players who have a height of under 200 inch?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.height_in_cm < 200 AND T2.nation = 'Russia' THEN T2.ELITEID ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height

question: Among all the teams that made the playoffs in the 2007-2008 season, identify the percentage that played over 20 games.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN GP > 20 THEN TEAM ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(TEAM) FROM SeasonStatus WHERE SEASON = '2007-2008' AND GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs'

question: Among the players whose total NHL games played in their first 7 years of NHL career is no less than 500, what is the name of the player who committed the most rule violations?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.sum_7yr_GP > 500 ORDER BY T2.PIM DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the player who had the most goals for team Rimouski Oceanic in playoff.
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.TEAM = 'Rimouski Oceanic' AND T2.GAMETYPE = 'Playoffs' ORDER BY T2.G DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who has the heaviest weight?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id ORDER BY T2.weight_in_kg DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the height in centimeter of the tallest player born in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada?
original_query: SELECT T2.height_in_cm FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN height_info AS T2 ON T1.height = T2.height_id WHERE T1.birthplace = 'Edmonton, AB, CAN' ORDER BY T2.height_in_cm DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of Swedish players in playoffs games in the 1997 - 2000 season?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.nation = 'Sweden' THEN T1.ELITEID ELSE NULL END) OVER (PARTITION BY T2.SEASON) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.ELITEID) OVER (PARTITION BY T2.SEASON) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.SEASON IN ('1997-1998', '1998-1999', '1999-2000')

question: Among the players who played 72 games, how many are left-shooters?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.ELITEID) FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.GP = 72 AND T2.shoots = 'L'

question: How many players weigh more than 90 kg?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ELITEID) FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN weight_info AS T2 ON T1.weight = T2.weight_id WHERE T2.weight_in_kg > 90

question: Who is the oldest player who played for Avangard Omsk during the regular season in 2000-2001?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2000-2001' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Regular Season' AND T1.TEAM = 'Avangard Omsk' ORDER BY T2.birthdate ASC LIMIT 1

question: Who had the most assists of team Plymouth Whalers in the 1999-2000 season?
original_query: SELECT T1.PlayerName FROM PlayerInfo AS T1 INNER JOIN SeasonStatus AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T2.TEAM = 'Plymouth Whalers' AND T2.SEASON = '1999-2000' ORDER BY T2.A DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the players who played in OHL league during the regular season in 2007-2008, who is the player that attained the most number of assist?
original_query: SELECT T2.PlayerName FROM SeasonStatus AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.ELITEID = T2.ELITEID WHERE T1.SEASON = '2007-2008' AND T1.LEAGUE = 'OHL' AND T1.GAMETYPE = 'Regular Season' ORDER BY T1.A DESC LIMIT 1

question: Define the onion's bounding box on image no. 285930.
original_query: SELECT T1.X, T1.Y, T1.W, T1.H FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 285930 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'onion'

question: How many objects are there in the attribute class id with the highest number of objects?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ_att GROUP BY IMG_ID ORDER BY COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the caption for the prediction class id 12?
original_query: SELECT PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES WHERE PRED_CLASS_ID = 12

question: How many object elements can be detected on image no. 31?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(OBJ_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 31

question: How many attribute classes are there for image id 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT WHERE IMG_ID = 5

question: Name the most common predicate class of image ID 4434.
original_query: SELECT T2.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 4434 ORDER BY T2.PRED_CLASS DESC LIMIT 1

question: To which predicted relation class does the self-relation of the object sample in image no.5 belong?
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 5 AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: What are the corresponding classes for the "very large bike" attribute?
original_query: SELECT ATT_CLASS_ID FROM ATT_CLASSES WHERE ATT_CLASS = 'very large'

question: What are the width and height of the bounding box of the object with "keyboard" as their object class and (5, 647) as their coordinate?
original_query: SELECT T1.W, T1.H FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'keyboard' AND T1.X = 5 AND T1.Y = 647

question: State the width and height of the object with the class of 'van' in image 1.
original_query: SELECT T1.H, T1.W FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'van'

question: What is the relationship between object sample no. 25 and object sample no. 2 on image no. 1?
original_query: SELECT T2.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1 AND T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = 25 AND T1.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 2

question: How many self-relations are there between the object samples in image no.5?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN IMG_ID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_REL WHERE OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: List the object sample IDs of image ID 17 with coordinates (0,0).
original_query: SELECT OBJ_SAMPLE_ID FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 17 AND X = 0 AND Y = 0

question: What is the ID of the image with the most number of object samples?
original_query: SELECT IMG_ID FROM IMG_OBJ GROUP BY IMG_ID ORDER BY COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the object class of the image with a bounding (422, 63, 77, 363).
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.X = 422 AND T1.Y = 63 AND T1.W = 77 AND T1.H = 363

question: What is the average difference in the y coordinate of 2 object samples with the relation "parked on" in image no.1?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T3.Y) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.PRED_CLASS = 'parked on' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1 AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID != T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: What is the bounding box of the object sample in image no.5 that has a self-relation?
original_query: SELECT T2.X, T2.Y, T2.W, T2.H FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.IMG_ID = T2.IMG_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 5 AND T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = T1.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID

question: List all the attribute classes of the images that have a (5,5) coordinate.
original_query: SELECT T1.ATT_CLASS FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID WHERE T3.X = 5 AND T3.Y = 5

question: What colour is the van that can be spotted in image no. 1?
original_query: SELECT T4.ATT_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.ATT_CLASS_ID = T4.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'van' AND T1.IMG_ID = 1 GROUP BY T4.ATT_CLASS

question: How many images have objects with the attributes of polka dot?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'polka dot'

question: Calculate the ratio of the total number of images with an object class of "man" and "person".
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'man' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'person' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID

question: How many images have a total of 10 attribute classes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE OBJ_CLASS_ID = 10

question: On image no. 20, identify the attribute ID that is composed of the highest number of objects.
original_query: SELECT ATT_CLASS_ID FROM IMG_OBJ_ATT WHERE IMG_ID = 20 GROUP BY ATT_CLASS_ID ORDER BY COUNT(ATT_CLASS_ID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many samples of "wall" are there in image no.2353079?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'wall' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2353079

question: Provide the dimensions of the bounding box that contains the keyboard that was spotted in image no. 3.
original_query: SELECT T1.W, T1.H FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 3 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'keyboard'

question: Indicate the bounding box of the image 8.
original_query: SELECT X, Y, W, H FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 8

question: List all the object classes in image 10.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 10

question: Write the object classes of image ID 22 alongside the object's width and height.
original_query: SELECT T1.W, T1.H, T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 22

question: How many samples of food object are there in image no.6?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 6 AND T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'food'

question: State the object class of the image with tallest bounding box.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID ORDER BY T1.H DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the IDs of all the images with more than 2 pairs of object samples with the relation "parked on".
original_query: SELECT T2.IMG_ID FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.PRED_CLASS = 'parked on' AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID != T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID GROUP BY T2.IMG_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.IMG_ID) > 2

question: What is the relationship between object sample no.12 and no.8 of image no.2345511?
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2345511 AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = 12 AND T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 8

question: What is the average width and height of the objects in image ID 47? List their object classes as well.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS, AVG(T1.W), AVG(T1.H) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 47 GROUP BY T2.OBJ_CLASS

question: How many images have less than 15 object samples?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE OBJ_SAMPLE_ID < 15

question: How many 'has' predicate classes does image ID 107 have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.PRED_CLASS) FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 107 AND T2.PRED_CLASS = 'has'

question: Tell the attribute of the weeds in image no.2377988.
original_query: SELECT T2.ATT_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ_att AS T1 INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'weeds' AND T1.IMG_ID = 2377988

question: Identify the border's coordinates on the X and Y axes that enclose a folk in image no. 6.
original_query: SELECT T1.X, T1.Y FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 6 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'folk'
