question: How many objects can you spot in image no. 72? What objects may be identified on the same image and within the bounding box represented as (341, 27, 42, 51)?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.IMG_ID = 1, 1, 0)), SUM(IIF(T1.X = 341 AND T1.Y = 27 AND T1.W = 42 AND T1.H = 51, 1, 0)) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID

question: Define the bounding box of the object sample no. 7 on image no. 42.
original_query: SELECT X, Y, W, H FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 42 AND OBJ_SAMPLE_ID = 7

question: Count the number of 'dress' object classes and include their X and Y coordinates in image ID 1764.
original_query: SELECT T1.X, T1.Y FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1764 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'dress'

question: List all the ID of the images that have an attribute class of "horse".
original_query: SELECT T2.IMG_ID FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'horse'

question: What is the object class of the image with a bounding box of 0, 0, 135, 212?
original_query: SELECT T1.OBJ_CLASS FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.X = 0 AND T2.Y = 0 AND T2.W = 135 AND T2.H = 212

question: Find the object in image 5 where the object with the coordinate of (634, 468).
original_query: SELECT OBJ_SAMPLE_ID FROM IMG_OBJ WHERE IMG_ID = 5 AND X = 634 AND Y = 468

question: Give all the bounding boxes for image 2222 whose object classes are feathers.
original_query: SELECT T2.X, T2.Y, T2.H, T2.W FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2222 AND T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'feathers'

question: How many object classes are there in the database?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(OBJ_CLASS_ID) FROM OBJ_CLASSES

question: List all the attribute classes of image ID 22.
original_query: SELECT T1.ATT_CLASS FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 22

question: What is the bounding box of "spoon" in image id 1344?
original_query: SELECT T1.X, T1.Y, T1.W, T1.H FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1344 AND T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'spoon'

question: Give the bounding box of the kite in image no.2324765.
original_query: SELECT T2.X, T2.Y, T2.W, T2.H FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2324765 AND T1.OBJ_CLASS = 'kite'

question: How many images have "keyboard" as their object class?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'keyboard'

question: List all the IDs of images that have objects with the attributes of 'wired'.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.IMG_ID FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'wired'

question: How many prediction classes with "has" captions are there for image id 3050?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.PRED_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 3050 AND T2.PRED_CLASS = 'has'

question: How many images have "vegetable" and "fruits" as their object classes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.IMG_ID) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'vegetables' OR T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'fruits'

question: What is the relation between object sample no.8 and object sample no.4 in image no.1?
original_query: SELECT T1.PRED_CLASS FROM PRED_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 1 AND T2.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID = 8 AND T2.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID = 4

question: How many object samples in image no.908 are in the class of tip?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'tip' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 908

question: Among the objects that have multiple relations, how many images whose captions for the prediction class ids are "on"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.PRED_CLASS_ID) FROM IMG_REL AS T1 INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.PRED_CLASS_ID = T2.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.OBJ1_SAMPLE_ID != T1.OBJ2_SAMPLE_ID AND T2.PRED_CLASS = 'on'

question: List all the object classes of the images that have a (5,5) coordinate.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.X = 5 AND T1.Y = 5

question: List the object classes of image ID 36 with coordinates (0,0).
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 36 AND T1.X = 0 AND T1.Y = 0

question: Which images have more than 20 object samples?
original_query: SELECT IMG_ID FROM IMG_OBJ GROUP BY IMG_ID HAVING COUNT(IMG_ID) > 20

question: Name number of samples of "bed" object are there in the image No.1098?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.OBJ_CLASS = 'bed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1098

question: State the object class of sample no.10 of image no.2320341.
original_query: SELECT T1.OBJ_CLASS FROM OBJ_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T2.IMG_ID = 2320341 AND T2.OBJ_SAMPLE_ID = 10

question: Provide the number of predicted classes.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(PRED_CLASS_ID) FROM PRED_CLASSES

question: State the explanation about object class 10.
original_query: SELECT OBJ_CLASS FROM OBJ_CLASSES WHERE OBJ_CLASS_ID = 10

question: Which object classes belong to the onion category?
original_query: SELECT OBJ_CLASS_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES WHERE OBJ_CLASS = 'onion'

question: Name the object class of the image with lowest bounding box.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID ORDER BY T1.H LIMIT 1

question: How many images have over 20 object samples?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.IMG_ID) FROM ( SELECT IMG_ID FROM IMG_OBJ GROUP BY IMG_ID HAVING COUNT(OBJ_SAMPLE_ID) > 20 ) T1

question: Provide the x-coordinate and y-coordinate of the image with an attribute class of ''horse" and an object class of "fur".
original_query: SELECT T3.X, T3.Y FROM ATT_CLASSES AS T1 INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T2 ON T1.ATT_CLASS_ID = T2.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ AS T3 ON T2.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T4.OBJ_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.ATT_CLASS = 'horse' AND T4.OBJ_CLASS = 'fur'

question: What is the unique id number identifying the onion object class?
original_query: SELECT OBJ_CLASS_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES WHERE OBJ_CLASS = 'onion'

question: What are the id of all the objects belonging to the transportation class?
original_query: SELECT OBJ_CLASS_ID FROM OBJ_CLASSES WHERE OBJ_CLASS IN ('bus', 'train', 'aeroplane', 'car', 'etc')

question: Describe the objects, their attributes, and the relationships that comprise the scene on image no. 1 within the bounding box, represented as (388, 369, 48, 128).
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.OBJ_CLASS, T4.ATT_CLASS, T6.PRED_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.ATT_CLASS_ID = T4.ATT_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_REL AS T5 ON T1.IMG_ID = T5.IMG_ID INNER JOIN PRED_CLASSES AS T6 ON T5.PRED_CLASS_ID = T6.PRED_CLASS_ID WHERE T1.IMG_ID = 1 AND T1.X = 388 AND T1.Y = 369 AND T1.W = 48 AND T1.H = 128

question: Name the object element that is described as being scattered on image no. 10.
original_query: SELECT T2.OBJ_CLASS FROM IMG_OBJ AS T1 INNER JOIN OBJ_CLASSES AS T2 ON T1.OBJ_CLASS_ID = T2.OBJ_CLASS_ID INNER JOIN IMG_OBJ_ATT AS T3 ON T1.IMG_ID = T3.IMG_ID INNER JOIN ATT_CLASSES AS T4 ON T3.ATT_CLASS_ID = T4.ATT_CLASS_ID WHERE T4.ATT_CLASS = 'scattered' AND T1.IMG_ID = 10 GROUP BY T2.OBJ_CLASS

question: Which word that has 274499 repetitions in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT T1.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T2.occurrences = 274499 AND T2.lid = 1

question: Indicate the page id of Wikipedia about Catalan language of all the pages that have a numeric value in their title.
original_query: SELECT pid, title FROM pages WHERE title LIKE '%0%' OR '%1%' OR '%2%' OR '%3%' OR '%4%' OR '%5%' OR '%6%' OR '%7%' OR '%8%' OR '%9%'

question: Which word that has 71303 appearance in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT T1.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN langs_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T2.occurrences = 71303

question: Among the biwords pairs with "àbac" as its first word, how many of them have an occurrence of over 10?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.w2nd) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st WHERE T1.word = 'àbac' AND T2.occurrences > 10

question: Is word id "88" the word id for title "Animals"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(T1.pid) > 0 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS YORN FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T2.wid = 88 AND T1.title = 'Animals'

question: What proportion of a pair of words in the Catalan language have been repeated less than 80 times?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN occurrences < 80 THEN lid ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(lid) FROM biwords

question: Among the wikipedia pages on Catalan with more than 300 different words, how many of them have a revision ID of over 28330000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(lid) FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 AND words > 300 AND revision > 28330000

question: What is the title of corpus where word "desena" appear?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T2.wid = T3.wid WHERE T3.word = 'desena'

question: Indicate which is the word that is repeated the most times.
original_query: SELECT word FROM words WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM words )

question: In Abadia, what is the word id of the of the Catalan language that appeared the highest amount of times? Indicate the how many times did they said word id appeared.
original_query: SELECT T2.wid, T2.occurrences FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.title = 'Abadia' ORDER BY T2.occurrences DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times did the word "grec" occur on the page titled "Àbac"?
original_query: SELECT T2.occurrences FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T3.title = 'Àbac' AND T1.word = 'grec'

question: What is the word ID for the second word for the biwords pair with most repetitions?
original_query: SELECT w2nd FROM biwords WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM biwords )

question: Indicate if there is any pair formed by the words fukunaga and d'egees.
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(T1.wid) > 0 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st OR T1.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE T1.word = 'fukunaga' ) AND T2.w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word LIKE 'd%egees' )

question: Calculate the average number of different words that appear on all pages whose title begins with A.
original_query: SELECT AVG(words) FROM pages WHERE title LIKE 'A%'

question: For corpus title "Atomium", pick 3 words appear in the title and calculate the total occurence of these words.
original_query: SELECT T1.word, T1.occurrences FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T2.pid = ( SELECT pid FROM pages WHERE title = 'Atomium' ) LIMIT 3

question: Which word has the most repetitions in the Catalan language? Give the ID of the word.
original_query: SELECT wid FROM langs_words WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM langs_words )

question: How many word that has number of different words equal to 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.wid) FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.words = 3

question: What is the percentage of words in the Catalan language that have a repetition of more than 16,000 times?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN occurrences > 16000 THEN lid ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(lid) FROM langs_words

question: State the Wikipedia page title that has revision page id of 28040864.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE revision = 28040864

question: State the word ID for "periodograma".
original_query: SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'periodograma'

question: What are the titles of the top 5 Catalan language Wikipedia page with the least number of different words? Indicate each title's word id that has appeared the most in the said pages.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid ORDER BY T1.words LIMIT 5

question: How many times on page number 44 does the word "votives" appear?
original_query: SELECT T2.occurrences FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'votives' AND T2.pid = 44

question: How many total occurrences are there in the three-letter words?
original_query: SELECT SUM(occurrences) FROM words WHERE LENGTH(word) = 3

question: How many times that the word pair of "barcelona" and "precolombina" occur?
original_query: SELECT SUM(occurrences) FROM biwords WHERE w1st = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'barcelona' ) AND w2nd = ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'precolombina' )

question: Among the title with single digit word count, list down 5 revision page ID of these titles.
original_query: SELECT revision FROM pages WHERE words < 10 LIMIT 5

question: How many appearances does the word ID No. 2823 have in the Wikipedia page "Astre"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.occurrences) FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.title = 'Astre' AND T2.wid = 2823

question: List the page number for Catalan language wikipedia pages containing the word 'Art' in the page title.
original_query: SELECT page FROM pages WHERE title LIKE 'Art%' OR title LIKE '%Art%' OR title LIKE '%Art'

question: Please list the title of the pages on which the word "grec" occurred for over 20 times.

question: How many Catalan-language Wikipedia pages are there overall?
original_query: SELECT pages FROM langs WHERE lang = 'ca'

question: What is the title of Catalan language wikipedia page with revision page id '16203226'?
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE revision = 16203226

question: Calculate the average percentage of word appearance in the page that have revision page id smaller than 106680.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.words) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.occurrences) FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.revision < 106680

question: State one biword pair with occurence of 4.
original_query: SELECT T1.word, T3.word FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.occurrences = 4 LIMIT 1

question: How many times does the word "heròdot" appear in the Wikipedia page?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.occurrences) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid WHERE T1.word = 'heròdot'

question: Calculate the percentage of pages that have 1500 different words.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN words = 1500 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(page) FROM pages WHERE words > 300 LIMIT 3

question: In which Wikipedia page does the word ID No. 174 have the most appearances? Give the title.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE pid = ( SELECT pid FROM pages_words WHERE wid = 174 ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the title of the page on which the word "grec" has an occurrence of 52 times.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'grec' AND T2.occurrences = 52

question: What is the pair of words that is repeated the most times? Identify them by their ID.
original_query: SELECT w1st, w2nd FROM biwords WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM biwords )

question: What is the word that occurs the most in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT word FROM words WHERE occurrences = ( SELECT MAX(occurrences) FROM words )

question: Which Wikipedia page number has the highest number of words in the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT page FROM pages WHERE words = ( SELECT MAX(words) FROM pages )

question: Please list the top three most frequently occurring words and their ids.
original_query: SELECT word, wid FROM words ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many Catalan language wikipedia pages have between 1000 to 2000 number of different words?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(pid) FROM pages WHERE words BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000

question: How many times on page number 16 does the second word in the pair of words 1 and 109 appear?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.occurrences) FROM pages_words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T2.w2nd = T1.wid WHERE T2.w2nd = 109 AND T2.w1st = 1 AND T1.pid = 16

question: Please list any three Wikipedia pages that are written in Catalan, together with their titles and revision page numbers.
original_query: SELECT title, revision FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 LIMIT 3

question: What is the total pages of Wikipedia in Catalan language?

question: What are the total occurence of words that paired with "nombre"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.occurrences) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st OR T1.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T2.w1st IN (( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'nombre' ) OR T2.w2nd IN ( SELECT wid FROM words WHERE word = 'nombre' ))

question: List out the title of Catalan language Wikipedia page that has wikipedia revision page id as 106601.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE revision = 106601

question: How frequently did the words 1 and 25 appear together?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM biwords WHERE w1st = 1 AND w2nd = 25

question: Show all the title of pages and number of occurences for each page where the word 'quipu' appears.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T2.occurrences FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T2.wid = T3.wid WHERE T3.word = 'quipu'

question: What is the language of the pair of words numbered 1 and 616?
original_query: SELECT T2.lang FROM biwords AS T1 INNER JOIN langs AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T1.w1st = 1 AND T1.w2nd = 616

question: What percentage of Catalan-language Wikipedia pages have more than 10,000 words?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.words > 10000 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.page) FROM langs AS T1 INNER JOIN pages AS T2 ON T1.lid = T2.lid WHERE T1.lang = 'ca'

question: List down the words with word id from 1 to 10 and write down a paired word for each of them.
original_query: SELECT T1.word AS W1, T3.word AS W2 FROM words AS T1 LEFT JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st LEFT JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T1.wid <= 10 GROUP BY T1.wid

question: How many pages of Wikipedia are there in total on the Catalan language?
original_query: SELECT pages FROM langs WHERE lang = 'ca'

question: How many words has the appearance times greater than 10?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(w1st) AS countwords FROM biwords WHERE occurrences > 10

question: What is the revision ID for the page on Catalan titled "Arqueologia"?
original_query: SELECT revision FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 AND title = 'Arqueologia'

question: List out the total pages of Wikipedia in Catalan language.
original_query: SELECT pages FROM langs

question: What is the word id for title "Sometent"?
original_query: SELECT T2.wid FROM pages AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.pid = T2.pid WHERE T1.title = 'Sometent'

question: List the titles for all Catalan language wikipedia page from revision page id 106600 to 106700.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE revision BETWEEN 106600 AND 106700

question: Calculate the average number of repetitions in the pairs of words in which the first word id is number 34.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN w1st = 34 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(w1st) FROM biwords

question: How many pages does the Catalan language have in Wikipedia?
original_query: SELECT pages FROM langs WHERE lang = 'ca'

question: List down the page id of titles start with alphabet "b".
original_query: SELECT pid FROM pages WHERE title LIKE 'b%'

question: How many occurrences does the word "panajot" have?
original_query: SELECT occurrences FROM words WHERE word = 'panajot'

question: How much higher in percentage does the word "grec" occur on the page titled "Àbac" than on the page titled "Astronomia"?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T3.title = 'Àbac' THEN T2.occurrences END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T3.title = 'Astronomia' THEN T2.occurrences END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T3.title = 'Astronomia' THEN T2.occurrences END) FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN pages_words AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.wid INNER JOIN pages AS T3 ON T2.pid = T3.pid WHERE T1.word = 'grec'

question: What is the total word of title "Adam" and "Acampada"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(words) FROM pages WHERE title IN ('Adam', 'Acampada')

question: Calculate the percentage of times that the same word appears in a pair.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN w1st = w2nd THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(w1st) FROM biwords

question: What is the second word in the pair of words number 1 and 8968?
original_query: SELECT word FROM words WHERE wid = 8968

question: Please list the titles of the top 3 Wikipedia pages with the most different words on the Catalan language.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 ORDER BY words DESC LIMIT 3

question: Please list all the biwords pairs with "àbac" as its first word.
original_query: SELECT T1.word AS W1, T3.word AS W2 FROM words AS T1 INNER JOIN biwords AS T2 ON T1.wid = T2.w1st INNER JOIN words AS T3 ON T3.wid = T2.w2nd WHERE T1.word = 'àbac'

question: Please list the titles of the Wikipedia pages on the Catalan language with more than 4000 words.
original_query: SELECT title FROM pages WHERE lid = 1 AND words > 4000

question: What are the keywords of the episode which received the 2nd-highest number of votes?
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.votes NOT IN ( SELECT MAX(T1.votes) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id ) ORDER BY T1.votes DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the 3 worst rated episodes?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Episode ORDER BY rating LIMIT 3

question: What was the rating of the episodes that Jace Alexander worked on?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T3.name = 'Jace Alexander'

question: How many roles did Julia Roberts play in the series?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.role) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T2.name = 'Julia Roberts'

question: Which role did Joseph Blair play in the show?
original_query: SELECT T1.role FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T2.name = 'Joseph Blair'

question: Park Dietz was credited in which role in the episode titled "Cherished"?
original_query: SELECT T2.role FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Cherished' AND T3.name = 'Park Dietz' AND T2.credited = 'true'

question: Who is the winner of the Best Television Episode award for the Edgar category in 2000? Include his or her name and role.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.year = 2000 AND T2.award_category = 'Edgar' AND T2.award = 'Best Television Episode'

question: How many episodes are credited to Jerry Orbach?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T2.name = 'Jerry Orbach'

question: What is the title of the episode with the keyword "laundering money"?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.keyword = 'laundering money'

question: Which episode got the most 1 star votes? Give its title.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.stars = 1 ORDER BY T1.votes DESC LIMIT 1

question: On what episode did Julia Roberts win the "Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series" award during the 1999 Primetime Emmy Awards? Tell me her role.
original_query: SELECT T3.episode_id, T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN Episode AS T3 ON T2.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T2.year = 1999 AND T2.award = 'Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series' AND T2.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND T1.name = 'Julia Roberts' AND T2.result = 'Nominee'

question: How many nominations did Law and Order season 9, episode 20 get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.award_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.series = 'Law and Order' AND T1.season = 9 AND T1.episode = 20

question: Write down the organization, year, award, and award category in which Rene Balcer is the winner.
original_query: SELECT T2.organization, T2.year, T2.award, T2.award_category FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.name = 'Rene Balcer' AND T2.result = 'Winner'

question: In which region were the assistant location managers born?
original_query: SELECT T2.birth_region FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.role = 'president of NBC West Coast'

question: List out all the credit names for episode 9.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.episode = 9

question: What are the keywords of the episode "Shield"?
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Shield'

question: What is the title of the episode with the highest number of keywords?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id GROUP BY T1.episode_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.keyword) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average star with highest percentage for episodes that have received award?
original_query: SELECT T2.person_id FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id ORDER BY T1.percent DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list all the keywords of the episode "Refuge: Part 1".
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Refuge: Part 1'

question: What role was Julia Roberts nominated for?
original_query: SELECT T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.Result = 'Nominee' AND T1.name = 'Julia Roberts'

question: List out all award titles nominated for episode 20.
original_query: SELECT T2.award FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.episode = 20 AND T2.result IN ('Winner', 'Nominee')

question: For season 9, episode 17 of the show Law and Order, how many roles have been included in the credit?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.role) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.series = 'Law and Order' AND T1.season = 9 AND T1.episode = 17 AND T2.credited = 'true'

question: How many people had filled a role in the episode titled "Cherished", but did not show up in the on-screen credits?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Cherished' AND T2.credited = 'false'

question: Was Anthony Azzara's role in episode tt0629204 displayed in the credits at the end of the episode?
original_query: SELECT T1.credited FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T2.name = 'Anthony Azzara' AND T1.episode_id = 'tt0629204'

question: Give me the years and episode IDs in which Constantine Makris was the winner of the Television Silver Gavel Award at the American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts for two consecutive years.
original_query: SELECT t3.years, t3.episode_id FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT T2.year AS years, T2.episode_id, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.episode_id ORDER BY T2.year) AS rm FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.award = 'Television' AND T2.award_category = 'Silver Gavel Award' AND T1.name = 'Constantine Makris' AND T2.result = 'Winner' AND T2.organization = 'American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts' ) AS T3 GROUP BY t3.episode_id HAVING COUNT(t3.years - t3.rm) >= 2

question: Who was the actor who was portraying "Alex Brown" and has been credited?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.role = 'Alex Brown' AND T2.credited = 'true'

question: Which episode has the highest total number of viewer votes?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id GROUP BY T1.title ORDER BY SUM(T1.votes) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the tallest camera operator?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.role = 'camera operator' ORDER BY T2.height_meters DESC LIMIT 1

question: What role does the tallest person play?
original_query: SELECT T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN Award AS T3 ON T2.episode_id = T3.episode_id ORDER BY T1.height_meters DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many people were not credited at the end of the "Admissions" episode?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Admissions' AND T2.credited = 'false'

question: Which continent was Michael Preston born on?

question: How many times did the episode titled "Agony" win an award?

question: Who played the role of the "president of NBC West Coast" in the first episode?

question: How many credits have been displayed from episode 1 until 10?

question: Who is the script supervisor of the series in episode tt0629204?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.episode_id = 'tt0629204' AND T1.role = 'script supervisor'

question: How many episodes did J.K. Simmons' role appear on the show?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.role) FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T2.name = 'J.K. Simmons'

question: Which role have won at least two awards for the entire season and list out the name?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id GROUP BY T2.role HAVING COUNT(T2.award_id) > 1

question: What is the title of the episodes that were least enjoyed?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 1

question: For the episode with the most votes, give its air date.
original_query: SELECT T2.air_date FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id GROUP BY T2.episode_id ORDER BY SUM(T1.votes) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many awards has Julia Roberts been nominated for?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.award_id) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.name = 'Julia Roberts' AND T2.result = 'Nominee'

question: Please list any three episodes that were most enjoyed by the viewers.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10 LIMIT 3

question: What are the titles of the top 3 episodes that received no less than 30 votes in its 10-star rating?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.votes >= 30 AND T1.stars = 10 ORDER BY T1.votes DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many keywords are there in the episode Disciple?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.keyword) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Disciple'

question: What are the names of all the people who worked on episode 19 of season 9?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T3.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.episode = 19 AND T1.season = 9

question: Who was the Law and Order series writer who also won the Television Silver Gavel Award at the American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts for two consecutive years?
original_query: SELECT t3.name FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT T2.year AS years, T1.name, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY T1.name ORDER BY T2.year) AS rm FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.award = 'Television' AND T2.award_category = 'Silver Gavel Award' AND T2.series = 'Law and Order' AND T2.result = 'Winner' AND T2.organization = 'American Bar Association Silver Gavel Awards for Media and the Arts' ) AS T3 GROUP BY t3.name HAVING COUNT(t3.years - t3.rm) >= 2

question: What is the percentage of people who gave the "True North" episode a 1-star rating?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.stars = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'True North' AND T1.episode_id = 'tt0629477'

question: List the names of all the cast members in the series.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.category = 'Cast'

question: List down the titles of the top 3 episodes, from highest to lowest, in terms of their weighted stars.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Vote AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.stars BETWEEN 1 AND 10 GROUP BY T2.title ORDER BY CAST(SUM(T1.stars * T1.percent) AS REAL) / 100 DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the title of the episode that got the most 10-star votes?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10 ORDER BY T2.votes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which episodes are nominated for an awards but not win?
original_query: SELECT T1.episode FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.result = 'Nominee'

question: What is the date of birth of the actor who played the role of a "writer"?
original_query: SELECT T2.birthdate FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.role = 'writer'

question: What is the ratio of American casts on episode 2 of the series? Please include their roles.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.category = 'Cast' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.category), T1.role FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Episode AS T3 ON T2.episode_id = T3.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T4 ON T2.person_id = T4.person_id WHERE T3.episode = 2 AND T4.birth_country = 'USA'

question: Among the episodes that were aired in 1998, how many won an International Monitor Awards?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.air_date) = '1998' AND T2.organization = 'International Monitor Awards' AND T2.result = 'Winner'

question: List out director names that received an award along with the episode number.
original_query: SELECT T3.name, T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T2.role = 'director' AND T2.result = 'Winner'

question: Who is the youngest person to ever play a "clerk" role in the series?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM Credit AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T2.person_id = T1.person_id WHERE T1.role = 'Clerk' AND T2.birthdate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.birthdate LIMIT 1

question: Please list all the keywords for the episodes with a rating of over 8.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.rating > 8

question: Among the legislators who will end in 2009, how many are from the Republican party?
original_query: SELECT `END`, party FROM `current-terms` WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', `END`) = '2009' AND party = 'Republican'

question: State the address of Amy Klobuchar at the term of 4th of January 2001.
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'Amy' AND T1.last_name = 'Klobuchar' AND T2.start = '2001-04-01'

question: How many legislators hold the title "Majority Leader"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide) FROM `current-terms` WHERE title = 'Majority Leader'

question: How many legislators are not senator?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide) FROM `current-terms` WHERE class IS NULL

question: What is the official Twitter handle of Jason Lewis?
original_query: SELECT T2.twitter FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Jason Lewis'

question: What are the first and last name of the representatives of the house in district 9?
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.district = 9

question: List the official full names of all the legislators that served 13 district for 26 consecutive years.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.end) AS int) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.start) AS int)) = 26 THEN T1.official_full_name END FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide GROUP BY T1.official_full_name, T2.district HAVING COUNT(T1.official_full_name) = 13

question: Mention the username of Facebook of Ralph Abraham.
original_query: SELECT T2.facebook FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Ralph' AND T1.last_name = 'Abraham'

question: Give the official full names of legislators representing Virginia.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.state = 'VA' GROUP BY T1.official_full_name

question: Among the male legislators born between 1955 to 1965, what is the percentage of the legislators with an independent party?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.party = 'Independent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.party) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'M' AND strftime('%Y', T1.birthday_bio) BETWEEN '1955' AND '1965'

question: Please list the username of the current official Facebook presence of all the current legislators that are famous or impact.
original_query: SELECT T2.facebook FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.wikipedia_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T2.facebook

question: What is the title of legislator whose birthday on 2/20/1942?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.birthday_bio = '1942-02-20' GROUP BY T2.title

question: State the opensecrets_id of the legislator whose YouTube name is Bluetkemeyer.
original_query: SELECT T1.opensecrets_id FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T2.youtube = 'BLuetkemeyer'

question: How many class 1 senators belong to the Republican party?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide) FROM `current-terms` WHERE class = 1 AND party = 'Republican'

question: What is the Instagram name of the legislator whose birthday was on 8/24/1952?
original_query: SELECT T1.instagram FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T2.birthday_bio = '1952-08-24'

question: How many percent of senators were from class 1?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN class = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM `historical-terms` WHERE type = 'sen'

question: What is the numeric ID of Chris Van Hollen on GovTrack.us?
original_query: SELECT T2.govtrack FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Chris Van Hollen'

question: How many male legislators are Roman Catholic?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE religion_bio = 'Roman Catholic' AND gender_bio = 'M'

question: Among male legislators, state number of the legislators who are not the senator.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.state) FROM ( SELECT T2.state FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'M' AND (T2.class IS NULL OR T2.class = '') GROUP BY T2.state ) T3

question: State number of legislators who are not the senator among female legislators.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F' AND (T2.class IS NULL OR T2.class = '')

question: State all the Facebook ID for current legislators under the democrat party.
original_query: SELECT T2.facebook_id FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.party = 'Democrat' GROUP BY T2.facebook_id

question: Which party does Christopher Henderson Clark belong to?
original_query: SELECT T1.party FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.first_name OR T2.middle_name OR T2.last_name = 'ChristopherHendersonClark'

question: What was current legislator Sherrod Brown's Washington, D.C. office phone number during his term starting on 2013/1/3?
original_query: SELECT T1.phone FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown' AND T1.start = '2013-01-03'

question: Which legislator has the YouTube channel 'RoskamIL06?' Write the official full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T2.youtube = 'RoskamIL06'

question: What are the Wikipedia page names of all the anti-administration senators?
original_query: SELECT T1.wikipedia_id FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.type = 'sen' AND T2.party = 'Anti-Administration'

question: Give the alphanumeric ID of the Catholic legislators in Nebraska.
original_query: SELECT T1.bioguide FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.religion_bio = 'Catholic' AND T1.state = 'NE'

question: How many minority leaders have not been registered in Federal Election Commission data?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.title = 'Minority Leader' AND (T1.fec_id IS NULL OR T1.fec_id = '')

question: How old was Jr. F. James Sensenbrenner when he first started as a legislator?
original_query: SELECT CAST(MIN(T2.start) - T1.birthday_bio AS DATE) AS AGE FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'F. James Sensenbrenner, Jr.'

question: What is the religion of current legislator Sherrod Brown?
original_query: SELECT religion_bio FROM current WHERE official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown'

question: Among all the current legislators who have served for more than 4 terms, what is the percentage of them being female?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender_bio = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.bioguide) FROM ( SELECT T2.bioguide, T1.gender_bio FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide GROUP BY T2.bioguide HAVING COUNT(T2.bioguide) > 4 ) T3

question: Please list the official full names of all the current legislators who were once a senator during his or her terms.
original_query: SELECT T2.official_full_name FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.state_rank IS NOT NULL

question: Provide the full name and birth date of the legislator with a contact form of http://www.brown.senate.gov/contact/.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name, T1.birthday_bio FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.contact_form = 'http://www.brown.senate.gov/contact/'

question: For how many terms has current legislator Sherrod Brown served as a representative for district no.13?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown' AND T2.district = 13

question: List the last name of all current legislators who live in California.
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.state = 'CA' GROUP BY T1.last_name

question: Does Thomas Carnes have an account on ballotpedia.org?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN ballotpedia_id IS NULL THEN 'doesn''t have' ELSE 'have' END AS HaveorNot FROM historical WHERE first_name = 'Thomas' AND last_name = 'Carnes'

question: Among the current legislators who served the term starting on 2013/1/3, how many of them are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.start = '2013-01-03' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F'

question: How many female representatives served in the state of California for at least 10 years?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.result) FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.`end`) AS int) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.start) AS int)) > 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN "current-terms" AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'F' AND T2.state = 'CA' AND T2.type = 'rep' ) AS T3

question: How many legislators were born in 1736?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide_id) FROM historical WHERE birthday_bio LIKE '1736%'

question: How many Catholic legislators do not have an account on ballotpedia.org?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(bioguide_id) FROM historical WHERE religion_bio = 'Catholic' AND ballotpedia_id IS NULL

question: For how many terms has current legislator Sherrod Brown served?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown'

question: What is the ratio of males and females among historical legislators?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender_bio = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN gender_bio = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM historical

question: Provide the full name of all current female legislators that chose Republican as their political party.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Republican' AND T1.gender_bio = 'F' AND T2.END > DATE() GROUP BY T1.bioguide_id

question: What are the full names of the non-google female entity legislators that have not been registered in Federal Election Commission data?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM historical WHERE gender_bio = 'F' AND google_entity_id_id IS NULL AND fec_id IS NULL

question: Among all the current legislators whose religion is Roman Catholic, what is the percentage of the ones without an instagram account?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.instagram IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T2.religion_bio = 'Roman Catholic'

question: Provide the current legislators' official full names who are from the Independent party.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Independent' GROUP BY T1.official_full_name

question: Give the district numbers with an Anti-Administration party.
original_query: SELECT district FROM `historical-terms` WHERE party = 'Anti-Administration' GROUP BY district

question: Which legislators are woman?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM historical WHERE gender_bio = 'F'

question: List down the MapLight ID of the representatives in Maine.
original_query: SELECT T1.maplight_id FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.type = 'rep' AND T2.state = 'ME' GROUP BY T1.maplight_id

question: How many legislators have not been registered in Federal Election Commission data?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE fec_id IS NULL OR fec_id = ''

question: Provide the address of the legislator with the contact form of http://www.carper.senate.gov/contact/.
original_query: SELECT address FROM `current-terms` WHERE contact_form = 'http://www.carper.senate.gov/contact/'

question: How many current legislators do not have an account on instagram?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T1.instagram IS NULL

question: What is the full name of the oldest legislator?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM historical ORDER BY birthday_bio LIMIT 1

question: How many current legislators chose Republican as their political party?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `current-terms` WHERE party = 'Republican'

question: How many years had Jr. John Conyers served in total?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(T2.END - T2.start AS DATE)) AS sum FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'John Conyers, Jr.'

question: Who is the Lutheran representative that served in the state of Ohio for 14 years before becoming a senator?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.end) AS int) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T2.start) AS int)) = 14 THEN official_full_name END FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.religion_bio = 'Lutheran' AND T2.state = 'OH' AND T2.type = 'rep'

question: What is the official full name of the current legislator whose current official Facebook presence is "senjoniernst"?
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.facebook = 'senjoniernst'

question: Among the legislators who started a term on 2nd December 1793, how many of them were males?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.bioguide_id) FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.gender_bio = 'M' AND T2.start = '1793-12-02'

question: Which historical legislators are members of the National Greenbacker party? Write their first and last names.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM `historical-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN historical AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.party = 'National Greenbacker'

question: List all of the ids of the representatives belonging to the Democrat party in district 13 that ended their term on 1/3/2019?
original_query: SELECT bioguide FROM `current-terms` WHERE type = 'rep' AND party = 'Democrat' AND end = '2019-01-03' AND district = 13

question: List the official full names of all the legislators who have facebook, instagram, twitter and youtube accounts.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.facebook IS NOT NULL AND T2.instagram IS NOT NULL AND T2.twitter IS NOT NULL AND T2.youtube IS NOT NULL

question: What is the current official Instagram handle of current legislator Bob Corker?
original_query: SELECT T2.instagram FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Bob Corker'

question: How many districts are in Idaho?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(district) FROM `current-terms` WHERE state = 'ID'

question: Among the current legislators who have accounts on both http://thomas.gov, how many of them have accounts on instagram?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.bioguide_id) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.thomas_id IS NOT NULL AND T2.instagram IS NOT NULL

question: Please list the full official names of all the current legislators who served the term that started on 2013/1/3.
original_query: SELECT T1.official_full_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.start = '2013-01-03'

question: Among the current legislators who do not have accounts on OpenSecrets.org., how many of them do not have instagram accounts either?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.instagram IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T1.bioguide = T2.bioguide_id WHERE T2.opensecrets_id IS NULL OR T2.opensecrets_id = ''

question: Which party has the highest number of legislators who are Baptist?
original_query: SELECT T2.party FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.religion_bio = 'Baptist' GROUP BY T2.party ORDER BY COUNT(T2.party) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the party of the legislator named Susan M. Collins?
original_query: SELECT T2.party FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Susan M. Collins' GROUP BY T2.party

question: List the full name of all the senior senators in year 2013.
original_query: SELECT T2.official_full_name FROM `current-terms` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T1.state_rank = 'senior' AND T1.type = 'sen' AND T1.start LIKE '2013%'

question: What is the twitter name of the legislator whose birthday was on 5/27/1946?
original_query: SELECT T2.twitter FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id WHERE T1.birthday_bio = '1946-05-27'

question: What is the username of the current official Facebook presence of the oldest current legislator?
original_query: SELECT T2.facebook FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T2.bioguide = T1.bioguide_id ORDER BY T1.birthday_bio LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of terms served for a current legislator that's famous or impact?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bioguide) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.bioguide_id) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.wikipedia_id IS NOT NULL

question: Among the current legislators who have served for more than 6 terms, how many of them were born after 1960?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CID) FROM ( SELECT T1.bioguide_id AS CID FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.birthday_bio >= '1960-01-01' GROUP BY T2.bioguide HAVING COUNT(T2.bioguide) > 6 )

question: List the full name of all past legislators that chose Pro-Administration as their political party in year 1791.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.party = 'Pro-Administration' AND CAST(T2.start AS DATE) <= 1791 AND CAST(T2.END AS DATE) >= 1791

question: What is the google entity ID of Benjamin Hawkins?
original_query: SELECT google_entity_id_id FROM historical WHERE first_name = 'Benjamin' AND last_name = 'Hawkins'

question: Among all the current legislators born after the year 1960, how many of them are not google entities?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE strftime('%Y', birthday_bio) > '1960' AND google_entity_id_id IS NULL

question: List down the district number of the representative of the house named Jonathan Grout.
original_query: SELECT T2.district FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.last_name = 'Grout' AND T1.first_name = 'Jonathan' AND T2.type = 'rep'

question: What is the contact URL of Claire McCaskill?
original_query: SELECT T2.contact_form FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Claire McCaskill' GROUP BY T2.contact_form

question: How many males were members of the current legislators?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current WHERE gender_bio = 'M'

question: Which legislators do not have instagram account?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.instagram IS NULL

question: Current legislator Sherrod Brown has been in the Democrat party during how many terms that he has served?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.official_full_name = 'Sherrod Brown' AND T2.party = 'Democrat'

question: In California, how many representatives ended their term in 1995?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `current-terms` WHERE state = 'CA' AND type = 'rep' AND end LIKE '1995%'

question: Provide the Instagram username of the legislator named Benjamin Hawkins.
original_query: SELECT T1.instagram FROM `social-media` AS T1 INNER JOIN current AS T2 ON T2.bioguide_id = T1.bioguide WHERE T2.first_name = 'Benjamin' AND T2.last_name = 'Hawkins'

question: What is the name of the legislator with the ID of W000059?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM historical WHERE bioguide_id = 'W000059'

question: Provide the facebook ID of the facebook account named "RepWilson".
original_query: SELECT facebook_id FROM `social-media` WHERE facebook = 'RepWilson'

question: What is the ratio between male and female legislators?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender_bio = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN gender_bio = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM historical

question: List down the open secrets and thomas ID of the democrat senators of New Jersey.
original_query: SELECT T1.opensecrets_id, T1.thomas_id FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.type = 'sen' AND T2.state = 'NJ' GROUP BY T1.opensecrets_id, T1.thomas_id

question: Current legislator Roger F. Wicker has not been a representative for how many terms?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.official_full_name = 'Roger F. Wicker' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `current-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.district IS NULL OR T2.district = ''

question: Provide the start date, end date, and party of Pearl Peden Oldfield.
original_query: SELECT T2.start, T2.`end`, T2.party FROM historical AS T1 INNER JOIN `historical-terms` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T1.first_name = 'Pearl' AND T1.middle_name = 'Peden' AND T1.last_name = 'Oldfield'

question: How many Jewish legislators do not have facebook?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.bioguide_id) FROM ( SELECT T1.bioguide_id FROM current AS T1 INNER JOIN `social-media` AS T2 ON T1.bioguide_id = T2.bioguide WHERE T2.facebook IS NULL GROUP BY T1.bioguide_id ) T3

question: How many questions in 2014's survey had more than 200 answers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(QuestionID) FROM Answer WHERE SurveyID LIKE 2014 GROUP BY QuestionID ORDER BY COUNT(QuestionID) > 200 LIMIT 1

question: Tell the number of surveys that contained the question “What country do you work in?”.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.QuestionID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid INNER JOIN Survey AS T3 ON T1.SurveyID = T3.SurveyID WHERE T2.questiontext = 'What country do you work in?'

question: What was the percentage for the answer of "Yes" was given to the question "Has your employer ever formally discussed mental health (for example, as part of a wellness campaign or other official communication)?"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T1.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'Has your employer ever formally discussed mental health (for example, as part of a wellness campaign or other official communication)?'

question: How many times more for the number of users who took the "mental health survey for 2017" than "mental health survey for 2018"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.UserID) AS REAL) / ( SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2018' ) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2017'

question: What are the ages of the oldest and youngest user that were surveyed? Indicate their user id.
original_query: SELECT MAX(T1.AnswerText), MIN(T1.AnswerText) , ( SELECT T1.UserID FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 1 ORDER BY T1.AnswerText LIMIT 1 ) AS "youngest id" FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questionid = 1

question: How many users answered "No" to the question "Would you bring up a mental health issue with a potential employer in an interview?" in 2014's survey?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T1.questiontext = 'Would you bring up a mental health issue with a potential employer in an interview?' AND T2.SurveyID = 2014 AND T2.AnswerText LIKE 'NO'

question: How many users answered the question "Overall, how much importance does your employer place on physical health?"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'Overall, how much importance does your employer place on physical health?'

question: For the question “What US state or territory do you work in?”, how many people gave "Kansas" as the answer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'What US state or territory do you work in?' AND T1.AnswerText = 'Kansas'

question: Please list the IDs of the users who answered "Yes" to the question "Do you think that discussing a physical health issue with your employer would have negative consequences?" in 2014's survey.
original_query: SELECT T2.UserID FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T1.questiontext = 'Do you think that discussing a physical health issue with your employer would have negative consequences?' AND T2.AnswerText LIKE 'Yes' AND T2.SurveyID = 2014

question: How many users answered "No" to question 19?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(QuestionID) FROM Answer WHERE QuestionID = 19 AND AnswerText LIKE 'No'

question: How many users participated in the mental health survey for 2014?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2014'

question: Give the number of users who took the "mental health survey for 2018".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2018'

question: What is the average result of the question "What is your age?" in 2014's survey?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.AnswerText) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.UserID) AS "avg" FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2014 AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'What is your age?'

question: Provide the number of users who took part in the "mental health survey for 2016".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Survey AS T2 ON T1.SurveyID = T2.SurveyID WHERE T2.Description = 'mental health survey for 2016'

question: Please list all the questions in the mental health survey for 2014.
original_query: SELECT T2.questiontext FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid INNER JOIN Survey AS T3 ON T1.SurveyID = T3.SurveyID WHERE T3.Description LIKE 'mental health survey for 2014' GROUP BY T2.questiontext

question: How many respondents who participated in the survey in 2019 have ever sought treatment for a mental health disorder from a mental health professional?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.QuestionID = 7 AND T1.SurveyID = 2019 AND T1.AnswerText = 1

question: How many respondents who participated in the survey in 2014 work remotely at least 50% of the time?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.AnswerText) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T1.QuestionID = 93 AND T1.SurveyID = 2014 AND T1.AnswerText = 'Yes'

question: For all the users who have been asked "Have you ever been diagnosed with a mental health disorder?", how many of them said "Yes"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'Have you ever been diagnosed with a mental health disorder?' AND T1.AnswerText = 'Yes'

question: What is the rate of increase of users with a current mental disorder from 2019's survey to 2016's survey?
original_query: SELECT CAST(( SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2019 AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'Do you currently have a mental health disorder?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Yes' ) - ( SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2016 AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'Do you currently have a mental health disorder?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Yes' ) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2016 AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'Do you currently have a mental health disorder?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Yes' )

question: From 2016 to 2019, how many users each year were asked the question 13?
original_query: SELECT SurveyID, COUNT(UserID) FROM Answer WHERE QuestionID = 13 AND SurveyID BETWEEN 2016 AND 2019 GROUP BY SurveyID

question: According to 2016's survey, what is the number of users with a mental health disorder in the past?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID = 2016 AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'Have you had a mental health disorder in the past?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Yes'

question: How many users answered "Yes" to the question "Have you had a mental health disorder in the past?" in 3 consecutive years starting from 2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.UserID) FROM Question AS T1 INNER JOIN Answer AS T2 ON T1.questionid = T2.QuestionID WHERE T2.SurveyID IN (2016, 2017, 2018) AND T1.questiontext LIKE 'Have you had a mental health disorder in the past?' AND T2.AnswerText = 'Yes'

question: How many different answers did the question "Describe the conversation you had with your previous employer about your mental health, including their reactions and actions taken to address your mental health issue/questions." get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.AnswerText) FROM Answer AS T1 INNER JOIN Question AS T2 ON T1.QuestionID = T2.questionid WHERE T2.questiontext LIKE 'Describe the conversation you had with your previous employer about your mental health, including their reactions and actions taken to address your mental health issue/questions.'

question: How many users participated in the Survey No.2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserID) FROM Answer WHERE SurveyID LIKE 2016

question: How many respondents of the mental health survey were diagnosed with 'Substance Use Disorder'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(AnswerText) FROM Answer WHERE AnswerText LIKE 'Substance Use Disorder'

question: How many menus were created for steamship?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE venue = 'STEAMSHIP'

question: Provide the numbers of the menu item which includes Fresh lobsters in every style and location where that dish was used on a menu.
original_query: SELECT T2.menu_id, T1.xpos, T1.ypos FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T4.name = 'Fresh lobsters in every style'

question: What is the event sponsored by the Republican House?
original_query: SELECT event FROM Menu WHERE sponsor = 'REPUBLICAN HOUSE'

question: How many dishes do not have correct data for the year in which it appeared first?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Dish WHERE first_appeared < 1851 OR first_appeared > 2012

question: What is the highest price of the dish "Clear green turtle" on a menu page?
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Clear green turtle' ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the menus sponsored by Pacific Mail Steamship Company, how many menus have no more than 2 pages?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T1.sponsor = 'PACIFIC MAIL STEAMSHIP COMPANY' GROUP BY T2.menu_id HAVING COUNT(T2.page_number) <= 2

question: Among all the menu pages with the appearance of the dish "Clear green turtle", how many of them have the dish at a stable price?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Clear green turtle' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.highest_price IS NULL

question: Among all the dishes that were once free, what is the name of the dish that had appeared on most menus?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Dish WHERE lowest_price = 0 ORDER BY menus_appeared DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the highest price of the dish "Chicken gumbo" on a menu page?
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Chicken gumbo' ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the sponsors of the menu whose image full height is more than 10000 mm?
original_query: SELECT T2.sponsor FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T1.full_height = 10000

question: Please list the prices of the dish "Clear green turtle" on every menu page it appeared on.
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Clear green turtle'

question: How many pages were there on the menu created on 17th November 1898?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.date = '1898-11-17' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id

question: How many menus were created for lunch?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE event = 'LUNCH'

question: Among the menus that include baked apples with cream, who is the sponsor of the menu with the highest price?
original_query: SELECT T4.sponsor FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T4 ON T4.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T3.name = 'Baked apples with cream' AND T3.id = 107 ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many dishes appeared more than once on a menu?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Dish WHERE times_appeared > Dish.menus_appeared

question: What is the image ID of page 1 of the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace"?
original_query: SELECT T2.image_id FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T1.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace' AND T2.page_number = 1

question: Among the menus in which the dish "Clear green turtle" had appeared, how many of them used the dollar as their currency?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.currency = 'Dollars' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T4.name = 'Clear green turtle'

question: Among the menus that include milk, what is the menu page id of the menu that has the highest price?
original_query: SELECT T1.menu_page_id FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T2.name = 'Milk' ORDER BY T1.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the page numbers of all the menu pages on which the dish "Chicken gumbo" had appeared.
original_query: SELECT T1.page_number FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Chicken gumbo'

question: What is the name of the menu with the highest number of pages?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id GROUP BY T2.menu_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.page_number) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the IDs of all the menus that are DIYs of the restaurant.
original_query: SELECT id FROM Menu WHERE sponsor IS NULL

question: How long has the "Clear Green Turtle" dish appeared on the menu, and tell me when its latest update was?
original_query: SELECT T1.last_appeared - T1.first_appeared, T2.updated_at FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T1.name = 'Clear green turtle'

question: Where is the place that menu with ID 12472 was created for?
original_query: SELECT location FROM Menu WHERE id = 12472

question: How many menus were used in Dutcher House?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Menu WHERE location = 'Dutcher House'

question: What dishes made their first and last appearances in 1855 and 1900, respectively?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Dish WHERE first_appeared = 1855 AND last_appeared = 1900

question: List the names and menu page IDs of the dishes that first appeared in 1861.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T1.dish_id FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T2.first_appeared = 1861

question: How much space does page 1 of the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace" cover?
original_query: SELECT T2.full_height * T2.full_width FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T1.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace' AND T2.page_number = 1

question: How much does the dish on page 2 of menu ID 12474 cost?
original_query: SELECT T1.price FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_page_id WHERE T2.menu_id = 12474 AND T2.page_number = 2

question: Please list the IDs of the menus that are DIYs of the restaurant and have the dish "Clear green turtle".
original_query: SELECT T2.menu_id FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T4.name = 'Clear green turtle' AND T3.sponsor IS NULL

question: Is "c02c9a3b-6881-7080-e040-e00a180631aa" the uuid for menu called "The Biltmore"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.uuid = 'c02c9a3b-6881-7080-e040-e00a180631aa' THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS yn FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T1.name = 'The Biltmore' AND T2.uuid = 'c02c9a3b-6881-7080-e040-e00a180631aa'

question: List down the name of dishes from menu created in April.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.created_at, 7, 1) = '4'

question: Name the dishes that cost 180,000.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T2.price = 180000

question: How many dishes are there on page 1 of menu ID12882?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.page_number = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id WHERE T1.menu_id = 12882

question: Which dish has the highest price on the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace"? Please give its name.
original_query: SELECT T4.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T3.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace' ORDER BY T1.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of all the dishes that appeared on the menu "Zentral Theater Terrace".
original_query: SELECT T4.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T3.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace'

question: Calculate the total dish count for menu with uuid of "510d47e4-2958-a3d9-e040-e00a18064a99" & "510d47e4-295a-a3d9-e040-e00a18064a99".
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.uuid = '510d47e4-2958-a3d9-e040-e00a18064a99' THEN T1.dish_count ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.uuid = '510d47e4-295a-a3d9-e040-e00a18064a99' THEN T1.dish_count ELSE 0 END) FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id

question: What is the highest price of dishes with menu item ID 1 to 5?
original_query: SELECT T2.price FROM Dish AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.dish_id WHERE T2.id BETWEEN 1 AND 5 ORDER BY T2.price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the name and menu price of dishes that were free.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T1.price FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T2.lowest_price = 0

question: List down name of dishes from menu with menu page ID 1389.
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T1.menu_page_id = 1389

question: What is the menu id of the menu sponsored by Occidental and Oriental Steamship Company with the highest number of pages?
original_query: SELECT T2.menu_id FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T1.sponsor = 'OCCIDENTAL & ORIENTAL STEAMSHIP COMPANY' GROUP BY T2.menu_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.page_number) DESC LIMIT 1
