question: List down the menu page IDs for menu sponsored by Occidental & Oriental?
original_query: SELECT T2.id FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id WHERE T2.sponsor = 'Occidental & Oriental'

question: To which menu does the menu page image ID5189412 belong? Please give its name.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id WHERE T2.image_id = 5189412

question: Which menu page has a bigger width, page 1 of "Zentral Theater Terrace" or page 1 of "Young's Hotel"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Zentral Theater Terrace' THEN T2.full_width ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.name = 'Young''s Hotel' THEN T2.full_width ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Zentral Theater Terrace' ELSE 'Young''s Hotel' END FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id

question: Provide the sponsor and event of the menu which includes Cerealine with Milk.
original_query: SELECT T3.name, T3.event FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T1.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T4.name = 'Cerealine with Milk'

question: How many menu items were created on 28th March 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MenuItem WHERE created_at LIKE '2011-03-28%'

question: Who is the sponsor of menu with ID 12463?
original_query: SELECT sponsor FROM Menu WHERE id = 12463

question: How many dishes are included in the menu page ID 144?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MenuItem WHERE menu_page_id = 144

question: Provide the page IDs and name of the menu which had the highest page count.
original_query: SELECT T1.page_number, T2.name FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN Menu AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.menu_id ORDER BY T2.page_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of all the dishes on page 1 of menu ID12882.
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM MenuPage AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T3 ON T2.dish_id = T3.id WHERE T1.menu_id = 12882 AND T1.page_number = 1

question: What are the names of the dishes in the menu sponsored by The Society of Cumberland that was created for the 19th reunion at Grand Pacific Hotel in Chicago, Illinois?
original_query: SELECT T4.name FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.menu_page_id INNER JOIN Dish AS T4 ON T3.dish_id = T4.id WHERE T1.sponsor = 'THE SOCIETY OF THE CUMBERLAND' AND T1.event = '19NTH REUNION' AND T1.place = 'GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL,CHICAGO,ILL'

question: Which dish lasted longer, Anchovies or Fresh lobsters in every style?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'Anchovies' THEN last_appeared - first_appeared ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'Fresh lobsters in every style' THEN last_appeared - first_appeared ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Anchovies' ELSE 'Fresh lobsters in every style' END FROM Dish WHERE name IN ('Fresh lobsters in every style', 'Anchovies')

question: On the menu with the most dishes, how many dishes were there on its second page?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.dish_id) FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.menu_page_id = T2.id INNER JOIN Menu AS T3 ON T2.menu_id = T3.id WHERE T2.page_number = 2 GROUP BY T3.name ORDER BY T3.dish_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the dishes shown in the lower right corner of menu page 48706?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM MenuItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Dish AS T2 ON T2.id = T1.dish_id WHERE T1.xpos > 0.75 AND T1.ypos > 0.75 AND T1.menu_page_id = 48706

question: List down the page numbers for menu with dishes on the right upper corner.
original_query: SELECT T2.page_number FROM Menu AS T1 INNER JOIN MenuPage AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.menu_id INNER JOIN MenuItem AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.menu_page_id WHERE T3.xpos > 0.75 AND T3.ypos < 0.25

question: How much is her GDP in agriculture for the country with the least area?
original_query: SELECT T2.GDP * T2.Agriculture FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T1.Area ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which nations have a boundary with the Kalahari Desert?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM desert AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_desert AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Desert INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Kalahari'

question: Which Asian country gave its agricultural sector the largest share of its gross domestic product?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T2.Country = T3.Code INNER JOIN economy AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Asia' ORDER BY T4.Agriculture DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the country whose citizens have the lowest purchasing power?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code ORDER BY T1.Inflation DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of ABEDA and when was it established?
original_query: SELECT Name, Established FROM organization WHERE Abbreviation = 'ABEDA'

question: List all the cities in Sumatra and state the population of each city.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Population FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN locatedOn AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T3.Name = 'Sumatra'

question: In which country is the city of Grozny? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Province = T2.Name WHERE T3.Name = 'Grozny'

question: For countries with area between 500000 to 1000000, state the country and infant mortality rate.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Infant_Mortality FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Area BETWEEN 500000 AND 1000000

question: List all members and member type of the Islamic Development Bank.
original_query: SELECT T2.Country, T2.Type FROM organization AS T1 INNER JOIN isMember AS T2 ON T1.Abbreviation = T2.Organization INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T2.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Islamic Development Bank'

question: Provide all rivers name and length in USA.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Name, T3.Length FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN river AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.River WHERE T2.Country = 'USA'

question: In which province and country does Moldoveanu located? State its height.
original_query: SELECT T2.Province, T2.Country, T1.Height FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T1.Name = 'Moldoveanu'

question: What province does the 4th most populous city in the United Kingdom belong to, and how many people live there?
original_query: SELECT T1.Province, T1.Population FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'United Kingdom' ORDER BY T1.Population DESC LIMIT 3, 1

question: How much sea is around the island where Kerinci Mountain is located?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T4.Sea) FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN mountainOnIsland AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island INNER JOIN islandIn AS T4 ON T4.Island = T3.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'Kerinci'

question: For all cities where Seine is located at, which city has the greatest population? Calculate the difference from the city with least population.
original_query: SELECT MAX(T1.Population) - MIN(T1.population) FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN river AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.River WHERE T3.Name = 'Seine'

question: What proportion of rivers have a length of more than 3,000 miles? Please provide the name of a Russian river that is more than 3,000 miles long.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Length > 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Name) FROM river AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.River INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country

question: How many cities have a salt lake located in it?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.City) FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN lake AS T2 ON T1.Lake = T2.Name WHERE T2.Type = 'salt'

question: What is the capital of the country that has the Licancabur Mountain?
original_query: SELECT T4.Capital FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T4.Province = T3.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'Licancabur'

question: Please list the mountains in the country with the lowest inflation rate.
original_query: SELECT Mountain FROM geo_mountain WHERE Country = ( SELECT Country FROM economy ORDER BY Inflation ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the name of the country with the smallest population, and what is its gross domestic product?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.GDP FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T1.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which 2 countries' border span across the longest length? Provide the country's full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T3.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country2 ORDER BY T2.Length DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many deserts are there in a country where over 90% of people speaks Armenian?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Desert) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_desert AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T3.Name = 'Armenian' AND T3.Percentage > 90

question: How much does the gross domestic products goes to the industry sector for Singapore?
original_query: SELECT T2.GDP * T2.Industry FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Singapore'

question: What is the longitude of the island on which Mount Olympos is located?
original_query: SELECT T3.Longitude FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN mountainOnIsland AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T1.Name = 'Olympos'

question: How many organizations are established in countries where people speak Bosnian?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Name) FROM language AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Bosnian'

question: What is the population of African in 'Turks and Caicos Islands'?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage * T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'African' AND T1.Name = 'Turks and Caicos Islands'

question: Which Zaire region is home to the country's deepest lake's Name it and list its depth.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name, T1.Name, T1.Depth FROM lake AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Lake INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T4.Code = T3.Country WHERE T4.Name = 'Zaire'

question: What is the population gap between the United Kingdom and Italy?
original_query: SELECT MAX(Population) - MIN(Population) FROM country WHERE Name = 'United Kingdom' OR Name = 'Italy'

question: Which island is city Balikpapan located on? How big is the island?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name, T3.Area FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN locatedOn AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T1.Name = 'Balikpapan'

question: How many mountains are there on the African Continent?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN province AS T4 ON T4.Country = T1.Code INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T5 ON T5.Province = T4.Name WHERE T3.Name = 'European'

question: Which country has the widest range of religious practices?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN religion AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the countries with over 3 organizations, how many of them have an inflation rate of over 5%?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Country) FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Country IN ( SELECT Country FROM organization GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(Country) > 3 ) AND T1.Inflation > 5

question: Which country has the most neighbors? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which countries have more than 90% of African? List the name of the country in full.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ethnicGroup AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'African' AND T1.Percentage > 90

question: For the countries have the population north of a billion, which one has the lowest GDP? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Population > 1000000000 ORDER BY T2.GDP ASC LIMIT 1

question: Among the countries whose government type is republic, how many of them shares a border that's longer than 200?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN borders AS T3 ON T3.Country1 = T2.Country WHERE T2.Government = 'republic' AND T3.Length > 200

question: Which countries are dependent on the British Crown?
original_query: SELECT Country FROM politics WHERE Government = 'British crown dependency'

question: Name the first organisation established in the Paris city. State its abbreviation, full name and date of establishment.
original_query: SELECT Abbreviation, Name, Established FROM organization WHERE City = 'Paris' ORDER BY Established ASC LIMIT 1

question: List all the mountains that are volcanic along with its longitude and latitude.
original_query: SELECT Name, Latitude, Longitude FROM mountain WHERE Type = 'volcano'

question: Please provide a list of every volcano mountain in the province of Ecuador.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province WHERE T3.Name = 'Ecuador' AND T1.Type = 'volcano'

question: How many mountains are there in Indonesia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Mountain) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Indonesia'

question: How many people in Montenegro speaks Serbian?
original_query: SELECT T1.Percentage * T2.Population FROM language AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Serbian' AND T2.Name = 'Montenegro'

question: What are the names of the rivers in Canada?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.River FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'Canada' AND T1.River IS NOT NULL

question: Which two countries share the second highest mountain? Give the country code.
original_query: SELECT T1.Code FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Mountain = ( SELECT Name FROM mountain ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1, 1 )

question: What is the average height of all mountains in Nepal?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Height) FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T2.Province = 'Nepal'

question: In which country does Polish found least in?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ethnicGroup AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Polish' GROUP BY T2.Name, T1.Percentage ORDER BY T1.Percentage ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the provincial capital of the province with a population of less than 80,000 that has the highest average population per area?
original_query: SELECT CapProv FROM province WHERE Population < 80000 ORDER BY Population / Area DESC LIMIT 1

question: Where is the capital of country which has the largest percentage of Malay people?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Malay' ORDER BY T2.Percentage DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the organization(s) that has 'National Society' as member type.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM organization AS T1 INNER JOIN isMember AS T2 ON T2.Country = T1.Country INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T2.Country = T3.Code WHERE T2.Type = 'National Society'

question: Of the deserts on the America Continent, which one covers the greatest area?
original_query: SELECT T5.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN geo_desert AS T4 ON T4.Country = T1.Code INNER JOIN desert AS T5 ON T5.Name = T4.Desert WHERE T3.Name = 'America' ORDER BY T5.Area DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which two countries does the Detroit River flow through? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN river AS T2 ON T1.River = T2.Name INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T1.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Detroit River'

question: In which city is the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development's headquarters? Please include the city and province where the headquarters are located in your answer.
original_query: SELECT City, Province FROM organization WHERE Name = 'European Bank for Reconstruction and Development'

question: Which religion has the majority of the people in Japan?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN religion AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Japan' ORDER BY T2.Percentage DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the organizations where headquarters are in the 'USA', what is the percentage of the them are in 'Washington'?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Washington' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.City) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Country = 'USA'

question: Which nation has the greatest infant mortality rate among those that attained independence in 1960?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country FROM politics AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Independence) = '1960' ORDER BY T2.Infant_Mortality DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the organization names established in the countries where Dutch is spoken.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM language AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Dutch'

question: What is the average population growth rate of countries where more than 3 languages are used?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.Population_Growth) / COUNT(T3.Country) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN population AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T2.Country IN ( SELECT Country FROM language GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(Country) > 3 ) GROUP BY T3.Country

question: How many more people speak English than speak Scottish in United Kingdom?
original_query: SELECT T3.Population * (T2.Percentage - T1.Percentage) FROM ethnicGroup AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T1.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Scottish' AND T2.Name = 'English' AND T3.Name = 'United Kingdom'

question: Which nation's GDP is the lowest among those that are communist states?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM politics AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Government = 'Communist state' ORDER BY T2.GDP ASC LIMIT 1

question: For the third largest country, which ethinic group has the most population?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM country ORDER BY Area DESC LIMIT 2, 1 ) GROUP BY T2.Name ORDER BY T2.Percentage * T1.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: Indicate the coordinates of all the deserts whose area is in more than one country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Latitude, T1.Longitude FROM desert AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_desert AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Desert GROUP BY T1.Name, T1.Latitude, T1.Longitude HAVING COUNT(T1.Name) > 1

question: Please list the capital cities of the countries that have more than 4 mountains.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Name, T1.Capital HAVING COUNT(T1.Name) > 4

question: Name the river of which Lorraine is on. Please name the mountains where to source flow from?
original_query: SELECT T1.SourceLongitude, T1.SourceLatitude, T1.SourceAltitude FROM river AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_river AS T2 ON T2.River = T1.Name WHERE T2.Province = 'Lorraine'

question: What is the population density of Hanoi's home country?
original_query: SELECT T1.Population / T1.Area FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Province = T2.Name WHERE T3.Name = 'Hanoi'

question: What other country does the most populated nation in the world share a border with and how long is the border between the two nations?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country2, T2.Length FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country2 WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM country ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: In which lake flows the river that is, in turn, the mouth of the Manicouagan River?
original_query: SELECT NAME FROM lake WHERE river = ( SELECT river FROM river WHERE NAME = 'Manicouagan' )

question: Please list the top 3 countries with the highest inflation rate.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Inflation DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all the coral islands along with its city and province.
original_query: SELECT City, Province FROM locatedOn WHERE Island IN ( SELECT Name FROM island WHERE Type = 'coral' )

question: When did Uganda declare independence?
original_query: SELECT T2.Independence FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Uganda'

question: How many organizations are established in the country with the most ethnic groups?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Province) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T3.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: When did 'Bulgaria' gain independence?
original_query: SELECT T2.Independence FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Bulgaria'

question: How many Italian regions are bordered by the Mediterranean Sea? How deep is the Mediterranean Sea?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.province), T3.Depth FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN sea AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Sea WHERE T1.Code = 'I' AND T3.Name = 'Mediterranean Sea' GROUP BY T3.Depth

question: When did the United States of America attained it's Independence?
original_query: SELECT T1.Independence FROM politics AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'United States'

question: Where country does Baghdad belongs to?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Province = 'Baghdad'

question: List all the cities and provinces located at the rivers that flows to Atlantic Ocean.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Province FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN river AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.River WHERE T3.Sea = 'Atlantic Ocean'

question: List the all the cities and its city population for provinces with population more than 1000000.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Population FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T2.Name = T1.Province WHERE T2.Population > 1000000

question: Among countries with more than 400,000 GDP, state its capital and population.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital, T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.GDP > 400000

question: What is the average area of Asian countries?
original_query: SELECT AVG(Area) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Continent = 'Asia'

question: Among the countries with a GDP of over 1000000, how many of them have mountains higher than 1000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T3 ON T3.Country = T1.Code INNER JOIN mountain AS T4 ON T4.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T3.GDP > 1000000 AND T4.Height > 1000

question: Give the full names of the countries that are located in more than one continent.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country GROUP BY T3.Name HAVING COUNT(T3.Name) > 1

question: On what date did the country have a gross domestic product 400% higher than Saint Kitts and Nevis become independent?
original_query: SELECT Independence FROM politics WHERE country = ( SELECT country FROM economy WHERE GDP = 1100 )

question: What is the name of the most recently founded organization in Saudi Arabia?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM organization AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'Saudi Arabia' ORDER BY T1.Established DESC LIMIT 1

question: What kind of mountain is Ampato? Which province and nation does this mountain belong to?
original_query: SELECT T1.Type, T3.Name, T4.Name FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T3.Country = T4.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Ampato'

question: State the different ethnic group and percentage of the language in Singapore.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Percentage FROM ethnicGroup AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'Singapore' GROUP BY T1.Name, T1.Percentage

question: Which country has the highest infant mortality? Also state its population growth.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Population_Growth FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Infant_Mortality DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country has the highest GDP?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.GDP DESC LIMIT 1

question: What kind of government does Iran have?
original_query: SELECT T2.Government FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Iran'

question: How many organizations are established after 1999/1/1 in a country whose GDP is under 500000?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country, COUNT(T1.Country) FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.GDP < 500000 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Established) < '1999' GROUP BY T1.Country

question: What river has the 17th-longest length overall? Specify it's length.
original_query: SELECT Name, Length FROM river ORDER BY Length DESC LIMIT 16, 1

question: Among all the rivers finally flows to the sea of 540m in depth, which one has the longest length?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM sea AS T1 INNER JOIN river AS T2 ON T2.Sea = T1.Name WHERE T1.Depth = 540 ORDER BY T2.Length DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country has the least organization membership?
original_query: SELECT country FROM organization WHERE country IN ( SELECT Code FROM country ) GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(NAME) LIMIT 1

question: Average length of the rivers flowing into the Donau River.
original_query: SELECT * FROM river WHERE Name = 'Donau'

question: What provinces encompass the world's biggest desert in terms of overall area?
original_query: SELECT Province FROM geo_desert WHERE Desert = ( SELECT Name FROM desert ORDER BY Area DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: State the inflation rate of Greece.
original_query: SELECT T2.Inflation FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Greece'

question: Calculate the population of Arab in each country?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage * T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Arab'

question: What is the average population ratio of the countries in which organizations were established in 1947?
original_query: SELECT T1.Population / T1.Area FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Established) = '1947'

question: When did Equatorial Guinea become independent?
original_query: SELECT T2.Independence FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Equatorial Guinea'

question: Which religion is most prevalent in Asia?
original_query: SELECT T4.Name FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN religion AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Asia' GROUP BY T4.Name ORDER BY SUM(T4.Percentage) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name and length of rivers located at 'Orleans' city?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name, T3.Length FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN river AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.River WHERE T1.Name = 'Orleans'

question: Which nation has the highest GDP? Please give the nation's full name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.GDP DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which nations have a 100% Spanish-speaking population?
original_query: SELECT Country FROM language WHERE Name = 'Spanish' AND Percentage = 100

question: What is the average population for all cities location at Baltic Sea?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Population) FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN located AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN sea AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Sea WHERE T3.Name = 'Baltic Sea'

question: Where does Bermuda belong to? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM locatedOn AS T1 INNER JOIN island AS T2 ON T1.Island = T2.Name INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T1.Country WHERE T3.Name = 'Bermuda'

question: Which lake is the largest in terms of both surface area and depth?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM lake ORDER BY Area * Depth DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the number of infant mortality in Switzerland in a year?
original_query: SELECT T2.Infant_Mortality * T1.Population * T2.Population_Growth FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Switzerland'

question: How big is Africa, and how many nations make up the continent?
original_query: SELECT T1.Area, COUNT(T3.Name) FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Asia' GROUP BY T1.Name, T1.Area

question: Name of the capitals of the countries that have less than 99.95% less population than the country that has the most population.
original_query: SELECT Capital FROM country WHERE Population <= ( SELECT MAX(Population) - MAX(Population) * 0.9995 FROM country )

question: How many people reside in the nation's capital city, which is situated in the nation that attained independence on 8/15/1947?
original_query: SELECT T3.Population FROM politics AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Capital WHERE T1.Independence = '1947-08-15'

question: Calculate the percentage of population in Edmonton city to the population of its province.
original_query: SELECT CAST(T1.Population AS REAL) * 100 / T2.Population FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN province AS T2 ON T1.Province = T2.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'Edmonton'

question: How many percent of the total area of Russia is in Europe?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country WHERE T3.Name = 'Russia' AND T1.Name = 'Europe'

question: Find the GPD for Bosnia and Herzegovina and the type of government it belongs to.
original_query: SELECT T1.GDP, T2.Government FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country WHERE T3.Name = 'Bosnia and Herzegovina'

question: Of all the lakes in Bolivia, which is the deepest?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM lake AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_lake AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Lake INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T4.Code = T3.Country WHERE T4.Name = 'Bolivia' ORDER BY T1.Depth DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the depth of the lakes that are located in the Province of Albania.
original_query: SELECT T2.Depth FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN lake AS T2 ON T1.Lake = T2.Name WHERE T1.Province = 'Albania'

question: Name the tallest mountain on Himalaya and what is its height.
original_query: SELECT Name, Height FROM mountain WHERE Mountains = 'Himalaya' ORDER BY Height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the government type for the country with the highest percentage GDP in Agriculture.
original_query: SELECT T3.Government FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN politics AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Agriculture DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the infant mortality rate for Ethiopia?
original_query: SELECT T2.Infant_Mortality FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Ethiopia'

question: Which sea is the shallowest and which country surrounds it?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Code WHERE Sea = ( SELECT Name FROM sea ORDER BY Depth ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the number of growth population for country with the lowest infant mortality?
original_query: SELECT T2.Population_Growth * T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Infant_Mortality IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.Infant_Mortality ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which country has the biggest percentage of the albanian ethnic group?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN ethnicGroup AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Albanian' ORDER BY T2.Percentage DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the capital of the 3rd most populated country in Asia and what is the capital city's ratio in percentage (%) against the overall population of the country?
original_query: SELECT T4.Capital, CAST(T3.Population AS REAL) * 100 / T4.Population FROM city AS T3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T1.Capital , T1.Population FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Continent = 'Asia' ORDER BY T1.Population DESC LIMIT 2, 1 ) AS T4 ON T3.Name = T4.Capital

question: On which continent is the country with the most erosion of real income?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Code ORDER BY T4.Inflation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the countries on the European Continent that have a population growth of more than 3%.
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN continent AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN population AS T4 ON T4.Country = T1.Code WHERE T3.Name = 'Europe' AND T4.Population_Growth > 0.03

question: What are the most recent three independent nations?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN politics AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country ORDER BY T2.Independence DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many percent of the mountains on Andes which are non-volcanic?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN type != 'volcano' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM mountain WHERE Mountains = 'Andes'

question: What is the average inflation rate of the biggest continent?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T4.Inflation) FROM continent AS T1 INNER JOIN encompasses AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Continent INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T3.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN economy AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Code WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM continent ORDER BY Area DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which country is 41% Christian? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN religion AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Christian' AND T2.Percentage = 41

question: Based on the data shown at Target, what percentage of countries are non-Christian?
original_query: SELECT 100 - (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Target = 'Christian' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL)) * 100 / COUNT(Country) FROM target

question: Provide the population of the city of the 'World Tourism Organization' headquarter.
original_query: SELECT T2.Population FROM organization AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.City = T2.Name WHERE T1.Name = 'World Tourism Organization'

question: What are the names of the sea that can be found on the island with the biggest area?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM islandIn AS T1 INNER JOIN sea AS T2 ON T2.Name = T1.Sea WHERE T1.Island = ( SELECT Name FROM island ORDER BY Area DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: For the country in which Olsztyn is located, where is the capital?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Olsztyn'

question: Which country with a city with a population between 50,000 and 300,000 inhabitants and which is a member of an organization established between 03/01/1991 and 04/30/1991 is also a member of the EBRD?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN isMember AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN organization AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country INNER JOIN city AS T4 ON T4.Country = T3.Country WHERE T3.Abbreviation = 'EBRD' AND T4.Population BETWEEN 50000 AND 300000 AND T3.Established BETWEEN '1991-01-31' AND '1991-04-30'

question: What percentage of nations have achieved independence since 1993 and practice parliamentary democracy? Please include any three parliament-based democracies that attained independence after 1993.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(government = 'parliamentary democracy', 1, 0)) , CAST(SUM(IIF(government = 'parliamentary democracy', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM politics AS t1 WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', independence) >= '1993'

question: Among the countries whose GDP is over 1000000, how many of them have a population groth rate of over 3%?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Country) FROM economy AS T1 INNER JOIN population AS T2 ON T1.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.GDP > 1000000 AND T2.Population_Growth > 3

question: Which Arabic-speaking country has the smallest population?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'Arabic' AND T2.Percentage = 100 ORDER BY T1.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: State all countries with border greater than 4,000. List the full country name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN borders AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country1 WHERE T2.Length > 4000

question: What is the newest established organization where Singapore is a member of?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN isMember AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country INNER JOIN organization AS T3 ON T3.Country = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'Singapore' ORDER BY T3.Established DESC LIMIT 1

question: Of all the countries in which English is spoken, what percentage has English as their only language?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Percentage = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Name = 'English'

question: List all islands that are greater than the island on which Warwickshire is located.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM island WHERE Area > ( SELECT DISTINCT T3.Area FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN locatedOn AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.City INNER JOIN island AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Island WHERE T1.Province = 'Warwickshire' )

question: Which country is home to the world's tiniest desert, and what are its longitude and latitude?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country, T1.Latitude, T1.Longitude FROM desert AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_desert AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Desert WHERE T1.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM desert ORDER BY Area ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the latitude of the island on which Mount Andrinjitra is located?
original_query: SELECT T1.Latitude FROM island AS T1 INNER JOIN mountainOnIsland AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Island WHERE T2.Mountain = 'Andringitra'

question: How many times longer is the longest river in Tajikistan than the shortest river?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.Length) / MIN(T2.Length) FROM located AS T1 INNER JOIN river AS T2 ON T1.River = T2.Name WHERE T1.Country = 'TJ'

question: How many mountains are there in the United States?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Name) FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN geo_mountain AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Mountain INNER JOIN province AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Province INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T4.Province = T3.Name WHERE T4.Name = 'United States'

question: Which nation has the smallest population, and where is its capital located?
original_query: SELECT Name, Capital FROM country ORDER BY Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: In which group of islands is Rinjani Mountain located?
original_query: SELECT T1.Islands FROM island AS T1 INNER JOIN mountainOnIsland AS T2 ON T1.Name = T2.Island INNER JOIN mountain AS T3 ON T3.Name = T2.Mountain WHERE T3.Name = 'Rinjani'

question: Among the countries with a population of over 10000000, how many of them have a GDP of over 500000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Name) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN economy AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.GDP > 500000 AND T1.Population > 10000000

question: Which country has the city of 114339 in population? Give the full name of the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T2.Population = 114339

question: Which United States province is home to the greatest number of corporations' corporate headquarters?
original_query: SELECT T1.Province FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN organization AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Country WHERE T1.Name = 'United States' GROUP BY T1.Province ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who played the character named "Chanice Kobolowski"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.`Character Name` = 'Chanice Kobolowski'

question: Give the name of the No.1 character in the credit list from the highest rating thriller movie.
original_query: SELECT T2.`Character Name` FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID WHERE T2.creditOrder = '1' AND T1.Genre = 'Thriller' ORDER BY T1.Rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the height and net worth of actors starred in Three Men and a Little Lady.
original_query: SELECT T3.`Height (Inches)`, T3.NetWorth FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Title = 'Three Men and a Little Lady'

question: Among the actors born in New York City, list the genre of their movie with a rating greater than 5.
original_query: SELECT T1.Genre FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T3.`Birth City` = 'New York City' AND T1.Rating > 5

question: Which actor played the role of Joker in the movie Batman?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Title = 'Batman' AND T2.`Character Name` = 'Joker'

question: Among the movies with drama genre, what is the percentage of the actors with net worth greater than $400,000,000.00?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T3.NetWorth, ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL) > 400000000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T3.NetWorth, ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL) < 400000000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Genre = 'Drama'

question: Give the biography of the actor who played "Michael Moscovitz".
original_query: SELECT T2.Biography FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.`Character Name` = 'Michael Moscovitz'

question: Which movie had the biggest budget? Give the name of the movie.
original_query: SELECT Title FROM movie ORDER BY Budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: How tall is the actor who played "Lurch"?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Height (Inches)` FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.`Character Name` = 'Lurch'

question: Please list the names of the characters in the movie Look Who's Talking.
original_query: SELECT T2.`Character Name` FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID WHERE T1.Title = 'Look Who''s Talking'

question: How many movies has the highest networth actor acted in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T2.NetWorth, ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL) = ( SELECT MAX(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(NetWorth, ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL)) FROM actor)

question: Among the movies starring Tom Cruise, which one of them has the best quality?
original_query: SELECT T1.Title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T3.Name = 'Tom Cruise' ORDER BY T1.Rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: When is the birthday of the actor who played "Sully"?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Date of Birth` FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.`Character Name` = 'Sully'

question: What is the MPAA rating and title of the movie starred by Leonardo DiCaprio with highest budget?
original_query: SELECT T1.`MPAA Rating`, T1.Title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T3.Name = 'Leonardo DiCaprio' ORDER BY T1.Budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who was the actor that played in the movie "Batman" with the longest screentime?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T3.MovieID = T1.MovieID WHERE T3.Title = 'Batman' ORDER BY T1.screentime DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the gross of a comedy movie with a rating lower than 7 and starred by an actor with a net worth greater than $375,000,000.00?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Gross) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T3.NetWorth, ',', ''), '$', '') AS REAL) > 375000000 AND T1.Rating < 7 AND T1.Genre = 'Comedy'

question: Please list the names of all the characters played by Tom Cruise.
original_query: SELECT T1.`Character Name` FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T2.Name = 'Tom Cruise'

question: Count the male actors born in USA that starred in Ghost.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Title = 'Ghost' AND T3.Gender = 'Male' AND T3.`Birth Country` = 'USA'

question: Who played the No.2 character in the credit list of the movie "American Hustle"?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Title = 'American Hustle' AND T2.creditOrder = '2'

question: How much longer in percentage is the screen time of the most important character in Batman than the least important one?
original_query: SELECT (MAX(CAST(SUBSTR(T2.screentime, 3, 2) AS REAL)) - MIN(CAST(SUBSTR(T2.screentime, 3, 2) AS REAL))) * 100 / MIN(CAST(SUBSTR(T2.screentime, 3, 2) AS REAL)) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID WHERE T1.Title = 'Batman'

question: How many movies star a male African American actor?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM characters AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T2.Ethnicity = 'African American'

question: What is the average rating of all the movies starring Tom Cruise?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Rating) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T3.Name = 'Tom Cruise'

question: What is the runtime of the movie starred by Jackie Chan with a rating greater than 7?
original_query: SELECT T1.Runtime FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.MovieID = T2.MovieID INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T3.Name = 'Jackie Chan' AND T1.Rating > 7

question: Please list the titles of all the films that have more than 2 special features.
original_query: SELECT title FROM ( SELECT title, COUNT(special_features) AS num FROM film GROUP BY title ) AS T ORDER BY T.num > 2

question: State the number of films that are 178 minutes long.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE length = '178'

question: What is the name and email of the staff in store ID 2?
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name, email FROM staff WHERE store_id = 2

question: List down all ratings of action film titles.
original_query: SELECT T1.description FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'action'

question: How many customers live in the city of Miyakonojo?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.customer_id) FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id INNER JOIN customer AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.city = 'Miyakonojo'

question: Who is the manager of the store with the largest collection of films?
original_query: SELECT T.first_name, T.last_name FROM ( SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name, COUNT(T1.film_id) AS num FROM inventory AS T1 INNER JOIN store AS T2 ON T1.store_id = T2.store_id INNER JOIN staff AS T3 ON T2.manager_staff_id = T3.staff_id GROUP BY T3.first_name, T3.last_name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the description and film title of ID 996?
original_query: SELECT description, title FROM film_text WHERE film_id = 996

question: Provide the email, address, city, and country of the customer Lillie Kim.
original_query: SELECT T1.email, T2.address, T3.city, T4.country FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T2.city_id = T3.city_id INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T3.country_id = T4.country_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Lillie' AND T1.last_name = 'Kim'

question: What is Mary Smith's rental ID?
original_query: SELECT T2.rental_id FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'MARY' AND T1.last_name = 'SMITH'

question: Among the payments made by Mary Smith, how many of them are over 4.99?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.amount) FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'MARY' AND T2.last_name = 'SMITH' AND T1.amount > 4.99

question: Where can you rent the movie 'Wyoming Storm'? Identify the address of the rental store and the rental rate.
original_query: SELECT T2.store_id, T1.address, T4.rental_rate FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN store AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.store_id = T3.store_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T4.title = 'WYOMING STORM'

question: How many actors starred in the film id 508?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(actor_id) FROM film_actor WHERE film_id = 508

question: What is the address of Mary Smith?
original_query: SELECT T1.address FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'MARY' AND T2.last_name = 'SMITH'

question: Calculate the total amount paid by Stephanie Mitchell for film rentals in June 2005.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.amount) FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'STEPHANIE' AND T2.last_name = 'MITCHELL' AND SUBSTR(T1.payment_date, 1, 7) = '2005-06'

question: How long did Austin Cintron take to return the movie 'Destiny Saturday'?
original_query: SELECT T2.rental_date - T2.return_date FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'AUSTIN' AND T4.title = 'DESTINY SATURDAY'

question: Calculate the total payment amount of customers in Nagasaki district.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.amount) FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN address AS T3 ON T3.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T3.district = 'Nagasaki'

question: List the actors' IDs who have "KILMER" as last name.
original_query: SELECT actor_id FROM actor WHERE last_name = 'KILMER'

question: How many titles did Mary Smith rent in 2005? Determine the percentage of titles rented in June 2005.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.rental_id) , CAST(SUM(IIF(STRFTIME('%m',T2.rental_date) = '7', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.rental_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maria' AND T1.last_name = 'Miller' AND STRFTIME('%Y',T2.rental_date) = '2005'

question: How many customers rented for an above-average period?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(customer_id) FROM rental WHERE return_date - rental_date > ( SELECT AVG(return_date - rental_date) FROM rental )

question: How many non-active clients have not returned the rented material?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.customer_id) FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.active = 0

question: List all the films that are rated as PG-13.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE rating = 'PG-13'

question: How many actors have starred in the film ACADEMY DINOSAUR?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actor_id) FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T2.title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: Which category is the most common?
original_query: SELECT T.name FROM ( SELECT T2.name, COUNT(T2.name) AS num FROM film_category AS T1 INNER JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id GROUP BY T2.name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the full names of all the actors that have starred in the film ACADEMY DINOSAUR.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: Name the cast members of the movie 'African Egg'.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T1.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'AFRICAN EGG'

question: In which country is the store where Hector Poinexter rents equipment located?
original_query: SELECT T5.country FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN store AS T2 ON T1.store_id = T2.store_id INNER JOIN address AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id INNER JOIN city AS T4 ON T3.city_id = T4.city_id INNER JOIN country AS T5 ON T4.country_id = T5.country_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'HECTOR' AND T1.last_name = 'POINDEXTER'

question: For how many times has the customer RUTH MARTINEZ rented a film?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.rental_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'RUTH' AND T1.last_name = 'MARTINEZ'

question: Name the most recent movie rented by Dorothy Taylor.
original_query: SELECT T4.title FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'DOROTHY' AND T1.last_name = 'TAYLOR' ORDER BY T2.rental_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many English films have a duration of over 50 minutes and the cost of replacement are under 10.99?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T2.name = 'English' AND T1.length > 50 AND T1.replacement_cost < 10.99

question: Who is the customer with the largest payment for rental films?
original_query: SELECT T.first_name, T.last_name FROM ( SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, SUM(T2.amount) AS num FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN payment AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.first_name, T1.last_name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the title of the animated films that have the shortest length?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id ORDER BY T1.length LIMIT 1

question: Where does the staff Jon Stephens live?
original_query: SELECT T1.address, T1.address2 FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Jon' AND T2.last_name = 'Stephens'

question: Please provide the full name of the customer at 692 Joliet Street.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.address = '692 Joliet Street'

question: Find the full name and email address of inactive customers whose record was created in 2006.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name, email FROM customer WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',create_date) = '2006' AND active = 0

question: Indicate the percentage of inactive customers at store no.1.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN active = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(customer_id) FROM customer WHERE store_id = 1

question: Calculate the percentage of total payment of MARGARET MOORE customers.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.first_name = 'MARGARET' AND T2.last_name = 'MOORE', T1.amount, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.amount) FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id

question: What is the name of the client who has the largest quantity of rented material without returning it?
original_query: SELECT T.first_name FROM ( SELECT T2.first_name, COUNT(T1.rental_date) AS num FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T2.first_name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What language was the most used in movies released in 2006?
original_query: SELECT T.language_id FROM ( SELECT T1.language_id, COUNT(T1.language_id) AS num FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',T1.release_year) = '2006' GROUP BY T1.language_id ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the full names of all the customers who have rented the film with the highest replacement cost.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id ORDER BY T4.replacement_cost DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please give the description of the movie starring JENNIFER DAVIS.
original_query: SELECT T3.description FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T3.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'JOHNNY' AND T1.last_name = 'DAVIS'

question: Which district does Maria Miller live in?
original_query: SELECT T2.district FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maria' AND T1.last_name = 'Miller'

question: Mention the language of Untouchables Sunrise film and calculate its rental cost per day.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T1.replacement_cost / T1.rental_duration AS cost FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T1.title = 'UNTOUCHABLES SUNRISE'

question: List down the film titles performed by Emily Dee.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Emily' AND T1.last_name = 'Dee'

question: List all the animation titles.
original_query: SELECT T3.title AS per FROM film_category AS T1 INNER JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T1.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T2.name = 'Animation'

question: In films with rental rate of 4.99, list down the inventory ID of the films starred by Lucille Dee.
original_query: SELECT T4.inventory_id FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Lucille' AND T1.last_name = 'Dee' AND T3.rental_rate = 4.99

question: What is the inventory ID of the films starred by Russell Close with a duration between 110 to 150 minutes?
original_query: SELECT T4.inventory_id FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T3.length BETWEEN 110 AND 150 AND T1.first_name = 'Russell' AND T1.last_name = 'Close'

question: Among all films that the customer RUTH MARTINEZ has rented, what is the percentage of it being a Music film?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.name = 'Music', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T4 ON T1.film_id = T4.film_id INNER JOIN customer AS T5 ON T4.store_id = T5.store_id INNER JOIN rental AS T6 ON T4.inventory_id = T6.inventory_id WHERE T5.first_name = 'RUTH' AND T5.last_name = 'MARTINEZ'

question: Among the times Mary Smith had rented a movie, how many of them happened in June, 2005?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'MARY' AND T2.last_name = 'SMITH' AND STRFTIME('%Y',T1.payment_date) = '2005' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.payment_date) = '6'

question: Among films with store ID of 2, list the title of films with the highest rental rate.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T2.store_id = 2 ORDER BY rental_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the store ID of the films starred by Reese West with a duration of 100 minutes and below?
original_query: SELECT T4.store_id FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T3.length < 100 AND T1.first_name = 'Reese' AND T1.last_name = 'West'

question: List the address in Texas in the ascending order of city id.
original_query: SELECT address FROM address WHERE district = 'Texas' AND city_id = ( SELECT MIN(city_id) FROM address WHERE district = 'Texas' )

question: Among films with a rental rate of 4.99, what is the total number of films starred by Bob Fawcett?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actor_id) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.rental_rate = 4.99 AND T1.first_name = 'Bob' AND T1.last_name = 'Fawcett'

question: What is the language of the film ACADEMY DINOSAUR?
original_query: SELECT T2.name FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN language AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T1.title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: List the descriptions of movies under the category Travel.
original_query: SELECT T1.description FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.`name` = 'Travel'

question: What are the actors that have the same forename as Johnny? Please include in your answer the full names of these actors.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM actor WHERE first_name = 'Johnny'

question: List the store ID of the films with a rental rate greater than the 60% of average rental rate of all listed films.
original_query: SELECT T2.store_id FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T1.rental_rate > ( SELECT AVG(T1.rental_rate) * 0.6 FROM film AS T1 )

question: How many films have a rental rate of 0.99?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE rental_rate = 0.99

question: Provide any 5 customers' full names who have rented from Mike Hillyer.
original_query: SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM staff AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN customer AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Mike' AND T1.last_name = 'Hillyer' LIMIT 5

question: List the full names of customers who have paid more than 10$.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.amount > 10

question: What is the store and inventory ID of the film with the longest duration?
original_query: SELECT T2.store_id, T2.inventory_id FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id ORDER BY T1.length DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the customers who have rented the film ACADEMY DINOSAUR, how many of them are active?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.active = 1 AND T4.title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: Calculate the average rate of renting the film that Lucille Tracy got starred.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.rental_rate) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'LUCILLE' AND T1.last_name = 'TRACY'

question: How many animation film titles are rated for adults only?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.title) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'animation' AND T1.rating = 'NC-17'

question: List at least 10 films that falls into the Horror category.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'Horror'

question: What are the last updated date for English film titles that were released in 2006?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.last_update FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN `language` AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T2.`name` = 'English' AND T1.release_year = 2006

question: What are the titles of the films starred by Russell Close?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T1.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Russell' AND T2.last_name = 'Close'

question: Please give the full names of all the active staff.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM staff WHERE active = 1

question: Which actor acted in ANONYMOUS HUMAN?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T3.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'ANONYMOUS HUMAN'

question: Give the email address of the person who lives in "1411 Lillydale Drive".
original_query: SELECT T2.email FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.address = '1411 Lillydale Drive'

question: What are the ratings of the film featuring behind the scenes?
original_query: SELECT rating FROM film WHERE special_features LIKE '%Behind the Scenes%'

question: What is the difference in the average number of films rented each day in Australia and Canada?
original_query: SELECT AVG(IIF(T4.country = 'Australia', 1, 0)) - AVG(IIF(T4.country = 'Canada', 1, 0)) AS diff FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN city AS T3 ON T2.city_id = T3.city_id INNER JOIN country AS T4 ON T3.country_id = T4.country_id

question: How many customers are still active?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(customer_id) FROM customer WHERE active = 1

question: List the store ID of the film titled "Amadeus Holy".
original_query: SELECT T2.store_id FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T1.title = 'Amadeus Holy'

question: The actor Dan Harris played in a 77 minute film with replacement cost of 9.99, what was the rating for that film?
original_query: SELECT T3.rating FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'DAN' AND T1.last_name = 'HARRIS' AND T3.length = 77 AND T3.replacement_cost = '9.99'

question: How many times is the number of films Gina DeGeneres acted in than Penelope Guinness?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.first_name = 'GINA' AND T2.last_name = 'DEGENERES', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T2.first_name = 'PENELOPE' AND T2.last_name = 'GUINESS', 1, 0)) FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id

question: List movie titles with duration over 120 minutes that are in the action category.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T3.category_id = T2.category_id WHERE T3.`name` = 'action' AND T1.length > 120

question: Please list the titles of the films that are released in 2006 and have a rental rate of $2.99.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE release_year = 2006 AND rental_rate = 2.99

question: Who are the actors that act in the ACADEMY DINOSAUR film?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: List the films' titles which were rented by Brian Wyman in July, 2005.
original_query: SELECT T4.title FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'BRIAN' AND T1.last_name = 'WYMAN' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.rental_date) = '2005' AND STRFTIME('%m',T2.rental_date) = '7'

question: Calculate the percentage of customers who paid more than the average rent amount in store 1.
original_query: SELECT CAST(( SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN payment AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.amount > ( SELECT AVG(amount) FROM payment ) ) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(customer_id) FROM customer )

question: How many films with the rental rate of $2.99 have the special feature of "Deleted Scenes"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE rental_rate = 2.99 AND special_features = 'Deleted Scenes'

question: List down all film IDs of comedy film titles.
original_query: SELECT T1.film_id FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T3.category_id = T2.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'comedy'

question: How many addresses are there in Woodridge city?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.address_id) FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id WHERE T2.city = 'Woodridge'

question: State the number of addresses in the Nordrhein-Westfalen district.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(address_id) FROM address WHERE district = 'Nordrhein-Westfalen'

question: How many film categories are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category_id) FROM category

question: In 2006, how many restricted films were released?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE rating = 'R' AND release_year = 2006

question: Of the movies in which Reese Kilmer acted, what percentage are action movies?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T4.name = 'Action', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.actor_id) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film_category AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T4 ON T3.category_id = T4.category_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Reese' AND T1.last_name = 'Kilmer'

question: In store ID 2, how many of the films are R rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T2.store_id = 2 AND T1.rating = 'R'

question: Please list the titles of all the films under the category of "Horror" and has a rental rate of $2.99.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'Horror' AND T1.rental_rate = 2.99

question: How many films rented to the customer RUTH MARTINEZ were returned in August, 2005?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'RUTH' AND T1.last_name = 'MARTINEZ' AND STRFTIME('%m',T2.return_date) = '8' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.return_date) = '2005'

question: Which movie title has the lowest movie rental in the horror category?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.`name` = 'Horror' ORDER BY T1.rental_rate LIMIT 1

question: Who is the customer that is active and lives at 1795 Santiago de Compostela Way, Texas?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T2.address = '1795 Santiago de Compostela Way' AND T1.active = 1

question: How many actors with the surname Kilmer are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(actor_id) FROM actor WHERE last_name = 'Kilmer'

question: List the inventory ID of the film titled "African Egg".
original_query: SELECT T2.inventory_id FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T1.title = 'African Egg'

question: Compute the total payment made by Sarah Lewis for film rentals so far.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.amount) FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN payment AS T3 ON T1.rental_id = T3.rental_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'SARAH' AND T2.last_name = 'LEWIS'

question: How many payments were made throughout the month of August 2005?
original_query: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM payment WHERE payment_date LIKE '2005-08%'

question: Please indicate the full name of actor id 5.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM actor WHERE actor_id = 5

question: How many different clients have rented materials from Jon Stephens?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN staff AS T2 ON T1.staff_id = T2.staff_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Jon' AND T2.last_name = 'Stephens'

question: Provide the full name of all the actors of the film "Ending Crowds".
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T1.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'ENDING CROWDS'

question: Which film has a higher replacement cost, ACE GOLDFINGER or ACADEMY DINOSAUR?
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE title IN ('ACE GOLDFINGER', 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR') ORDER BY replacement_cost DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of documentary films?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.name = 'Documentary', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film_category AS T1 INNER JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id

question: What are the addresses of the inactive customers?
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.active = 0

question: What are the special features for the film "Smoochy Control"?
original_query: SELECT special_features FROM film WHERE title = 'SMOOCHY CONTROL'

question: How many documentary films are rated PG-13?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'Documentary' AND T1.rating = 'PG-13'

question: What are the films that are least rented by the customers?
original_query: SELECT T.title FROM ( SELECT T3.title, COUNT(T1.customer_id) AS num FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.inventory_id = T2.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id GROUP BY T3.title ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the name of the films that can only be found in store id 2.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T2.store_id = 2

question: Who are the top 5 actors with the highest number of films? List their full names and calculate the average number of films for each of the actors.
original_query: SELECT T.first_name, T.last_name, num FROM ( SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, COUNT(T2.film_id) AS num FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id GROUP BY T1.first_name, T1.last_name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 5

question: Provide the full names and emails of customers whose payments were greater than 70% of the average.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T2.email FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN address AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.amount > ( SELECT AVG(amount) FROM payment ) * 0.7

question: How many times is the number of Indian cities than Italian cities?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.country = 'India', 1, 0)) AS REAL) / SUM(IIF(T1.country = 'Italy', 1, 0)) FROM country AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.country_id

question: What is the most common first name among the customers?
original_query: SELECT first_name FROM customer GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY COUNT(first_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the titles of all the films starring the actor PENELOPE GUINESS.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T1.actor_id = T3.actor_id WHERE T3.first_name = 'PENELOPE' AND T3.last_name = 'GUINESS'

question: State the documentary film titles with longest length.
