original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T3.category_id = T2.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'documentary' ORDER BY T1.length DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average rental rate for PG-13 rated movies?
original_query: SELECT AVG(rental_rate) FROM film WHERE rating = 'PG-13'

question: Write down the inventories' IDs and actors' names of "STREETCAR INTENTIONS".
original_query: SELECT T4.inventory_id, T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T4 ON T2.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'STREETCAR INTENTIONS'

question: In films with a length duration of 113 minutes, how many of the films are starred by Kirk Jovovich?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actor_id) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.length = 113 AND T1.first_name = 'Kirk' AND T1.last_name = 'Jovovich'

question: How many actors played a role in the 2006 film whose rental duration is 7 days, rental rate is 4.99 and is 98 minutes duration?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actor_id) FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id WHERE T2.release_year = 2006 AND T2.rental_duration = 7 AND T2.rental_duration = 4.99 AND T2.length = 98

question: What is Diane Collins' email address?
original_query: SELECT email FROM customer WHERE first_name = 'DIANE' AND last_name = 'COLLINS'

question: Among the films starring PENELOPE GUINESS, how many of them are released in 2006?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.film_id) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.release_year = 2006 AND T1.first_name = 'PENELOPE' AND T1.last_name = 'GUINESS'

question: What is the biggest amount of payment for a rental made by Mary Smith?
original_query: SELECT T1.amount FROM payment AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'MARY' AND T2.last_name = 'SMITH' ORDER BY T1.amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list three types of film along with their IDs and the latest update.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name, category_id, last_update FROM category LIMIT 3

question: How many times was "Blanket Beverly" rented?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.rental_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN rental AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id WHERE T1.title = 'Blanket Beverly'

question: List all the films that Karl Berr starred in and rated as PG.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'KARL' AND T1.last_name = 'BERRY' AND T3.rating = 'PG'

question: List at least 10 films that the customers can rent for more than 5 days.
original_query: SELECT T.title FROM ( SELECT T1.title, COUNT(T3.customer_id) AS num FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN rental AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id WHERE T1.rental_duration > 5 GROUP BY T1.title ) AS T WHERE T.num > 10

question: List the films' titles which were rented on 24th May,2005.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN rental AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id WHERE SUBSTR(T3.rental_date, 1, 10) = '2005-05-24'

question: Among all the films starring PENELOPE GUINESS, what is the title of the one with the highest rental price per day?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'PENELOPE' AND T1.last_name = 'GUINESS' ORDER BY T3.rental_rate / T3.rental_duration DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of the actor who has acted the most times in comedy films?
original_query: SELECT T.first_name, T.last_name FROM ( SELECT T4.first_name, T4.last_name, COUNT(T2.actor_id) AS num FROM film_category AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T1.category_id = T3.category_id INNER JOIN actor AS T4 ON T2.actor_id = T4.actor_id WHERE T3.name = 'Comedy' GROUP BY T4.first_name, T4.last_name ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many movies have a length longer than 100?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE length > 100

question: How many films did actor Daryl Wahlberg appear in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'DARYL' AND T2.last_name = 'WAHLBERG'

question: What is the title of the films in which Cuba Allen acted?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Cuba' AND T1.last_name = 'Allen'

question: Which category is the film "Beach Heartbreakers" falls into?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.title = 'BEACH HEARTBREAKERS'

question: Tally the full names of actors in the film "Alabama Devil."
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM film_actor AS T1 INNER JOIN actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T1.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'ALABAMA DEVIL'

question: What is the language for film titled "CHILL LUCK"?
original_query: SELECT T2.`name` FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN `language` AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T1.title = 'CHILL LUCK'

question: What is the title of the restricted film, whose length is 71 minutes and whose replacement cost is $29.99?
original_query: SELECT title FROM film WHERE replacement_cost = 29.99 AND rating = 'R' AND length = 71

question: Please list any two films that Penelope Guiness acted in.
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Penelope' AND T1.last_name = 'Guiness' LIMIT 2

question: What is the name of the most rented movie?
original_query: SELECT T.title FROM ( SELECT T1.title, COUNT(T3.rental_id) AS num FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN inventory AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN rental AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id GROUP BY T1.title ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the titles of any three action films.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'Action' LIMIT 3

question: What is the title of the film with the longest duration time and stars PENELOPE GUINESS?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'PENELOPE' AND T1.last_name = 'GUINESS' ORDER BY T3.length DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the postal code of the address 692 Joliet Street?
original_query: SELECT postal_code FROM address WHERE address = '692 Joliet Street'

question: Give the full name of the actor with the highest rental rate.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T3.film_id = T2.film_id ORDER BY T3.rental_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the actors of film titled "BIRD INDEPENDENCE"?
original_query: SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T2.actor_id = T3.actor_id WHERE T1.title = 'BIRD INDEPENDENCE'

question: What is the description of the film ACADEMY DINOSAUR?
original_query: SELECT description FROM film WHERE title = 'ACADEMY DINOSAUR'

question: What is the difference between the number of children's films and action films?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T2.name = 'Children', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.name = 'Action', 1, 0)) AS diff FROM film_category AS T1 INNER JOIN category AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id

question: What percentage of the movies are PG-13?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(rating = 'PG-13', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(film_id) FROM film

question: Who are the actors starred in the film "Bound Cheaper"?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film AS T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T3.title = 'BOUND CHEAPER'

question: How many rental IDs belong to Eleanor Hunt?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.rental_id) FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN customer AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Eleanor' AND T2.last_name = 'Hunt'

question: Among the films that are released in 2006, how many of them are rated Adults Only in the Motion Picture Association Film Rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE rating = 'NC-17' AND release_year = 2006

question: Among the active customers, how many of them have Nina as their first name?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(customer_id) FROM customer WHERE first_name = 'Nina' AND active = 1

question: How much percentage of the film did Mary Keitel perform more than Angela Witherspoon?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T1.first_name = 'ANGELA' AND T1.last_name = 'WITHERSPOON', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.first_name = 'MARY' AND T1.last_name = 'KEITEL', 1, 0))) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.first_name = 'MARY' AND T1.last_name = 'KEITEL', 1, 0)) FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id

question: What are the addresses for the stores?
original_query: SELECT T2.address FROM store AS T1 INNER JOIN address AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id

question: Among the films that the customer RUTH MARTINEZ has rented, what is the title of the one with the highest replacement cost?
original_query: SELECT T4.title FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'RUTH' AND T1.last_name = 'MARTINEZ' ORDER BY T4.replacement_cost DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which category does BABY HALL film belong to?
original_query: SELECT T3.`name` FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T3.category_id = T2.category_id WHERE T1.title = 'BABY HALL'

question: Please list the top ten movies with the most price per day in descending order of price per day.
original_query: SELECT title FROM film ORDER BY rental_rate / rental_duration DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the average rental rate of sci-fi film titles?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.rental_rate) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T3.category_id = T2.category_id WHERE T3.`name` = 'Sci-Fi'

question: Please list the titles of all the films that the customer RUTH MARTINEZ has rented.
original_query: SELECT T4.title FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN inventory AS T3 ON T2.inventory_id = T3.inventory_id INNER JOIN film AS T4 ON T3.film_id = T4.film_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'RUTH' AND T1.last_name = 'MARTINEZ'

question: How many Italian film titles were special featured with deleted scenes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.film_id) FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN `language` AS T2 ON T1.language_id = T2.language_id WHERE T2.`name` = 'Italian' AND T1.special_features = 'deleted scenes'

question: What is the rental price per day for Airplane Sierra?
original_query: SELECT rental_rate / rental_duration AS result FROM film WHERE title = 'AIRPLANE SIERRA'

question: How many id movies have category id 11?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film_category WHERE category_id = 11

question: What is the total amount paid for rentals made on July 29, 2005?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.amount) FROM rental AS T1 INNER JOIN payment AS T2 ON T1.rental_id = T2.rental_id WHERE date(T1.rental_date) = '2005-07-29%'

question: What is the most common special features of science-fiction movies?
original_query: SELECT T1.special_features FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'sci-fi' ORDER BY T1.special_features DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many films did a customer named Francis Sikes rent?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.customer_id) FROM customer AS T1 INNER JOIN rental AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'FRANCIS' AND T1.last_name = 'SIKES'

question: How many films have a rental duration of over 6 days?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(film_id) FROM film WHERE rental_duration > 6

question: In which year was the film with the highest replacement cost released?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT release_year FROM film WHERE replacement_cost = ( SELECT MAX(replacement_cost) FROM film )

question: For all movies where users left a critic, find the movie name, user, rating and critics comments from the user.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title, T1.user_id, T1.rating_score, T1.critic FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.critic IS NOT NULL

question: User 58149469's critic on which film got 1 like and 2 comments?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.user_id = 58149469 AND T1.critic_likes = 1 AND T1.critic_comments = 2

question: What is the name of the movie whose critic received the highest number of likes related to the critic made by the user rating the movie?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.critic_likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Between 1/1/2017 to 12/31/2017, how many users who were eligible for trial when they rated the movie "Patti Smith: Dream of Life"and what is the image URL to the movie on Mubi?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id), T2.movie_image_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE datetime(T1.rating_timestamp_utc) BETWEEN '2017-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2017-12-31 00:00:00'

question: How many movie lists were still updated 10 years after it was created?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lists WHERE SUBSTR(list_update_timestamp_utc, 1, 4) - SUBSTR(list_creation_timestamp_utc, 1, 4) > 10

question: What's the number of users gave the movie "Downfall" a rating of "4"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'Downfall' AND T1.rating_score = 4

question: Please list the titles of the movie lists user 32172230 created when he or she was eligible for trial.
original_query: SELECT T1.list_title FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.user_id = 32172230 AND T2.user_eligible_for_trial = 1

question: How many followers did the user who posted the list "Non-American Films about World War II" have?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.list_followers) FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_title LIKE 'Non-American Films about World War II'

question: How much is the popularity of the movie that has the highest popularity between 1920 to 1929 and when did the movie received its first rating score of 1 from the users who were a paying subscriber when they rated the movie ?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T2.movie_popularity), MIN(T1.rating_timestamp_utc) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_release_year BETWEEN 1920 AND 1929 AND T1.rating_score = 1 AND T1.user_has_payment_method = 1

question: List ther users who gave the worst rating for movie 'Love Will Tear Us Apart'.
original_query: SELECT T1.user_id FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'Love Will Tear Us Apart' AND T1.rating_score = 1

question: When was the first movie of the director who directed the highest number of movies released and what is the user id of the user who received the highest number of comments related to the critic made by the user rating the movie?
original_query: SELECT MIN(movie_release_year) FROM movies WHERE director_name = ( SELECT T2.director_name FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_release_year BETWEEN 1960 AND 1985 GROUP BY T2.director_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.director_name) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the average number of Mubi users who love movies directed by Stanley Kubrick?
original_query: SELECT AVG(movie_popularity) FROM movies WHERE director_name = 'Stanley Kubrick'

question: When did user 39115684 rate the movie "A Way of Life"?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating_score FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Way of Life' AND T1.user_id = 39115684

question: What is the user avatar url for user 41579158? What is the latest movie rated by him / her?
original_query: SELECT T3.user_avatar_image_url, T3.rating_date_utc FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN ratings_users AS T3 ON T3.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T3.user_id = 41579158 ORDER BY T3.rating_date_utc DESC LIMIT 1

question: Between 1/1/2010 to 12/31/2020, how many users, who were a trialist when they created the list, gave the movie "The Secret Life of Words" a rating score of 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'The Secret Life of Words' AND T1.rating_score = 3 AND T1.user_trialist = 0 AND T1.rating_timestamp_utc BETWEEN '2010%' AND '2020%'

question: Please list the names of the top three movies in the number of likes related to the critic made by the user rating the movie.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.critic_likes DESC LIMIT 3

question: Give the number of followers for the user who posted the most lists.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.list_followers) FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id GROUP BY T1.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.list_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many movies directed by Francis Ford Coppola have a popularity of more than 1,000? Indicate what is the highest amount of likes that each critic per movie has received, if there's any.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_title), T1.critic FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.director_name = 'Francis Ford Coppola' AND T2.movie_popularity > 1000

question: Please list the names of the movies that have been rated the most times in 2020.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2020%' GROUP BY T2.movie_title ORDER BY COUNT(T2.movie_title) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many users, who were not a a trialist when they rated the movie, gave the movie "The South" a rating score of not more than 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.user_trialist = 0 AND T2.rating_score <= 2 AND T1.movie_title = 'The South'

question: What's the description of user 85981819's movie list with the most followers?
original_query: SELECT T1.list_description FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.user_id = 85981819 ORDER BY T1.list_followers DESC LIMIT 1

question: For movie titled 'Welcome to the Dollhouse', how many percentage of the ratings were rated with highest score.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.rating_score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_title = 'Welcome to the Dollhouse'

question: What is the percentage of the ratings were rated by user who was a subcriber?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN user_subscriber = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM ratings

question: What is the average rating score of the movie "When Will I Be Loved" and who was its director?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.rating_score), T2.director_name FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'When Will I Be Loved'

question: Which movie has the highest average score in Mubi?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id GROUP BY T2.movie_title ORDER BY SUM(T1.rating_score) / COUNT(T1.rating_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: When was the first movie released and who directed it?
original_query: SELECT movie_release_year, director_name FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY movie_release_year ASC LIMIT 1

question: Show the avatar of the user who gave the rating at 2019/10/17 1:36:36.
original_query: SELECT T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2019-10-17 01:36:36'

question: Give the name of the movie that got the most "5" ratings.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_score = 5

question: Who is the director of the most popular movie of all time and when was it released? Indicate the average rating score of the users who were on a trialist when they rated the movie.
original_query: SELECT T1.director_name, T1.movie_release_year , SUM(T2.rating_score) / COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.user_trialist = 1 ORDER BY T1.movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the URL to the rating on Mubi made by user 45579900 for the movie "The Vertical Ray of the Sun" that received 20 likes?
original_query: SELECT T2.rating_url FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.user_id = 45579900 AND T1.movie_title = 'The Vertical Ray of the Sun' AND T2.critic_likes = 20

question: Give the url of movie which was rated 5 on 2013/5/3 5:11:17.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE rating_score = 5 AND rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2013-05-03 05:11:17'

question: Which year was the third movie directed by Quentin Tarantino released? Indicate the user ids of the user who gave it a rating score of 4.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_release_year, T1.user_id FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_id = ( SELECT movie_id FROM movies WHERE director_name = 'Quentin Tarantino' ORDER BY movie_release_year ASC LIMIT 2, 1 ) AND T1.rating_score = 4

question: How many users were not trialists when they rated the movie "Patti Smith: Dream of Life"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'Patti Smith: Dream of Life' AND T1.user_trialist = 0

question: What is the name of the most followed list?
original_query: SELECT list_title FROM lists ORDER BY list_followers DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the movie that was rated by the user between 1/1/2013 to 12/31/2013 by the user who created the list "100 Greatest Living American Filmmakers"? Calculate for the average rating score of those movies in 2013.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN lists AS T3 ON T3.user_id = T1.user_id WHERE T1.rating_timestamp_utc BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31' AND T3.list_title = '100 Greatest Living American Filmmakers'

question: What's the url of user 39115684's rating on the movie 'When Will I Be Loved'?
original_query: SELECT T1.rating_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Way of Life' AND T1.user_id = 39115684

question: What's the average rating score of the movie "A Way of Life"?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.rating_score) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Way of Life'

question: What is the average score for the movie Versailles Rive-Gauche?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.rating_score) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title LIKE 'Versailles Rive-Gauche'

question: Among the movie lists created after 2010/1/1, how many of them have over 200 followers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lists WHERE list_followers > 200 AND list_update_timestamp_utc > '2010-01-01'

question: What is the percentage of rated movies were released in year 2021?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.movie_release_year = 2021 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id

question: Among the lists created in 2016, which is the list that was updated most recently.
original_query: SELECT list_title FROM lists WHERE strftime('%Y', list_update_timestamp_utc) = '2016' ORDER BY list_update_timestamp_utc DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please provide the title of the list with the most comments on the list.
original_query: SELECT list_title FROM lists GROUP BY list_title ORDER BY COUNT(list_comments) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many movies did the director of the highest movie popularity make?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_id) FROM movies WHERE director_id = ( SELECT director_id FROM movies ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Who gave a "4" rating to the movie "Freaks" at 2013/5/4 6:33:32? Give his/her user id.
original_query: SELECT T1.user_id FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE rating_score = 4 AND rating_timestamp_utc LIKE '2013-05-04 06:33:32' AND T2.movie_title LIKE 'Freaks'

question: Show the head portrait of the user who gave the most "5" ratings.
original_query: SELECT T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.rating_score = 5

question: Please list the id of the director of the movie "It's Winter".
original_query: SELECT director_id FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'It''s Winter'

question: What is Jeannot Szwarc's most popular movie and what is its average rating score?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title, AVG(T1.rating_score) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.director_name = 'Jeannot Szwarc' ORDER BY T2.movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among all movies in the list, calculate the percentage of movies that were never been rated?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.movie_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id

question: When did the creator of the list "250 Favourite Films" last updated a movie list?
original_query: SELECT T2.list_update_date_utc FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.list_title = '250 Favourite Films' ORDER BY T2.list_update_date_utc DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please provide the ID of the user with the most followers on the list.
original_query: SELECT user_id FROM lists ORDER BY list_followers DESC LIMIT 1

question: For movie id 1269, how many users, who was a paying subscriber and was eligible for trial when he rated the movie, gave the movie a rating score of less than or equal to 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ratings WHERE movie_id = 1269 AND rating_score <= 2 AND user_eligible_for_trial = 1 AND user_has_payment_method = 1

question: For all ratings which are rated in year 2020, name the movies which has the rating scored 4 and above.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(T1.rating_timestamp_utc, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) = 2020 AND CAST(SUBSTR(T1.rating_timestamp_utc, 6, 2) AS INTEGER) > 4

question: What's the avatar image of the user who created the movie list "250 Favourite Films"?
original_query: SELECT T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id AND T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.list_title = '250 Favourite Films'

question: Name movie titles released in year 1945. Sort the listing by the descending order of movie popularity.
original_query: SELECT movie_title FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 1945 ORDER BY movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the number of the paying subscribers when rating a movie after the year 2014?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(user_subscriber) FROM ratings_users WHERE user_has_payment_method = 1 AND rating_date_utc > '2014%'

question: How many ratings on the movie "A Way of Life" are made after the year 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.rating_id) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title = 'A Way of Life' AND T1.rating_timestamp_utc >= '2012-01-01'

question: For all the movies that were released in 1995, how many lower than 3 ratings did the most popularity movie had?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.rating_score) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_score < 3 AND T2.movie_release_year = 1995 AND T2.movie_popularity = ( SELECT MAX(movie_popularity) FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 1995 )

question: List all movies with the best rating score. State the movie title and number of Mubi user who loves the movie.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.movie_title, T2.movie_popularity FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_score = 5

question: What percentage of users rated the movie "Patti Smith: Dream of Life" by more than 3?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.rating_score > 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.rating_score) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_title LIKE 'Patti Smith: Dream of Life'

question: Please list the names of the top three movies in the number comments related to the critic made by the user rating the movie.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.critic_comments DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the URL to the user profile image on Mubi of the user who gave the movie id of 1103 a 5 ratinng score on 4/19/2020?
original_query: SELECT T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T2.user_id = 1103 AND rating_score = 5 AND T2.rating_date_utc = '2020-04-19'

question: Among the lists created by user 4208563, which one has the highest number of followers? Indicate how many followers it has and whether the user was a subscriber or not when he created the list.
original_query: SELECT T1.list_followers, T2.user_subscriber = 1 FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id AND T2.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.user_id = 4208563 ORDER BY T1.list_followers DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the cover image of the user who created the movie list 'Georgia related films'?
original_query: SELECT T1.user_cover_image_url FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_title LIKE 'Georgia related films'

question: What are the URL to the list page on Mubi of the lists with followers between 1-2 and whose last update timestamp was on 2012?
original_query: SELECT list_url FROM lists WHERE list_update_timestamp_utc LIKE '2012%' AND list_followers BETWEEN 1 AND 2 ORDER BY list_update_timestamp_utc DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's the description for the movie list "Short and pretty damn sweet"?
original_query: SELECT list_description FROM lists WHERE list_title = 'Short and pretty damn sweet'

question: What is the name of the movie whose critic received the highest amount of likes? Indicate the URL to the rating on Mubi.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title, T1.rating_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id ORDER BY T1.critic_likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many users rated the movie "The Magnificent Ambersons" gave a rating score of no more than 2? List all the URL to the rating on Mubi.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id), T2.rating_url FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_title = 'The Magnificent Ambersons' AND T2.rating_score <= 2

question: Was the user who created the "World War 2 and Kids" list eligible for trial when he created the list? Indicate how many followers does the said list has.
original_query: SELECT T2.user_eligible_for_trial, T1.list_followers FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T1.user_id AND T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.list_title = 'World War 2 and Kids'

question: Who is the director that directed the highest number of movies in the 70s? If there are multiple directors with the same amount of movies, list all of their names and indicate the highest rating score that those movies got from the users.
original_query: SELECT T2.director_name, T1.rating_score FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_release_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1979 GROUP BY T2.director_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.movie_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the list ID that was first created by user 85981819?
original_query: SELECT list_id FROM lists_users WHERE user_id = 85981819 ORDER BY list_creation_date_utc ASC LIMIT 1

question: In which year was the movie "La Antena" released?
original_query: SELECT movie_release_year FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'La Antena'

question: How many followers does the list created by the user whose user_avatar_image_url is https://assets.mubicdn.net/images/avatars/74983/images-w150.jpg?1523895214 have?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.list_followers) FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.user_avatar_image_url = 'https://assets.mubicdn.net/images/avatars/74983/images-w150.jpg?1523895214'

question: How many films were released in 2007?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 2007

question: Among the lists with at least one follower, how many were created by user who was subscriber when created the list?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.list_id) FROM lists_users AS T1 INNER JOIN lists AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_followers >= 1 AND T1.user_subscriber = 1

question: List all movies rated by user 39115684. State the title, rating date and rating score.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title, T1.rating_timestamp_utc, T1.rating_score FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.user_id = 39115684

question: Where can I find the movie list "Short and pretty damn sweet"?
original_query: SELECT list_url FROM lists WHERE list_title = 'Short and pretty damn sweet'

question: Please give me the url of the movie "La Antena".
original_query: SELECT movie_url FROM movies WHERE movie_title = 'La Antena'

question: From all the movies that got more than 13000 popularity number, which one had the least ratings.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.movie_popularity > 13000 ORDER BY T1.rating_score LIMIT 1

question: For the 1998 movie which got the highest popularity, how many "4" rating did the movie get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_title) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.rating_score = 4 AND T2.movie_release_year = 1998 ORDER BY T2.movie_popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many users who created a list in the February of 2016 were eligible for trial when they created the list? Indicate the user id of the user who has the most number of followers in his list in February of 2016.
original_query: SELECT T1.list_followers FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id AND T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T2.list_creation_date_utc BETWEEN '2016-02-01' AND '2016-02-29' AND T2.user_eligible_for_trial = 1

question: What is the average popularity of each movie that was directed by Christopher Nolan? Indicate which movie directed by him has received the highest number of 5 rating scores.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.movie_popularity) FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.director_name = 'Christopher Nolan'

question: Who created the list that has 142 comments? Indicate the user id of the user, if there are multiple lists with 142 comments, list the user id of the person who created the list
original_query: SELECT user_id FROM lists WHERE list_comments = 142

question: Which of the film directed by director Abbas Kiarostami has the highest average score?
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_title FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T2.director_name = 'Abbas Kiarostami' GROUP BY T2.movie_title ORDER BY SUM(T1.rating_score) / COUNT(T1.rating_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many users, who were a paying subscriber when they rated the movie, gave the movie that was released in 1924 and directed by Erich von Stroheim a rating score of 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_release_year = 1924 AND T1.director_name = 'Erich von Stroheim' AND T2.rating_score = 5 AND T2.user_has_payment_method = 1

question: List the genres of the movies which actor id 851 is the star.
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM movies2actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T1.actorid = T3.actorid WHERE T3.actorid = 851

question: How many different female users have rated movies from France?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.userid) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.u_gender = 'F' AND T3.country = 'France'

question: How many actors have acted in both US or UK films?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.actorid) FROM movies2actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'USA' OR T2.country = 'UK'

question: How many 35-year-old female users gave the movie 1711133 a rating of 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.userid) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T2.rating = 3 AND T2.movieid = '1711133' AND T1.age = 35 AND T1.u_gender = 'F'

question: How many of the users who rate the movie with the id '2462959' are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.userid) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T2.userid = 2462959 AND T1.u_gender = 'F'

question: What is the most distinct rated movie with a running time of 0?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.runningtime = 0 AND T2.rating = ( SELECT MAX(rating) FROM u2base )

question: What are the ID of actors that had worked together with director 22397? What was the genre of that movie?
original_query: SELECT T2.actorid, T4.genre FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T4 ON T1.movieid = T4.movieid WHERE T4.directorid = 22397

question: Which different movies from France got the least ratings?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'France' AND T1.rating = 1

question: Which Crime film got the lowest average rating?
original_query: SELECT T2.movieid FROM u2base AS T2 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T3.genre = 'Crime' GROUP BY T2.movieid ORDER BY AVG(T2.rating) LIMIT 1

question: What horror movies have a running time of at least 2? Please list movie IDs.
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.runningtime >= 2 AND T1.genre = 'Horror'

question: What is the difference of female and male audiences in number who viewed horror movies?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T2.u_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.u_gender = 'M', 1, 0)) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T3 ON T3.movieid = T1.movieid WHERE T3.genre = 'horror'

question: List down 5 non English adventure movies from UK?
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'UK' AND T1.genre = 'Adventure' AND T2.isEnglish = 'F' LIMIT 5

question: Among the most rated UK movies, how many of them has running time of less than 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'UK' AND T2.runningtime < 2 AND T1.rating = 5

question: Among the worst actresses, how many of them got a rating of more than 3 to the movies they starred?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.userid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid INNER JOIN users AS T4 ON T1.userid = T4.userid WHERE T3.a_quality = 0 AND T1.rating > 3 AND T4.u_gender = 'F'

question: Among the users who gave a rating of 5, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.userid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating = 5 AND T2.u_gender = 'M'

question: Among the actors who acted in UK movies, what percentage of actors received a rating of at least 3?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.a_quality >= 3, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid WHERE T1.country = 'UK'

question: How many female actresses appeared in the movie 2312852, what country was it in, and what was it's running time?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.a_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) , T3.country, T3.runningtime FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T2.movieid = 2312852 GROUP BY T3.country, T3.runningtime

question: Please list the ID of the movie that has been mostly rated by female users.
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T2.u_gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.movieid ORDER BY COUNT(T2.userid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total amount male and female actors who were casted in movie ID 1684910 and what is the proportion between the highest quality actors against the worst quality of actors? Indicate your answer in percentage. List the the director as well as the genre.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(a_gender = 'M', 1, 0)) , SUM(IIF(a_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) , CAST(SUM(IIF(a_quality = 5, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) , CAST(SUM(IIF(a_quality = 0, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), ( SELECT directorid FROM movies2directors WHERE movieid = 1684910 ) , ( SELECT genre FROM movies2directors WHERE movieid = 1684910 ) FROM actors WHERE actorid IN ( SELECT actorid FROM movies2actors WHERE movieid = 1684910 )

question: UK produced what genre of movies?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'UK'

question: List all of the user ids and ages who rated movies with the id 1695219?
original_query: SELECT T2.userid, T2.age FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.movieid = 1695219

question: Among the English comedy movies produced in the UK, how many movies with a running time of 3 was rated the highest by users between the age 45-50? Indicate the movie names.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN u2base AS T3 ON T1.movieid = T3.movieid INNER JOIN users AS T4 ON T3.userid = T4.userid WHERE T1.country = 'UK' AND T2.genre = 'Comedy' AND T1.runningtime = 3 AND T3.rating = 5 AND T4.age BETWEEN 45 AND 50 AND T1.isEnglish = 'T'

question: Calculate the percentage of female actors and quality 2 who have appeared twice at the casting of the film 1672580.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.cast_num = 2 AND T1.a_quality = 2, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.actorid) FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid WHERE T2.movieid = 1672580 AND T1.a_gender = 'F'

question: What is the percentage of female audiences who viewed movies with rating 2?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.u_gender = 'F', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.userid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T1.rating = 2

question: What is the average rating of the newest movies from France?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.rating) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'france' AND T2.year = 4

question: Please list the country of the movie that stars an actress who acts the worse.
original_query: SELECT T3.country FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.a_gender = 'F' AND T1.a_quality = 0

question: What are the ID of actors with quality rating of 3 acted in English USA movies?
original_query: SELECT T2.actorid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid WHERE T3.a_quality = 3 AND T1.country = 'USA' AND T1.isEnglish = 'T'

question: Please give the ids of the oldest films that got the most ratings.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.rating = 5 AND T2.year = 1

question: What is the ID of audiences that gave the most rating of 5?
original_query: SELECT userid FROM u2base WHERE rating = 5 GROUP BY userid ORDER BY COUNT(movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the disparate number of the comedy films that got the 1 rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.movieid) FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.rating = 1 AND T1.genre = 'comedy'

question: How many distinct movies in English stars a male actor who acts the best?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.actorid) FROM actors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.actorid = T2.actorid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T2.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T3.isEnglish = 'T' AND T1.a_gender = 'M' AND T1.a_quality = 5

question: How many drama movie with the rating of 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.genre = 'drama' AND T1.rating = 3

question: Please list director IDs who have the quality of at least 3 and have made at least 2 different genres of movies.
original_query: SELECT T1.directorid FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.d_quality >= 3 GROUP BY T1.directorid HAVING COUNT(T2.movieid) >= 2

question: Which actor has acted in at least 2 French films? Please list their IDs.
original_query: SELECT T2.actorid FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'France' GROUP BY T2.actorid HAVING COUNT(T1.movieid) > 2

question: List the top 10 USA movies, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the user rating.
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'USA' GROUP BY T1.movieid ORDER BY AVG(T1.rating) DESC LIMIT 10

question: How many movies from the USA which user rating is less than 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'USA' AND T1.rating < 3

question: What are the most common film genres made by the worst directors?
original_query: SELECT T2.genre FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.d_quality = 0 GROUP BY T2.genre ORDER BY COUNT(T2.movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of casts of movies that are from the USA?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.cast_num) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'USA'

question: How many American comedies are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'USA' AND T2.genre = 'comedy'

question: What is the most popular genre of film directed by directors?
original_query: SELECT genre FROM movies2directors GROUP BY genre ORDER BY COUNT(movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What's different average revenue status for director who directed the movie that got the most 1 ratings?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.avg_revenue FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.d_quality = 5

question: Which actor has appeared in the most films?
original_query: SELECT actorid FROM movies2actors GROUP BY actorid ORDER BY COUNT(movieid) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage difference of English and non-English-language crime movies in other countries in year 3?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.isEnglish = 'T', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.isEnglish = 'F', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movieid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.country = 'other' AND T1.year = 3

question: How many directors with average revenue of 4 have made either action or adventure films?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.directorid) FROM directors AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid WHERE T1.avg_revenue = 4 AND (T2.genre = 'Adventure' OR T2.genre = 'Action')

question: List the user ids and ages who gave the rate 2 to the movie No. 2409051.
original_query: SELECT T1.userid, T1.age FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.userid = T2.userid WHERE T2.movieid = '2409051' AND T2.rating = 2

question: Which adventure movie has the highest average rating?
original_query: SELECT T1.movieid FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN u2base AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T1.genre = 'Adventure' GROUP BY T1.movieid ORDER BY AVG(T2.rating) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the top 5 movies from other countries which to language is not in English.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.movieid FROM u2base AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid WHERE T2.country = 'other' AND T2.isEnglish = 'F' LIMIT 5

question: How many female actors acted in the movies of year 4?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.actorid) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN movies2actors AS T2 ON T1.movieid = T2.movieid INNER JOIN actors AS T3 ON T2.actorid = T3.actorid WHERE T3.a_gender = 'F' AND T1.year = 4

question: Action movies are mostly directed by directors of which country?
original_query: SELECT T3.country FROM movies2directors AS T1 INNER JOIN directors AS T2 ON T1.directorid = T2.directorid INNER JOIN movies AS T3 ON T1.movieid = T3.movieid WHERE T1.genre = 'Action' GROUP BY T3.country ORDER BY COUNT(T3.country) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the zero-budget movie titles, which one has made the highest revenue?
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE budget = 0 ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of movies that came from Japan belong in the 'animation' genre?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T4.genre_name = 'Animation' THEN T1.movie_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T2.genre_id = T4.genre_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T5 ON T3.COUNTry_id = T5.COUNTry_id WHERE T5.COUNTry_name = 'Japan'

question: List the names of all the producers in the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End".
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl' AND T2.job = 'Producer'

question: How many movies did Harrison Ford appear in total?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Harrison Ford'

question: Accumulate the budget of the movie titles with the keyword of "video game".
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.budget) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T3.keyword_name = 'video game'

question: List down the IDs of the production companies that released the movies in 1916.
original_query: SELECT T2.company_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.release_date) AS INT) = 1916

question: What is the title of the movie with the most keywords?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id GROUP BY T1.title ORDER BY COUNT(T2.keyword_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For all the movies which were produced by Cruel and Unusual Films, which one has the most popularity?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Cruel and Unusual Films' ORDER BY T3.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the movie titles that were produced in Canada.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE T3.COUNTry_name = 'Canada'

question: Among Warner Bros. Pictures' movies, which title made the highest revenue?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Warner Bros. Pictures' ORDER BY T3.revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which department has the most people?
original_query: SELECT T1.department_name FROM department AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.department_id = T2.department_id GROUP BY T1.department_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.department_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average number of horror movies among all movies genre?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.genre_name = 'Horror' THEN T1.movie_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id

question: What is the average number of crews for a movie?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CD) AS REAL) / COUNT(movie_id) FROM ( SELECT movie_id, COUNT(person_id) AS CD FROM movie_crew GROUP BY movie_id )

question: Which keywords belong to the movie titles with the highest popularity?
original_query: SELECT T3.keyword_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id ORDER BY T1.popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of films are made in the US?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.COUNTry_iso_code = 'US' THEN T1.movie_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id

question: Write all the keywords belonging to the movie 'Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow.'
original_query: SELECT T3.keyword_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow'

question: Calculate the 2016 gap between the average revenue for Indian and American films.
original_query: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T3.COUNTry_name = 'United States of America' THEN T1.revenue END) - AVG(CASE WHEN T3.COUNTry_name = 'India' THEN T1.revenue END) AS CALCULATE FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.release_date) AS INT) = 2016

question: What is the most common first name?
original_query: SELECT person_name FROM person GROUP BY person_name ORDER BY COUNT(person_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the main actor in the "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End" movie?
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' ORDER BY T2.cast_order LIMIT 1

question: How many times did Bob Peterson appear in the movie credits?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Bob Peterson'

question: Among the movie in which Dariusz Wolski works as the director of photography, what is the title of the one with the highest average vote?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski' AND T2.job = 'Director of Photography' ORDER BY T1.vote_average DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the director for the movie 'Transformers?'
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Transformers' AND T2.job = 'Director'

question: List all the unspecified gender characters.
original_query: SELECT T1.character_name FROM movie_cast AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.gender_id WHERE T2.gender = 'Unspecified'

question: Please list the names of all the crew members of the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End".
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End'

question: Show the total number of keywords of the movie "I Hope They Serve Beer in Hell".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.keyword_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'I Hope They Serve Beer in Hell'

question: Provide the titles and revenues of the movies produced by the DreamWorks company.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.revenue FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_company AS T3 ON T2.company_id = T3.company_id WHERE T3.company_name = 'DreamWorks'

question: How many movies have made at least 1 Billion at the box office?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(movie_id) FROM movie WHERE revenue > 1000000000

question: For the movie "Land of the Dead", who is its director?
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Land of the Dead' AND T2.job = 'Director'

question: Provide the average revenue of all the French movies.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.revenue) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE T3.COUNTry_name = 'France'

question: How many crew are named John Young?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(person_id) FROM person WHERE person_name = 'John Young'

question: Which character did Orlando Bloom play in the movie Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl?
original_query: SELECT T2.character_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title = 'Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl' AND T3.person_name = 'Orlando Bloom'

question: List down the movie titles within the genre of thriller.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre_name = 'Thriller'

question: Are there any post-production movies in Nederlands?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.movie_status = 'Post Production' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS YORN FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Nederlands'

question: List the names of camera supervisors in the crew.
original_query: SELECT T1.person_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.job = 'Camera Supervisor'

question: What is the role of Mark Hammel?
original_query: SELECT T2.job FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Mark Hammel'

question: What is the production company of the movie "Crazy Heart"?
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T3.title = 'Crazy Heart'

question: Which movies did the company Paramount Pictures produce in 2000?
original_query: SELECT T3.title FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Paramount Pictures' AND CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T3.release_date) AS INT) = 2000

question: List down the tagline of the Polski movies.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.tagline FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Polski'

question: Tally the movie ID and character name in the movie starring Jim Carrey.
original_query: SELECT T2.movie_id, T2.character_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Jim Carrey'

question: Who played Captain Jack Sparrow in all of the Pirates of the Caribbean movies?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.person_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T2.character_name = 'Captain Jack Sparrow' AND T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean%'

question: What is the country ID of the movie with the title of "Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest"?
original_query: SELECT T2.COUNTry_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man%s Chest'

question: What was David Rubin's job in the movie "Days of Thunder"?
original_query: SELECT T2.job FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'David Rubin' AND T1.title = 'Days of Thunder'

question: Write the person ID and character name of casts between order numbers 1 and 10 in Movie No. 285.
original_query: SELECT person_id, character_name FROM movie_cast WHERE movie_id = 285 AND cast_order BETWEEN 1 AND 10

question: What is the average revenue made by Latin movies?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.revenue) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T3.language_name = 'Latin'

question: Provide the title of the movie that is most-liked by a large number of people.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie ORDER BY popularity DESC LIMIT 1

question: In how many movie does Dariusz Wolski work as the director of photography?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski' AND T2.job = 'Director of Photography'

question: Tell the number of movies made by Paramount Animation.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id WHERE T1.company_name = 'Paramount Animation'

question: List the character names played by Catherine Deneuve.
original_query: SELECT T2.character_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.person_name = 'Catherine Deneuve'

question: What is the title of the highest-budget film to date? Please include the revenue and name the country.
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.revenue, T3.COUNTry_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id ORDER BY T1.budget DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the movie with a revenue of 559852396.
original_query: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE revenue = 559852396

question: Find out the popularity of the movies with the highest vote count.
original_query: SELECT popularity FROM movie ORDER BY vote_COUNT DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of the production companies that made at least 200 movies.
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id GROUP BY T1.company_id HAVING COUNT(T2.movie_id) > 200

question: What is the longest runtime of all movies?
original_query: SELECT MAX(runtime) FROM movie

question: What is the average revenue of American movies in 2006?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.revenue) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T3 ON T2.COUNTry_id = T3.COUNTry_id WHERE T3.COUNTry_name = 'United States of America' AND CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T1.release_date) AS INT) = 2006

question: Tell the language of the movie "C'era una volta il West".
original_query: SELECT T3.language_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_languages AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN language AS T3 ON T2.language_id = T3.language_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'C%era una volta il West'

question: What is the keyword ID of the movie with the title of "Sin City"?
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword_id FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sin City'

question: What is the genre of the movie title which was well-received by the audiences but made the lowest revenue?
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id ORDER BY T1.vote_average DESC, T1.revenue LIMIT 1

question: What keyword can the user use to search for the movie Finding Nemo?
original_query: SELECT T3.keyword_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T1.title = 'Finding Nemo'

question: Please list the names of the production company of the movie "Four Rooms".
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id WHERE T3.title = 'Four Rooms'

question: What is the average ratio between female and male actors in a movie?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'Female' THEN T1.person_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'Male' THEN T1.person_id ELSE NULL END) FROM movie_cast AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.gender_id

question: How many horror movies are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie_genres AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.genre_id WHERE T2.genre_name = 'Horror'

question: Which genre does the movie Dancer in the Dark belong to?
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.title = 'Dancer in the Dark'

question: Calculate the average budget of the movies directed by Jaume Collet-Serra.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.budget) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Jaume Collet-Serra' AND T2.job = 'Director'

question: What is the genre of the movie title with the lowest revenue generated?
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id ORDER BY T1.revenue LIMIT 1

question: How many movies were produced in Canada?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.movie_id) FROM COUNTry AS T1 INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T2 ON T1.COUNTry_id = T2.COUNTry_id WHERE T1.COUNTry_name = 'Canada'

question: What is the title of Jamie Foxx's most recent movie?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Jamie Foxx' ORDER BY T1.release_date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the ID and ISO code of Belgium.
original_query: SELECT COUNTry_id, COUNTry_iso_code FROM COUNTry WHERE COUNTry_name = 'Belgium'

question: List all the actors who have played characters with "captain" in their names.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.person_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.character_name LIKE '%captain%'

question: What is the percentage of romance films among films produced in India in 2015?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T4.genre_name = 'Romance' THEN T1.movie_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN production_COUNTry AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T2.genre_id = T4.genre_id INNER JOIN COUNTry AS T5 ON T3.COUNTry_id = T5.COUNTry_id WHERE T5.COUNTry_name = 'India' AND T1.release_date BETWEEN '2015-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'

question: How many production companies made more than 150 movies?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.company_name AS CNAME FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id GROUP BY T1.company_id HAVING COUNT(T1.company_name) > 150 )

question: Look for the movie title with the keyword of "angel".
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN keyword AS T3 ON T2.keyword_id = T3.keyword_id WHERE T3.keyword_name = 'angel'

question: What was the job of Dariusz Wolski in the movie "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End"?
original_query: SELECT T2.job FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' AND T3.person_name = 'Dariusz Wolski'

question: Find the difference in percentage of the movies under keywords of "woman director" and "independent film".
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.keyword_name = 'woman director' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.keyword_name = 'independent film' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.keyword_name = 'independent film' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_keywords AS T2 ON T1.keyword_id = T2.keyword_id

question: State the genre of the movie title with a runtime of only 14 minutes.
original_query: SELECT T3.genre_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_genres AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T1.runtime = 14

question: Provide the names and departments of the person who worked as a music editor in the "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End" movie.
original_query: SELECT T3.person_name, T4.department_name FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_crew AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id INNER JOIN department AS T4 ON T2.department_id = T4.department_id WHERE T1.title LIKE 'Pirates of the Caribbean: At World%s End' AND T2.job = 'Music Editor'

question: Which actor plays Optimus Prime?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.person_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.character_name = 'Optimus Prime (voice)'

question: How many films released between 1/2/1990 and 12/30/2000 starred Uma Thurman?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.movie_id) FROM movie AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_cast AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.person_name = 'Uma Thurman' AND T1.release_date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

question: What is the name of the production company that made the most movies?
original_query: SELECT T1.company_name FROM production_company AS T1 INNER JOIN movie_company AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.company_id GROUP BY T1.company_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.movie_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In Movie No. 19, how many people are there in Department No. 7? Please give me their job.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT job) FROM movie_crew WHERE movie_id = 19 AND department_id = 7

question: Indicate the slug and the itunes url of the podcast whose review content was written Can't stop listening.
original_query: SELECT slug, itunes_url FROM podcasts WHERE podcast_id IN ( SELECT podcast_id FROM reviews WHERE content = 'Can''t stop listening' )

question: What is the average rating of all the podcasts with reviews created in 2019?
original_query: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE created_at BETWEEN '2019-01-01T00:00:00-07:00' AND '2019-12-31T23:59:59-07:00'

question: List the urls for all the "fiction-science-fiction" podcasts.
original_query: SELECT itunes_url FROM podcasts WHERE podcast_id IN ( SELECT podcast_id FROM categories WHERE category = 'fiction-science-fiction' )

question: List all of the two-star reviews and their categories.
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.rating = 2

question: What are the titles and categories of all the podcasts with a review that has "Absolutely fantastic" in it?
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id WHERE T3.content LIKE '%Absolutely fantastic%'

question: What is the least common category?
original_query: SELECT category FROM categories GROUP BY category ORDER BY COUNT(podcast_id) ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the titles of the podcasts for which the author whose ID is F7E5A318989779D has written a review.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.author_id = 'F7E5A318989779D'

question: Name the podcast title, rating and review content created by '76A4C24B6038145'.
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T2.rating, T2.content FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.author_id = '76A4C24B6038145'

question: How many reviews are created for the podcast "Scaling Global" under?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.content) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Scaling Global'

question: The 'More Stupider: A 90-Day Fiance Podcast' belongs to which category and what is the average rating of the podcast?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.rating) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id INNER JOIN reviews AS T3 ON T3.podcast_id = T2.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'More Stupider: A 90-Day Fiance Podcast'

question: What is the longest review?
original_query: SELECT title FROM reviews ORDER BY LENGTH(content) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average rating of podcasts in comedy category?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'comedy'

question: List all the cagetories for all the podcasts with "jessica" in the title.
original_query: SELECT category FROM categories WHERE podcast_id IN ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title LIKE '%jessica%' )

question: Which podcast was reviewed the latest? State the date of creation, podcast tile and rating.
original_query: SELECT T1.podcast_id, T2.created_at, T2.title, T2.rating FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id ORDER BY T2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all reviews created in May 2019. State the title of podcast and review rating.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title, T2.rating FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.created_at LIKE '2019-05-%'

question: What is the average rating of the podcast "Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally"?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.rating) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally'

question: What is the content of the earliest review for the "Stuff You Should Know" podcast?
original_query: SELECT T2.content FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Stuff You Should Know' ORDER BY T2.created_at ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of reviews added each year of the total reviews added?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN run_at LIKE '2022-%' THEN reviews_added ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN run_at LIKE '2021-%' THEN reviews_added ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(reviews_added) OR '%' "percentage" FROM runs

question: To which categories do the podcasts of the reviewer whose id is EFB34EAC8E9397C belong?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.category FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.author_id = 'EFB34EAC8E9397C'

question: List the titles of the art category.
