original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'arts'

question: What is the category and itune url of the title "Scaling Global"?
original_query: SELECT T1.category, T2.itunes_url FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'Scaling Global'

question: What are the titles of the podcasts whose reviews were created between 2018-08-22T11:53:16-07:00 and 2018-11-20T11:14:20-07:00?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.created_at BETWEEN '2018-08-22T11:53:16-07:00' AND '2018-11-20T11:14:20-07:00'

question: How many total reviews runned at in June 2022 were added to the podcasts?
original_query: SELECT SUM(reviews_added) FROM runs WHERE run_at LIKE '2022-06-%'

question: How many podcasts are there in the category which has the most podcasts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(podcast_id) FROM categories WHERE category = ( SELECT category FROM categories GROUP BY category ORDER BY COUNT(podcast_id) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: How many reviews does "Planet Money" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.podcast_id) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Planet Money'

question: How many ratings of 5 have been given to the podcast "Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.rating) FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Please Excuse My Dead Aunt Sally' AND T2.rating = 5

question: List the authors who created review for podcast titled 'Pop Rocket' in 2016 with rating less than 5.
original_query: SELECT T2.author_id FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.title = 'Pop Rocket' AND T2.created_at LIKE '2016-%' AND T2.rating < 5

question: In how many categories were podcast reviews created in the last six months of 2016? List them.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.category) FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.created_at BETWEEN '2016-07-01T00:00:00-07:00' AND '2016-12-31T23:59:59-07:00'

question: List all the names of podcasts under the 'true crime' category.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'true-crime'

question: What is the review with the title "Hosts bring the show down" for?
original_query: SELECT title FROM podcasts WHERE podcast_id = ( SELECT podcast_id FROM reviews WHERE title = 'Hosts bring the show down' )

question: Write all the review content belonging to StormCast: The Official Warhammer Age of Sigmar Podcast.
original_query: SELECT content FROM reviews WHERE podcast_id = ( SELECT podcast_id FROM podcasts WHERE title = 'StormCast: The Official Warhammer Age of Sigmar Podcast' )

question: Write the names of the podcasts in the music category that have a rating greater than 3.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'music' AND T2.rating > 3

question: List all the podcast title and its itunes url under the 'society-culture' category.
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T2.itunes_url FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'society-culture'

question: State the podcast title, content review and rating for all reviews with titled 'Love it!'
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title, T2.content, T2.rating FROM podcasts AS T1 INNER JOIN reviews AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T2.title = 'Love it!'

question: Which "music" podcast has the longest title?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM categories AS T1 INNER JOIN podcasts AS T2 ON T2.podcast_id = T1.podcast_id WHERE T1.category = 'music' ORDER BY LENGTH(T2.title) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many releases are tagged "1980s"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM tags WHERE tag LIKE '1980s'

question: How many singles were released in 1979?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(releaseType) FROM torrents WHERE releaseType LIKE 'single' AND groupYear = 1979

question: What are the average download times for the a release tagged "1980s"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.totalSnatched) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.tag) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = '1980s'

question: How many releases by the artist michael jackson are tagged "pop"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.groupName) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'pop' AND T1.artist = 'michael jackson'

question: Among the artists with the id from 10 to 30. Which artist released the product with the tag "funk" in 1980?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'funk' AND T1.groupYear = 1980 AND T1.id BETWEEN 10 AND 30

question: Provide the title, release year and the tag associated with the live album that has the highest number of downloads?
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName, T1.groupYear, T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'live album' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the tag and the artist of the most downloaded single?
original_query: SELECT T2.tag, T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'single' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the average number of downloads for Single-Tables released by '2Pac' between 2001 and 2013.
original_query: SELECT AVG(totalSnatched) FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE '2Pac' AND releaseType LIKE 'Single' AND groupYear BETWEEN 2001 AND 2013

question: What are the tags of the top 5 least downloaded live albums?
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'album' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched LIMIT 5

question: Which artist released singles between 1980 to 1982?
original_query: SELECT artist FROM torrents WHERE groupYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1982 AND releaseType LIKE 'single'

question: What are the top 5 tags with the highest amount of downloads?
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'album' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 5

question: Indicates groups with id from 10 to 20 with singles downloaded at least 20.
original_query: SELECT groupName FROM torrents WHERE totalSnatched >= 20 AND releaseType LIKE 'single' AND id BETWEEN 10 AND 20

question: Please list the titles of all the releases with the tag "1980s".
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = '1980s'

question: Please list the releases that have been downloaded for more than 20000 times.
original_query: SELECT groupName FROM torrents WHERE totalSnatched > 20000

question: How many singles were released between 1979 and 1981 labeled as "soul"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.tag) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'soul' AND T1.groupYear BETWEEN 1979 AND 1981 AND T1.releaseType LIKE 'single'

question: How many albums and Single-Tables were released by the artist named '50 cent' between 2010 and 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id), ( SELECT COUNT(id) FROM torrents WHERE groupYear BETWEEN 2010 AND 2015 AND artist LIKE '50 cent' AND releaseType LIKE 'album' ) FROM torrents WHERE groupYear BETWEEN 2010 AND 2015 AND artist LIKE '50 cent' AND releaseType LIKE 'Single'

question: Among the artists from 1980 to 1982. Which artist was tagged as "disco"?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'disco' AND T1.groupYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1982

question: Among id from 10 to 50. Which artist tagged as "new.york" has the most downloads?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.id BETWEEN 10 AND 50 AND T2.tag LIKE 'new.york' ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: An American rapper '2Pac' released his first solo album in 1991, how many years have passed until his next album was released?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT groupYear FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE '2Pac' AND releaseType LIKE 'album' ORDER BY groupYear LIMIT 1, 1 ) - groupYear FROM torrents WHERE artist LIKE '2Pac' AND releaseType LIKE 'album' AND groupYear = 1991

question: Which artists have released singles with the tag 1970s?
original_query: SELECT T1.artist FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseType = 'single' AND T2.tag LIKE '1970s'

question: List the group name has the most downloaded that have released jazz genres from 1982 or later.
original_query: SELECT T1.groupName FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'jazz' AND T1.groupYear >= 1982 ORDER BY T1.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the tags of the release "sugarhill gang"?
original_query: SELECT T2.tag FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.groupName = 'sugarhill gang'

question: Among the releases that were released in 2000, how many of them were released as an album and tagged "pop"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.groupName) FROM torrents AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.tag = 'pop' AND T1.releaseType = 'album' AND T1.groupYear = 2000

question: How many athletes are from Australia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Australia'

question: What is the name of medal that competitor id 9 obtained?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.medal_name FROM medal AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.medal_id WHERE T2.competitor_id = 9

question: Among the males, list the region name of people with height greater than 87% of the average height of all people listed.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.gender = 'M' AND T3.height * 100 > ( SELECT AVG(height) FROM person WHERE gender = 'M' ) * 87

question: In which city was the 1992 Summer Olympic Games held?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '1992 Summer'

question: What is the season of the game where a competitor who weighted 73 kg and 180 cm tall, participated?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.season FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.height = 180 AND T3.weight = 73

question: Which city hosted the most games?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.city_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.city_name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the height of the tallest athlete from Portugal.
original_query: SELECT T3.height FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Portugal' ORDER BY T3.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among all the Olympic competitors from Finland, how many of them are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Finland' AND T3.gender = 'F'

question: Among the competitors with age ranges 24 and below, calculate the difference between the number of competitors who weighed greater than 70 kg and competitors who weighted less than 70 kg.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.weight > 70 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.weight < 70 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T2.age < 24

question: How many Olympics games were held during the 90s?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(games_year) FROM games WHERE games_year BETWEEN '1990' AND '1999'

question: Which city was the 1992 Summer Olympic held?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '1992 Summer'

question: List out all the medals won by Lee Chong Wei.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.medal_name FROM medal AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.medal_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T3 ON T2.competitor_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person AS T4 ON T3.person_id = T4.id WHERE T4.full_name = 'Lee Chong Wei' AND T2.medal_id <> 4

question: For how many times has London held the Olympic games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.games_id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London'

question: What is the percentage of female competitors whose heights are over 170 that participated in the game in 1988?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'F' AND T3.height > 170 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_year = 1988

question: In the 2014 Winter game, what is the percentage of competitors who age 28 years old?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.age = 28 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '2014 Winter'

question: Provide the name of competitors from Greece.
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Greece'

question: What is the name of the oldest competitor?
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id ORDER BY T2.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many athletes playing in Canoeing fall into overweight BMI category in the 2008 Summer games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T5.id) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T4 ON T3.competitor_id = T4.id INNER JOIN person AS T5 ON T4.person_id = T5.id INNER JOIN games AS T6 ON T4.games_id = T6.id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Canoeing' AND T6.games_name = '2008 Summer' AND T5.weight * 10000.0 / (T5.height * T5.height) BETWEEN 25.0 AND 30

question: List out all the gold medalist winners in cycling sport.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T5.full_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T3 ON T2.competitor_id = T3.id INNER JOIN sport AS T4 ON T1.sport_id = T4.id INNER JOIN person AS T5 ON T3.person_id = T5.id WHERE T4.sport_name = 'Cycling' AND T2.medal_id = 1

question: How many Olympic events did Michael Phelps II join in total? Find the percentage of the events where he won a gold medal.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.event_id) , CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T4.id = '1' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T4.id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T3.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Michael Fred Phelps, II'

question: List out the id of event that achieve the gold medal.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_id FROM medal AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.medal_id WHERE T1.medal_name = 'Gold'

question: How many 20 years old athletes were there in the 1984 Summer Olympic Games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '1984 Summer' AND T2.age = 20

question: What is the ratio male to female athletes in the 2012 Summer Olympic?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2012 Summer'

question: At what age did Michael Fred Phelps, II join the Olympics?
original_query: SELECT T2.age FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Michael Fred Phelps, II' ORDER BY T2.age LIMIT 1

question: How many kinds of events does athletics have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.event_name) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Athletics'

question: What is the name of the game in which the oldest Olympian has ever participated?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id ORDER BY T2.age LIMIT 1

question: What is the average height of male athletes playing basketball sport?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T5.height) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T4 ON T3.competitor_id = T4.id INNER JOIN person AS T5 ON T4.person_id = T5.id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Basketball' AND T5.gender = 'M'

question: Which region has the highest medal number?
original_query: SELECT T5.region_name FROM medal AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.medal_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T3 ON T2.competitor_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person_region AS T4 ON T3.person_id = T4.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T5 ON T4.region_id = T5.id WHERE T1.id != 4 GROUP BY T5.region_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.competitor_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: In which year did London hold its earliest Olympic game?
original_query: SELECT T3.games_year FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London' ORDER BY T3.games_year LIMIT 1

question: Who is the youngest competitor that participated in 2014 Winter?
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2014 Winter' ORDER BY T2.age LIMIT 1

question: How many different events are there of Modern Pentathlon?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.event_name) FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Modern Pentathlon'

question: In the Winter and Summer Olympics of 1988, which game has the most number of competitors? Find the difference of the number of competitors between the two games.
original_query: SELECT P1 , ( SELECT MAX(P2) - MIN(P2) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) AS P2 FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name IN ('1988 Winter', '1988 Summer') GROUP BY T1.season ) ORDER BY P2 DESC LIMIT 1 ) FROM ( SELECT T1.season AS P1, COUNT(T2.person_id) AS P2 FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name IN ('1988 Winter', '1988 Summer') GROUP BY T1.season ) ORDER BY P2 DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average age of the competitors who participated in the 1924 Winter.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.age) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '1924 Winter'

question: What is the average age of Argentina's athletes who participated in the Summer Olympics in 2012?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.age) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person_region AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T4 ON T3.region_id = T4.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2012 Summer' AND T4.region_name = 'Argentina'

question: How many Olympic Games has London hosted?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London'

question: What are the id of the games held in London?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_id FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London'

question: What is the sport name of "Cross Country Skiing Men's 10/15 kilometres Pursuit" event?
original_query: SELECT T1.sport_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T2.event_name LIKE 'Cross Country Skiing Men%s 10/15 kilometres Pursuit'

question: How many 10-year old athletes participated in the Gymnastics Men's Parallel Bars, Teams event?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.competitor_id = T2.id INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T1.event_id = T3.id WHERE T3.event_name LIKE 'Gymnastics Men%s Parallel Bars, Teams' AND T2.age = 10

question: How many athletes from Malaysia have won a medal?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.person_id) FROM medal AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.medal_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T3 ON T2.competitor_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person_region AS T4 ON T3.person_id = T4.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T5 ON T4.region_id = T5.id WHERE T5.region_name = 'Malaysia' AND T1.id != 4

question: What is the average age of competitors who participated in 1988 Winter?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.age) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '1988 Winter'

question: In which Olympic Games have the largest number of women participation?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.games_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.person_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the event where competitors received the most gold medals?
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.id INNER JOIN medal AS T3 ON T1.medal_id = T3.id WHERE T3.medal_name = 'Gold' GROUP BY T2.id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.event_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many 24 years old competitors competed in Men's Basketball?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.competitor_id = T2.id INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T1.event_id = T3.id WHERE T3.event_name LIKE 'Basketball Men%s Basketball' AND T2.age = 24

question: What is the NOC code of the region where the tallest male Olympic competitor is from?
original_query: SELECT T1.noc FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.gender = 'M' ORDER BY T3.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the heaviest athlete from Russia?
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Russia' ORDER BY T3.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many athlete from China participate in the 2016 Summer Olympics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person_region AS T4 ON T3.id = T4.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T5 ON T4.region_id = T5.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2016 Summer' AND T5.region_name = 'China'

question: Provide the competitors' names who joined the 2000 Summer.
original_query: SELECT T3.full_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.games_name = '2000 Summer'

question: Give the NOC code and region name of the heaviest competitor.
original_query: SELECT T1.noc, T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id ORDER BY T3.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many athletes from region 151 have won a medal?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.person_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.competitor_id = T2.id INNER JOIN person_region AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.person_id WHERE T3.region_id = 151 AND T1.medal_id != 4

question: How many males from Belgium have participated in an Olympic Games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Belgium' AND T3.gender = 'M'

question: Which region is Yao Ming from?
original_query: SELECT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Yao Ming'

question: Among the competitors of the 1994 Winter Olympic Game, what is the percentage of those from Finland?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T5.region_name = 'Finland' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person_region AS T4 ON T3.id = T4.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T5 ON T4.region_id = T5.id WHERE T1.games_name = '1994 Winter'

question: What is the average weight of the competitors who won a silver medal?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.weight) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T3.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T4.medal_name = 'Silver'

question: List out years that only have summer games.
original_query: SELECT games_year FROM games WHERE season != 'Winter' GROUP BY games_year HAVING COUNT(season) = 1

question: Provide the names of competitors who received a gold medal.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T3.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T4.medal_name = 'Gold'

question: How many competitors over the age of 30 participated in the 1992 Winter Olympics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.games_name = '1992 Winter' AND T2.age > 30

question: How many games has Prithipal Singh participated in?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.games_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Prithipal Singh'

question: Where was the 1920 Summer held?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name = '1920 Summer'

question: What was the medal that Coleen Dufresne got?
original_query: SELECT T4.medal_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T3.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Coleen Dufresne (-Stewner)'

question: How many female athletes are from the Philippines?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Philippines' AND T3.gender = 'F'

question: In which cities were the 1976 winter and summer games held?
original_query: SELECT T2.city_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T3.games_name IN ('1976 Summer', '1976 Winter')

question: How many times was Larysa Semenivna Latynina (Diriy-) declared as champion in Gymnastics Women's Individual All-Around?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T3 ON T2.competitor_id = T3.id INNER JOIN person AS T4 ON T3.person_id = T4.id WHERE T4.full_name = 'Larysa Semenivna Latynina (Diriy-)' AND T1.event_name LIKE 'Gymnastics Women%s Individual All-Around' AND T2.medal_id = 1

question: From 1900 to 1992, how many games did London host?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London' AND T3.games_year BETWEEN 1900 AND 1992

question: The Olympic competitor John Aalberg is from which region?
original_query: SELECT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'John Aalberg'

question: Please list the names of the Olympic games that were held in London.
original_query: SELECT T3.games_name FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id INNER JOIN games AS T3 ON T1.games_id = T3.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London'

question: Who is the heaviest athlete?
original_query: SELECT full_name FROM person ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average weight of male athletes from Tonga.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.weight) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Tonga' AND T3.gender = 'M'

question: How many people who are below 30 and participated in the summer season?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id WHERE T1.season = 'Summer' AND T2.age < 30

question: Mention the height of people who belong to region id 7.
original_query: SELECT T2.height FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.id WHERE T1.region_id = 7

question: How many Belgian men have competed in an Olympic Games?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.person_id) FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T1.region_name = 'Belgium' AND T3.gender = 'M'

question: What is the id of Rio de Janeiro?
original_query: SELECT id FROM city WHERE city_name = 'Rio de Janeiro'

question: How many persons in total have participated in 12 meter Mixed Sailing competitions?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.competitor_id) FROM competitor_event AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.id INNER JOIN sport AS T3 ON T2.sport_id = T3.id WHERE T2.event_name = 'Sailing Mixed 12 metres'

question: Provide hockey's sport id.
original_query: SELECT id FROM sport WHERE sport_name = 'Hockey'

question: Tell the weight of Dagfinn Sverre Aarskog.
original_query: SELECT weight FROM person WHERE full_name = 'Dagfinn Sverre Aarskog'

question: What was the name of the Olympic game that John Aalberg took part in when he was 31?
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'John Aalberg' AND T2.age = 31

question: What is the region id of Christine Jacoba Aaftink?
original_query: SELECT T1.region_id FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.id WHERE T2.full_name = 'Christine Jacoba Aaftink'

question: How many competitor ids does Martina Kohlov have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Martina Kohlov'

question: Where is competitor Estelle Nze Minko from?
original_query: SELECT T1.region_name FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Estelle Nze Minko'

question: How many Olympic games were held in London?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.games_id) FROM games_city AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.id WHERE T2.city_name = 'London'

question: What is the NOC code of the region of the competitors weighted 77 kg?
original_query: SELECT T1.noc FROM noc_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.region_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.weight = 77

question: What is the name of the competitor who has won the most medals?
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN competitor_event AS T3 ON T2.id = T3.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal AS T4 ON T3.medal_id = T4.id WHERE T4.id != 4 GROUP BY T1.full_name ORDER BY COUNT(T4.id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the name of the games that Georgios Abaris participated.
original_query: SELECT T1.games_name FROM games AS T1 INNER JOIN games_competitor AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.games_id INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.id WHERE T3.full_name = 'Georgios Abaris'

question: State the event name of Basketball.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM sport AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.sport_id WHERE T1.sport_name = 'Basketball'

question: How many athletes are there in the region where Clara Hughes is from?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(person_id) FROM person_region WHERE region_id = ( SELECT T1.region_id FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.id WHERE T2.full_name = 'Clara Hughes' )

question: How many Olympic competitors are from Finland?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.person_id) FROM person_region AS T1 INNER JOIN noc_region AS T2 ON T1.region_id = T2.id WHERE T2.region_name = 'Finland'

question: Please list the top ten teams with the highest scores in 2000.
original_query: SELECT tmID FROM players_teams WHERE year = 2000 GROUP BY tmID ORDER BY SUM(PostPoints) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Please list the team names which have at least 5 players were born in the same state.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM teams WHERE tmID IN ( SELECT tmID FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.birthState IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.tmID, T2.birthState HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 )

question: Among the NBA All-star players in 1996 season , which have more than 70% free throw rate? Please give their player id.
original_query: SELECT playerID FROM player_allstar WHERE season_id = 1996 AND CAST(ft_made AS REAL) * 100 / ft_attempted > 70

question: From 1960 to 1970, what is the total point of all-star players who are still alive?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.points) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.season_id BETWEEN 1960 AND 1970 AND T1.deathDate = '0000-00-00'

question: Please list out the first name and last name of player who attended California college and have been selected as all stars?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.college = 'California'

question: in which year costela01 obtained the best balance of games won as a coach?
original_query: SELECT year FROM coaches WHERE coachID = 'costela01' ORDER BY CAST(won AS REAL) / (won + lost) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the name of the coach who has served more than 2 NBA teams.
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM coaches GROUP BY coachID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT tmID) > 2

question: Among the winning game from the team, what is the percentage of the winning was home game.
original_query: SELECT CAST(homeWon AS REAL) * 100 / won  FROM teams

question: What is the percentage of player who won "All-Defensive First Team" from 1980 - 2000 is from 'NY'.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthState = 'NY' AND T2.award = 'All-Defensive First Team' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2000

question: List the team name and the total wins of the team in year 2005 which has greater winning from the previous year.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T1.won FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM teams WHERE year = 2004 ) AS T2 on T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T1.year = 2005 and T1.won > T2.won

question: What is the name of the university that was drafted from the player who won the NBA Finals MVP in 1990?
original_query: SELECT T1.college FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1990 AND T2.award = 'Finals MVP'

question: Please list the players who received the "Most Valuable Player" award in the NBA league after the year of 1990, along with their IDs.
original_query: SELECT playerID FROM awards_players WHERE year > 1990 AND award = 'Most Valuable Player' AND lgID = 'NBA'

question: What is the percentage of the teams who had post season (playoff) were ranked number 1?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(name) FROM teams

question: Which are the teams coached by 'adelmri01' from year 1990-1995. List the team name, year and offense point.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T1.year, T2.o_pts FROM coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1995 AND T1.coachID = 'adelmri01'

question: What are the basketball players' BMI ranges?
original_query: SELECT MIN(CAST(weight AS REAL) / (height * height)) , MAX(CAST(weight AS REAL) / (height * height)) FROM players

question: Which team had the most same starting players througout the season? Give the full name of the team.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.tmID FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.GP = T2.GS

question: Please list the last names and first names of all-star players who are higher than 75 inch.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lastName, T1.firstName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.height > 75

question: From 1980 to 1983, how many of the NBA All-Star players have more than 60% three point rate?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.playerID FROM player_allstar AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1983 AND T1.three_made / T1.three_attempted > 0.6

question: What is the percentage of offense rebounds from the total rebounds of the players in year 2000.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.o_rebounds) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.rebounds) FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.year = 2000

question: In 1975, what was the average point of all-star players coming from the USA?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.points) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.season_id = 1975

question: In the year 1998, how many home wins did the team which had the 1st round, 12th pick have that year?
original_query: SELECT T2.homeWon FROM draft AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.draftYear = T2.year WHERE T1.draftRound = 1 AND T1.draftSelection = 12 AND T1.draftYear = 1998

question: Player from which team has the highest point per minute in NBA from 1991 to 2000?
original_query: SELECT tmID FROM players_teams WHERE year BETWEEN 1991 AND 2000 ORDER BY CAST(points AS REAL) / minutes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the team names which have at least 3 all-star players.
original_query: SELECT T1.tmID FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T1.tmID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) >= 3

question: Which winning team in the final round of the postseason series games against the LAL won more than 60 games in the NBA league during the year 1996?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.tmID FROM series_post AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmIDWinner = T2.tmID WHERE T2.won > 60 AND T1.year = 1996 AND T1.round = 'CSF' AND T1.tmIDLoser = 'LAL'

question: Please list the coach IDs who received the award twice from 1970 to 1990.
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM awards_coaches WHERE year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1990 GROUP BY coachID, award HAVING COUNT(award) = 2

question: For the players who played the most PBLA games, who was graduated from Central Missouri State college?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.middleName, T1.lastName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.lgID = 'PBLA' AND T2.GP = 10 AND T1.college = 'Central Missouri State' GROUP BY T1.firstName, T1.middleName, T1.lastName ORDER BY COUNT(T2.id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which coach of the Chicago Bulls during the year 1981 won the NBA Coach of the Year award in the 1970s?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.coachID FROM coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID INNER JOIN teams AS T3 ON T3.tmID = T1.tmID WHERE T2.award = 'NBA Coach of the Year' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1979 AND T1.year = 1981 AND T3.name = 'Chicago Bulls'

question: How many teams have played more than 3800 points and have player with "Most Valuable Player" award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T4.name) FROM ( SELECT T1.name, SUM(T2.points) FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year INNER JOIN awards_players AS T3 ON T2.playerID = T3.playerID WHERE T3.award = 'Most Valuable Player' GROUP BY T1.name HAVING SUM(T2.points) >= 3800 ) AS T4

question: Among players who were born after 1950, who had offence rebounds rates more than 30%? Please list their last names and first names.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lastName, T1.firstName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthDate > 1950 AND CAST(T2.o_rebounds AS REAL) * 100 / T2.rebounds > 30

question: How many field goals did George Mikan make overall between 1951 and 1953?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(fg_made) FROM player_allstar WHERE first_name = 'George' AND last_name = 'Mikan' AND season_id BETWEEN 1951 AND 1953

question: List out all the players fullname who won the championship in 1970.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.firstName, T3.middleName, T3.lastName FROM series_post AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.tmIDWinner = T2.tmID INNER JOIN players AS T3 ON T3.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.year = 1970 AND T1.round = 'F'

question: List the year, team and coach that with winning rate of above 75%.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.year, T2.name, T1.coachID FROM coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE CAST(T1.won AS REAL) / CAST((T1.won + T1.lost) AS REAL) > 0.75

question: What is the full name of the team that selected Mike Lynn?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN draft AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.draftYear WHERE T2.firstName = 'Mike' AND T2.lastName = 'Lynn'

question: How many total minutes has the Brooklyn-born player, known by the name of Superman, played during all of his NBA All-Star seasons?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.minutes) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthCity = 'Brooklyn' AND T1.nameNick LIKE '%Superman%'

question: Among the players from the NBL league, how many of them were born in Spencer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.birthCity = 'Spencer' AND T2.lgID = 'NBL'

question: In what year did the only team to beat the Houston in the final round of postseason series games earn its lowest ranking?
original_query: SELECT T2.year FROM series_post AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmIDWinner = T2.tmID WHERE T1.round = 'DSF' AND T1.tmIDLoser = 'HSM' ORDER BY T2.rank ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the birth date of the player with the most assists during the 1985 All-Star season?
original_query: SELECT T1.birthDate FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.season_id = 1985 ORDER BY T2.assists DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many awards were given out in 2010 to players who attended high school in Chicago?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.award) FROM awards_players AS T1 INNER JOIN players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.year = 2010 AND T2.hsCity = 'Chicago'

question: Which coach has the most 'won' than 'lost' in year '1988'?
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM coaches WHERE year = 1988 ORDER BY won - lost DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many teams in the NBA which has at least 3 all-star players?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT tmID FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.lgID = 'NBA' GROUP BY T1.tmID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) > 3 ) AS T3

question: What is the full name of the team with the fastest growth in winning rate in the 'ABA' league from 1972 to 1973?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM teams WHERE lgID = 'ABA' AND year = 1972 ) AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T1.lgID = 'ABA' AND T1.year = 1973 ORDER BY (CAST(T1.won AS REAL) / (T1.won + T1.lost) - (CAST(T2.won AS REAL) / (T2.won + T2.lost))) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which player selected by Portland in 2nd draftRound won Rookie of the Year in 1971?
original_query: SELECT T1.playerID FROM draft AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'Rookie of the Year' AND T1.draftYear = 1971 AND T1.draftRound = 2

question: Among the players that went to high school in New York and have won the MVP, what is their average height?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.height) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'Most Valuable Player' AND T1.birthCity = 'New York'

question: Which player from "AFS" team has the tallest height?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.middleName, T1.lastName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.tmID = 'AFS' ORDER BY T1.height DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the player who was drafted in the 1st round, 6th position in 1976, which team did he play in that year?
original_query: SELECT T2.tmID FROM draft AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.draftYear = T2.year WHERE T1.draftRound = 1 AND T1.draftSelection = 6 AND T1.draftYear = 1976

question: Which coach has serviced in NBA for more than 10 years.
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM coaches WHERE lgID = 'NBA' GROUP BY coachID HAVING MAX(year) - MIN(year) > 10

question: Which teams have winning rate less than 50%?
original_query: SELECT name FROM teams WHERE CAST(won AS REAL) * 100 / (won + lost) < 50

question: Of the players drafted in NBA between 1990 and 2000, who has the most points in all-star? List the player's first name and last name.
original_query: SELECT T3.firstname, T3.lastname FROM player_allstar AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN draft AS T3 ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID WHERE T2.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000 ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the full name of the team that has the most players from UCLA?
original_query: SELECT T3.name FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN teams AS T3 ON T3.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T1.college = 'UCLA' GROUP BY T3.name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the first name, last name and team name of players who are drafted from 'Seattle' between year 1965 to 1970.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T3.name FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN draft AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN teams AS T3 ON T2.tmID = T3.tmID WHERE T2.draftFrom = 'Seattle' AND T2.draftYear BETWEEN 1965 AND 1970

question: List the full name and age of the player when he won the "Finals MVP" in 2003.
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.middleName, T1.lastName , 2003 - strftime('%Y', T1.birthDate) FROM awards_players AS T2 JOIN players AS T1 ON T2.playerID = T1.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'Finals MVP' AND T2.year = 2003

question: What is the first and last name of the player with the highest field goal made rate in 1973?
original_query: SELECT T1.firstName, T1.lastName FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE year = 1973 ORDER BY CAST(T2.fgMade AS REAL) / T2.fgAttempted DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many All Star players who played in the 1973 season were black?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.season_id = 1973 AND T1.race = 'B'

question: Please list the birth date of the player who has won the most MVPs.
original_query: SELECT T1.birthDate FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'Most Valuable Player' GROUP BY T1.playerID, T1.birthDate ORDER BY COUNT(award) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the coaches for team with winning rate of 80% and above?
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM coaches GROUP BY tmID, coachID, won, lost HAVING CAST(won AS REAL) * 100 / (won + lost) > 80

question: What is the percentage of coaches in 1969 who were awarded "NBA Coach of the Year"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN award = 'NBA Coach of the Year' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM awards_coaches WHERE year = 1969

question: Among the players who went to high school in Chicago, how many of them belongs to the west conference?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.hsCity = 'Chicago' AND T2.conference = 'West'

question: Of all the teams coached by the winner of the 1994 NBA Coach of the Year award, which team has lost the most times playing at home?
original_query: SELECT T3.tmID FROM awards_coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN coaches AS T2 ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID INNER JOIN teams AS T3 ON T3.tmID = T2.tmID WHERE T1.year = 1994 AND T1.award = 'NBA Coach of the Year' GROUP BY T3.tmID ORDER BY SUM(T3.homeLost) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Of all the All-star players who played in the Eastern Conference for no more than 5 minutes, how many went to Illinois College?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.conference = 'East' AND T2.minutes <= 5 AND T1.college = 'Illinois'

question: In 1937, how many teams whose players got at least 500 points?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T2.name, SUM(T1.points) FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = 1937 GROUP BY T2.name HAVING SUM(points) >= 500 ) AS T3

question: Which team did the MVP of 1997 NBA season play in?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.tmID FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID INNER JOIN teams AS T3 ON T1.tmID = T3.tmID AND T1.year = T3.year WHERE T2.year = 1997 AND T2.award = 'Finals MVP' LIMIT 1

question: List the first name, last name, height and weight of the players who has all free throw attempted successfully made.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.firstName, T1.lastName, T1.height, T1.weight FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.ft_attempted > 0 AND ft_attempted = ft_made

question: Among the teams that were ranked 3 from 1937 to 1940, what is the team name whose players had the highest point?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.rank = 3 AND T1.year BETWEEN 1937 AND 1940 ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the player in 2011 who started every game he played, which team had the player who had the most steals?
original_query: SELECT T1.tmID FROM teams AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year = 2011 AND T2.GP = T2.GS GROUP BY T1.tmID, T2.steals ORDER BY T2.steals DESC LIMIT 1

question: Between the years 1990 and 2007, of the total rebounds achieved by each player, how many managed to exceed 75% of defensive rebounds?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT playerID) FROM player_allstar WHERE CAST(d_rebounds AS REAL) * 100 / rebounds > 75 AND season_id BETWEEN 1990 AND 2007

question: Percentage of games lost out of total games played by the Houston Mavericks
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(lost) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(games) FROM teams WHERE name = 'Houston Mavericks'

question: What's the name of the player in 1996 who had the most steals that didn't play in the playoffs?
original_query: SELECT T1.playerID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.year = 1996 AND T2.PostGP = 0 ORDER BY T2.steals DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of players who attended Auburn University and won an "All-Defensive Second Team" award?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.award = 'All-Defensive Second Team' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.college = 'Auburn'

question: List out all the coach ID who have served more than 2 different teams.
original_query: SELECT coachID FROM coaches GROUP BY coachID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT tmID) > 2

question: What is the nickname of the NBA player whose team competed in the Western Conference in the season 2006 and who had a total of two blocks?
original_query: SELECT T2.nameNick FROM player_allstar AS T1 INNER JOIN players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.blocks = 2 AND T1.conference = 'West' AND T1.season_id = 2006

question: How many times between 1975 and 1980 did the player abdulka01 play for LAL?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.year) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.tmID = 'LAL' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1975 AND 1980 AND T1.playerID = 'abdulka01'

question: In 1990, how many players whose teams had the winning rate of more than 75%?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players_teams AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmID AND T1.year = T2.year WHERE CAST(T2.won AS REAL) * 100 / CAST(T2.games AS REAL) > 75 AND T1.year = 1990

question: Name the teams along with the coaches that went to 'Quarter Final' round in 1946.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.coachID, T3.name FROM coaches AS T1 JOIN series_post AS T2 ON T1.tmID = T2.tmIDWinner JOIN teams AS T3 ON T3.tmID = T1.tmID WHERE T2.round = 'QF' AND T2.year = 1946

question: Among the coaches who won the 'NBA coach of the year' award from 1971 - 1975, how many of them were in 'POR' team?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM awards_coaches AS T1 INNER JOIN teams AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year WHERE T1.year BETWEEN 1971 AND 1975 AND T1.award = 'NBA Coach of the Year' AND T2.tmID = 'POR'

question: Among the players born in Whitestone, how many of them have won the MVP?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.playerID) FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T2.award = 'Most Valuable Player' AND T1.birthCity = 'Houston'

question: Who is the longest serving coach from year 1970 to 1980. List the coach ID and the team(s) he served.
original_query: SELECT coachID, tmID FROM coaches WHERE year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1980 ORDER BY stint DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many first round draft player in 1996 NBA draft became an All-Star?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.playerID) FROM draft AS T1 INNER JOIN player_allstar AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE T1.draftYear = 1996 AND T1.draftRound = 1

question: In which league did the player who weighs 40% less than the heaviest player and whose height is 80 inches play?
original_query: SELECT T2.lgID FROM players AS T1 INNER JOIN players_teams AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID GROUP BY T2.lgID, T1.weight HAVING T1.weight = MAX(T1.weight) - MAX(T1.weight) * 0.4

question: What is the number of NBA titles that Ray Allen has won throughout his NBA career?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.playerID) FROM player_allstar AS T1 INNER JOIN awards_players AS T2 ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID WHERE first_name = 'Ray' AND last_name = 'Allen'

question: What is the quantity of the closed or not running Yelp Businesses in 'AZ'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE state LIKE 'AZ' AND active LIKE 'False'

question: In businesses with a category of mexican, how many of them has a star rating below 4?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.business_id) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories ON T1.business_id = Business_Categories.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON Business_Categories.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.stars < 4 AND T3.category_name LIKE 'Mexican'

question: What is the closing and opening time of businesses located at Gilbert with highest star rating?
original_query: SELECT T2.closing_time, T2.opening_time FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city LIKE 'Gilbert' ORDER BY T1.stars DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which city has the highest number of businesses in the food industry whose number of reviews is high?
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories ON T1.business_id = Business_Categories.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON Business_Categories.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.review_count LIKE 'High' AND T3.category_name LIKE 'Food' GROUP BY T1.city

question: List down the business ID and attribute value of the attribute name of "payment_types_visa".
original_query: SELECT T2.business_id, T2.attribute_value FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'payment_types_visa'

question: What is the number of reviews from user No. "21679"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(review_length) FROM Reviews WHERE user_id = 21679

question: Which users become an elite in 2012?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.user_id FROM Elite AS T1 INNER JOIN Years AS T2 ON T1.year_id = T2.year_id WHERE T2.actual_year = 2012

question: List out city name of businesses which have medium length of review.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.city FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.review_length = 'Medium'

question: Sum up the number of business with "ambience_romantic" attribute.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'ambience_romantic' AND T2.attribute_value = 'true'

question: Find out which business is opened for 24/7 and list out what is the business attribute.
original_query: SELECT T5.attribute_name FROM Business_Hours AS T1 INNER JOIN Days AS T2 ON T1.day_id = T2.day_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T1.business_id = T3.business_id INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T4 ON T3.business_id = T4.business_id INNER JOIN Attributes AS T5 ON T4.attribute_id = T5.attribute_id WHERE T2.day_id LIKE '1' AND '2' AND '3' AND '4' AND '5' AND '6' AND '7' AND T1.opening_time = T1.closing_time GROUP BY T5.attribute_name

question: For the user who gave the most number of long reviews, what is his/her averge ratings of all review?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.review_stars) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.review_stars) FROM Reviews AS T1 INNER JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.review_length LIKE 'Long' GROUP BY T1.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.review_length) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which businesses with the category name Accessories have opening hours before 7AM?
original_query: SELECT T1.business_id FROM Business_Hours AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.category_name = 'Accessories' AND SUBSTR(T1.opening_time, -4, 2) * 1 < 7 AND T1.opening_time LIKE '%AM'

question: How many stars does each of the 3 top users with the most likes in their reviews have?
original_query: SELECT T2.user_average_stars FROM Tips AS T1 INNER JOIN Users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id GROUP BY T2.user_id ORDER BY SUM(T1.likes) DESC LIMIT 3

question: Among the elite users of 10 consecutive year from 2005 to 2014, list down the user ID and their number of compliment on photos.
original_query: SELECT T2.user_id, T2.number_of_compliments FROM Compliments AS T1 INNER JOIN Users_Compliments AS T2 ON T1.compliment_id = T2.compliment_id INNER JOIN Elite AS T3 ON T2.user_id = T3.user_id WHERE T3.year_id BETWEEN 2005 AND 2014 AND T1.compliment_type = 'photos'

question: How many business are opened for more than 8 hour in Mesa and what is the percentage of the active businesses?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.active = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.business_id) AS ACT FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'Mesa'

question: How many businesses are there in Phoenix city? Find the percentage of businesses in Phoenix city in the total city.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.city LIKE 'Phoenix' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "num" , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.city LIKE 'Phoenix' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.city) FROM Business_Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Categories AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T1.business_id = T3.business_id

question: In businesses with a category of "DJs", how many businesses are rated less than 5?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.business_id) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.category_name = 'DJs' AND T1.stars < 5

question: Find the 5-star business in Ahwatukee, AZ and identify it's business category.
original_query: SELECT T1.business_id, T3.category_name FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.city = 'Ahwatukee' AND T1.stars = 5

question: For the only Yelp business in "Yuma" city, how many "medium" reviews did it get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.review_length) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city LIKE 'Yuma' AND T2.review_length LIKE 'Medium'

question: How many short tips were left for the business with ID no.2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Tips WHERE business_id = 2 AND tip_length = 'Short'

question: How many active businesses of city are underrated?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE review_count LIKE 'Low' AND active LIKE 'TRUE'

question: What kind of "wi-fi" does Yelp business No."10172" have?
original_query: SELECT T2.attribute_value FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id WHERE T2.business_id = 10172 AND T1.attribute_name LIKE 'wi-fi'

question: List the business ID of shopping business that have 4 stars ratings.
original_query: SELECT T1.business_id FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.category_name = 'Shopping' AND T1.stars = 4

question: Find the location of businesses that have business hours from 8 am to 9 pm every Friday.
original_query: SELECT T1.city FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Days AS T3 ON T2.day_id = T3.day_id WHERE T2.closing_time LIKE '9PM' AND T2.opening_time LIKE '8AM' AND T3.day_of_week LIKE 'Friday' GROUP BY T1.city

question: Who has got the most number of "funny" type of compliments? Give the user ID.
original_query: SELECT user_id FROM Users_Compliments WHERE compliment_id IN ( SELECT compliment_id FROM Compliments WHERE compliment_type LIKE 'funny' )

question: List the active business ID and its stars of the businesses fall under the category of Fashion.
original_query: SELECT T1.business_id, T1.stars FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories ON T1.business_id = Business_Categories.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON Business_Categories.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.active LIKE 'TRUE' AND T3.category_name LIKE 'Fashion'

question: State the ID number for the attribute named "Accepts Insurance"?
original_query: SELECT attribute_id FROM Attributes WHERE attribute_name = 'Accepts Insurance'

question: Among the businesses in Chandler, list the attribute of the business with a low review count.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.attribute_id, T3.attribute_name FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.attribute_id INNER JOIN Attributes AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.attribute_id WHERE T1.review_count = 'Low' AND T1.city = 'Chandler'

question: What is the opening time of the active businesses in Chandler that has a medium review count.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.opening_time FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Days AS T3 ON T2.day_id = T3.day_id WHERE T1.city LIKE 'Chandler' AND T1.active LIKE 'TRUE' AND T1.review_count LIKE 'Medium'

question: List the user ID, business ID with review length of the business which received the most likes in tips.
original_query: SELECT T1.user_id, T1.business_id, T2.review_length FROM Tips AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id ORDER BY T1.likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the category of businesses with highest star rating?
original_query: SELECT T3.category_name FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id ORDER BY T1.stars DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many hours does the Yelp business No. "5734" open on Saturday?
original_query: SELECT T1.closing_time - T1.opening_time AS "hour" FROM Business_Hours AS T1 INNER JOIN Days AS T2 ON T1.day_id = T2.day_id WHERE T2.day_of_week LIKE 'Saturday' AND T1.business_id = 5734

question: How many businesses of Yelp are in Scottsdale?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE city LIKE 'Scottsdale'

question: How many actively running Yelp businesses are there located in "Phoenix" city?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE active = 'true' AND city = 'Phoenix'

question: Which business ID received the review of 4 star and above by 65% of user? Describe their active status and city.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.business_id, T2.city FROM Reviews AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.review_stars >= 4 AND ( SELECT CAST(( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.user_id) FROM Reviews AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.review_stars >= 4 ) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM Users ) > 65 )

question: Among the stopped businesses in San Tan Valley city, list down the user ID and review length of who had great experience.
original_query: SELECT T2.user_id, T2.review_length FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'San Tan Valley' AND T1.active = 'false' AND T2.review_stars = 5

question: Which user has done the most review on a business attributed to delivery?
original_query: SELECT T3.user_id FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id INNER JOIN Reviews AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'Delivery' GROUP BY T3.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.business_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the categories of active businesses in Glendale, AZ.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.category_name FROM Business_Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T1.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T2.active = 'true' AND T2.state = 'AZ' AND T2.city = 'Glendale'

question: Please indicate the closing hours and business days of the businesses with the category named Doctors.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.opening_time, T3.day_id FROM Business_Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Categories AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T3 ON T1.business_id = T3.business_id INNER JOIN Days AS T4 ON T3.day_id = T4.day_id WHERE T2.category_name = 'Doctors'

question: Please indicate the review count of the "active life" businesses in Phoenix.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.category_name = 'Active Life' AND T3.city = 'Phoenix'

question: Sum up the likes get by short reviews on businesses located in City Goodyear.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.likes) AS likes FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Tips AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'Goodyear'

question: How many active businesses are there in Phoenix?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE city LIKE 'Phoenix' AND active LIKE 'TRUE'

question: Under the attribute name of "music_playlist", describe the attribute ID, business ID, city and inactive status.
original_query: SELECT T1.attribute_id, T2.business_id, T3.city FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'music_playlist' AND T3.active = 'false'

question: What is the total number of active business in AZ with a high review count?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE state LIKE 'AZ' AND review_count LIKE 'High' AND active LIKE 'True'

question: What is the attribute value of an active business with a low review count and 3 stars which is located at Goodyear, AZ?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.attribute_value FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Attributes AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.attribute_id WHERE T1.state = 'AZ' AND T1.city = 'Goodyear' AND T1.active = 'true' AND T1.stars = 3 AND T1.review_count = 'Low'

question: Among the active businesses located at Mesa, AZ, list the category and attributes of business with a low review count.
original_query: SELECT T3.category_name FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.review_count = 'Low' AND T1.city = 'Mesa' AND T1.active = 'true' AND T1.state = 'AZ'

question: Calculate the percentage of businesses who located in Mesa. What is attribute value of these businesses.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.city) AS REAL) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business ), T2.attribute_value FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'Mesa'

question: How much time do businesses in El Mirage City, AZ State operate in average daily?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.closing_time - T2.opening_time) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'El Mirage' AND T1.state = 'AZ'

question: List the active business ID and its stars of the businesses fall under the category of Pets.
original_query: SELECT T1.business_id, T1.stars FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories ON T1.business_id = Business_Categories.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON Business_Categories.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.active LIKE 'TRUE' AND T3.category_name LIKE 'Pets'

question: How many closed businesses that have more than 10 attributes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Business WHERE business_id IN ( SELECT T1.business_id FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.active = 'false' GROUP BY T1.business_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.attribute_id) > 10 )

question: Count the active businesses that has an attribute of BYOB with high review count.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.business_id) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Attributes AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.attribute_id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'BYOB' AND T1.review_count = 'High' AND T1.active = 'true'

question: How many user ids from 1 to 20 have no fan users and have low ratings?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM Users WHERE user_id BETWEEN 1 AND 20 AND user_fans LIKE 'None' AND user_review_count LIKE 'Low'

question: Please indicate the opening day of businesses whose category is pets.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T4.day_of_week FROM Business_Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Categories AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T3 ON T1.business_id = T3.business_id INNER JOIN Days AS T4 ON T3.day_id = T4.day_id WHERE T2.category_name = 'Pets'

question: List all the tires businesses that are opened everyday.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.business_id FROM Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Categories AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id INNER JOIN Business_Hours AS T4 ON T3.business_id = T4.business_id WHERE T1.category_name = 'Tires' GROUP BY T2.business_id HAVING COUNT(day_id) = 7

question: What are the most common compliments types received by user with uber number of fans?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.compliment_type FROM Users AS T1 INNER JOIN Users_Compliments AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id INNER JOIN Compliments AS T3 ON T2.compliment_id = T3.compliment_id WHERE T1.user_fans = 'Uber'

question: How many Yelp_Business in Arizona has user no. 3 reviewed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM Reviews AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.state LIKE 'AZ' AND T1.user_id = 3

question: What is the total number of fans or followers who received most likes of their comments in the business?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.user_fans) FROM Users AS T1 INNER JOIN Tips AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(T2.likes) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many businesses with music_karaoke attribute are closed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id INNER JOIN Business AS T3 ON T2.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'music_karaoke' AND T3.active = 'false' AND T2.attribute_value IN ('none', 'no', 'false')

question: Which actively running Yelp business in "Gilbert" has got the most reviews? Give the business id.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.business_id FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.active = 'true' AND T1.city = 'Gilbert' AND T1.review_count = 'Uber'

question: For users with average ratings of 3, what kind of tip length they mostly left?
original_query: SELECT T2.tip_length FROM Users AS T1 INNER JOIN Tips AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T1.user_average_stars = 3 GROUP BY T2.tip_length ORDER BY COUNT(T2.tip_length) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the long reviews made by user ID 3, how many of them have received a medium number of useful votes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(review_length) FROM Reviews WHERE user_id = 3 AND review_length LIKE 'Long' AND review_votes_useful LIKE 'Medium'

question: Give the number of "dogs allowed" Yelp businesses.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id WHERE T1.attribute_name LIKE 'Dogs Allowed' AND T2.attribute_value LIKE 'TRUE'

question: What is the percentage of businesses with "Good for Kids" attribute over the other attributes?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN attribute_name = 'Good for Kids' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.business_id) FROM Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Business_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.attribute_id WHERE T2.attribute_value = 'true'

question: For the Yelp business in "Tempe" city which got "3.5" stars and review count as "Uber", how many "long" reviews did it get?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.review_length) FROM Business AS T1 INNER JOIN Reviews AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'Tempe' AND T1.stars = '3.5' AND T1.review_count = 'Uber' AND T2.review_length = 'Long'

question: Which year has the most elite users?
original_query: SELECT year_id FROM Elite GROUP BY year_id ORDER BY COUNT(user_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the percentage of businesses with the category name food that are open from 7AM to 8PM in the businesses with the same time.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.category_name = 'Food' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.category_name) FROM Business_Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN Categories AS T3 ON T1.category_id = T3.category_id

question: Provide the number of Yelp businesses in "Gilbert" which got a" high" review count.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(business_id) FROM Business WHERE review_count = 'High' AND city = 'Gilbert'

question: How many open businesses in the City of Phoenix have users left a long review?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.business_id) FROM Reviews AS T1 INNER JOIN Business AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.review_length = 'Long' AND T2.active = 'true' AND T2.city = 'Phoenix'

question: List down the business ID with a star range from 3 to 5, located at Chandler.
original_query: SELECT business_id FROM Business WHERE stars >= 3 AND stars < 6 AND city = 'Chandler'

question: For the user who joined Yelp in "2010", with an average of "4.5" stars review and has got uber number of fans, how many "funny" compliments has he/she received from other users?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM Users AS T1 INNER JOIN Users_Compliments AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id INNER JOIN Compliments AS T3 ON T2.compliment_id = T3.compliment_id WHERE T1.user_yelping_since_year = 2010 AND T1.user_average_stars = 4.5 AND T1.user_fans = 'Uber' AND T3.compliment_type = 'funny'

question: How many reviews have the user whose ID is 3 posted?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(review_length) FROM Reviews WHERE user_id = 3

question: In users yelping since 2009 to 2011, how many of them have low count of fans?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM Users WHERE user_yelping_since_year >= 2009 AND user_yelping_since_year < 2012 AND user_fans = 'Low'

question: For all the Yelp businesses that allow customers bring their own beer, what percentage of them are in "Phoenix"?
