question: What is the percentage ratio between uncredited and credited roles on the episode that won the 2017 Jupiter Award for Best International TV Series? Please include the title of the episode and the names of the persons who were uncredited alongside their role in that episode.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.credited = 'false' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.credited = 'true' THEN 1 END), T3.title, T2.person FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id INNER JOIN Episode AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.year, 1, 4) = '2017' AND T1.award_category = 'Jupiter Award' AND T1.award = 'Best International TV Series' AND T1.result = 'Winner';

question: Which character won the Outstanding Voice-Over Performance award in 2009?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.character FROM Character_Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.award_id = T2.award_id WHERE T2.award = 'Outstanding Voice-Over Performance' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T2.result = 'Winner';

question: Among the person nominated for the Comedy Series Award in 2009, how many of them were born in California?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.award = 'Comedy Series' AND T1.birth_region = 'California';

question: Which episode ids are rated 5 stars and have more than 100 votes?
original_query: SELECT episode_id FROM Vote WHERE stars = 5 AND votes > 100;

question: What percentage of votes are from the nominated episodes?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.result = 'Nominee' THEN T2.votes ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.votes) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id;

question: How many episodes have the keyword "2d animation"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(episode_id) FROM Keyword WHERE keyword = '2d animation';

question: What is the name of the person that has the highest number of nominated award but didn't win?
original_query: SELECT person FROM Award WHERE result = 'Nominee' GROUP BY person ORDER BY COUNT(person) DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Write down all the keywords for winner of "WGA Award (TV)" award.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.award_category = 'WGA Award (TV)';

question: Based on the credits, state how many roles were played in the 5th episode of simpson 20.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.role) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.episode = 5;

question: Write down the title and summary of the episode with the keyword 'eviction.'
original_query: SELECT T1.title, T1.summary FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.keyword = 'eviction';

question: What is the birth place of the cast or crew member who won the Best Voice-Over Performance in Online Film & Television Association in 2009?
original_query: SELECT T1.birth_place FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.award = 'Best Voice-Over Performance' AND T2.organization = 'Online Film & Television Association' AND T2.year = 2009;

question: Calculate the total votes of episodes that Adam Kuhlman had involved.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.votes) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.person = 'Adam Kuhlman';

question: What is the birth name of the person who voiced 'Helen Lovejoy?'
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.birth_name FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.role = 'Helen Lovejoy';

question: Which country has the tallest person in the crew?
original_query: SELECT birth_country FROM Person ORDER BY height_meters DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many crew members who were born in the USA were nominated for the Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour) award in 2009?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T1.birth_country = 'USA' AND T2.result = 'Nominee' AND T2.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND T2.year = 2009;

question: Find the average height for each person.
original_query: SELECT AVG(height_meters) FROM Person;

question: Please give the name of the director who achieved the Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour) award whose episode title is "No Loan Again, Naturally".
original_query: SELECT T1.person FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.role = 'director' AND T1.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND T2.title = 'No Loan Again, Naturally';

question: Write down the website address which stores the episode image of episode 5.
original_query: SELECT episode_image FROM Episode WHERE episode = 5;

question: What year did the Simpsons receive its first ever award for Favorite Animated Comedy in People's Choice Award?
original_query: SELECT year FROM Award WHERE result = 'Winner' AND award = 'Favorite Animated Comedy' ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is The simpson 20s: Season 20 average awards winning rate?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'Winner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(award) AS rate FROM Award;

question: List out the names of the awarded character in the awards held in 2009.
original_query: SELECT T2.character FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Character_Award AS T2 ON T1.award_id = T2.award_id WHERE T1.year = 2009;

question: Calculate the percentage of the nominees who were born in USA.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.birth_country = 'USA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.result = 'Nominee';

question: How many 1 star ratings are there in the worst rated episode of the season?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 1 ORDER BY T1.rating LIMIT 1;

question: List all keywords associated with the episode 'Take My Life, Please'.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Take My Life, Please';

question: Please list the three episodes with the highest number of votes for the worst star rating.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = ( SELECT MIN(stars) FROM Vote ) ORDER BY T2.votes DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Please indicate the keywords of the title "Double, Double, Boy in Trouble".
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Double, Double, Boy in Trouble';

question: Who from The simpson 20s: Season 20 cast and crew was born in October 29, 1957 in Chicago, Illinois?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE birthdate = '1957-10-29' AND birth_place = 'Chicago' AND birth_region = 'Illinois';

question: In episodes aired in 2009, how many of them are credited to Sam Im for additional timer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.credited = 'true' AND T2.person = 'Sam Im' AND SUBSTR(T1.air_date, 1, 4) = '2009' AND T2.role = 'additional timer';

question: Calculate the percentage of people who were born after 1970 and from California.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN birth_region = 'California' AND SUBSTR(birthdate, 1, 4) > '1970' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(birthdate) FROM Person;

question: Please check is "limbo dancing" the keyword for title "Dangerous Curves"?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.Keyword = 'limbo dancing' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS result FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Dangerous Curves';

question: Please list the titles of the episodes that have over 200 voters voting a 10 in star score.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.votes > 200 AND T2.stars = 10;

question: Who produced The simpson 20s: Season 20?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT person FROM Credit WHERE role = 'producer';

question: Which character did the "Outstanding Voice-Over Performance" winner voice?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.character FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Character_Award AS T2 ON T1.award_id = T2.award_id WHERE T1.award = 'Outstanding Voice-Over Performance' AND T1.result = 'Winner';

question: How many additional timers were born in USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.role = 'additional timer' AND T1.birth_country = 'USA';

question: What award did the episode that aired on 11/30/2008 win?
original_query: SELECT T1.award FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.result = 'Winner' AND T2.air_date = '2008-11-30';

question: Please provide any two episodes' names that have the same keyword of "1930s to 2020s".
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.keyword = '1930s to 2020s' LIMIT 2;

question: Name the organization which hold the award id 328.
original_query: SELECT organization FROM Award WHERE award_id = 328;

question: Name of the crew that were born in California, USA between 1958 and 1969.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE SUBSTR(birthdate, 1, 4) = '1958' AND birth_place = 'California' AND birth_country = 'USA';

question: List all the keyword for 'Take My Life, Please' episode.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Take My Life, Please';

question: How many crews were born in the USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM Person WHERE birth_country = 'USA';

question: What is the average height of people from USA?
original_query: SELECT AVG(height_meters) FROM Person WHERE birth_country = 'USA';

question: What is the title of episode that has a keyword of 'riot' and 'cake'?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.keyword IN ('riot', 'cake');

question: How many people who were born after 1970 are animation executive producer?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE STRFTIME(T1.birthdate) > '1970' AND T2.role = 'animation executive producer';

question: How many episodes have more than 1000 votes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(episode_id) FROM Episode WHERE votes > 1000;

question: Which episode has the highest number of vote of the star score?
original_query: SELECT episode_id FROM Vote ORDER BY votes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many crew have their own nickname? List their full name along with the nickname.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM Person WHERE nickname IS NOT NULL;

question: What is the average heights of crew members from Animation Department?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.height_meters) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.category = 'Animation Department';

question: Sum up the votes from star 1 to 5 for all of the contestants in Blimp Award.
original_query: SELECT T2.stars, SUM(T2.stars) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.award_category = 'Blimp Award' AND T2.stars BETWEEN 1 AND 5 GROUP BY T2.stars;

question: List out the star scores of episode which has title of "How the Test Was Won".
original_query: SELECT T2.stars FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'How the Test Was Won';

question: What is the number of votes for 10-star for the episode that has the keyword "reference to the fantastic four"?
original_query: SELECT T2.votes FROM Keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10 AND T1.keyword = 'reference to the fantastic four';

question: Calculate the total rating of winners in OFTA Television Award and WGA Award (TV).
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.rating) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.award_category IN ('Jupiter Award ', 'WGA Award (TV)');

question: How many executive producers are the nominees for the award of "Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Award WHERE role = 'executive producer' AND result = 'Nominee' AND award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)';

question: Please indicate the birthplace of the crew which name is Dan Castellaneta.
original_query: SELECT birth_place FROM Person WHERE name = 'Dan Castellaneta';

question: List down the keyword and crew member's name for episode id S20-E1.
original_query: SELECT T1.keyword, T2.person FROM Keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.episode_id = 'S20-E1';

question: Among the episodes with excellent rating which were aired in 2008, describe the title, episode's image, award name and person who were nominated.
original_query: SELECT T2.title, T2.episode_image, T1.award, T1.person FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.rating BETWEEN 7 AND 10 AND SUBSTR(T2.air_date, 1, 4) = '2008' AND T1.result = 'Nominee';

question: How much more votes for episode 1 than for episode 5?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.episode = 1 THEN T2.votes ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.episode = 5 THEN T2.votes ELSE 0 END) AS diff FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id;

question: Name the title of the episode that received the highest star score and the highest number of votes.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id ORDER BY T2.stars DESC, T2.votes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Among episodes aired in 2009, which episode has received the worst response based on the rating.
original_query: SELECT episode_id FROM Episode WHERE air_date LIKE '2009%' ORDER BY rating LIMIT 1;

question: Provide the episode number, title and rating of which were aired in October, 2008.
original_query: SELECT episode, title, rating FROM Episode WHERE SUBSTR(air_date, 1, 7) LIKE '2008-10%';

question: Describe name, birth country, role in episode and age in 2022 of the oldest crew member..
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T1.birth_place, T2.role, 2022 - CAST(SUBSTR(T1.birthdate, 1, 4) AS int) AS age FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T1.birthdate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.birthdate LIMIT 1;

question: Among episodes from 10 to 20, which episode has more than 200 votes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.episode FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.episode BETWEEN 10 AND 20 AND T2.votes > 200;

question: Who did "The Tiny Canadian" play as in the show?
original_query: SELECT T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T1.nickname = 'The Tiny Canadian';

question: How many people were not born in Connecticut, USA?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM Person WHERE birth_region != 'Connecticut' AND birth_country != 'USA';

question: State the name of director for the 'Treehouse of Horror XIX' episode.
original_query: SELECT T2.person FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Treehouse of Horror XIX' AND T2.role = 'director';

question: List down person's name who has nickname.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE nickname IS NOT NULL;

question: In year 2009, what is the percentage of the episode titled by "Gone Maggie Gone" being nominated?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.result = 'Nominee' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.result = 'Winner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.result) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.title = 'Gone Maggie Gone' AND T1.year = 2009;

question: List down the names of person born in California, USA.
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person WHERE birth_region = 'California' AND birth_country = 'USA';

question: Name the person, award, organization, result and credited status of the assistant director in S20-E13.
original_query: SELECT T1.person, T1.award, T1.organization, T1.result, T2.credited FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.episode_id = 'S20-E13' AND T2.role = 'assistant director';

question: Who is the oldest among all the casts and crews?
original_query: SELECT name FROM Person ORDER BY birthdate ASC LIMIT 1;

question: How many stars on average does the episode Lost Verizon have?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.votes * T2.stars) AS REAL) / SUM(T2.votes) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Lost Verizon';

question: For the episode who won the award held by Jupiter Award, describe award name, aired date and rating of that episode.
original_query: SELECT T1.award, T2.air_date, T2.rating FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.organization = 'Jupiter Award' AND T1.result = 'Winner';

question: What is the title of the episode that received the lowest rating?
original_query: SELECT title FROM Episode ORDER BY rating LIMIT 1;

question: Which title is the winner of Best International TV Series in 2017?
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.award = 'Best International TV Series' AND SUBSTR(T1.year, 1, 4) = '2017';

question: Describe the birth country, height and person name who were not included in credit list with category of casting.
original_query: SELECT T1.birth_country, T1.height_meters, T1.name FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.category = 'Cast' AND T2.credited = 'false';

question: How many episodes aired in the year 2009 have over 15% of voters giving 10 stars in star score?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.air_date, 1, 4) = '2009' AND T2.stars = 10 AND T2.percent > 15;

question: What's the title of the episode that got the most 7-star votes in star score?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 7 ORDER BY T2.votes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: State the number of votes for episode with rating of 7 and above.
original_query: SELECT votes FROM Episode WHERE rating > 7;

question: What is the keyword for episodes with stars score of 10 at 30% and above?
original_query: SELECT T1.keyword FROM Keyword AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10 AND T2.percent > 29;

question: List out the title of episodes which have star score of 2.
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 2;

question: Among the people in Animation Department, who are credited for additional time in the episode titled by "How the Test Was Won"?
original_query: SELECT T2.person FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'How the Test Was Won' AND T2.role = 'additional timer' AND T2.credited = 'true' AND T2.category = 'Animation Department';

question: What is the episode ID that received 2 stars and 9 votes?
original_query: SELECT episode_id FROM Vote WHERE stars = 2 AND votes = 9;

question: How many awards did simpson 20 won in 2009?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(award_id) FROM Award WHERE SUBSTR(year, 1, 4) = '2009' AND result = 'Winner';

question: Please list all the keywords of the episode Lost Verizon.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Lost Verizon';

question: Which episode has the most vote for 10 stars rating?
original_query: SELECT T1.title FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 10 ORDER BY T1.votes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the percentage of star score 5 that was collected by title "Sex, Pies and Idiot Scrapes"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.stars = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Sex, Pies and Idiot Scrapes';

question: List all of the award winners' birth dates.
original_query: SELECT T1.birthdate FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T2.result = 'Winner';

question: What is the birth name of Al Jean and his role in creating The simpson 20s: Season 20?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.birth_name, T2.role FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.person WHERE T1.name = 'Al Jean';

question: Out of the rating of 6.8 scored by title "No Loan Again, Naturally", how many percent of it consists of scores 5 to 10?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.percent) FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'No Loan Again, Naturally' AND T1.rating = 6.8 AND T2.stars BETWEEN 5 AND 10;

question: Indicate the name and category of the most recent award received by the show.
original_query: SELECT award, award_category FROM Award WHERE result = 'Winner' ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the ratio between the 5 stars votes for 'No Loan Again, Naturally' episode and 'Coming to Homerica' episode?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'No Loan Again, Naturally' THEN T1.votes ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.title = 'Coming to Homerica' THEN T1.votes ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T2.stars = 5;

question: How many episodes have won the award for Outstanding Animated Program (Programming Under One Hour) with less than 100 votes? Calculate the percentage of episodes with less than 100 votes out of total episodes.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.votes < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.votes < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Episode AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T1.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)';

question: Among the casts who were born in Los Angeles, describe the name and birth date of who have 1.8 m and above in height.
original_query: SELECT name, birthdate FROM Person WHERE birth_place = 'Los Angeles' AND height_meters >= 1.8;

question: Among the episodes aired in 2008 with votes ranges from 920 to 950, list their percent.
original_query: SELECT T2.percent FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.air_date, 1, 4) = '2008' AND T1.votes BETWEEN 950 AND 960;

question: Name the title of the episode that was nominated for Emmy's Outstanding Animated Program 21 times.
original_query: SELECT T2.title FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND T1.award = 'Outstanding Animated Program (For Programming Less Than One Hour)' AND T1.result = 'Nominee' GROUP BY T1.episode_id HAVING COUNT(T1.episode_id) = 21;

question: Please indicate the keywords of the episode that won the Primetime Emmy Award category.
original_query: SELECT T2.keyword FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T2.episode_id = T1.episode_id WHERE T1.award_category = 'Primetime Emmy';

question: Among the episodes aired on April of 2009, how many episodes won an award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.episode_id) FROM Award AS T1 INNER JOIN Episode AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.year, 1, 4) = '2009' AND T2.air_date LIKE '2009-04%';

question: What are the names of the venues in Abu Dhabi?
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id WHERE T2.City_Name = 'Abu Dhabi'

question: For how many times has player no.41 won the "man of the match" award?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE Man_of_the_Match = 41

question: What is the batting hand of MK Pandey?
original_query: SELECT T2.Batting_hand FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'MK Pandey'

question: List the names of players who played as a keeper.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T3.Role_Desc = 'Keeper' GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: What is the total number of runs scored by the batsmen during the 2nd inning of the match ID 335988?
original_query: SELECT SUM(Runs_Scored) FROM Batsman_Scored WHERE Match_Id = 335988 AND Innings_No = 2

question: How many players were born after the year 1985?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Id) FROM Player WHERE SUBSTR(DOB, 1, 4) > 1985

question: Indicate the name of the most versatile players of the Delhi Daredevils.
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_Name FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T1.Player_Id = T3.Player_Id WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Delhi Daredevils' GROUP BY T3.Player_Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Role_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the bowling skills of all the players from Australia.
original_query: SELECT T2.Bowling_Skill FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_skill = T2.Bowling_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T1.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T3.Country_Name = 'Australia' GROUP BY T2.Bowling_Skill

question: In what year did SP Narine win the Orange Cap?
original_query: SELECT T4.Season_Year, T4.Orange_Cap FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T3.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SP Narine' GROUP BY T4.Season_Year, T4.Orange_Cap

question: What is the total number of players born between 1970 to 1975?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Id) FROM Player WHERE strftime('%Y', DOB) BETWEEN '1970' AND '1975'

question: State the name of captain keeper of the match no.419117.
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_Name FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Rolee AS T2 ON T1.Role_Id = T2.Role_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T1.Player_Id = T3.Player_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = '419117' AND T2.Role_Desc = 'CaptainKeeper'

question: Who was the man of the series in 2013? Give the full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Player_Id WHERE T1.Season_Year = 2013

question: List down the match ID of matches that the "man of the match" award was given to BB McCullum.
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Man_of_the_Match WHERE T2.Player_Name = 'BB McCullum'

question: Which team did CK Kapugedera belong to? How many matches did he play?
original_query: SELECT T3.Team_Name, COUNT(T2.Match_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T3.Team_Id = T2.Team_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'CK Kapugedera'

question: On average, how many players from each country bat with their right hand?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Batting_hand = 'Right-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Country_Name) FROM Batting_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Batting_id = T2.Batting_hand

question: How many victory matches were there in 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM Match WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2008%' AND Match_Winner IS NOT NULL

question: List all Zimbabwean players.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'Zimbabwea'

question: Name the player who is born on July 7, 1981.
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM Player WHERE DOB = '1981-07-07'

question: When did the Sunrisers Hyderabad win their first match?
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Date FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.Match_Winner = T2.Team_Id WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Sunrisers Hyderabad'

question: In the players, how many were out by hit wicket?
original_query: SELECT Player_Out FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T1.Kind_Out = T2.Out_Id WHERE Out_Name = 'hit wicket'

question: Among the players who were born in 1977, provide names and birthdates of the players from England.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name, T2.DOB FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Country_Name = T1.Country_Id WHERE T2.DOB LIKE '1977%' AND T1.Country_Name = 'England'

question: How many players got out by being stumped in the second innings of all matches?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Innings_No = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T2.Out_Id = T1.Kind_Out WHERE T2.Out_Name = 'stumped'

question: List down names of teams that have played as second team against Pune Warriors.
original_query: SELECT T2.Team_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Team_2 WHERE T1.Team_1 = ( SELECT Team_Id FROM Team WHERE Team_Name = 'Pune Warriors' ) GROUP BY T2.Team_Name

question: What is the role of SC Ganguly?
original_query: SELECT T3.Role_Desc FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly' GROUP BY T3.Role_Desc

question: What is the difference in the average number of players out by lbw and runout in the matches?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Player_Out) FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T1.Kind_Out = T2.Out_Id WHERE T2.Out_Name = 'lbw'

question: Among the players out in match ID 392187, calculate the percentage of players out by bowl.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Out_Name = 'bowled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Player_Out) FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T2.Out_Id = T1.Kind_Out WHERE T1.Match_Id = 392187

question: List down the name of venues in season 2.
original_query: SELECT T2.Venue_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.Venue_Id = T1.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Season_Id = 2 GROUP BY T2.Venue_Name

question: Which country is the youngest player from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Name ORDER BY T2.DOB DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the date of the match that has the highest wager on the final result of a game?
original_query: SELECT Match_Date FROM `Match` ORDER BY Win_Margin DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which player became the man of the series in the year 2012? Give the name and country of this player.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name, T3.Country_Name FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T1.Season_Year = 2012

question: In what percentage of games played at the Dr DY Patil Sports Academy venue did the winning team win by a margin of less than 10?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.Win_Margin < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / TOTAL(T1.Venue_Id) FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Venue_Name = 'Dr DY Patil Sports Academy'

question: Which team wins the toss during the match ID 336011, and can you tell me whether they decided to bat or field?
original_query: SELECT T2.Toss_Name, T1.Toss_Decide, T1.Toss_Winner FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Toss_Decision AS T2 ON T1.Toss_Decide = T2.Toss_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = '336011'

question: Among the" Mumbai Indians" team that played in 2009, how many percent of the matches did they win?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Match_Winner = T2.Team_Id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Match_Id) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.Team_1 = T2.Team_Id OR T1.Team_2 = T2.Team_Id WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' AND T1.Match_Date LIKE '2009%'

question: Among the matches held in St. George's Park, give the match ID of the match with the highest winning margin points.
original_query: SELECT T2.Match_Id FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.venue_id = T2.venue_id WHERE T1.Venue_Name = 'St George''s Park' ORDER BY T2.Win_Margin DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many umpires are from South Africa?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Country_Name = 'South Africa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Umpire AS T2 ON T1.Country_ID = T2.Umpire_Country

question: What are the match IDs that were played at Brabourne Stadium?
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.Venue_Id = T1.Venue_Id WHERE T2.Venue_Name = 'Brabourne Stadium'

question: How many games were not won by runs?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Win_Type != 'runs' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id

question: In the matches where the winning margin is less than fifty, how many teams won by wicket?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Win_Id) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id WHERE T2.Win_Type = 'wickets' AND T1.Win_Margin < 50

question: How many times did SC Ganguly be the man of the match?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Man_of_the_Match) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: How many matches did the Sunrisers Hyderabad team win in 2013?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Match_Date LIKE '2013%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.Match_Winner = T2.Team_Id WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Sunrisers Hyderabad'

question: Among the players who use the right hand as their batting hand, how many of them were born after 1985?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.DOB, 1, 4) > 1985 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id WHERE T2.Batting_Hand = 'Right-hand bat'

question: In how many venues did team 2 win the toss and lose the match?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Team_2 = T1.Match_Winner THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T1.Team_1 = T1.Toss_Winner

question: How many matches have Mumbai Indians won?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T2.Team_Id = T1.Match_Winner

question: Which teams have had a player awarded the Purple Cap and another with the Orange Cap in the same season?
original_query: SELECT T5.Team_Name, T1.Orange_Cap, T1.Purple_Cap FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Season_Id = T2.Season_Id INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T4 ON T3.Player_Id = T4.Player_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T5 ON T3.Team_Id = T5.Team_Id GROUP BY T5.Team_Name, T1.Orange_Cap, T1.Purple_Cap

question: How many games were played in March 2010?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Match_Date LIKE '2010-03%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match`

question: Provide match ID which had the extra type of penalty.
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id FROM Extra_Runs AS T1 INNER JOIN Extra_Type AS T2 ON T1.Extra_Type_Id = T2.Extra_Id WHERE T2.Extra_Name = 'penalty'

question: Provide the country ID of East London.
original_query: SELECT Country_id FROM City WHERE City_Name = 'East London'

question: Give the name of the youngest player.
original_query: SELECT Player_Name FROM Player ORDER BY DOB DESC LIMIT 1

question: What type did match ID 336000 win?
original_query: SELECT T2.Win_Type FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T2 ON T1.Win_Type = T2.Win_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = 336000

question: How many players have left arm fast in bowling skill?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_skill = T2.Bowling_Id WHERE T2.Bowling_skill = 'Left-arm fast'

question: Give the name of the striker in the match no. 419169, over no.3, ball no.2, inning no.2.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Ball_by_Ball AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Striker = T2.Player_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = 419169 AND T1.Over_Id = 3 AND T1.Ball_Id = 2 AND T1.Innings_No = 2

question: How many players were born in the 80s and have bowling skill of 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Name) FROM Player WHERE DOB LIKE '198%' AND Bowling_skill = 2

question: How many times did Yuvraj Singh receive the Man of the Match award?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Player_Name = 'Yuvraj Singh' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Man_of_the_Match

question: In which country do the majority of the players are from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Country_Id = T2.Country_Name GROUP BY T2.Country_Name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Country_Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the match IDs which had players out by hit wickets.
original_query: SELECT T1.Match_Id FROM Wicket_Taken AS T1 INNER JOIN Out_Type AS T2 ON T2.Out_Id = T1.Kind_Out WHERE T2.Out_Name = 'hit wicket'

question: List down all of the venues in Mumbai.
original_query: SELECT T2.Venue_Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.City_Id = T1.City_Id WHERE T1.City_Name = 'Mumbai'

question: What are the names of players who participated in season year 2008?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T2.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id WHERE T4.Season_Year = 2008 GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: How many matches did team Kings XI Punjab win in season year 2008?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Match_Id) FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T1.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id INNER JOIN Season AS T4 ON T2.Season_Id = T4.Season_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Kings XI Punjab' AND T4.Season_Year = 2008

question: Who is the eldest player and where did he/she come from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name, T2.Country_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_Id ORDER BY T1.DOB LIMIT 1

question: What is the difference between the number of matches where SC Ganguly played as a Captain and those matches where he played other roles?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Role_Id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T3.Role_Id > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T1.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T2.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: Where did BR Doctrove come from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Umpire AS T2 ON T2.Umpire_Country = T1.Country_Id WHERE T2.Umpire_Name = 'BR Doctrove'

question: Who is the player that has the highest number of roles as a captain for Deccan Chargers?
original_query: SELECT T4.Player_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_id = T2.Team_id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T4 ON T2.Player_Id = T4.Player_Id WHERE T1.Team_Name = 'Deccan Chargers' AND T1.Team_Id = 8 AND T3.Role_Desc = 'Captain' AND T3.Role_Id = 1 GROUP BY T4.Player_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T3.Role_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many venues are located at Centurion, South Africa?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Venue_name) FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Id = T3.Country_Id WHERE T3.country_name = 'South Africa' AND T2.city_name = 'Centurion'

question: How many players have the bowling skill greater than 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Name) FROM Player WHERE Bowling_skill > 2

question: Which bowling skills did the players from Zimbabwea have?
original_query: SELECT T1.Bowling_skill FROM Bowling_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_Id = T2.Bowling_skill INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id WHERE T3.Country_Name = 'Zimbabwea'

question: How many matches did Mohammad Hafeez play?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Player_Name = 'Mohammad Hafeez' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id

question: List the player's name of Mumbai Indians in the match ID 335990.
original_query: SELECT T3.Team_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T3.Team_Id = T2.Team_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 335990 AND T3.Team_Name = 'Mumbai Indians' GROUP BY T3.Team_Name

question: How many matches were played in Season 7?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE Season_Id = 7

question: What is the venue for the match ID 829768?
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.venue_id = T2.venue_id WHERE T2.match_id = 829768

question: How many cities are in U.A.E?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'U.A.E' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.Country_id = T2.Country_id

question: What percentage of players have Legbreak skill?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Bowling_skill = ' Legbreak' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / TOTAL(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_skill = T2.Bowling_Id

question: How many matches have 7 points of winning margin?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM Match WHERE win_margin = 7

question: For the game on 2008/5/12, who was the man of the match?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match WHERE T2.Match_Date = '2008-05-12'

question: List the player's name who played as a captain.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T1.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id WHERE T3.Role_Desc = 'Captain' GROUP BY T2.Player_Name

question: What is the average of Indian players that were born between 1975 and 1985 among all players?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Country_Name = 'India' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.Player_Id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_ID WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.DOB) BETWEEN '1975' AND '1985'

question: What is the venue name of Bandladore?
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T2.City_Name = 'Bangalore'

question: Give the player id of the player who was at the non-striker end for the most number of balls in the match 501219.
original_query: SELECT Ball_Id FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Non_Striker = Ball_Id ORDER BY Ball_Id DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which year do the majority of the players were born?
original_query: SELECT DOB FROM Player GROUP BY DOB ORDER BY COUNT(DOB) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the team of T Kohli in the match ID 335989.
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T2.Player_Id = T3.Player_Id WHERE T2.match_id = 335989 AND T3.player_name = 'T Kohli'

question: How many players were born in 1970?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Player_Name) FROM Player WHERE DOB LIKE '1970%'

question: Give the name of the venue where the most number of matches are held.
original_query: SELECT T2.Venue_Name FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id GROUP BY T2.Venue_Name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Venue_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which country is the oldest player from?
original_query: SELECT T1.Country_Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Country_Name = T1.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.DOB LIMIT 1

question: What is the city of M Chinnaswamy Stadium?
original_query: SELECT T1.City_Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T2.City_Id = T1.City_Id WHERE T2.Venue_Name = 'M Chinnaswamy Stadium'

question: List the players' names who were born in 1971.
original_query: SELECT Player_name FROM Player WHERE DOB LIKE '1971%'

question: Who is the player who won the first ever "man of the match" award?
original_query: SELECT Player_Name FROM Player WHERE Player_Id = ( SELECT Man_of_the_Match FROM `Match` ORDER BY match_date ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: Who is the player who received the man of the match award during the last match of Season 9?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match WHERE T2.Season_Id = 9 ORDER BY T2.Match_Date DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many first teams chose to bat after winning the toss?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Team_1) FROM `Match` WHERE Team_1 = Toss_Winner AND Toss_Decide = 2

question: What is the percentage of all right-handed batting players among all the other players?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Batting_hand = 'Right-hand bat' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Player_Id) FROM Batting_Style AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Batting_hand = T1.Batting_Id

question: Which team won by wickets in match ID 335993?
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.match_winner INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T3 ON T1.Team_Id = T3.Team_Id INNER JOIN Win_By AS T4 ON T2.Win_Type = T4.Win_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = '335993' GROUP BY T1.Team_Name

question: Write the name of the player who was the man of the series more than one time.
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Season AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.Man_of_the_Series = T2.Player_Id WHERE T1.Man_of_the_Series > 1

question: In which venue did Kochi Tuskers Kerala play most of their matches?
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id INNER JOIN Team AS T3 ON T2.Team_1 = T3.Team_Id WHERE T3.Team_Name = 'Kochi Tuskers Kerala' GROUP BY T1.Venue_Name

question: Calculate the average runs scored during the first half of all first innings.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN 1 < Over_Id AND Over_Id < 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(Runs_Scored) FROM Batsman_Scored WHERE Innings_No = 1

question: Calculate the run rate at the end of 17 overs of the match ID 335987 on 4/18/2008.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Toss_Name = 'bat' THEN T3.Runs_Scored ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Toss_Name = 'field' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Toss_Decision AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Toss_Id = T2.Toss_Decide INNER JOIN Batsman_Scored AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id WHERE T2.Match_Id = 335987 AND T2.Match_Date = '2008-04-18' GROUP BY T3.Over_Id HAVING COUNT(T1.Toss_Name = 'field') = 17

question: Among the players born in 1977, what is the percentage of the players with a role as a captain?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Role_Desc = 'Captain' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Role_Id) FROM Rolee AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T2.Role_Id = T1.Role_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id WHERE T3.DOB LIKE '1977%'

question: How many matches were played on May 2008?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Match_Date, 7, 1) = '5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` WHERE SUBSTR(Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2008'

question: Provide the players' names in both teams of the match that was held in June 2014.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id WHERE SUBSTR(T3.Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2014' AND SUBSTR(T3.Match_Date, 7, 1) = '6' LIMIT 2

question: From which country does the most umpires are from? How many of them are from the mentioned country?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country_Id, COUNT(T1.Umpire_Id) FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T2.Country_Id = T1.Umpire_Country GROUP BY T2.Country_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Umpire_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the ball IDs, scores, and innings numbers in the over ID 20 of match ID "335988".
original_query: SELECT Ball_Id, Runs_Scored, Innings_No FROM Batsman_Scored WHERE Match_Id = 335988 AND Over_Id = 20

question: Name the teams played in a match which resulted in a tie in 2015.
original_query: SELECT T1.Team_Name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_1 OR T1.Team_Id = T2.Team_2 INNER JOIN Win_By AS T3 ON T2.Win_Type = T3.Win_Id WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2015' AND T3.Win_Type = 'Tie' LIMIT 1

question: List down the ID of toss winners who decided to bat after winning the "toss of the coin".
original_query: SELECT Toss_Winner FROM Match WHERE Toss_Decide = 2

question: Where was the ID 336005 match held? Please give me the venue and the city.
original_query: SELECT T2.Venue_Name, T3.City_Name FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id INNER JOIN City AS T3 ON T2.City_Id = T3.City_Id WHERE T1.Match_Id = '336005'

question: Count the total venues located in Pune City.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Venue_Name) FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id WHERE T2.City_Name = 'Pune'

question: Who was the captain of the winning team in the match held on 1st June 2008?
original_query: SELECT T3.Player_Name FROM Player_Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T2.Match_Id = T1.Match_Id INNER JOIN Player AS T3 ON T3.Player_Id = T1.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T4 ON T4.Role_Id = T1.Role_Id WHERE T2.Match_Date = '2008-06-01' AND T4.Role_Desc = 'Captain' AND T2.Match_Winner = T1.Team_Id

question: Where did SB Joshi come from?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Country_Name = T2.Country_ID WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SB Joshi'

question: Tally the player IDs of "Man of the Series" awardees for the seasons from 2011 to 2015.
original_query: SELECT Man_of_the_Series FROM Season WHERE 2011 < Season_Year < 2015

question: How many matches did Rajasthan Royals play in Season 8?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Season_Id = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.Team_1 = T2.Team_Id OR T1.Team_2 = T2.Team_Id WHERE T2.Team_Name = 'Rajasthan Royals'

question: Count the matches with a total of two innings.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM Wicket_Taken WHERE innings_no = 2

question: What is the role of SC Ganguly in the match on 2008/4/18?
original_query: SELECT T2.Role_Id FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Rolee AS T3 ON T2.Role_Id = T3.Role_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T4 ON T2.Match_Id = T4.Match_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly' AND T4.Match_Date = '2008-04-18'

question: How many players have won at least 5 man of the match awards?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` GROUP BY Man_of_the_Match HAVING COUNT(Match_Id) >= 5

question: List the IDs and names of the umpires from New Zealand.
original_query: SELECT T1.Umpire_Id, T1.Umpire_Name FROM Umpire AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.Umpire_Country = T2.Country_Id WHERE T2.Country_Name = 'New Zealand'

question: Describe any five matches IDs that reached over ID 20.
original_query: SELECT Match_Id FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Over_Id = 20 GROUP BY Match_Id LIMIT 5

question: Among all the matches SC Ganguly has played in, what is the highest winning margin?
original_query: SELECT MAX(T3.Win_Margin) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T3 ON T2.Match_Id = T3.Match_Id WHERE T1.Player_Name = 'SC Ganguly'

question: Provide the complete name of the venue, city and country where the last match was held.
original_query: SELECT T1.Venue_Name, T2.City_Name, T3.Country_Name FROM Venue AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.City_Id = T2.City_Id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.Country_Id = T3.Country_Id INNER JOIN Match AS T4 ON T1.Venue_Id = T4.Venue_Id ORDER BY T4.Match_Date DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times has Sunrisers Hyderabad been the toss winner of a game?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Toss_Winner = ( SELECT Team_Id FROM Team WHERE Team_Name = 'Sunrisers Hyderabad' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match`

question: How many times did the matches were held in MA Chidambaram Stadium from 5/9/2009 to 8/8/2011?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Venue_Name = 'MA Chidambaram Stadium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE Match_Date BETWEEN '2009-05-09' AND '2011-08-08'

question: How many matches in 2009 had win margins of less than 10?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2009%' AND Win_Margin < 10

question: How many matches were held in 2011?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(Match_Id) FROM `Match` WHERE Match_Date LIKE '2011%'

question: What are the names of players that have run scored less than 3?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Player_Id INNER JOIN Batsman_Scored AS T3 ON T2.Match_ID = T3.Match_ID WHERE T3.Runs_Scored < 3 GROUP BY T1.Player_Name

question: List the names of players who play by the left hand.
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Batting_Style AS T2 ON T1.Batting_hand = T2.Batting_Id WHERE T2.Batting_hand = 'Left-hand bat'

question: What is the name of the player who won the "man of the match" award in the match on 2008/4/18?
original_query: SELECT T2.Player_Name FROM Match AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T2.Player_Id = T1.Man_of_the_Match WHERE T1.Match_Date = '2008-04-18'

question: How many players bowl in the legbreak style?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Bowling_Style AS T2 ON T1.Bowling_skill = T2.Bowling_Id WHERE T2.Bowling_skill = 'Legbreak'

question: How many matches did Team 10 play in 2012?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Team_1 = 10 OR Team_2 = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM `Match` WHERE SUBSTR(Match_Date, 1, 4) = '2012'

question: How many overs were there in each innings of match ID "336011"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Innings_No = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IN1 , SUM(CASE WHEN Innings_No = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IN2 FROM Ball_by_Ball WHERE Match_Id = 336011

question: What is the name of the player with the highest number of outstanding player awards in a particular match?
original_query: SELECT T1.Player_Name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Man_of_the_Match GROUP BY T2.Man_of_the_Match ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Man_of_the_Match) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the youngest player?
original_query: SELECT Player_Name FROM Player ORDER BY DOB DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which season played the highest number of matches at M Chinnaswamy Stadium?
original_query: SELECT T1.Season_Id FROM `Match` AS T1 INNER JOIN Venue AS T2 ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id WHERE T2.Venue_Name = 'M Chinnaswamy Stadium' GROUP BY T1.Season_Id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Season_Id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many Orange Cap awards were won by CH Gayle?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Player_Name = 'CH Gayle' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Season AS T2 ON T1.Player_Id = T2.Orange_Cap

question: List the over IDs, ball IDs, and innings numbers of the match ID "336004" while the batsman got the maximum scores.
original_query: SELECT Over_Id, Ball_Id, Innings_No FROM Batsman_Scored WHERE Match_Id = 336004 ORDER BY Runs_Scored DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many matches were played by the player with player ID 2?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Player_Match

question: What is the day of the week that tweet with ID tw-682712873332805633 was posted?
original_query: SELECT Weekday FROM twitter WHERE TweetID = 'tw-682712873332805633'

question: Please list the top 3 cities with the most number of tweets posted in Canada.
original_query: SELECT T.City FROM ( SELECT T2.City, COUNT(T1.TweetID) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Canada' GROUP BY T2.City ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many female Twitter users are there from Wisconsin?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Likes) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID INNER JOIN user AS T3 ON T3.UserID = T1.UserID WHERE T2.State = 'Wisconsin' AND T3.Gender = 'Female'

question: Give the gender of the user who made the highest klout tweet on Wednesdays.
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Weekday = 'Wednesday' ORDER BY T1.Klout DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of the tweets from California are positive?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Sentiment > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.TweetID) AS percentage FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE State = 'California'

question: For the tweet which got a reach number of 547851, which country did it come from?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.Reach = 547851

question: List down all the tweet text posted from Australia.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Australia'

question: What gender of users posted the most tweets in `en`?
original_query: SELECT T.Gender FROM ( SELECT T2.Gender, COUNT( text) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Lang = 'en' GROUP BY T2.Gender ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the number of tweets from Michigan on Thursdays.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.Weekday = 'Thursday' AND T2.State = 'Michigan'

question: Write down the tweet text posted from Rawang, Selangor, Malaysia.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.City = 'Rawang' AND T2.State = 'Selangor' AND T2.Country = 'Malaysia'

question: How many tweets are posted by male users in Argentina?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID INNER JOIN user AS T3 ON T1.UserID = T3.UserID WHERE T3.Gender = 'Male' AND T2.Country = 'Argentina'

question: How many tweets have a klout of over 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Klout > 50

question: Give the name of the city of the user who tweeted `One of our favorite stories is @FINRA_News's move to the cloud with AWS Enterprise Support! https://amp.twimg.com/v/991837f1-4815-4edc-a88f-e68ded09a02a`.
original_query: SELECT T2.City FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.text = 'One of our favorite stories is @FINRA_News''s move to the cloud with AWS Enterprise Support! https://amp.twimg.com/v/991837f1-4815-4edc-a88f-e68ded09a02a'

question: Give the location id of West Sussex State.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT LocationID FROM location WHERE State = 'West Sussex'

question: State the country where the most positive sentiment tweets were posted.
original_query: SELECT T.Country FROM ( SELECT T2.Country, SUM(T1.Sentiment) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T1.Sentiment > 0 GROUP BY T2.Country ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Tweets that were posted from Brazil are in what languague?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Lang FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.Country = 'Brazil'

question: For the tweet which got the most likes, state the gender of the user who tweeted it.
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID ORDER BY T1.Likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Tweet with ID tw-682723090279841798 was posted from which country?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-682723090279841798'

question: Which state was the tweet `tw-685681052912873473` from? Give the state code.
original_query: SELECT T2.StateCode FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-685681052912873473'

question: From which country is the tweet with the most likes posted?
original_query: SELECT T2.Country FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID ORDER BY T1.Likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: Tweets posted from which city has a higher number of average likes, Bangkok or Chiang Mai?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Bangkok' THEN Likes ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.City = 'Bangkok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bNum , SUM(CASE WHEN City = 'Chiang Mai' THEN Likes ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN City = 'Chiang Mai' THEN TweetID ELSE NULL END) AS cNum FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T2.City IN ('Bangkok', 'Chiang Mai')

question: How many reshared tweets have over 100 likes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE IsReshare = 'TRUE' AND Likes > 100

question: Among all the tweets that have a positive sentiment, how many of them are posted on Thursday?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) AS tweet_number FROM twitter WHERE Sentiment > 0 AND Weekday = 'Thursday'

question: What is the gender of the user who has posted the tweet that got the most likes?
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID ORDER BY T1.Likes DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the code of Gwynedd State?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT StateCode FROM location WHERE State = 'Gwynedd'

question: Please list the texts of the top 3 tweets with the most number of unique users seeing the tweet.
original_query: SELECT text FROM twitter ORDER BY Reach DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many tweets in French were posted from Australia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T1.Lang = 'fr' AND T2.Country = 'Australia'

question: Please list all the cities in Argentina.
original_query: SELECT City FROM location WHERE City IS NOT NULL AND Country = 'Argentina'

question: Please list the texts of all the tweets posted by male users from Buenos Aires.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T2.UserID = T1.UserID INNER JOIN user AS T3 ON T1.UserID = T3.UserID WHERE T2.City = 'Buenos Aires' AND T3.Gender = 'Male'

question: Calculate the average number of male users who posted tweets in a week.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TweetID) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.UserID) / 7 AS avg FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male' AND T1.Day BETWEEN 1 AND 31

question: How many tweets are seen by more than 1000 unique users?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) AS tweet_number FROM twitter WHERE Reach > 1000

question: Is 3751 the location ID for tweet with ID tw-682714048199311366?
original_query: SELECT LocationID FROM twitter WHERE TweetID = 'tw-682714048199311366'

question: Among all the tweets with a positive sentiment, what is the percentage of those posted by a male user?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Gender = 'Male' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.TweetID) AS per FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Sentiment > 0

question: Calculate the total likes collected by tweets in `ru` posted by male users.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Likes) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Lang = 'ru' AND T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: Which country's tweets collected the most likes?
original_query: SELECT T.Country FROM ( SELECT T2.Country, SUM(T1.Likes) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID GROUP BY T2.Country ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the texts of all the tweets posted from Buenos Aires with a positive sentiment.
original_query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID WHERE T1.Sentiment > 0 AND T2.City = 'Buenos Aires'

question: Among all the tweets with a positive sentiment, how many of them were posted by male users in Australia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN location AS T2 ON T2.LocationID = T1.LocationID INNER JOIN user AS T3 ON T3.UserID = T1.UserID WHERE T2.Country = 'Australia' AND T3.Gender = 'Male' AND T1.Sentiment > 0

question: How many more tweets with a positive sentiment than the tweets with a neutral sentiment were posted by male users?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Sentiment > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Sentiment = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS diff FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: What is the gender of the user whose tweet got 535 retweets?
original_query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.RetweetCount = 535

question: Of the first 60,000 customers who sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department, how many of them are divorced males?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Divorced' AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: In widowed male customers ages from 40 to 60, how many of them has an income ranges from 3000 and above?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.age >= 40 AND T1.age <= 60 AND T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Widowed' AND T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T2.INCOME_K >= 2000 AND T2.INCOME_K <= 3000

question: List down the geographic identifier with an number of inhabitants less than 30.
original_query: SELECT GEOID FROM Demog WHERE INHABITANTS_K < 30

question: Of the first 60,000 customers' responses to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department, how many of them are considered a true response?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(REFID) custmoer_number FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE RESPONSE = 'true'

question: How many teenagers are working as Machine-op-inspct?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) teenager_number FROM Customers WHERE OCCUPATION = 'Machine-op-inspct' AND age >= 13 AND age <= 19

question: What is the age of female customers within the number of inhabitants below 30?
original_query: SELECT age FROM Customers WHERE GEOID IN ( SELECT GEOID FROM Demog WHERE INHABITANTS_K < 30 ) AND SEX = 'Female'

question: Describe the average income per month and yearly income of the geographic ID in which customer of ID "209556" and "290135".
original_query: SELECT T2.INCOME_K, T2.INHABITANTS_K * T2.INCOME_K * 12 FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.ID = 209556 OR T1.ID = 290135

question: Find and list the id and geographic ID of the elderly customers with an education level below 3.
original_query: SELECT ID, GEOID FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM < 3 AND age > 65

question: Among the customers with a marital status of married-civ-spouse, list the number of inhabitants and age of those who are machine-op-inspct.
original_query: SELECT T2.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.OCCUPATION = 'Farming-fishing' AND T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T1.age >= 20 AND T1.age <= 30

question: What is the total number of customers with an age below 30?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE age < 30

question: In female customers ages from 50 to 60, how many of them has an number of inhabitants ranges from 19 to 24?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T1.age >= 50 AND T1.age <= 60 AND T2.INHABITANTS_K >= 19 AND T2.INHABITANTS_K <= 24

question: List the income and number of inhabitants of customers with a reference ID greater than the 50% of average of number of false response?
original_query: SELECT T2.INCOME_K, T2.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.REFID WHERE T3.REFID > ( SELECT 0.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN RESPONSE = 'false' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(RESPONSE) FROM Mailings1_2 )

question: Among the reference ID of under 10 who got response by marketing department, compare their education status.
original_query: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONNUM FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T2.REFID < 10 AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: What is the response and number of inhabitants of the oldest female customer?
original_query: SELECT T2.RESPONSE, T3.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' ORDER BY T1.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the income of female customers ages from 30 to 55 years old and has an occupation of machine-op-inspct?
original_query: SELECT T2.INCOME_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T1.age >= 30 AND T1.age <= 55 AND T1.OCCUPATION = 'Machine-op-inspct'

question: List down the customer's geographic identifier who are handlers or cleaners.
original_query: SELECT GEOID FROM Customers WHERE OCCUPATION = 'Handlers-cleaners'

question: In male customers with an occupation handlers or cleaners, what is the percentage of customers with a true response?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.RESPONSE = 'true' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.REFID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.OCCUPATION = 'Handlers-cleaners' AND T1.SEX = 'Male'

question: What is the occupation and response of female customers within the number of inhabitants range of 20 to 25?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.OCCUPATION, T2.RESPONSE FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T3.INHABITANTS_K >= 20 AND T3.INHABITANTS_K <= 25

question: In geographic identifier from 20 to 50, how many of them has a number of inhabitants below 20?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(GEOID) FROM Demog WHERE INHABITANTS_K < 20 AND GEOID >= 20 AND GEOID <= 50

question: Among the widowed female customers, give the income of those who has an level of education of 5 and below.
original_query: SELECT INCOME_K FROM Demog WHERE GEOID IN ( SELECT GEOID FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM < 5 AND SEX = 'Female' AND MARITAL_STATUS = 'Widowed' )

question: Give the level of education and occupation of customers ages from 20 to 35 with an income K of 2000 and below.
original_query: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONNUM, T1.OCCUPATION FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T2.INCOME_K < 2000 AND T1.age >= 20 AND T1.age <= 35

question: How many of the first 60,000 customers from the place with the highest average income per month have sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T2.RESPONSE = 'true' ORDER BY T3.INCOME_K DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the customers with an average income per inhabitant above 3000, what percentage are in their eighties?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.age BETWEEN 80 AND 89 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T2.INCOME_K > 3000

question: Please list the occupations of the customers with an education level of 11.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT OCCUPATION FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM = 11

question: List the geographic id of places where the income is above average.
original_query: SELECT AVG(INCOME_K) FROM Demog

question: Of the first 60,000 customers who sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department, how many of them are from a place with more than 30,000 inhabitants?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID INNER JOIN Demog AS T3 ON T1.GEOID = T3.GEOID WHERE T3.INHABITANTS_K > 30 AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: What is the number of inhabitants of the place the most customers are from?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.INHABITANTS_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID ORDER BY T2.INHABITANTS_K DESC

question: Among the male customer in their twenties, how many are from places where the average income is more than 3000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.GEOID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T2.INCOME_K > 3000 AND T1.age >= 20 AND T1.age <= 29

question: Among all the customers, how many of them are teenagers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Customers WHERE age >= 13 AND age <= 19

question: In geographic identifier from 10 to 30, how many of them has an income below 2000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(GEOID) FROM Demog WHERE INCOME_K < 2000 AND GEOID >= 10 AND GEOID <= 30

question: List down the number of inhabitants of customers with a divorced marital status and older than 50 years old.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Divorced' AND T1.age < 50

question: Among the geographic ID which has 33.658K of inhabitants, describe the education, occupation and age of female widow.
original_query: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONNUM, T1.OCCUPATION, T1.age FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T2.INHABITANTS_K = 33.658 AND T1.SEX = 'Female' AND T1.MARITAL_STATUS = 'Widowed'

question: What is the marital status of the customer ages 62 with an level of education of 7?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT MARITAL_STATUS FROM Customers WHERE EDUCATIONNUM = 7 AND age = 62

question: Of the first 60,000 customers who sent a true response to the incentive mailing sent by the marketing department, how many of them are teenagers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Mailings1_2 AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.REFID WHERE T1.age >= 13 AND T1.age <= 19 AND T2.RESPONSE = 'true'

question: Among the customers who come from the place with 25746 inhabitants, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T2.INHABITANTS_K = 25.746 AND T1.SEX = 'Male'

question: How many of the customer's reference ID that has a TRUE response?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(REFID) FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE RESPONSE = 'true'

question: What is the geographic identifier and income of the oldest customer?
original_query: SELECT T1.GEOID, T2.INCOME_K FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID ORDER BY T1.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the male customers, how many of them come from a place with over 30,000 inhabitants?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.GEOID) FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Demog AS T2 ON T1.GEOID = T2.GEOID WHERE T1.SEX = 'Male' AND T2.INHABITANTS_K > 30

question: What is the percentage of the cost for the meeting events?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.type = 'Meeting' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget

question: What is the total budgeted amount for all category in "October Speaker" event?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.amount) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Speaker'

question: Provide the total number of the budget amount for "September Speaker" event.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.amount) FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T2.event_name = 'September Speaker'

question: Find the name and date of events with expenses for pizza that were more than fifty dollars but less than a hundred dollars.
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name, T1.event_date FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T3.expense_description = 'Pizza' AND T3.cost > 50 AND T3.cost < 100

question: Give the location for "Spring Budget Review".
original_query: SELECT location FROM event WHERE event_name = 'Spring Budget Review'

question: Tell the hometown county for "Adela O'Gallagher".
original_query: SELECT T2.county FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Adela' AND T1.last_name = 'O''Gallagher'

question: How many members did attend the event 'Community Theater' in 2019?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.link_to_member) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'Community Theater' AND SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019'

question: Among the students majored in interior design, who have attended the Community Theater event?
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T2.member_id = T3.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.link_to_event = T4.event_id WHERE T4.event_name = 'Community Theater' AND T1.major_name = 'Interior Design'

question: How many events of the Student_Club did Sacha Harrison attend in 2019?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T3.first_name = 'Sacha' AND T3.last_name = 'Harrison' AND SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019'

question: What is the total cost of the pizzas for all the events?
original_query: SELECT SUM(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense_description = 'Pizza'

question: What is the most expensive item that was spent in support of club events?
original_query: SELECT expense_description FROM expense ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the city and state of members enrolled under electrical and computer engineering department.
