original_query: SELECT city, state FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major INNER JOIN zip_code AS T3 ON T3.zip_code = T1.zip WHERE department = 'Electrical and Computer Engineering Department' AND position = 'Member'

question: Find the full name of members whose t-shirt size is extra large.
original_query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM member WHERE t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'

question: How many members attended the "Women's Soccer" event?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.link_to_member) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'

question: What is the major of Garrett Gerke and which department does it belong to?
original_query: SELECT T2.major_name, T2.department FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.first_name = 'Garrett' AND T1.last_name = 'Gerke'

question: How many majors are there in "College of Humanities and Social Sciences"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(major_name) FROM major WHERE college = 'College of Humanities and Social Sciences'

question: List out the type of events which have remaining budget more than 30 USD.
original_query: SELECT T1.type FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T2.remaining > 30

question: List the full name of the top five members who spend the most money in the descending order of spending.
original_query: SELECT T3.first_name, T3.last_name FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T1.link_to_member = T3.member_id ORDER BY T2.spent DESC LIMIT 5

question: List emails of people who paid more than 20 dollars from 9/10/2019 to 11/19/2019.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.email FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE date(SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-09-10' AND '2019-11-19' AND T2.cost > 20

question: What is the ratio between students majored in finance and physics?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN major_name = 'Finance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN major_name = 'Physics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM major

question: Please list the event names of all the events attended by Maya Mclean.
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T3.first_name = 'Maya' AND T3.last_name = 'Mclean'

question: Indicate the top source of funds received in September 2019 based on their amount.
original_query: SELECT source FROM income WHERE date_received BETWEEN '2019-09-01' and '2019-09-30' ORDER BY source DESC LIMIT 1

question: Indicate the name of the closed event whose cost has exceeded the budget the most.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T2.event_id = T1.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_status = 'Closed' AND T1.remaining < 0 ORDER BY T1.remaining LIMIT 1

question: How much did the Student_Club members spend on food in September Meeting?
original_query: SELECT T2.spent FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'September Meeting' AND T2.category = 'Food' AND SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 6, 2) = '09'

question: Among the budgets for Food, which one has the highest budgeted amount?
original_query: SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food' AND amount = ( SELECT MAX(amount) FROM budget )

question: Write the full name of the member who spent money for water, veggie tray and supplies and include the cost of it.
original_query: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T1.cost FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'

question: List the event names which were budgeted for the food.
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T2.category = 'Food'

question: How many income are received with an amount of 50?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(income_id) FROM income WHERE amount = 50

question: What is the highest amount of budget spend for an event?
original_query: SELECT MAX(spent) FROM budget

question: List the name and location of events that underspend its budget.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.event_name, T1.location FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T2.remaining > 0

question: Calculate the difference of the total amount spent in all events by the Student_Club in year 2019 and 2020.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN T2.spent ELSE 0 END) AS num FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event

question: List all the members who attended the event "October Meeting".
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.member_id FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'

question: Among the events attended by more than 10 members of the Student_Club, how many of them are meetings?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1  INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_id  HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 10 EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_name  FROM event AS T1  WHERE T1.type = 'Meeting'

question: What is the total expense for the Yearly Kickoff?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'

question: List out the position of members who joined major of Business.
original_query: SELECT T2.position FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T1.major_name = 'Business'

question: List all of the College of Humanities and Social Sciences' departments.
original_query: SELECT department FROM major WHERE college = 'College of Humanities and Social Sciences'

question: What's Christof Nielson's zip code type?
original_query: SELECT T2.type FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Christof' AND T1.last_name = 'Nielson'

question: List the last name of all the students who majored Law and Constitutional Studies.
original_query: SELECT T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.major_name = 'Law and Constitutional Studies'

question: What city and state did the President of the Student_Club grow up?
original_query: SELECT T2.city, T2.state FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.position = 'President'

question: Calculate the total average cost that Elijah Allen spent in the events on September and October.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.cost) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.last_name = 'Allen' AND T1.first_name = 'Elijah' AND (SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 6, 2) = '09' OR SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 6, 2) = '10')

question: Name the event with the highest amount spent on advertisement.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_name FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T1.category = 'Advertisement' ORDER BY T1.spent DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which student has the hometown of Lincolnton, North Carolina with the zip code of 28092? List their full name and position.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.position FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip WHERE T2.city = 'Lincolnton' AND T2.state = 'North Carolina' AND T2.zip_code = 28092

question: Calculate the total cost spent for Parking in the list.
original_query: SELECT SUM(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense_description = 'Parking'

question: List the last name of members with a major in environmental engineering and include its department and college name.
original_query: SELECT T2.last_name, T1.department, T1.college FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T2.position = 'Member' AND T1.major_name = 'Environmental Engineering'

question: Among all events hold by the Student_Club in 2019, find the percentage share of events related to 'Community Service'
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'Community Service' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(type) FROM event WHERE SUBSTR(event_date, 1, 4) = '2019'

question: Mention the category of events which were held at MU 215.
original_query: SELECT T2.category FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.location = 'MU 215'

question: Among the members, how many of them have an extra large t-shirt size?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(member_id) FROM member WHERE position = 'Member' AND t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'

question: Which student was able to generate income more than $40?
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T2.amount > 40

question: What's Angela Sanders's major?
original_query: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Angela' AND T1.last_name = 'Sanders'

question: Tell the phone number of "Carlo Jacobs".
original_query: SELECT phone FROM member WHERE first_name = 'Carlo' AND last_name = 'Jacobs'

question: Calculate the percentage of members who are major Business in the list?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.position = 'Member'

question: For all the budgets for "November Meeting", how many of them had exceeded the budget?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.event_id) FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T2.event_name = 'November Meeting' AND T1.remaining < 0

question: Give the full name and contact number of members who had to spend more than average on each expense.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.first_name, T3.last_name, T3.phone FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T1.link_to_member WHERE T1.cost > ( SELECT AVG(T1.cost) FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T1.link_to_member )

question: What is the amount of the funds that the Vice President received?
original_query: SELECT T2.amount FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President'

question: List the expenses that spend more than fifty dollars on average.
original_query: SELECT expense_description FROM expense GROUP BY expense_description HAVING AVG(cost) > 50

question: On average, how much did the Student_Club spend on food for the typical event in the past?
original_query: SELECT SUM(spent) / COUNT(spent) FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food' AND event_status = 'Closed'

question: Among the members who incurred expenses in more than one event, who paid the most amount?
original_query: SELECT T2.member_id FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN budget AS T3 ON T1.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.link_to_event = T4.event_id GROUP BY T2.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T4.event_id) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(T1.cost) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the event ID, location, and status of events conducted from November 2019 to March 2020.
original_query: SELECT event_id, location, status FROM event WHERE date(SUBSTR(event_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-11-01' AND '2020-03-31'

question: Mention the zip code of member who incurred less than 50USD.
original_query: SELECT T1.zip FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T2.cost < 50

question: List the full name of the Student_Club members that grew up in Illinois state.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.state = 'Illinois'

question: How many members of Business have the Medium size of tee shirt?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.member_id) FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T1.major_name = 'Business' AND T2.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

question: Please provide links to events for members who have paid more than 50 dollar.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.link_to_event FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T2.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T1.cost > 50

question: Write the full name of the club member with the position of 'Secretary' and list which college the club member belongs to.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.position = 'Secretary'

question: List all the names of events that had an attendance of over 20 students but were not fundraisers.
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_id HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 20 EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1  WHERE T1.type = 'Fundraiser'

question: Which countries have zip codes with post office boxes?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT county FROM zip_code WHERE type = 'PO Box' AND county IS NOT NULL

question: Did Maya Mclean attend the 'Women's Soccer' event?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' THEN 'YES' END AS result FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean'

question: What was Brent Thomason's major?
original_query: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Brent' AND T1.last_name = 'Thomason'

question: What is the most popular size of t-shirt ordered by the club members?
original_query: SELECT t_shirt_size FROM member GROUP BY t_shirt_size ORDER BY COUNT(t_shirt_size) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many cities are there in Orange County, Virginia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(city) FROM zip_code WHERE county = 'Orange County' AND state = 'Virginia'

question: Provide the number of events attended by Luisa Guidi. What is her major?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.link_to_event), T1.major_name FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T2.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T2.first_name = 'Luisa' AND T2.last_name = 'Guidi'

question: What are the budget category of the events located at MU 215 and a guest speaker type with a 0 budget spent?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.category, T1.type FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.location = 'MU 215' AND T2.spent = 0 AND T1.type = 'Guest Speaker'

question: Where is the hometown state for "Sacha Harrison"?
original_query: SELECT T2.state FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Sacha' AND T1.last_name = 'Harrison'

question: Which event has the lowest cost?
original_query: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget ORDER BY T3.cost LIMIT 1

question: What is the category of event which was taken place in 2020-03-24T12:00:00?
original_query: SELECT T2.category FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_date = '2020-03-24T12:00:00'

question: Which college is the vice president of the Student_Club from?
original_query: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.position LIKE 'vice president'

question: What percentage was the budget for Parking to the total budget for the "November Speaker"?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.category = 'Parking' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.amount) FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T2.event_name = 'November Speaker'

question: How many members have education major in the College of Education & Human Services?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.position = 'Member' AND T2.major_name LIKE '%Education%' AND T2.college = 'College of Education & Human Services'

question: Based on the total cost for all event, what is the percentage of cost for Yearly Kickoff event?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget

question: Which students manage to generate the highest income. State his/her full name along with the income source.
original_query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.source FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member GROUP BY T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.source ORDER BY SUM(T2.amount) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the percentage of male students in the navy department?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.name) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.name) FROM enlist AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T1.organ = 'navy'

question: List out the number of students who have the longest duration of absense from school and enlisted in the peace corps.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.NAME) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.organ = 'peace_corps' ORDER BY T1.month DESC LIMIT 1

question: State name of students who have the longest duration of absense from school and do not have payment due.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.bool = 'neg' ORDER BY T1.month DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the name of disabled male students that are unemployed.
original_query: SELECT T2.NAME FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name INNER JOIN disabled AS T3 ON T3.name = T2.name

question: Calculate the number of students who are not disabled.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE  WHEN T2.name IS NULL THEN T1.name END) AS "number" FROM person AS T1 LEFT JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name

question: Calculate the average enlisted students per organization.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(NAME) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT organ) FROM enlist

question: List out students that enrolled in occ school and enlisted in a fire department.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN enrolled AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T2.school = 'occ' AND T1.organ = 'fire_department'

question: State the unemployed students who enlisted in marines.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.organ = 'marines'

question: List the names of the disabled students who were absent from school for more than 5 months.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.month > 5

question: List at least 5 students who has the longest absense from schoool?
original_query: SELECT name FROM longest_absense_from_school ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many disabled students have zero absences?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.month = 0

question: Among the students who have been absent for four months, provide any five students' names and enlisted organizations.
original_query: SELECT T2.name, T2.organ FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.month = 4 LIMIT 5

question: Please provide a gender breakdown for each organization.
original_query: SELECT IIF(T2.name IS NULL, 'female', 'male') AS gender FROM enlist AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name GROUP BY T1.organ

question: Among the students that filed for bankruptcy, how many of them have been enrolled in OCC?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM filed_for_bankrupcy AS T1 INNER JOIN enrolled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.school = 'occ'

question: How many students are enlisted in the army?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'army'

question: Mention the name of students who filed for bankruptcy and have never been absent from school.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.month = 0

question: Calculate the ratio of disabled students who have never been absent from school.
original_query: SELECT 100 * SUM(IIF(T2.month = 0, 1, 0)) AS num FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: Which school has the highest number of disabled students?
original_query: SELECT T.school FROM ( SELECT T2.school, COUNT(T2.name) AS num FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN enrolled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name GROUP BY T2.school ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the employment and payment status of student110?
original_query: SELECT T1.bool FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.name = 'student110'

question: Among the unemployed students, how many of them have no payment due?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.bool = 'neg'

question: Calculate the average duration of absense of disabled male students.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.month) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name INNER JOIN male AS T3 ON T3.name = T2.name

question: How many male students have no due payments?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.bool = 'neg'

question: Which school have the highest student enrollment? How many of those students are filed for bankruptcy?
original_query: SELECT T.school, num FROM ( SELECT T1.school, COUNT(T2.name) AS num FROM enrolled AS T1 LEFT JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name GROUP BY T1.school ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the students' names and schools who enrolled for 15 months.
original_query: SELECT name, school FROM enrolled WHERE month = 15

question: What is the school and gender of student34?
original_query: SELECT T1.school , IIF(T3.name IS NULL, 'female', 'male') AS gender FROM enrolled AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name LEFT JOIN male AS T3 ON T2.name = T3.name WHERE T2.name = 'student34'

question: List down the enrolled schools and duration of student214.
original_query: SELECT school, month FROM enrolled WHERE name = 'student214'

question: How many students have never been absent in school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month = 0

question: Calculate the percentage of female students.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NULL, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.name) FROM person AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name

question: Calculate the ratio between unemployed students and disabled students.
original_query: SELECT CAST(( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM unemployed ) AS REAL ) / ( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM disabled )

question: How many of the unemployed students are disabled?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: What is the school and organization enrolled by student211?
original_query: SELECT T2.school, T1.organ FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN enrolled AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.name = 'student211'

question: Among the students that have been absent from school for more than 5 months, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T1.`month` >= 5

question: How many unemployed students still have payment due?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T2.bool = 'pos'

question: State the number of disabled students who have payment due.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.bool = 'neg'

question: How many female students joined a marines and air force organization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ IN ('marines', 'air_force') AND name NOT IN ( SELECT name FROM male )

question: Calculate the average duration of absense of female students.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.month) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name LEFT JOIN male AS T3 ON T1.name = T3.name WHERE T3.name IS NULL

question: State name of students who have been absent for 5 months from school and do not have payment due.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN no_payment_due AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.month = 5 AND T2.bool = 'neg'

question: How many students have absent from school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month > 1

question: How many male students filed for bankruptcy as compare to female students?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.name) - SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NULL, 1, 0)) AS num FROM filed_for_bankrupcy AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name

question: State the number of male students who do not have payment due.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN male AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.bool = 'pos'

question: How many students have been absent less than 4 months?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month < 4

question: How many disabled students have never been absent from school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T1.`month` = 0

question: Mention the status of payment of student 299.
original_query: SELECT bool FROM no_payment_due WHERE name = 'student299'

question: What is the average time for a disabled student to be absent from school?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.month) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name`

question: How many students are enlisted to the air force?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'air_force'

question: How many students have been absent above 2 months?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month > 2

question: What is the ratio of students who have payment due and those who do not have payment due?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(`bool` = 'pos', 1, 0)) AS REAL) / SUM(IIF(`bool` = 'neg', 1, 0)) FROM no_payment_due

question: What is the average absence period of a disabled student?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.month) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: How many female students are enlisted in the Navy organization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'navy' AND name NOT IN ( SELECT name FROM male )

question: Calculate the average number of disabled female students enrolled in UCI.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.school = 'uci' AND T4.name IS NULL, 1, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.name) FROM enrolled AS T1 INNER JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name INNER JOIN person AS T3 ON T1.name = T3.name LEFT JOIN male AS T4 ON T3.name = T4.name

question: List all students that have been absent for 6 months.
original_query: SELECT name FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE `month` = 6

question: How many students are enlisted in the Navy organization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'navy'

question: List out all bankrupt students that are able to make payment before due?

question: Which organization has the highest number of male students? Calculate for the percentage of the male students in the said organization.
original_query: SELECT T.organ, T.per FROM ( SELECT T1.organ, CAST(COUNT(T3.name) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.name) AS per , COUNT(T3.name) AS num FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name LEFT JOIN male AS T3 ON T2.name = T3.name GROUP BY T1.organ ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many students are enlisted in the Army organization?

question: What percentage of students who enlisted in the navy make up the number of students enrolled in OCC?

question: State name of disabled students who have the longest duration of absense from school.

question: How many students are enlisted in the Peace Corps organization are enrolled in UCSD school?

question: State name of students who filed for bankruptcy and have the longest duration of absense from school.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name ORDER BY T1.month DESC LIMIT 1

original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM no_payment_due WHERE bool = 'neg'

question: How many students has the longest absense from school for 5 months?

original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.name) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.name) FROM enlist AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.organ = 'fire_department'

question: How many students are enrolled in UCLA school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enrolled WHERE school = 'ucla'

question: List any ten male students who enlisted for foreign legion.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN male AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.organ = 'foreign_legion' LIMIT 10

original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.bool = 'neg' AND T2.organ = 'fire_department' LIMIT 10

original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month = 0

question: Which students have absents the most?
original_query: SELECT name FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month = ( SELECT MAX(month) FROM longest_absense_from_school )

question: Among the students with disabilities, list any five students' names who are unemployed.
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name LIMIT 5

question: Among students who have been absent for nine months, how many of them are disabled?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM disabled AS T1 LEFT JOIN longest_absense_from_school AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T2.month = 9

question: What is the number of unemployed and bankrupt students?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM unemployed AS T1 INNER JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: How many female students have enlisted for the Army?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T3.name IS NULL, 1, 0)) AS "result" FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN person AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name LEFT JOIN male AS T3 ON T2.name = T3.name WHERE T1.organ = 'army'

question: List all students in the air force and which school they were enrolled at.
original_query: SELECT T1.name, T1.school FROM enrolled AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T1.`name` = T2.`name` WHERE T2.organ = 'air_force'

question: What is the percentage difference between month 0 absence and month 9 absence?
original_query: SELECT CAST(((SUM(IIF(month = 0, 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(month = 9, 1, 0)))) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(IIF(month = 0, 1, 0)) FROM longest_absense_from_school

question: How many unemployed students are enlisted in the Army organization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM enlist AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.organ = 'army'

question: How many students is disabled and unemployed at the same time?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM disabled AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name

question: Which organization did student285 enlist?
original_query: SELECT organ FROM enlist WHERE name = 'student285'

question: How many students enlisted in the Navy?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'navy'

question: What is the employment, disability, gender and school debt status for student180 and student117?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM disabled WHERE name IN ('student180', 'student117') ), ( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM unemployed WHERE name IN ('student180', 'student117') ), ( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM male WHERE name IN ('student180', 'student117') ), ( SELECT COUNT(name) FROM no_payment_due WHERE name IN ('student180', 'student117'))

question: Among the students who filed for bankruptcy with an absence in school of no more than 6 months, how many students enlisted for the fire department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 INNER JOIN filed_for_bankrupcy AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name INNER JOIN enlist AS T3 ON T3.name = T2.name WHERE T3.organ = 'fire_department'

question: Among all students, calculate the percentage of male students.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.name) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.name) FROM person AS T1 LEFT JOIN male AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name

question: How many students belong to the navy department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM enlist WHERE organ = 'navy'

question: Please check if student 124 is disabled male.
original_query: SELECT IIF(T2.name IS NULL, 'female', 'male') FROM male AS T1 LEFT JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T1.name = T2.name WHERE T1.name = 'student124'

question: List at least 5 students who have payment due and are enlisted in Peace Corps organization?
original_query: SELECT T1.name FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN enlist AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T2.organ = 'peace_corps' AND T1.bool = 'pos' LIMIT 5

question: How many unemployed students have payment due?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.name) FROM no_payment_due AS T1 INNER JOIN unemployed AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name WHERE T1.bool = 'pos'

question: Does student348 have a due payment?
original_query: SELECT bool FROM no_payment_due WHERE name = 'student348'

question: What is the percentage difference between the attendence of disabled and non-disable students? Do the disable students show better attendance than non-disable students?
original_query: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NOT NULL AND T1.month = 0, 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NULL AND T1.month = 0, 1, 0))) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.name), IIF(SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NOT NULL AND T1.month = 0, 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.name IS NULL AND T1.month = 0, 1, 0)) > 0, 'YES', 'NO') AS isHigh FROM longest_absense_from_school AS T1 LEFT JOIN disabled AS T2 ON T2.name = T1.name

question: How many students have never been absent from school?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(name) FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE `month` = 0

question: What is the name of the student with the longest duration of absence?
original_query: SELECT name FROM longest_absense_from_school WHERE month = ( SELECT MAX(month) FROM longest_absense_from_school )

question: Provide the eye colours of the heroes whose skin colours are gold.
original_query: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T3.colour = 'Gold'

question: Calculate the average attribute value of all neutral superheroes.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute AS T1 INNER JOIN superhero AS T2 ON T1.hero_id = T2.id INNER JOIN alignment AS T3 ON T2.alignment_id = T3.id WHERE T3.alignment = 'Neutral'

question: How many superheroes did DC Comics publish?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'

question: Count the good female superheroes.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Good' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: Identify the race of the superhero who weighed 169 kg.
original_query: SELECT T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.weight_kg = 169

question: Calculate the difference between Emil Blonsky's weight and Charles Chandler's weight.
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT weight_kg FROM superhero WHERE full_name LIKE 'Emil Blonsky' ) - ( SELECT weight_kg FROM superhero WHERE full_name LIKE 'Charles Chandler' ) AS CALCULATE

question: What is the percentage of superheroes who act in their own self-interest or make decisions based on their own moral code? Indicate how many of the said superheroes were published by Marvel Comics.
original_query: SELECT (CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero)), CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN alignment AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.alignment_id WHERE T3.alignment = 'Bad'

question: What is the power ID of cryokinesis?
original_query: SELECT id FROM superpower WHERE power_name = 'Cryokinesis'

question: What are the superpowers of heroes with ID 1?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id WHERE T1.hero_id = 1

question: Find the average weight of the heroes who are aliens.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.weight_kg) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Alien'

question: Calculate the percentage of superheroes with blue eyes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id

question: What is the publisher name of the superhero ID 38?
original_query: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.id = 38

question: Provide the names of superheroes with attribute value between 75 to 80.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id WHERE T2.attribute_value BETWEEN 75 AND 80

question: Give the publisher ID of Star Trek.
original_query: SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Star Trek'

question: Among the superheroes with the race of god/eternal, how many of them are male
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T1.race_id = 21 AND T1.gender_id = 1

question: Provide the name of superhero with superhero ID 294.
original_query: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero WHERE id = 294

question: Identify the weakest attribute of the Black Panther.
original_query: SELECT T3.attribute_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Black Panther' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which power do superheroes have the most of?
original_query: SELECT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.power_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.hero_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Describe the names of neutral alignment superheroes.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Neutral'

question: What is the eye colour of superhero with superhero ID 75?
original_query: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.id = 75

question: List down at least five superpowers of male superheroes.
original_query: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN gender AS T4 ON T4.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T4.gender = 'Male' LIMIT 5

question: Provide the hair colour of the human superhero who is 185 cm tall.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T1.height_cm = 185 AND T2.race = 'Human'

question: How many female superheroes have a strength value of 100?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id INNER JOIN gender AS T4 ON T1.gender_id = T4.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Strength' AND T2.attribute_value = 100 AND T4.gender = 'Female'

question: In superheroes with height between 150 to 180, what is the percentage of heroes published by Marvel Comics?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.height_cm BETWEEN 150 AND 180

question: Indicate the attribute value of superhero Abomination.
original_query: SELECT T2.attribute_value FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Abomination'

question: List down at least five full name of Demi-God superheroes.
original_query: SELECT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Demi-God'

question: Identify superheroes who can control wind and list their names in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Wind Control' ORDER BY T1.superhero_name

question: How many female superheroes are in Marvel Comics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: How strong is the Hulk?
original_query: SELECT T2.attribute_value FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Hulk' AND T3.attribute_name = 'Strength'

question: What is the average height of a non-human superhero in Dark Horse Comics?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN race AS T3 ON T1.race_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics' AND T3.race != 'Human'

question: Provide superheroes' names who have the adaptation power.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Adaptation'

question: How many superheroes didn't have any publisher?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.id = 1

question: List down at least five full names of superheroes with blue eyes.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' LIMIT 5

question: Find the race of the superhero who weighs 108kg and is 188cm tall.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.weight_kg = 108 AND T1.height_cm = 188

question: Please list the full names of all the superheroes with over 15 super powers.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id GROUP BY T1.full_name HAVING COUNT(T2.power_id) > 15

question: What is Abomination's superpower?
original_query: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Abomination'

question: How many superheroes are published by Marvel Comics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: What is the superpowers of the superhero has Helen Parr as their full name?
original_query: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Helen Parr'

question: What is the eye clolour of the heaviest superhero?
original_query: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id ORDER BY T1.weight_kg DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down Ajax's superpowers.
original_query: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Ajax'

question: What is the total number of superheroes without full name?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM superhero WHERE full_name IS NULL

question: Among all superheroes created by George Lucas, identify the percentage of female superheroes.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'George Lucas'

question: List the attribute value of the superhero named Aquababy.
original_query: SELECT T2.attribute_value FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Aquababy'

question: Name the tallest superhero.
original_query: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero ORDER BY height_cm DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the full name of the superhero named Alien.
original_query: SELECT full_name FROM superhero WHERE superhero_name = 'Alien'

question: How many bad superheroes are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Bad'

question: Which publisher created more superheroes: DC or Marvel Comics? Find the difference in the number of superheroes.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id

question: Which superhero has the same eyes, hair and skin colour? Indicate the publisher of the superhero.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name, T2.publisher_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.eye_colour_id = T1.hair_colour_id AND T1.eye_colour_id = T1.skin_colour_id

question: What is the gender of Agent 13 hero?
original_query: SELECT T2.gender FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Agent 13'

question: How many superheroes have the super power of "Super Strength"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.hero_id) FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id WHERE T2.power_name = 'Super Strength'

question: Which group does superhero A-Bomb belong to?
original_query: SELECT T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'A-Bomb'

question: Calculate the average height of all neutral superheroes.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Neutral'

question: Who is the dumbest superhero?
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Intelligence' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value LIMIT 1

question: Rank heroes published by Marvel Comics by their height in descending order.
original_query: SELECT superhero_name, height_cm, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY height_cm DESC) AS HeightRank FROM superhero INNER JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id WHERE publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: How many gold-eyed superheroes did Marvel Comics publish?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T3.colour = 'Gold'

question: Identify the heaviest superhero in DC Comics.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' ORDER BY T1.weight_kg DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total number of superheroes that have John as their first name?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM superhero WHERE full_name LIKE 'John%'

question: How many superheroes have blue eyes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue'

question: Among the male superheroes, list the super hero names of superheroes with weight greater than the 79% average weight of all superheroes.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T2.gender = 'Male' AND T1.weight_kg * 100 > ( SELECT AVG(weight_kg) FROM superhero ) * 79

question: What is the name of the superhero that has the most powers?
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id GROUP BY T1.superhero_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.hero_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the superhero, otherwise known as Charles Chandler.
original_query: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero WHERE full_name = 'Charles Chandler'

question: List the name of superheroes with flight power.
original_query: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Flight'

question: Who is the tallest superhero?
original_query: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero ORDER BY height_cm DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the weight and race of the superhero with superhero ID 40.
original_query: SELECT T1.weight_kg, T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.id = 40

question: Among the superheroes with blue eyes, how many of them have the super power of "Agility"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id INNER JOIN colour AS T4 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T4.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Agility' AND T4.colour = 'Blue'

question: What was the quantity of Xerox 1952 ordered by Aimee Bixby on 2014/9/10?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Quantity) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' AND T3.`Product Name` = 'Xerox 1952' AND T2.`Order Date` = '2014-09-10'

question: Who order from the west region on August 12, 2013, and received a discount of 0.2?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Customer Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Order Date` = '2013-08-12' AND T1.Discount = 0.2 AND T1.Region = 'West'

question: For how many times has Aimee Bixby ordered the product Xerox 1952?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.`Order ID`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' AND T3.`Product Name` = 'Xerox 1952'

question: List 5 customers in the West region who had their item shipped 'Second Class.'
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Customer Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.Region = 'West' AND T1.`Ship Mode` = 'Second Class' LIMIT 5

question: In which segment does the customer who purchased the product from the east superstore with the highest original price belong?
original_query: SELECT T2.Segment FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T1.Region = 'East' ORDER BY (T1.Sales / (1 - T1.Discount)) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the sales, profit, and subcategories of the product ordered in the order ID US-2011-126571 in the East region.
original_query: SELECT T1.Sales, T1.Profit, T2.`Sub-Category` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Order ID` = 'US-2011-126571' AND T2.Region = 'East'

question: Calculate the difference between the total sales in the East superstore and the total sales in the West superstore.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Sales) - SUM(T2.Sales) AS difference FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN west_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID`

question: How many orders with a quantity greater than 5 have been shipped by the fastest delivery method?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT `Order ID`) FROM central_superstore WHERE Quantity > 5 AND `Ship Mode` = 'First Class'

question: What is the product's name in the highest quantity in a single purchase?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Region = 'East' ORDER BY T1.Quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many orders were made by Maxwell Schwartz in 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`Order ID`) FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Maxwell Schwartz' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`Order Date`) = '2015'

question: What are the names of the products that were ordered by Alejandro Grove?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.`Product Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Alejandro Grove'

question: Among the orders with sales value of no less than 5,000 in west superstore, how many were bought by the customers in California?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`Order ID`) FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` INNER JOIN people AS T3 ON T3.`Customer ID` = T1.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.Sales > 5000 AND T3.State = 'California' AND T2.Region = 'West'

question: Among the orders made by Aimee Bixby, how many of them included at least one kind of product under the category "Furniture"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.`Order ID`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T3.Category = 'Furniture' AND T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby'

question: How many orders purchased by Aaron Bergman have been delivered with the slowest shipping speed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aaron Bergman' AND T2.`Ship Mode` = 'Standard Class'

question: Among the customers from Chicago, Illinois, what is the highest quantity of products bought in a single order?
original_query: SELECT T1.Quantity FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN east_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T3 ON T3.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN south_superstore AS T4 ON T4.`Customer ID` = T3.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN people AS T5 ON T5.`Customer ID` = T4.`Customer ID` WHERE T5.City = 'Chicago' AND T5.State = 'Illinois' ORDER BY T1.Quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who ordered the Bush Mission Pointe Library in the Central Region?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Customer Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T3.`Product Name` = 'Bush Mission Pointe Library' AND T3.Region = 'Central'

question: What is the product name of order CA-2011-115791 in the East superstore?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Product Name` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Order ID` = 'CA-2011-141817'

question: How many quantities of Advantus plastic paper clips were ordered overall?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Quantity) FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Product Name` = 'Advantus Plastic Paper Clips'

question: What is the highest profit order in the East superstore of customers from Houston, Texas?
original_query: SELECT T1.`Order ID` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T2.City = 'Houston' AND T2.State = 'Texas' ORDER BY T1.Profit DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many orders were made by Corey Roper in 2015?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.`Customer ID`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Corey Roper' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Ship Date`) = '2015'

question: Among the products under the office supplies category, what is the product that made the highest sales in the Central region?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Category = 'Office Supplies' AND T2.Region = 'Central' ORDER BY T1.Sales DESC LIMIT 1

question: What product was ordered in the Central region on April 26, 2018, and shipped by April 27, 2018?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Order Date` = '2018-04-26' AND T1.`Ship Date` = '2018-04-27' AND T2.Region = 'Central'

question: What is the profit from selling the "O'Sullivan Living Dimensions 2-Shelf Bookcases"?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Profit FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Product Name` = 'O''Sullivan Living Dimensions 2-Shelf Bookcases'

question: What are the names of the ordered products that have profit deficiency in central superstore?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Product Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Region = 'Central' AND T1.Profit < 0

question: How many art products were ordered in 2013 in the east superstore?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`Product ID`) FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Sub-Category` = 'Art' AND T1.Region = 'East' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`Order Date`) = '2013'

question: List the name of all products that Cindy Stewart ordered in the east superstore.
original_query: SELECT T3.`Product Name` FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Cindy Stewart'

question: What category does the item ordered by Katherine Murray on 11/4/2018 in the South region belong to?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Category FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Katherine Murray' AND T1.`Order Date` = '2018-11-04' AND T2.Region = 'South'

question: Calculate the percentage of ordered office supplies products in the central and the south superstore.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T3.Category = 'Office Supplies' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.Category) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID`

question: What is the percentage of furniture orders that were shipped through first class in 2013 at the Central superstore?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T1.`Ship Mode` = 'First Class' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Category = 'Furniture' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`Ship Date`) = '2013'

question: Which item was shipped on 3/4/2013 and scheduled for same day delivery in the South region?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Ship Date` = '2013-03-04' AND T2.Region = 'South' AND T1.`Order Date` = '2013-03-04'

question: List the products that were ordered by Anne McFarland from the Western store.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.`Product Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Anne McFarland'

question: Give the customer segment from the West region that orders the order ID CA-2011-108189.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Segment FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.Region = 'West' AND T1.`Order ID` = 'CA-2011-108189'

question: How many orders of O'Sullivan Plantations 2-Door Library in Landvery Oak in central superstore were shipped through the shipping mode with the fastest delivery speed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`Order ID`) FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Product Name` = 'O''Sullivan Plantations 2-Door Library in Landvery Oak' AND T2.Region = 'Central' AND T1.`Ship Mode` = 'First Class'

question: How many orders in the south superstore with the fastest delivery are items of furniture?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.`Order ID`) FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Ship Mode` = 'First Class' AND T2.Category = 'Furniture'

question: List the products ordered by customers in Coachella.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.`Product Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.City = 'Coachella'

question: List the name of all the products with order quantities greater than or equal to 10 in the central superstore that has been shipped by the slowest delivery method.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Product Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Ship Mode` = 'Standard Class' AND T1.Quantity >= 10

question: What was the original price of Xerox 1952 ordered by Aimee Bixby on 2014/9/10?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Sales / (1 - T2.Discount) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' AND T3.`Product Name` = 'Xerox 1952' AND T2.`Order Date` = '2014-09-10'

question: Please list the names of all the products ordered by Aimee Bixby in 2016.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.`Product Name` FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Ship Date`) = '2016'

question: What product category got the least sales in the west superstore?
original_query: SELECT T2.Category FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` ORDER BY T1.Sales LIMIT 1

question: What is the total profit of "Memorex Froggy Flash Drive 8 GB in south superstore?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Profit) FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` GROUP BY T2.`Product Name` = 'Memorix Froggy Flash Drive 8 GB'

question: Among the orders from 2016 in the Central region, what is the product with the lowest profit?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Region = 'Central' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`Order Date`) = '2016' ORDER BY T1.Profit ASC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage do items under the category of 'Furniture' make up the total number of items ordered that are shipped as standard in the West region?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T2.Category = 'Furniture' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T1.Quantity) FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.Region = 'West' AND T1.`Ship Mode` = 'Standard Class'

question: Among the customers who have ordered the product "Telescoping Adjustable Floor Lamp", how many of them are consumers?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.`Customer Name`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T3.`Product Name` = 'Telescoping Adjustable Floor Lamp' AND T1.Segment = 'Consumer'

question: What is the name of the product that Aimee Bixby bought?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.`Product Name` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby'

question: Calculate the total profit by Cisco SPA301 for all regions.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Profit) + SUM(T2.Profit) + SUM(T3.Profit) + SUM(T4.Profit) AS totalProfit FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN east_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T3 ON T3.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN south_superstore AS T4 ON T4.`Customer ID` = T3.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T5 ON T5.`Product ID` = T4.`Product ID` WHERE T5.`Product Name` = 'Cisco SPA301'

question: What is the percentage of orders with 0.2 discount in the Central superstore were purchased by customers who live in Texas?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T2.Discount = 0.2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.State = 'Texas'

question: What was the total cost of Xerox 1952 ordered by Aimee Bixby on 2014/9/10?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT (T2.Sales / (1 - T2.discount)) * T2.Quantity - Profit FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' AND T3.`Product Name` = 'Xerox 1952' AND T2.`Order Date` = '2014-09-10'

question: How many office supply orders were made by Cindy Stewart in the south superstore?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T3.Category = 'Office Supplies' AND T2.`Customer Name` = 'Cindy Stewart'

question: Please list the IDs of the orders made by Aimee Bixby with more than 3 kinds of products ordered.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Order ID` FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby' GROUP BY T2.`Product ID` HAVING COUNT(T2.`Product ID`) > 3

question: What product category that Sam Craven ordered from the central and east superstore?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Category FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` LEFT JOIN central_superstore AS T4 ON T3.`Product ID` = T4.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Customer Name` = 'Sam Craven'

question: What is the name of the product that has the highest original price?
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM east_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` ORDER BY (T1.Sales / (1 - T1.Discount)) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total sales of 'Avery Hi-Liter EverBold Pen Style Fluorescent Highlighters, 4/Pack' in the Central region?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Sales) FROM central_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T2.`Product Name` = 'Avery Hi-Liter EverBold Pen Style Fluorescent Highlighters, 4/Pack' AND T2.Region = 'Central'

question: List down the customers that purchased the product named Xerox 23 in the South region.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.`Customer Name` FROM south_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T1.`Product ID` WHERE T1.Region = 'South' AND T3.`Product Name` = 'Xerox 23'

question: List the name of all products in the west superstore that customers chose for same-day shipment in the year 2013.
original_query: SELECT T2.`Product Name` FROM west_superstore AS T1 INNER JOIN product AS T2 ON T1.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.`Ship Mode` = 'Same Day' AND T1.`Ship Date` LIKE '2013%'

question: Among the customers from Indiana, what is the percentage of their purchased orders in the Central region with no discount?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE  WHEN T2.Discount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T2.Region = 'Central' AND T1.State = 'Indiana'

question: How many orders were made by Alan Barnes in 2015 at the Central superstore?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.`Order ID`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Alan Barnes' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Order Date`) = '2015'

question: Among the customers from Houston, Texas, what is the total profit of their orders in the Central region?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Profit) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` INNER JOIN product AS T3 ON T3.`Product ID` = T2.`Product ID` WHERE T1.City = 'Houston' AND T1.State = 'Texas' AND T2.Region = 'Central'

question: How many orders has Aimee Bixby made?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.`Order ID`) FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN central_superstore AS T2 ON T1.`Customer ID` = T2.`Customer ID` WHERE T1.`Customer Name` = 'Aimee Bixby'

question: How many patients have the most prevalent conditions?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient) FROM all_prevalences AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON lower(T1.ITEM) = lower(T2.DESCRIPTION) ORDER BY T1."PREVALENCE RATE" DESC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the allergen of the Dominican patient named Dirk Languish.
original_query: SELECT T1.DESCRIPTION FROM allergies AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.first = 'Dirk' AND T2.last = 'Langosh' AND T2.ethnicity = 'dominican'

question: According to the observation on 2008/3/11, what was the height of Elly Koss?
original_query: SELECT T2.value, T2.units FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.date = '2008-03-11' AND T2.description = 'Body Height'

question: How many Black patients were immunized with DTaP in 2013?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN immunizations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.race = 'black' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'DTaP' AND strftime('%Y', T2.DATE) = '2013'

question: List the full name of all patients with 'otitis media'.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Otitis media'

question: List the full names of patients with nut allergy.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to nut'

question: What is the care plan, procedure, medication and the patient's full name for encounter 6f2e3935-b203-493e-a9c0-f23e847b9798?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.DESCRIPTION, T4.DESCRIPTION, T5.DESCRIPTION, T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN careplans AS T3 ON T1.patient = T3.PATIENT INNER JOIN procedures AS T4 ON T1.patient = T4.PATIENT INNER JOIN medications AS T5 ON T1.patient = T5.PATIENT WHERE T2.ID = '6f2e3935-b203-493e-a9c0-f23e847b9798'

question: Indicate the start date of patient Walter Bahringer's care plan.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.start FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Walter' AND T1.last = 'Bahringer'

question: Tell me the reason for Lavelle Vandervort's encounter on 11/20/2013?
original_query: SELECT T2.REASONDESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DATE = '2013-11-20' AND T1.first = 'Lavelle' AND T1.last = 'Vandervort'

question: Give the body height status of Mr. Vincent Wyman on 2010/8/2.
original_query: SELECT T2.description, T2.VALUE, T2.units FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Mr.' AND T1.first = 'Vincent' AND T1.last = 'Wyman' AND T2.date = '2010-08-02' AND T2.description = 'Body Height'

question: From 7/9/2010 to 10/29/2013, how many black patients were immunized with the meningococcal MCV4P vaccine?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN immunizations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'meningococcal MCV4P' AND T2.DATE BETWEEN '2010-07-09' AND '2013-10-29' AND T1.race = 'black'

question: How many white patients whose birth year is 1935 have a stroke?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.patient WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.birthdate) = '1935' AND T1.race = 'white' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Stroke'

question: How many patients with care plan for 'concussion with loss of consciousness' are married?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.marital = 'M' AND T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Concussion with loss of consciousness'

question: Describe the condition of patient Wilmer Koepp.
original_query: SELECT T2.DESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Wilmer' AND T1.last = 'Koepp'

question: Calculate the average age of patients with prediabetes care plan.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.deathdate IS NULL THEN strftime('%Y', T2.STOP) - strftime('%Y', T1.birthdate) ELSE strftime('%Y', T1.deathdate) - strftime('%Y', T1.birthdate) END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Prediabetes'

question: How many unmarried women were checked for normal pregnancy?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient) FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Normal pregnancy' AND T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.marital = 'S'

question: What is the prevalence percentage of condition no. 64859006?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1."PREVALENCE PERCENTAGE" FROM all_prevalences AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON lower(T1.ITEM) = lower(T2.DESCRIPTION) WHERE T2.code = '64859006'

question: What is the start date of the care plan of the patient whose maiden name is Adams?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.START FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.maiden = 'Adams'

question: When the allergy starts for Angelo Buckridge.
original_query: SELECT T2.START FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Adolfo' AND T1.last = 'Schmitt' AND T2.STOP IS NOT NULL

question: List the patient ids whose disease has the most occurrences.
original_query: SELECT T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN all_prevalences AS T3 ON T3.ITEM = T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T3.OCCURRENCES DESC LIMIT 1

question: In 2009, who among the married patients had undergone a care plan for more than 60 days?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.marital = 'M' AND strftime('%J', T2.STOP) - strftime('%J', T2.START) > 60

question: How many male patients have been described as immune to quadrivalent HPV?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN immunizations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'HPV  quadrivalent' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: Among the patients that died, what is the condition of the oldest patient?
original_query: SELECT T1.DESCRIPTION FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.deathdate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY strftime('%Y', T2.deathdate) - strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) DESC LIMIT 1

question: According to all the observations of Elly Koss, what was her average weight?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.VALUE), T2.units FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.description = 'Body Weight'

question: State the description of the reason why Angelo Buckridge needs the care plan.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.REASONDESCRIPTION FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.first = 'Angelo' AND T2.last = 'Buckridge'

question: How many of the patients born in 1920s had pneumonia?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE DESCRIPTION = 'Pneumonia' AND strftime('%Y', T1.birthdate) LIKE '192%'

question: What is the social security number and address of the patient who encountered viral sinusitis symptoms on 6/13/2008?
