original_query: SELECT T1.ssn, T1.address FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DATE = '2008-06-13' AND T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Viral sinusitis (disorder)' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Encounter for symptom'

question: What is the most common condition among the female Americans?
original_query: SELECT T2.DESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.ethnicity = 'american' GROUP BY T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DESCRIPTION) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the reason Walter Bahringer visited medical professionals in July 2009.
original_query: SELECT T2.REASONDESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Walter' AND T1.last = 'Bahringer' AND T2.DATE LIKE '2009-07%'

question: How old was Mrs. Laronda Bernier at the time of her most recent medical encounter?
original_query: SELECT T2.DATE - T1.birthdate AS age FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Laronda' AND T1.last = 'Bernier' ORDER BY T2.DATE DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among observations in 2011, provide the names and ages of patients whose Systolic Blood Pressures are 200mmHg.
original_query: SELECT T2.first, T2.last , CASE WHEN T2.deathdate IS NULL THEN strftime('%Y', T1.DATE) - strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) ELSE strftime('%Y', T2.deathdate) - strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) END AS age FROM observations AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Systolic Blood Pressure' AND T1.VALUE = 200 AND T1.UNITS = 'mmHg' AND strftime('%Y', T1.DATE) = '2011'

question: How many women need to take 'Nitroglycerin 0.4 MG/ACTUAT [Nitrolingual]'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Nitroglycerin 0.4 MG/ACTUAT [Nitrolingual]' AND T1.gender = 'F'

question: Why did Elly Koss need to take Acetaminophen?
original_query: SELECT T2.REASONDESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.description LIKE 'Acetaminophen%'

question: What is the percentage of the most common conditions for patients age 60 and above?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T5.DESCRIPTION = T3.DESCRIPTION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.patient) FROM ( SELECT T2.DESCRIPTION, T1.patient FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE ROUND((strftime('%J', T2.START) - strftime('%J', T1.birthdate)) / 365) > 60 GROUP BY T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DESCRIPTION) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T3 INNER JOIN patients AS T4 ON T3.patient = T4.patient INNER JOIN conditions AS T5 ON T4.patient = T5.PATIENT WHERE ROUND((strftime('%J', T5.START) - strftime('%J', T4.birthdate)) / 365) > 60

question: Give the procedure description of Ms. Jacquelyn Shanahan on 2009/8/9.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.description FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN procedures AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Ms.' AND T1.first = 'Jacquelyn' AND T1.last = 'Shanahan' AND T2.DATE = '2009-08-09'

question: What is the care plan description of the prevalent disease with the highest prevalence percentage?
original_query: SELECT T4.DESCRIPTION FROM all_prevalences AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T2.DESCRIPTION = T1.ITEM INNER JOIN encounters AS T3 ON T2.ENCOUNTER = T3.ID INNER JOIN careplans AS T4 ON T4.ENCOUNTER = T3.ID ORDER BY T1."PREVALENCE PERCENTAGE" DESC LIMIT 1

question: Count all of the living patients that had a stroke.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient) FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T1.description = 'Stroke' AND T2.deathdate IS NULL

question: How many patients immunized against 'monovalent rotavirus' ceased their care plan on 11/23/2013?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN immunizations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'rotavirus  monovalent' AND T1.STOP = '2013-11-23'

question: How many patients who are allergic to peanuts have asthma?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient) FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient INNER JOIN allergies AS T3 ON T2.patient = T3.PATIENT WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Asthma' AND T3.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to peanuts'

question: How many patients on average receive combined chemotherapy and radiation therapy procedures each year?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(PATIENT) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y', DATE)) FROM procedures WHERE DESCRIPTION = 'Combined chemotherapy and radiation therapy (procedure)'

question: What is the age of the patient with hypertension named Giovanni Russel?
original_query: SELECT strftime('%Y', T2.deathdate) - strftime('%Y', T2.birthdate) AS age FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.first = 'Giovanni' AND T2.last = 'Russel' AND T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Hypertension'

question: Give the social security number of the female Irish patient allergic to grass pollen.
original_query: SELECT T2.ssn FROM allergies AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to grass pollen' AND T2.ethnicity = 'irish' AND T2.gender = 'F'

question: Give me the immunization codes and dates on which Ms. Jacquelyn Shanahan was immunized with influenza seasonal injectable preservative-free vaccine.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.CODE, T2.DATE FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN immunizations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Ms.' AND T1.first = 'Jacquelyn' AND T1.last = 'Shanahan' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free'

question: What is the percentage of Hispanic patients who stopped their care plan in 2011?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.race = 'hispanic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.PATIENT) FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.stop) = '2011'

question: Among the patients who were immunized with meningococcal MCV4P, how many have viral sinusitis disorder after getting the immunization?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM immunizations AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'meningococcal MCV4P' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Viral sinusitis (disorder)'

question: What are the birth date of patients who took outpatient encounter care plan?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.birthdate FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Outpatient Encounter'

question: How many types of medication have been prescribed to Mr. Major D'Amore since his visit to the hospital?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.DESCRIPTION) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Major' AND T1.last = 'D''Amore'

question: How many times was Elly Koss given a care plan between 1/11/2009 and 10/23/2010?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.PATIENT) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.START BETWEEN '2009-01-11' AND '2010-10-23'

question: List out patient names with calcium deficiency.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Calcium' AND T2.VALUE < 8.6

question: State the average period of Ms. Angelena Kertzmann's several normal pregnancies.
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(strftime('%J', T2.STOP) - strftime('%J', T2.START)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.PATIENT) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Ms.' AND T1.first = 'Angelena' AND T1.last = 'Kertzmann' AND T2.description = 'Normal pregnancy'

question: Which conditions the patient has when receiving the IPV immunization?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.DESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN immunizations AS T3 ON T1.patient = T3.PATIENT WHERE T3.DESCRIPTION = 'IPV'

question: What is the average body mass index for patients with higher total cholesterol?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.VALUE) / COUNT(T1.PATIENT) FROM observations AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT PATIENT FROM observations WHERE DESCRIPTION = 'Total Cholesterol' AND VALUE > 200 ) AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Body Mass Index'

question: Among the male patients, who has the earliest starting date of the care plan?
original_query: SELECT T2.first, T2.last FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.gender = 'M' ORDER BY T1.START LIMIT 1

question: When did Mrs. Ira Deckow have the standard pregnancy test?
original_query: SELECT T2.date FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN procedures AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Mrs.' AND T1.first = 'Ira' AND T1.last = 'Deckow' AND T2.description = 'Standard pregnancy test'

question: How many patients of Irish ethnicity take medication for 'myocardial infarction'?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Myocardial Infarction' AND T1.ethnicity = 'irish'

question: List out the procedure and medicine prescribed for drug overdose patients.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.DESCRIPTION, T3.DESCRIPTION FROM encounters AS T1 INNER JOIN procedures AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.PATIENT INNER JOIN medications AS T3 ON T1.PATIENT = T3.PATIENT WHERE T1.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Drug overdose'

question: How many stroke patients have married?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Stroke' AND T1.marital = 'M'

question: What percentage of patients born in 'Pembroke MA US' have 'allergy to grass pollen'?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to grass pollen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.birthplace = 'Pembroke MA US'

question: How many Italian patients have the care plan code of 304510005?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient) FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.ethnicity = 'italian' AND T1.CODE = '304510005'

question: Indicate the care plan needed for the patient living at 179 Sydni Roads, Taunton, MA 02780 US.
original_query: SELECT T1.DESCRIPTION FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.address = '179 Sydni Roads Taunton MA 02780 US'

question: List down the last name of patients who are allergic to dairy products.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to dairy product'

question: State the prevalence rate of condition no. 368581000119106.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1."PREVALENCE RATE" FROM all_prevalences AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON lower(T1.ITEM) = lower(T2.DESCRIPTION) WHERE T2.code = '368581000119106'

question: Indicate the time frame and details of the most recent care plan suggested to Jacquelyn Shanahan.
original_query: SELECT strftime('%J', T2.STOP) - strftime('%J', T2.START) AS timeFrame , T2.DESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Jacquelyn' AND T1.last = 'Shanahan' ORDER BY T2.START DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the difference between average glucose reading for patients in the 20s and 50s?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ROUND((strftime('%J', T2.DATE) - strftime('%J', T1.birthdate)) / 365) BETWEEN 20 AND 30 THEN T2.VALUE ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN ROUND((strftime('%J', T2.DATE) - strftime('%J', T1.birthdate)) / 365) BETWEEN 20 AND 30 THEN T2.PATIENT END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ROUND((strftime('%J', T2.DATE) - strftime('%J', T1.birthdate)) / 365) BETWEEN 50 AND 60 THEN T2.VALUE ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN ROUND((strftime('%J', T2.DATE) - strftime('%J', T1.birthdate)) / 365) BETWEEN 50 AND 60 THEN T2.PATIENT END) AS difference FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Glucose'

question: Among the patients with acute bronchitis, what is the percentage of Asian women?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'F' AND T2.race = 'asian' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.gender) FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Acute bronchitis (disorder)'

question: What kind of condition did Keven Kuhn have from 2016/9/24 to 2016/10/10? Describe the condition.
original_query: SELECT T2.description FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Keven' AND T1.last = 'Kuhn' AND T2.start = '2016-09-24' AND T2.stop = '2016-10-10'

question: How many patients sought medical attention due to a second-degree burn? Describe the care plan recommended to them.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.PATIENT), T2.DESCRIPTION FROM encounters AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Second degree burn'

question: What are the medical encounter ids of patients who were born in Pembroke MA US?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ENCOUNTER FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.birthplace = 'Pembroke MA US'

question: What kind of allergy is most common among white people?
original_query: SELECT T2.DESCRIPTION FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.race = 'white' GROUP BY T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DESCRIPTION) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Why did Mrs. Annabelle Pouros take leucovorin 100 mg injection on 1970/12/19? State the reason.
original_query: SELECT T2.reasondescription FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Mrs.' AND T1.first = 'Annabelle' AND T1.last = 'Pouros' AND T2.start = '1970-12-19' AND T2.description = 'Leucovorin 100 MG Injection'

question: What is the id of the patient whose hypertension started most recently?
original_query: SELECT PATIENT FROM conditions WHERE START = ( SELECT MAX(START) FROM conditions WHERE DESCRIPTION = 'Hypertension' )

question: In 2010, how many single patients took Nitrofurantoin 5 mg/ML [Furadantin] to cure cystitis?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.marital = 'S' AND T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Cystitis' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Nitrofurantoin 5 MG/ML [Furadantin]' AND strftime('%Y', T2.START) = '2010'

question: What is the id of the patient who has the longest allergy period?
original_query: SELECT PATIENT FROM allergies WHERE STOP IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PATIENT ORDER BY CASE WHEN SUBSTR(STOP, -2, 1) != '9' THEN SUBSTR(STOP, LENGTH(STOP) - 1) + 2000 END - CASE WHEN SUBSTR(START, -2, 1) = '9' THEN SUBSTR(START, LENGTH(START) - 1) + 1900 ELSE SUBSTR(START, LENGTH(START) - 1) + 2000 END LIMIT 1

question: What gender is more prone to 'dander (animal) allergy'?
original_query: SELECT T1.gender FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN allergies AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Dander (animal) allergy' GROUP BY T1.gender ORDER BY COUNT(T1.gender) DESC LIMIT 1

question: For how many times had Elly Koss have her Systolic Blood Pressure observed?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.description) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.description = 'Systolic Blood Pressure'

question: List down the first name of patients who encountered normal pregnancy.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Normal pregnancy'

question: How many care plans has Mrs. Norman Berge taken?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.PATIENT) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN careplans AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.prefix = 'Mrs.' AND T1.first = 'Norman' AND T1.last = 'Berge'

question: Among the patients with hypertension, what is the average of their diastolic blood pressure?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.VALUE) FROM observations AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient INNER JOIN conditions AS T3 ON T2.patient = T3.PATIENT WHERE T3.DESCRIPTION = 'Hypertension' AND T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Diastolic Blood Pressure'

question: How many interactions did Lorri Simons have with medical professionals between 2010 and 2017? What percentage of encounters are attributed to prenatal visits?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.patient) , CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Prenatal visit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Lorri' AND T1.last = 'Simonis' AND strftime('%Y', T2.DATE) BETWEEN '2010' AND '2017'

question: What is the glucose level of the patient that lives at 365 Della Crossroad Suite 202, Deerfield, MA 01342 US?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.DESCRIPTION, T2.VALUE, T2.UNITS FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN observations AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Glucose' AND T1.address = '365 Della Crossroad Suite 202 Deerfield MA 01342 US'

question: For how long did Elly Koss's cystitis last?
original_query: SELECT strftime('%J', T2.STOP) - strftime('%J', T2.START) AS days FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Elly' AND T1.last = 'Koss' AND T2.description = 'Cystitis'

question: What is the care plan for the patient with social security number 999-15-3685?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DESCRIPTION FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.PATIENT = T2.patient WHERE T2.ssn = '999-15-3685'

question: Provide the patients' full names who received the extraction of wisdom tooth.
original_query: SELECT T1.first, T1.last FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN procedures AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Extraction of wisdom tooth'

question: What is the code of the prevalent disease with the highest occurrences?
original_query: SELECT T2.code FROM all_prevalences AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.ITEM = T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY T1.OCCURRENCES DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the prevalence rate of the patients' diseases started on 9th May 2014?
original_query: SELECT T2."PREVALENCE RATE" FROM conditions AS T1 INNER JOIN all_prevalences AS T2 ON lower(T1.DESCRIPTION) = lower(T2.ITEM) WHERE T1.START = '2014-05-09'

question: Among the patients who have been using Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG, what percentage of patients are female?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN medications AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG'

question: Describe the care plans received by the patient with secondary malignant neoplasm of the colon.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DESCRIPTION FROM careplans AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Secondary malignant neoplasm of colon'

question: What is the most common condition among the patients who received influenza seasonal injectable preservative free immunization?
original_query: SELECT T2.DESCRIPTION FROM immunizations AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.DESCRIPTION = 'Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free' GROUP BY T2.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DESCRIPTION) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List down the first name of patients who have cystitis condition.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Cystitis'

question: List down the address of patients who have billable period in 2010.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.address FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN claims AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T2.BILLABLEPERIOD LIKE '2010%'

question: How many patients are allergic to eggs?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(PATIENT) FROM allergies WHERE DESCRIPTION = 'Allergy to eggs'

question: How old was Mr. Stacy Morar at the time of his first emergency room admission due to a drug overdose?
original_query: SELECT T2.DATE - T1.birthdate AS age FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN encounters AS T2 ON T1.patient = T2.PATIENT WHERE T1.first = 'Stacy' AND T1.last = 'Morar' AND T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Emergency Room Admission' AND T2.REASONDESCRIPTION = 'Drug overdose' ORDER BY T2.DATE LIMIT 1

question: How many male patients have prediabetes condition?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.patient) FROM patients AS T1 INNER JOIN conditions AS T2 WHERE T2.DESCRIPTION = 'Prediabetes' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: Please list the location coordinates of all the devices with an inactive app user when event no.2 happened.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.longitude, T2.latitude FROM app_events AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T2.event_id = T1.event_id WHERE T2.event_id = 2 AND T1.is_active = 0

question: What is the age of the oldest male user of the app?
original_query: SELECT MAX(age) FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'M'

question: What is the most common age group among all device users?
original_query: SELECT T.num FROM ( SELECT `group`, COUNT(`group`) AS num FROM gender_age GROUP BY `group` ) T

question: Among the male users, how many users use device model of Desire 820?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.device_model = 'Desire 820' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: What are the ages and genders of the LG L70 users?
original_query: SELECT T2.age, T2.gender FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.phone_brand = 'LG' AND T1.device_model = 'L70'

question: Which gender logged in the most to an event in the first 10 days of May 2016?
original_query: SELECT T.gender FROM ( SELECT T1.gender, COUNT(T1.device_id) AS num FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE date(T2.timestamp) BETWEEN '2016-05-01' AND '2016-05-10' GROUP BY T1.gender ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many female users belong to the age group of 27 to 28?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM gender_age WHERE `group` = 'F27-28' AND gender = 'F'

question: What is the ratio of the number of app users that belong to the Securities category to the number of app users that belong to the Finance category?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T2.category = 'Securities', 1, 0)) / SUM(IIF(T2.category = 'Finance', 1, 0)) AS per FROM app_labels AS T1 INNER JOIN label_categories AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id

question: What are the label IDs and app IDs of the Chinese Classical Mythology category?
original_query: SELECT T1.label_id, T2.app_id FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id WHERE T1.category = 'Chinese Classical Mythology'

question: List all females aged 24 to 26 devices' locations.
original_query: SELECT T2.longitude, T2.latitude FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.`group` = 'F24-26' AND T1.gender = 'F'

question: How many users used Vivo Xplay3S model?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE device_model = 'Xplay3S' AND phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: What is the ratio of active and inactive app users of the event ID "58"?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(is_active = 1, 1, 0)) / SUM(IIF(is_active = 0, 1, 0)) AS per FROM app_events WHERE event_id = 58

question: What are the categories of the top 2 oldest events?
original_query: SELECT T4.category FROM events_relevant AS T1 INNER JOIN app_events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN app_labels AS T3 ON T3.app_id = T2.app_id INNER JOIN label_categories AS T4 ON T3.label_id = T4.label_id ORDER BY T1.timestamp LIMIT 2

question: How many labels belong to the game-card category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(label_id) FROM label_categories WHERE category = 'game-card'

question: Among the users who use a Galaxy Note 2, how many of them are female?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND T1.device_model = 'Galaxy Note 2'

question: How many people over the age of 50 do not have HTC One M8 Eye phones?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.age > 50 AND T2.device_model != 'One M8 Eye' AND T2.phone_brand != 'HTC'

question: List down the labels' IDs and categories of the app ID "5758400314709850000".
original_query: SELECT T1.label_id, T2.category FROM app_labels AS T1 INNER JOIN label_categories AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id WHERE T1.app_id = 5758400314709850000

question: What were the locations of the events on 8th May, 2016?
original_query: SELECT longitude, latitude FROM `events` WHERE SUBSTR(`timestamp`, 1, 10) = '2016-05-08'

question: Provide the phone brands and models of the users who were at the coordinates of (80,44).
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.phone_brand, T1.device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T2.longitude = 80 AND T2.latitude = 44

question: What is the label ID of "Third-party card management" category?
original_query: SELECT label_id FROM label_categories WHERE category = 'Third-party card management'

question: Among all the devices with event no.2 happening, what is the percentage of the device being a vivo phone?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T2.phone_brand = 'vivo', 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.device_id) AS per FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.event_id = '2'

question: What is the age of the oldest device user?
original_query: SELECT MAX(age) FROM gender_age

question: For the device with an event occurring on 2016/5/1 at 0:55:25, what is the gender of its user?
original_query: SELECT T1.gender FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.timestamp = '2016-05-01 00:55:25'

question: Please list the device models of all the devices used by a user in the M23-26 user group.
original_query: SELECT T2.device_model FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.`group` = 'M23-26'

question: How many times is the number of active apps in the event that happened at 7:50:28 on 2016/5/2 than in the event that happened at 7:41:03 on 2016/5/2?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(timestamp = '2016-05-02 7:50:28', 1, 0)) / SUM(IIF(timestamp = '2016-05-02 7:41:03', 1, 0)) AS num FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN app_events AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id WHERE T2.is_active = '1'

question: Please list the IDs of the events happened on all the vivo devices.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_id FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: Please list the time when event no.2 happened on a vivo device.
original_query: SELECT T1.timestamp FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'vivo' AND T1.event_id = '2'

question: Among HTC Butterfly phone users, list any five devices' IDs used by females.
original_query: SELECT T2.device_id FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.device_model = 'Butterfly' AND T2.gender = 'F' AND T1.phone_brand = 'HTC' LIMIT 5

question: How many app IDs were included under science fiction category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.app_id) FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T2.label_id = T1.label_id WHERE T1.category = 'science fiction'

question: Describe the number of app IDs and location of the event ID "79641".
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.app_id), T2.longitude, T2.latitude FROM app_events AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id WHERE T1.event_id = 79641 GROUP BY T2.longitude, T2.latitude

question: What is the average age of the female users who uses a vivo device?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.age) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'vivo' AND T1.gender = 'F'

question: What age group is the most using SM-T2558 model phones?
original_query: SELECT T.`group` FROM ( SELECT T1.`group`, COUNT(T1.device_id) AS num FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.device_model = 'SM-T2558' GROUP BY T1.`group` ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the event IDs of the events that have happened on the device of the oldest user.
original_query: SELECT T2.event_id FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id ORDER BY T1.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most common device model among female users between the ages 27 to 28?
original_query: SELECT T2.device_model FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.`group` = 'F27-28' AND T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T2.device_id DESC LIMIT 1

question: State the number of users who are under 50 and above 20 use device model of Galaxy Premier.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.age BETWEEN 20 AND 50 AND T2.device_model = 'Galaxy Premier'

question: What percentage of vivo devices belong to users with no information?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.gender IS NULL AND T1.age IS NULL AND T1.`group` IS NULL, 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.device_id) AS per FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: How many events in total have happened on the devices in 2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(event_id) FROM `events` WHERE SUBSTR(`timestamp`, 1, 4) = '2016'

question: Among the users who use OPPO, calculate the percentage of those who are under 50 years old.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.age < 50, 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.device_id) AS per FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'OPPO'

question: What is the age of the youngest female device user?
original_query: SELECT MIN(age) FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'F'

question: Identify by their id all the apps that belong to the game-stress reliever category.
original_query: SELECT T2.app_id FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id WHERE T1.category = 'game-stress reliever'

question: To which user group do most of the users who uses a vivo device belong?
original_query: SELECT T.`group` FROM ( SELECT T2.`group`, COUNT(`group`) AS num FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.phone_brand = 'vivo' GROUP BY T2.`group` ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many male users are active in the events held on 5/1/2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.gender) FROM app_events AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T2.event_id = T1.event_id INNER JOIN gender_age AS T3 ON T3.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.is_active = 1 AND T3.gender = 'M' AND T2.timestamp LIKE '2016-05-01%'

question: What is the phone brand of the device model "坚果手机"?
original_query: SELECT phone_brand FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE device_model = '坚果手机'

question: How many women have apps from the game-Finding fault category installed on their device?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id INNER JOIN app_events_relevant AS T3 ON T2.event_id = T3.event_id WHERE T1.age < 23 AND T1.gender = 'F' AND T3.is_active = 0 AND T3.is_installed = 1

question: Which category has more app users, Securities or Finance?
original_query: SELECT IIF(SUM(IIF(T2.category = 'Securities', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.category = 'Finance', 1, 0)) > 0, 'Securities', 'Finance') AS diff FROM app_labels AS T1 INNER JOIN label_categories AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id

question: How many category names start with the word "game"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(label_id) FROM label_categories WHERE category LIKE 'game%'

question: How many events does the device "4069764298338760000" have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(event_id) FROM events WHERE device_id = 4069764298338760000

question: How many users in user group M23-26 use a vivo device?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.`group` = 'M23-26' AND T2.phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: What is the device model used by the most female users over 30?
original_query: SELECT T.device_model FROM ( SELECT T2.device_model, COUNT(T2.device_model) AS num FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.age > 30 AND T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T2.device_model ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the device model of the device used by the oldest user?
original_query: SELECT device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE device_id IN ( SELECT device_id FROM gender_age WHERE age = ( SELECT MAX(age) FROM gender_age ) )

question: For the event which happened at 23:55:16 on 2016/5/7, in the location coordinate(113, 28), on what device did it happen? Give the name of the device model.
original_query: SELECT T1.device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.event_id WHERE T2.longitude = '113' AND T2.latitude = '28' AND T2.timestamp = '2016-05-07 23:55:16'

question: Calculate the ratio in percentage between the average number of app users belonging to "80s Japanese comic" and "90s Japanese comic".
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.category = '80s Japanese comic', 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.label_id) AS J8 , SUM(IIF(T1.category = '90s Japanese comic', 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.label_id) AS J9 FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id

question: Indicate the location of all the events that occurred on April 30, 2016.
original_query: SELECT longitude, latitude FROM events WHERE date(timestamp) = '2016-04-30'

question: How many users belong to the same behavior category as comics?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.app_id) FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id WHERE T1.category = 'comics'

question: How many events did the 88-years-old male users participate on 4th May,2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.event_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND SUBSTR(`timestamp`, 1, 10) = '2016-05-04' AND T1.age = 88

question: How many users installed the app but are not active?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(app_id) FROM app_events WHERE is_installed = 1 AND is_active = 0

question: Among the devices on which an event happened on 2016/5/1, how many of them are used by a male user?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.timestamp = '2016-05-01' AND T2.gender = 'M'

question: What is the brand of the device used by the youngest female user?
original_query: SELECT phone_brand FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE device_id IN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT device_id FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'F' ORDER BY age LIMIT 1 ) AS T )

question: Please list any three devices that are owned by female users.
original_query: SELECT device_id FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'F' LIMIT 3

question: How many users belong to the MOBA category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.app_id) FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T2.label_id = T1.label_id WHERE T1.category = 'MOBA'

question: Please list any three OPPO device models.
original_query: SELECT device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE phone_brand = 'OPPO' LIMIT 3

question: Is the oldest device user male or female?
original_query: SELECT gender FROM gender_age WHERE age = ( SELECT MAX(age) FROM gender_age )

question: Please list any three events that happened on the 1st of May 2016 that have the same latitude of 31.
original_query: SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE timestamp LIKE '2016-05-01%' AND latitude = 31 LIMIT 3

question: Among the HTC users, calculate the percentage of female users who are over 80.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.age > 80, 1, 0)) / COUNT(T1.device_id) AS per FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'HTC'

question: How many male users are in the age group of M32-38?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(gender) FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'M' AND `group` = 'M32-38'

question: Mention the group of age of users who use phone brand of LG.
original_query: SELECT T1.`group` FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'LG'

question: How many female users use device model of MI 3?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.device_model = 'MI 3'

question: How many models does the VIVO phone brand released?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: Give the number of 30-year-old users who were active in the events on 2016/5/2.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T3.device_id) FROM app_events AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN gender_age AS T3 ON T2.device_id = T3.device_id WHERE SUBSTR(`timestamp`, 1, 10) = '2016-05-02' AND T1.is_active = 1 AND T3.age = '30'

question: Describe the ages, genders and numbers of events participated by the users at coordinates of (-102,38).
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.age, T1.gender, COUNT(T2.event_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN `events` AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T2.longitude = -102 AND T2.latitude = 38 GROUP BY T1.age, T1.gender, T2.longitude, T2.latitude

question: Calculate the average age of people who have apps installed but are not active on their devices.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.age) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id INNER JOIN app_events_relevant AS T3 ON T2.event_id = T3.event_id WHERE T3.is_installed = 1 AND T3.is_active = 0

question: What are the labels' IDs of online shopping and online malls categories?
original_query: SELECT label_id FROM label_categories WHERE category IN ('online shopping', 'online malls')

question: How many OPPO users participated in events which were held around 12 AM on 1st May,2016?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'OPPO' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', T1.`timestamp`) = '2016-05-01'

question: Identify by their id all the devices that are used by women who are in the age range of 29 to 31 years.
original_query: SELECT device_id FROM gender_age_train WHERE age BETWEEN 29 AND 31 AND gender = 'F'

question: How many devices are of the brand vivo?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE phone_brand = 'vivo'

question: Among the devices with event no.2 happening, how many of them are vivo devices?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T2.device_id = T1.device_id WHERE T1.phone_brand = 'vivo' AND T2.event_id = 2

question: How many male users have the log of events at the same longitude of 114?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.longitude = 114 AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: How many users who are under 30 years old use device model of Galaxy Note 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.device_model = 'Galaxy Note 2' AND T1.age < 30

question: To which categories does app user no.1977658975649780000 belong?
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id WHERE T2.app_id = 1977658975649780000

question: Among the female users of the devices, how many of them are under 30?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM gender_age WHERE age < 30 AND gender = 'F'

question: List all the devices' brands and models of events on 5/7/2016 at 6:03:22 AM.
original_query: SELECT T1.phone_brand, T1.device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.timestamp = '2016-05-07 06:03:22'

question: List the included categories in the event ID of 155.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.category FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T2.label_id = T1.label_id INNER JOIN app_events AS T3 ON T3.app_id = T2.app_id WHERE T3.event_id = 155

question: State the number of the "魅蓝Note 2" users who are in the "F29-32" group.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T1.`group` = 'F29-32' AND T2.device_model = '魅蓝Note 2'

question: On which brand of phone are the most applications installed?
original_query: SELECT T.phone_brand FROM ( SELECT T1.phone_brand, COUNT(T4.is_active) AS num FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T3 ON T2.device_id = T3.device_id INNER JOIN app_events_relevant AS T4 ON T3.event_id = T4.event_id WHERE T4.is_active = 1 GROUP BY T1.phone_brand ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the female users that uses OPPO as their phone brand, what is the percentage of them of the user that uses R815T model to install the app?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.phone_brand = 'OPPO', 1, 0)) / SUM(IIF(T1.device_id = 'R815T', 1, 0)) AS num FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F'

question: When did event number 7 happen for user number -8022267440849930000?
original_query: SELECT T1.timestamp FROM events_relevant AS T1 INNER JOIN app_events AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id WHERE T2.app_id = -8022267440849930000 AND T1.event_id = 7

question: Calculate the percentage of male users among all device users.
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(gender = 'M', 1, 0)) / COUNT(device_id) AS per FROM gender_age

question: What are the top 3 categories with the most app users?
original_query: SELECT T.category FROM ( SELECT T2.category, COUNT(T1.app_id) AS num FROM app_labels AS T1 INNER JOIN label_categories AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id GROUP BY T2.category ) AS T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 3

question: List at least 15 phone models released under the OPPO brand.
original_query: SELECT device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 WHERE phone_brand = 'OPPO' LIMIT 15

question: Provide the total number of the male users that use OPPO as their phone brand.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.phone_brand = 'OPPO' AND T1.gender = 'M'

question: List at least 3 categories with the lowest number of users.
original_query: SELECT T1.category FROM label_categories AS T1 INNER JOIN app_labels AS T2 ON T1.label_id = T2.label_id ORDER BY T2.label_id LIMIT 3

question: List 5 device models that users use to install the app and are active in using the app.
original_query: SELECT T1.device_model FROM phone_brand_device_model2 AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN app_events AS T3 ON T2.event_id = T3.event_id WHERE T3.is_active = 1 AND T3.is_installed = 1 LIMIT 5

question: How many female users over the age of 50 are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(gender) FROM gender_age WHERE age > 50 AND gender = 'F'

question: How many events have happened on the device of the youngest female user?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN gender_age AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.event_id, T2.age ORDER BY T2.age LIMIT 1

question: How many active users were there in the event id 2?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(is_active) FROM app_events WHERE event_id = 2 AND is_active = 1

question: How many men under the age of 23 have apps installed but are not active on their devices?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.device_id) FROM gender_age AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id INNER JOIN app_events_relevant AS T3 ON T2.event_id = T3.event_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T3.is_active = 0 AND T1.age < 23

question: What is the age of the oldest active user that participated in the event held on 5/6/2016 at coordinates 121, 31?
original_query: SELECT T3.age FROM app_events AS T1 INNER JOIN events_relevant AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.event_id INNER JOIN gender_age AS T3 ON T2.device_id = T3.device_id WHERE T1.is_active = 1 AND T2.longitude = 121 AND T2.latitude = 31 AND SUBSTR(T2.timestamp, 1, 10) = '2016-05-06' ORDER BY T3.age DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many apps are labeled 7?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(app_id) FROM app_labels WHERE label_id = 7

question: How many users of the app were not active when event no.2 happened?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(event_id) FROM app_events WHERE event_id = 2 AND is_active = 0

question: How many more devices are there of the brand vivo than of the brand LG?
original_query: SELECT SUM(IIF(phone_brand = 'vivo', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(phone_brand = 'LG', 1, 0)) AS num FROM phone_brand_device_model2

question: How many users are there in the Home Decoration category?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.app_id) FROM app_labels AS T1 INNER JOIN label_categories AS T2 ON T2.label_id = T1.label_id WHERE T2.category = 'Home Decoration'

question: Please list the location coordinates of all the Galaxy Note 2 devices when an event happened.
original_query: SELECT T1.longitude, T1.latitude FROM events AS T1 INNER JOIN phone_brand_device_model2 AS T2 ON T1.device_id = T2.device_id WHERE T2.device_model = 'Galaxy Note 2'

question: How many device users are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(device_id) FROM gender_age WHERE gender = 'M'

question: For the patient who got the laboratory test of uric acid level as 8.4 on 1991-10-21, how old was he/she at that time?
original_query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.UA = 8.4 AND T2.Date = '1991-10-21'

question: For patients with abnormal platelet level, state the number of patients with lower than normal range. How is it compare to the number of patients with higher than normal range?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PLT <= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PLT >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID

question: Among the patients who has a normal level of anti-centromere and a normal level of anti-SSB, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CENTROMEA IN ('negative', '0') AND T2.SSB IN ('negative', '0') AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: Among the patients have blood clots in veins, how many of them have a normal level of complement 4?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.C4 > 10 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'APS'

question: List all outpatient within normal range of creatinine phosphokinase. Give me the distinct ids.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CPK < 250 AND T1.Admission = '-'

question: What is the age gap between the youngest and oldest patient with a normal triglyceride recorded?
original_query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', MAX(T1.Birthday)) - STRFTIME('%Y', MIN(T1.Birthday)) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG >= 200

question: For patient born between Year 1930 to 1940, how many percent of them were inpatient?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Birthday) BETWEEN '1930' AND '1940'

question: What is the percentage of patient who has a abnormal level of glutamic oxaloacetic transaminase level, yet he or she is diagnosed with SLE?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN T1.ID ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`GOT` >= 60

question: What is the examination date of the patient whose albumin is the highest in the normal range?
original_query: SELECT Date FROM Laboratory WHERE ALB > 3.5 AND ALB < 5.5 ORDER BY ALB DESC LIMIT 1

question: List each patient's ID and blood glucose (GLU) index that were within normal range for patient's whose data was first recorded in 1991.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T2.GLU FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`First Date`) = '1991' AND T2.GLU < 180

question: Are there more male patients with creatinine not within the normal range than female? True or False?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CRE >= 1.5

question: What is the most common illness that doctors identified among the patients whose lab work was done between 1/1/1985, and 12/31/1995?
original_query: SELECT T2.Diagnosis FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.`Examination Date` BETWEEN '1985-01-01' AND '1995-12-31' GROUP BY T2.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Diagnosis) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many female patients who came at the hospital in 1997 was immediately followed at the outpatient clinic?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Description) = '1997' AND SEX = 'F' AND Admission = '-'

question: What is the average age of the male patient with high cholesterol?
original_query: SELECT AVG(STRFTIME('%Y', date('NOW')) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`T-CHO` >= 250 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: For patient born between 1936-1956, how many male patients have creatinine phosphokinase beyond the normal range?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) BETWEEN '1936' AND '1956' AND T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.CPK >= 250

question: For all patients who are older than 55 years old, what is the percentage of female who has abnormal prothrombin time (PT)?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) > 55

question: Among the patients who has a normal anti-scl70, how many of them are female and does not have any symptom?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE (T2.SC170 = 'negative' OR T2.SC170 = '0') AND T1.SEX = 'F' AND T3.Symptoms IS NULL

question: What is the anti Cardiolipin antibody concentration of the female patient with the highest uric acid level in the normal range?
original_query: SELECT T3.`aCL IgG`, T3.`aCL IgM`, T3.`aCL IgA` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5 ORDER BY T2.UA DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many patients diagnosed with SLE have a normal white blood cell level?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND T2.WBC BETWEEN 3.5 AND 9

question: For the examinations done after 1997/1/1, how many of them have the result of an inactivated partial prothrom bin time?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Date > '1997-01-01' AND T2.APTT >= 45

question: How many female patients were given an APS diagnosis?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'F' AND Diagnosis = 'APS'

question: What is the percentage of the female patient whose uric acid (UA) beyond the normal range?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA > 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F'

question: Lists all patients by ID who were diagnosed with Behcet's and had their exams between 01/01/197 and 12/31/1997.
original_query: SELECT ID FROM Examination WHERE `Examination Date` BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' AND Diagnosis = 'Behcet'

question: Among the patients who have an abnormal level of glutamic oxaloacetic transaminase, when was the youngest of them born?
original_query: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GOT >= 60 ORDER BY T1.Birthday DESC LIMIT 1

question: What number of patients with a degree of thrombosis level 2 and ANA pattern of only S, have a level of anti-Cardiolip in antibody (IgM) 20% higher than average?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Examination WHERE Thrombosis = 2 AND `ANA Pattern` = 'S' AND `aCL IgM` > (SELECT AVG(`aCL IgM`) * 1.2 FROM Examination WHERE Thrombosis = 2 AND `ANA Pattern` = 'S')

question: Among the patients followed at the outpatient clinic, how many of them have a normal level of alkaliphophatase?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALP < 300 AND T1.Admission = '-'

question: How many patients with a normal level of complement 3 have a P pattern observed in the sheet of ANA examination?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.C3 > 35 AND T1.`ANA Pattern` = 'P'

question: For all the female patient age 50 and above, who has abnormal red blood cell count. State if they were admitted to hospital.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.Admission FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F' AND (T2.RBC <= 3.5 OR T2.RBC >= 6.0) AND STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) >= 50

question: How many patients with a abnormal C-reactive protein don't have their data recorded?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE (T2.CRP = '+' ) AND T1.Description IS NULL

question: List and group all patients by sex for total bilirubin (T-BIL) level not within the normal range.
original_query: SELECT T1.ID,T1.SEX FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`T-BIL` >= 2.0 GROUP BY T1.SEX,T1.ID

question: Please list the diagnosis of the patients whose total protein is lower than normal.
original_query: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TP < 6.0

question: For the patients who are diagnosed with SJS, how many of them have a normal level of total protein?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'SJS' AND T2.TP > 6.0 AND T2.TP < 8.5

question: State the sex and birthday of patient ID '163109'. When was the examination taken and what symptom does the patient had.
original_query: SELECT T1.SEX, T1.Birthday, T2.`Examination Date`, T2.Symptoms FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 163109

question: What percentage of male patients who first presented to the hospital in 1981 were diagnosed with BEHCET?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(ID) FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', `First Date`) = '1981' AND SEX = 'M'

question: For the patients with the normal glutamic pylvic transaminase level, how many of them are male?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GOT < 60 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: Provide IDs for male patients with ALT glutamic pylvic transaminase (GPT) that have history of ALT glutamic pylvic transaminase (GPT) exceed the normal range.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.GPT >= 60

question: For the patient with the highest lactate dehydrogenase in the normal range, when was his or her data first recorded?
original_query: SELECT T1.`First Date` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH < 500 ORDER BY T2.LDH ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many patients with a normal anti-SSA came to the hospital before 2000?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.SSA IN ('negative', '0') AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) < '2000'

question: What percentage of patients with a proteinuria level within the normal range have a uric acid level below the normal range?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(ID) FROM Laboratory WHERE `U-PRO` > 0 AND `U-PRO` < 30

question: Provide list of patients and their diagnosis with triglyceride (TG) index greater than 100 of the normal range?
original_query: SELECT T1.ID, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG > 300

question: For the patient who has the highest Ig A within the normal range, what is his or her diagnosis?
original_query: SELECT patientData.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS patientData INNER JOIN Laboratory AS labData ON patientData.ID = labData.ID WHERE labData.IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500 ORDER BY labData.IGA DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the patients who were diagnosed with SLE, who is the oldest with normal hemoglobin level. Provide the ID and sex.
original_query: SELECT T1.ID, T1.SEX FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND T2.HGB > 10 AND T2.HGB < 17 ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many patients have a normal level of anti-ribonuclear protein and have been admitted to the hospital?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RNP = 'negative' OR T2.RNP = '0' AND T1.Admission = '+'

question: What is the anti-nucleus antibody concentration of the patient whose total bilirubin is the highest in the normal range?
original_query: SELECT T3.ANA FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.`T-BIL` < 2.0 ORDER BY T2.`T-BIL` DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many female patients born in 1964 were admitted to the hospital? List them by ID.
original_query: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Birthday) = '1964' AND SEX = 'F' AND Admission = '+'

question: Provide the ID, sex, birthday of all patients diagnosed with 'RA' that are within the UN normal index.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.UN < 30 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'RA'

question: What is the average age of patients as of year 1999 examined in the laboratory for the October of the year 1991?
original_query: SELECT AVG('1999'  - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Birthday)) FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-30'

question: Among all outpatients, list out those have low hemoglobin level. State the different IDs and their sex.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.HGB < 10 AND T1.Admission = '-'

question: For laboratory examinations take in 1984, list all patients below 50 years old with normal platelet level.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) < 50 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '1984'

question: Provide the ID and age of patient with lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) between 100-300 index above the normal range.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH > 600 AND T2.LDH < 800

question: List the patient ID, sex and birthday who has abnormal white blood cell count. Group them by sex and list the patient by age in ascending order.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.WBC <= 3.5 OR T2.WBC >= 9.0 GROUP BY T1.SEX,T1.ID ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC

question: Please list the top three patients' birthdays with the highest glutamic pylvic transaminase in the normal range.
original_query: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GPT < 60 ORDER BY T2.GPT DESC LIMIT 3

question: Name the ID of the patient who is born on the April 1st, 1982. Is his/her alkaliphophatase (ALP) within normal range?
original_query: SELECT T1.ID , CASE WHEN T2.ALP < 300 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'abNormal' END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Birthday = '1982-04-01'

question: How many male patients have elevated total bilirubin count?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`T-BIL` >= 2.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: Among the male patients who have a normal level of white blood cells, how many of them have an abnormal fibrinogen level?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450 AND T2.WBC > 3.5 AND T2.WBC < 9.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: Among the patients whose total bilirubin is over the normal range, how many of them have a peripheral pattern observed in the sheet of ANA examination?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.`T-BIL` >= 2 AND T3.`ANA Pattern` LIKE '%P%'

question: When is the birthday of the oldest patient whose blood glucose is abnormal?
original_query: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GLU > 180 ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many patients accepted to the hospital have a normal level of white blood cells?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.WBC BETWEEN 3.5 AND 9 AND T1.Admission = '+'

question: Among the patients whose total cholesterol is within the normal range, how many of them have a P pattern observed in the sheet of ANA examination?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T3.`ANA Pattern` = 'P' AND T2.`T-CHO` < 250

question: For the patient who first came to the hospital on 1991/6/13 who was diagnosed with SJS, what is the total number of his/her Laboratory tests in 1995?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = ( SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE `First Date` = '1991-06-13' AND Diagnosis = 'SJS' ) AND STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '1995'

question: For the patient who was diagnosed SLE on 1997/1/27, what was his/her original diagnose when he/she came to the hospital for the first time?
original_query: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = ( SELECT ID FROM Examination WHERE `Examination Date` = '1997-01-27' AND Diagnosis = 'SLE' ) AND T2.`Examination Date` = T1.`First Date`

question: How many patients with a normal RF don't have thrombosis?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RF < 20 AND T1.Thrombosis = 0

question: Of the patients with an normal level of IGG, how many of them admitted to the hospital?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG > 900 AND T2.IGG <2000 AND  T1.Admission = '+'

question: For all patient born in 1982, state if their albumin is within normal range.
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.ALB >= 3.5 AND T2.ALB <= 5.5 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'abnormal' END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'

question: Please list the ID of the patient whose RF is normal and who is older than 60.
original_query: SELECT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RF < 20 AND STRFTIME('%Y', DATE('now')) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) > 60

question: List ID, sex and date of birth of patient whose total protein (TP) below the lower range of the normal index.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TP < 6.0

question: How many of the patients with the most serious thrombosis cases examined in 1997 are women?
original_query: SELECT  COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) = '1997' AND T2.Thrombosis = 1

question: For the male patients that have a normal prothrombin time, what is their average prothrombin time?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.PT) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.PT < 14 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: Was the total cholesterol status for the patient id 2927464 on 1995-9-4 at the normal level?
original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN `T-CHO` < 250 THEN 'Normal' ELSE 'Abnormal' END FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = 2927464 AND Date = '1995-09-04'

question: How many patients have a normal anti-SSB and are diagnosed with SLE in the examination?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.SSB = 'negative' OR '0' AND T1.Diagnosis = 'SLE'

question: How many patients with an Ig G higher than normal?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG >= 2000

question: List all patients who were born in 1937 whose total cholesterol was beyond the normal range.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1937' AND T2.`T-CHO` >= 250

question: For the patient whose birthday was 1959/3/1, what symptoms did he/she have during the examination on 1993/9/27?
original_query: SELECT T2.Symptoms FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Birthday = '1959-03-01' AND T2.`Examination Date` = '1993-09-27'

question: When was the medical information on patient number 48473 first documented, and what disease did she have?
original_query: SELECT `First Date`, Diagnosis FROM Patient WHERE ID = 48473

question: Among the patients whose level of Hematoclit isn't normal, which patient has the highest anti-Cardiolipin antibody concentration? Please list his or her ID.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T3 on T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE (T3.HCT >= 52 OR T3.HCT <= 29) ORDER BY T2.`aCL IgA` DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the patient with an abnormal alkaliphophatase level, how many of them are admitted to the hospital?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALP >= 300 AND T1.Admission = '+'

question: For all female patient with total protein (TP) beyond the normal index, what is the deviation of their TP idex from the normal.
original_query: SELECT T2.TP - 8.5 FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.TP > 8.5

question: For patient with albumin level lower than 3.5, list their ID, sex and diagnosis.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALB < 3.5

question: Which patient is the first patient with an abnormal anti-SSA to come to the hospital? Please give his or her ID.
original_query: SELECT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.`First Date` IS NOT NULL AND T2.SSA NOT IN ('negative', '0') ORDER BY T1.`First Date` ASC LIMIT 1

question: What sex is the patient who in a medical examination was diagnosed with PSS and in a laboratory examination had a blood level of C-reactive protein de 2+, createnine 1 and LDH 123?
original_query: SELECT T1.SEX FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Diagnosis = 'PSS' AND T3.CRP = '2+' AND T3.CRE = 1.0 AND T3.LDH = 123

question: What is the ratio of male to female patients among all those with abnormal uric acid counts?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 8.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 6.5 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID

question: Please list the IDs of the patients with no thrombosis and an abnormal level of creatinine phosphokinase.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Thrombosis = 0 AND T1.CPK < 250

question: Which molecule consisted of Sulphur atom with double bond?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element = 's' AND T2.bond_type = '='

question: Identify by their ID the molecules in which there is carbon.
original_query: SELECT T.molecule_id FROM atom AS T WHERE T.element = 'c'

question: In the non-carcinogenic molecules, how many contain chlorine atoms?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.element = 'cl' AND T1.label = '-'

question: Indicate the molecule id is belonging to the TR000_1_2 bond that has the first atom named TR000_1.
original_query: SELECT T2.molecule_id, T2.bond_id, T1.atom_id FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR000_1' AND T2.bond_id = 'TR000_1_2'

question: What atoms are connected in single type bonds?
original_query: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '-'

question: What is the percentage of carcinogenic molecules in triple type bonds?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#'

question: Identify whether the molecule that contains atom TR001_1 is carcinogenic.
original_query: SELECT T2.label AS flag_carcinogenic FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR001_1'

question: Name chemical elements that form a bond TR001_10_11.
original_query: SELECT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'

question: How many single bonds are there in the list?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T.bond_id) FROM bond AS T WHERE T.bond_type = '-'

question: List out the atom id that belongs to the TR346 molecule and how many bond type can be created by this molecule?
original_query: SELECT T1.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_type),T1.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR000' GROUP BY T1.atom_id, T2.bond_type

question: Which toxic element can be found in the molecule TR151?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T.element FROM atom AS T WHERE T.molecule_id = 'TR151'

question: List the bond type and the bond ID of the atom 45.
original_query: SELECT T1.bond_type, T1.bond_id FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE SUBSTR(T2.atom_id, 7, 2) = '45'

question: What is the percentage of carbon in double-bond molecules?
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.element = 'c' THEN T1.atom_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '='

question: What is the total number of molecules with double bonded oxygen?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '=' AND T1.element = 'o'

question: Find the percentage of atoms with single bond.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T.bond_type = '-' THEN T.bond_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T.bond_id) FROM bond t

question: Please list top two bonds that happened with the molecule TR006 in alphabetical order.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR006' ORDER BY T2.bond_id LIMIT 2

question: How many molecules have a triple bond type?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T WHERE T.bond_type = '#'

question: What are the labels for TR000, TR001 and TR002?
original_query: SELECT molecule_id, T.label FROM molecule AS T WHERE T.molecule_id IN ('TR000', 'TR001', 'TR002')

question: Determine the bond type that is formed in the chemical compound containing element Carbon.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.bond_type FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element = 'c'

question: Identify the atoms belong to the molecule with ID between TR010 to TR050 that contain the element carbon.
original_query: SELECT T.atom_id FROM atom AS T WHERE T.molecule_id BETWEEN 'TR010' AND 'TR050' AND T.element = 'c'

question: What are the atoms that can bond with the atom that has the element lead?
original_query: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 'pb'

question: What type of bond is there between the atoms TR004_8 and TR004_20?
original_query: SELECT T1.bond_type FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T2.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND T2.atom_id2 = 'TR004_20' OR T2.atom_id2 = 'TR004_8' AND T2.atom_id = 'TR004_20'

question: How many bonds which involved atom 12 does molecule TR009 have?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.bond_id) FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR009' AND T2.atom_id = T1.molecule_id || '_1' AND T2.atom_id2 = T1.molecule_id || '_2'

question: Among the molecules between TR004 to TR010, how many of them has single bonds?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T WHERE T.molecule_id BETWEEN 'TR004' AND 'TR010' AND T.bond_type = '-'

question: Is molecule TR000 is carcinogenic or not?
original_query: SELECT label FROM molecule AS T WHERE T.molecule_id = 'TR000'

question: Name the elements that comprise the atoms of bond TR001_2_4.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_2_4'

question: What type of label is not on molecules with atoms with tin?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.label FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element != 'sn'

question: What are the bond IDs that have the same atom ID 2 of TR000_2?
original_query: SELECT T.bond_id FROM connected AS T WHERE T.atom_id2 = 'TR000_2'

question: What is the element of toxicology for the atom with the ID of TR000_1?
original_query: SELECT T.element FROM atom AS T WHERE T.atom_id = 'TR000_1'

question: How many of the single bond type molecules are non-carcinogenic?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '-' AND T1.bond_type = '-'

question: What is the type of bond that molecule TR000 has when involved in any bonds?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T.bond_type FROM bond AS T WHERE T.molecule_id = 'TR000'

question: Find the triple-bonded molecules which are carcinogenic.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.molecule_id FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#' AND T2.label = '+'

question: What are the atoms of the triple bond with the molecule "TR041"?
original_query: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#' AND T3.molecule_id = 'TR041'

question: List down atom id2 for atoms with element sulfur.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 's'

question: In the molecule containing sodium atoms, how many are non-carcinogenic?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element = 'na' AND T2.label = '-'

question: Calculate the percentage of molecules containing carcinogenic compounds that element is hydrogen.
original_query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'h' AND T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

question: in molecules with triple bonds, how many of them are not carcinogenic?
