original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.ProductLine = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.FinishedGoodsFlag = 1 GROUP BY T1.ProductID ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ProductReviewID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the vendors with an average credit rating, what is the overall total due amount of purchases made by the company to the vendor that isn't preferrerd if another vendor is available?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.TotalDue) FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.VendorID WHERE T1.CreditRating = 4 AND T1.PreferredVendorStatus = 0

question: List the name and calculate its profit for product with the highest rating in review.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID ORDER BY T2.Rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the employees who are store contacts, how many of them have a title of "Mr."?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM Person WHERE PersonType = 'SC' AND Title = 'Mr.'

question: How many people reviewed for product named HL Mountain Pedal? What is the average rating?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ProductID), AVG(T2.Rating) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'HL Mountain Pedal'

question: What is the Shift start time for Shift ID No.2?
original_query: SELECT StartTime FROM Shift WHERE ShiftID = '2'

question: What is the average lead time of product ID 843? Calculate for its profit on net and indicate the full location to which the vendor is located.
original_query: SELECT T1.AverageLeadTime, T1.LastReceiptCost - T1.StandardPrice, T4.AddressLine1, T4.AddressLine2 , T4.City, T4.PostalCode FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN BusinessEntityAddress AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Address AS T4 ON T3.AddressID = T4.AddressID WHERE T1.ProductID = 843

question: What is the name style of the employee with the lowest pay rate?
original_query: SELECT T2.NameStyle FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.Rate ASC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the employees that submitted resume to Human Resource Department and got hired? State the last name.
original_query: SELECT T3.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN JobCandidate AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID IN (212, 274)

question: Who is the Vice President of Engineering and when did he join the company? Indicate his/her full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName, T1.HireDate FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 USING (BusinessEntityID) WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Vice President of Engineering'

question: What is the number of State Province of France that doesn't have a State Province Code?
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryRegionCode FROM StateProvince AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryRegion AS T2 ON T1.CountryRegionCode = T2.CountryRegionCode WHERE T2.Name = 'France' AND T1.IsOnlyStateProvinceFlag = 1

question: Please list all the vendors' usual selling prices of the product Hex Nut 5.
original_query: SELECT T1.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'Hex Nut 5' GROUP BY T1.StandardPrice ORDER BY COUNT(T1.StandardPrice) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the product stored in location 1 compartment L container 6?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductInventory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.LocationID = 1 AND T1.Shelf = 'L' AND T1.Bin = 6

question: List the name of employees who had left the company? When were they hired?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName, T2.HireDate FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.EndDate IS NOT NULL

question: What is the position of the employee with the 10th highest salary? Indicate his/her salary amount and his/her full name.
original_query: SELECT T2.JobTitle, T1.Rate, T3.FirstName, T3.MiddleName, T3.LastName FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.Rate DESC LIMIT 9, 1

question: What is the sales revenue for item number 740?
original_query: SELECT ListPrice - StandardCost FROM Product WHERE ProductID = 740

question: List the full name of all the 'Production Technician - WC50'
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 USING (BusinessEntityID) WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Production Technician - WC50' GROUP BY T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName

question: What is the location of business number 1?
original_query: SELECT T1.AddressLine1 FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityAddress AS T2 USING (AddressID) WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = 1

question: Please list 3 businesses along with their IDs that use cellphones.
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID FROM PhoneNumberType AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonPhone AS T2 ON T1.PhoneNumberTypeID = T2.PhoneNumberTypeID WHERE T1.Name = 'Cell' LIMIT 3

question: What's Kevin A Wright's email address?
original_query: SELECT T2.EmailAddress FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Kevin' AND T1.MiddleName = 'A' AND T1.LastName = 'Wright'

question: Name all person in the individual retail whose last name is 'Anderson'.
original_query: SELECT FirstName, MiddleName, LastName FROM Person WHERE LastName = 'Anderson' AND PersonType = 'IN'

question: List all of the credit cards that had expired by 2007.
original_query: SELECT CardNumber FROM CreditCard WHERE ExpYear < 2007

question: What is the cost and the product number of product with the id "888"?
original_query: SELECT T2.StandardCost, T2.ProductNumber FROM ProductCostHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductID = 888

question: Among the employees who were born before 1969, what is the work shift of the 6th oldest employee?
original_query: SELECT T3.StartTime, T3.EndTime FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Shift AS T3 ON T2.ShiftId = T3.ShiftId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) < '1969' ORDER BY T1.BirthDate LIMIT 5, 1

question: What category do Road Frames fall into?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductSubcategory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductCategoryID = T2.ProductCategoryID WHERE T1.Name = 'Road Frames'

question: What is the total profit all transactions with product ID 827?
original_query: SELECT SUM((T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost) * T2.Quantity) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductID = 827

question: Did Rachel Valdez complete her sales task?
original_query: SELECT T1.Bonus FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.FirstName = 'Rachel' AND T2.LastName = 'Valdez'

question: What is the total shipment by "cargo transport 5" cost of all purchase orders created on 12/14/2011?
original_query: SELECT SUM(t2.freight) FROM ShipMethod AS t1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader AS t2 ON t1.shipmethodid = t2.shipmethodid WHERE t1.name = 'cargo transport 5' AND t2.orderdate = '2011-12-14'

question: What's Lynn N Tsoflias's job title?
original_query: SELECT T2.JobTitle FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'Lynn' AND T1.MiddleName = 'N' AND T1.LastName = 'Tsoflias'

question: Where does the person with the BusinessEntityID "5555" live?
original_query: SELECT T3.City, T3.AddressLine1 FROM BusinessEntityAddress AS T1 INNER JOIN AddressType AS T2 ON T1.AddressTypeID = T2.AddressTypeID INNER JOIN Address AS T3 ON T1.AddressID = T3.AddressID WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID = 5555 AND T2.Name = 'Home'

question: What goods were sold to customers in accordance with sales order number 43660?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.SalesOrderID = 43660

question: How many discount are of the type "Excess Inventory"?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(SpecialOfferID) FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Type = 'Excess Inventory'

question: Which vendor's selling price for Hex Nut 5 is the lowest, please give the vendor's name.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.Name = 'Hex Nut 5' ORDER BY T1.StandardPrice LIMIT 1

question: List the purchase order whereby all received quantity were rejected? Name those product.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.RejectedQty = T2.ReceivedQty AND T2.RejectedQty <> 0

question: How many product maintenance documents are private?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DocumentNode) FROM Document WHERE DocumentSummary IS NULL

question: What is contact Type ID No.16 represent for?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM ContactType WHERE ContactTypeID = '16'

question: Which chromoly steel product model has AdventureWorks saved in English?
original_query: SELECT T1.ProductModelID FROM ProductModelProductDescriptionCulture AS T1 INNER JOIN Culture AS T2 USING (cultureid) INNER JOIN ProductDescription AS T3 USING (productdescriptionid) WHERE T3.Description LIKE 'Chromoly steel%' AND T2.Name = 'English'

question: What is the profit on net of the vendor with the highest standard price? If there are two vendors of the same amount, calculate only for one vendor.
original_query: SELECT LastReceiptCost - StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor ORDER BY StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the job title of the newest employee in department 12?
original_query: SELECT T1.JobTitle FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.DepartmentID = 12 ORDER BY T2.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: In 2007, which job position was hired the most?
original_query: SELECT JobTitle FROM Employee WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', HireDate) = '2007' GROUP BY HireDate ORDER BY COUNT(JobTitle) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which sales areas are expected to have the highest yearly sales quota?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID GROUP BY T1.TerritoryID ORDER BY SUM(T1.SalesQuota) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Calculate the average length of employment for employee working in the Research and Development deparment.
original_query: SELECT AVG(STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.HireDate)) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.Name = 'Research and Development'

question: How many Minipumps have been sold?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(OrderQty) FROM SalesOrderDetail WHERE ProductID IN ( SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Name = 'Minipump' )

question: Among all products without any rejected quantity, which product has the highest line total? State the product name and unit price.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.UnitPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.RejectedQty = 0 ORDER BY T2.LineTotal DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many employees in the Information Service department work the evening shift?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.BusinessEntityID) FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID INNER JOIN Shift AS T3 ON T2.ShiftId = T3.ShiftId WHERE T1.Name = 'Information Services' AND T3.Name = 'Evening'

question: Please give the additional contact information of the oldest employee with the jod position of sales person.
original_query: SELECT T2.AdditionalContactInfo FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE PersonType = 'SP' ORDER BY T1.BirthDate ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many products that take more than 2 days to make are out of stock?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.ProductID) FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.OnOrderQty IS NULL OR T1.OnOrderQty = 0

question: How many materials still need to be assembled and have a depth of 2 between each component and their parent product?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BillOfMaterials WHERE BOMLevel = 2 AND EndDate IS NULL

question: For the employee who has been hired the latest, what is his or her pay rate?
original_query: SELECT T1.Rate FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T2.HireDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please provide contact details of all Marketing Managers. State their name and phone number.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName, T2.PhoneNumber FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonPhone AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Employee AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.JobTitle = 'Marketing Manager'

question: List the locations ids, compartments and containers for the Lock Ring
original_query: SELECT T2.LocationID, T2.Shelf, T2.Bin FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name LIKE 'Lock Ring'

question: How many products using "roadster_black_small.gif" as the thumbnail photo?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.ProductID) FROM ProductPhoto AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductProductPhoto AS T2 ON T1.ProductPhotoID = T2.ProductPhotoID WHERE T1.LargePhotoFileName = 'roadster_black_large.gif'

question: What kind of transaction type for the "HL Road Frame - Black, 48" order happened in 2012/12/13?
original_query: SELECT T1.TransactionType FROM TransactionHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'HL Road Frame - Black, 48' AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d',T1.TransactionDate) = '2013-07-31'

question: Find the vendor with the least average lead time for Product ID 348.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Vendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.ProductID = 348 ORDER BY T1.AverageLeadTime ASC LIMIT 1

question: Name all products and total quantity for each item for shopping cart ID 14951.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Quantity FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ShoppingCartItem AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.ShoppingCartID = 14951

question: Which product allows the company to make the highest profit on a single item among those that are the fastest to manufacture? Indicate the rating of the product if there any.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Rating FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.DaysToManufacture = ( SELECT DaysToManufacture FROM Product ORDER BY DaysToManufacture LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many vendors only consented to move on with the 500 to 15000 piece order in terms of quality?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ProductVendor WHERE MinOrderQty > 500 AND MaxOrderQty < 15000

question: What company has a Colonial Voice card that expired in March 2005?
original_query: SELECT T2.BusinessEntityID FROM CreditCard AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.CreditCardID = T2.CreditCardID WHERE T1.CardType = 'ColonialVoice' AND T1.ExpMonth = 3 AND T1.ExpYear = 2005

question: What is the full address of address number 11906?
original_query: SELECT AddressLine1, AddressLine2 FROM Address WHERE AddressID = 11906

question: What is the projected sales quota amount in 2013 and sales YTD amount for sales person with business entity ID 275?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.SalesQuota) FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID = 275 AND STRFTIME('%Y', QuotaDate) = '2013'

question: Please list the names of the products that have over 3 price changes.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductListPriceHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T2.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ListPrice) > 3

question: Among the products that get over at least 1 review, how many of them are from the mountain product line?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.ProductLine = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T1.ProductID HAVING COUNT(T1.ProductReviewID) > 1

question: Of the products that has a reorder inventory point of no more than 600, how many manufactured in-house products that takes 1 day to manufacture with BOM Level 4 are there?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.ProductID) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN BillOfMaterials AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductAssemblyID WHERE T1.MakeFlag = 1 AND T1.DaysToManufacture = 1 AND T2.BOMLevel = 4 AND T1.ReorderPoint <= 600

question: What are locations of the work order "35493"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM WorkOrderRouting AS T1 INNER JOIN Location AS T2 ON T1.LocationID = T2.LocationID WHERE T1.WorkOrderID = 35493

question: What is the product description of Headset Ball Bearings?
original_query: SELECT T1.Description FROM ProductDescription AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 WHERE T2.Name = 'Headset Ball Bearings' AND T1.productDescriptionID = T2.ProductID

question: How many of the workers who started working in 2009 are from the Production Department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.BusinessEntityID) FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID WHERE T2.StartDate >= '2009-01-01' AND T2.StartDate < '2010-01-01' AND T1.Name = 'Production'

question: Which job title has the lowest pay?
original_query: SELECT T1.JobTitle FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T2.Rate ASC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the business entity ID who did not achieved projected yearly sales quota in 2013.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.QuotaDate) = '2013' AND T1.SalesQuota < T1.SalesLastYear

question: When did the company hired its first Accountant?
original_query: SELECT MIN(HireDate) FROM Employee WHERE JobTitle = 'Accountant'

question: What is the hashed password of David Bradley?
original_query: SELECT T2.PasswordHash FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Password AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.LastName = 'Bradley'

question: Average of the last receipt cost of the products whose average lead time is 60 days.
original_query: SELECT SUM(LastReceiptCost) / COUNT(ProductID) FROM ProductVendor WHERE AverageLeadTime = 60

question: Which employee has been in the Engineering Department the longest? Please give his or her firstname and lastname.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T3.Name = 'Engineering' ORDER BY T2.EndDate - T2.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which product gets the most reviews?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T1.ProductID ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ProductReviewID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Sum the total number of products rejected for having a trim length that is too long.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.ScrappedQty) FROM ScrapReason AS T1 INNER JOIN WorkOrder AS T2 ON T1.ScrapReasonID = T2.ScrapReasonID WHERE T1.Name = 'Trim length too long'

question: Which reviewer gives the biggest number of the highest rating?
original_query: SELECT ReviewerName FROM ProductReview WHERE Rating = ( SELECT Rating FROM ProductReview ORDER BY Rating DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which product has the highest standard cost?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Product ORDER BY StandardCost DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total sick leave hours of employees who do not wish to receive any e-mail promotion?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.SickLeaveHours) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.EmailPromotion = 0

question: With 100$, how many Cable Lock can you buy?
original_query: SELECT 100 / T2.ListPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductListPriceHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'Cable Lock'

question: Names the Sales Representative with the highest year to date sales.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.SalesYTD DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all product name from Australia Bike Retailer order by product ID.
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Product AS T3 ON T2.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'Australia Bike Retailer'

question: Name the vendor who has the shortest average lead time for Product ID 319.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.ProductID = 319 ORDER BY T2.AverageLeadTime LIMIT 1

question: List all product names that are high in quality. Please also state its selling price.
original_query: SELECT Name, ListPrice FROM Product WHERE Class = 'H'

question: Compare the average pay rate of male and female employees.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Rate) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY T1.Gender

question: Which sales person achieved the highest sales YTD? What is the projected yearly sales quota in 2011 for this person?
original_query: SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID, SUM(T1.SalesQuota) FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.QuotaDate) = '2011' GROUP BY T1.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY SUM(T1.SalesYTD) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the reviewers who have given the highest rating for a medium class, women's product.
original_query: SELECT T1.ReviewerName FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Class = 'M' AND T2.Style = 'W' AND T1.Rating = 5

question: List the product name with more than 5 quantity in the shopping cart.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ShoppingCartItem AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Quantity > 5

question: How many active employees do not wish to receive e-mail promotions?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.EmailPromotion = 1

question: What is the average pay rate of the employees who worked in the Engineering Departmentin 2007?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T3.Rate) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.Name = 'Engineering' AND STRFTIME('%Y', EndDate) > '2007' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.StartDate) < '2007'

question: What is the phone number of the person with id "12597"?
original_query: SELECT PhoneNumber FROM PersonPhone WHERE BusinessEntityID = 12597

question: How many accounts have an address that is too long?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Address WHERE AddressLine2 <> ''

question: Add the number of businesses that indicate their home address as their address and those whose address corresponds to the shipping address.
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Name = 'Home' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) , SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Name = 'Shipping' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM BusinessEntityAddress AS T1 INNER JOIN AddressType AS T2 ON T1.AddressTypeID = T2.AddressTypeID

question: What is the surname suffix of the employee who works as a store contact and has the longest sick leave hours?
original_query: SELECT T2.Suffix FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'SP' ORDER BY T1.SickLeaveHours DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of businesses in the Northwest US have forecasted annual sales of above 300,000?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SalesQuota > 300000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesTerritory AS T2 ON T1.TerritoryID = T2.TerritoryID WHERE T2.CountryRegionCode = 'US' AND T2.Name = 'Northwest'

question: List all the purchase order ids of the vendor with a below average rating.
original_query: SELECT T2.PurchaseOrderID FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderHeader AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.VendorID WHERE T1.CreditRating = 5

question: Please list any 3 product numbers with the lowest standard cost.
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM ProductCostHistory ORDER BY StandardCost ASC LIMIT 3

question: For the employees who have the highest pay frequency, please list their vacation hours.
original_query: SELECT T2.VacationHours FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = ( SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM EmployeePayHistory ORDER BY Rate DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Among the employees born before 1980 , how many of them are single?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee WHERE MaritalStatus = 's' AND BirthDate < '1980-1-1'

question: What is the scrap reason for work order "57788"?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM WorkOrder AS T1 INNER JOIN ScrapReason AS T2 ON T1.ScrapReasonID = T2.ScrapReasonID WHERE T1.WorkOrderID = 57788

question: What are the color of products that were reviewed?
original_query: SELECT T1.Color FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductID = 709 OR 937 OR 798

question: What rating did Jill give for HL Mountain Pedal?
original_query: SELECT T1.Rating FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ReviewerName = 'Jill' AND T2.Name = 'HL Mountain Pedal'

question: List all the work orders that is related to the Down Tube.
original_query: SELECT T2.WorkOrderID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN WorkOrder AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'Down Tube'

question: Please give all the list prices of the product LL Fork.
original_query: SELECT T2.ListPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductListPriceHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'LL Fork'

question: Please list the products that are out of stock and purchased in house.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.MakeFlag = 0 AND (T1.OnOrderQty IS NULL OR T1.OnOrderQty = 0)

question: Which is a high quality product but with the lowest transacted quantity?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Class = 'H' ORDER BY T2.Quantity ASC LIMIT 1

question: Who is the oldest married male? State his job title.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName, T1.JobTitle FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'M' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'M' ORDER BY T1.BirthDate LIMIT 1

question: What is the name of the supplier number 1492?
original_query: SELECT NAME FROM Vendor WHERE BusinessEntityID = 1492

question: What is the highest vendor's selling price for Hex Nut 5?
original_query: SELECT T1.StandardPrice FROM ProductVendor AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Name = 'Hex Nut 5' ORDER BY T1.StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: What type of transaction was made with the only yellow product, size 62 and with a minimum inventory stock of 500 units?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.TransactionType FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Size = 62 AND T1.Color = 'Yellow' AND T1.SafetyStockLevel = 500

question: Please list the names of all the store contact employees whose credit cards expired in 2007.
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T3 ON T2.CreditCardID = T3.CreditCardID WHERE T3.ExpYear = 2007 AND T1.PersonType = 'SC'

question: How many of the work orders didn’t meet the due date?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(WorkOrderID) FROM WorkOrder WHERE EndDate > DueDate

question: How many people work in the finance department?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.BusinessEntityID) FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID WHERE T1.Name = 'Finance'

question: How much profit can the company gained from selling two high class black Road Bikes with a size of 58?
original_query: SELECT 2 * (T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE T1.Class = 'H' AND T1.Color = 'Black' AND T1.Size = 58 AND T2.Name = 'Road Bikes'

question: Jill ranked which medium-quality class product as the highest, and how long will it take the company to manufacture such a product?
original_query: SELECT T1.DaysToManufacture FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Rating = 5 AND T1.Class = 'M' ORDER BY T2.Rating LIMIT 1

question: What is the longest assembly item duration for bicycles?
original_query: SELECT JULIANDAY(EndDate) - JULIANDAY(StartDate) FROM BillOfMaterials ORDER BY JULIANDAY(EndDate) - JULIANDAY(StartDate) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What categories of offers qualify for group discounts for resellers?
original_query: SELECT Type FROM SpecialOffer WHERE Category = 'Reseller'

question: How much is the average salary of female employees in comparison to male employees?
original_query: SELECT AVG(T2.Rate) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.Gender = 'F'

question: Lists all companies by BusinessEntityID that increased their current year sales by more than 60% over last year's sales and have a bonus greater than 3,000.
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson WHERE SalesYTD > SalesLastYear + SalesLastyear * 0.6 AND Bonus > 3000

question: Who owns the email address "regina7@adventure-works.com"?
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName FROM EmailAddress AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.EmailAddress = 'regina7@adventure-works.com'

question: What is the cost for the product "847"?
original_query: SELECT StandardCost FROM ProductCostHistory WHERE ProductID = 847

question: How many people with the name Alex are single and occupying organization level of 1?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.FirstName = 'Alex' AND T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' AND T1.OrganizationLevel = 1

question: What is the total profit gained by the company from the product that has the highest amount of quantity ordered from online customers? Indicate the name of the product.
original_query: SELECT (T2.ListPrice - T2.StandardCost) * SUM(T1.Quantity), T2.Name FROM ShoppingCartItem AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T1.ProductID, T2.Name, T2.ListPrice, T2.StandardCost, T1.Quantity ORDER BY SUM(T1.Quantity) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the difference between the actual manufacturing cost of product number 818 and the estimated manufacturing cost?
original_query: SELECT PlannedCost - ActualCost FROM WorkOrderRouting WHERE ProductID = 818

question: How many products were on the LL Road Frame Sale?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ProductID) FROM SpecialOffer AS T1 INNER JOIN SpecialOfferProduct AS T2 ON T1.SpecialOfferID = T2.SpecialOfferID WHERE T1.Description = 'LL Road Frame Sale'

question: Identifies the ID number of the customer whose sales order for 32 units had a unit price of 35.
original_query: SELECT T2.CustomerID FROM SalesOrderDetail AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer AS T2 WHERE T1.UnitPrice = 35 AND T1.OrderQty = 32

question: What is the average total due price of products with approved status?
original_query: SELECT SUM(TotalDue) / COUNT(TotalDue) FROM PurchaseOrderHeader WHERE Status = 2

question: What is the business ID of the person who has made the most sales total year to date?
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM SalesPerson ORDER BY SalesYTD DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the employees whose pay frequencies are the highest, how many of them are married?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.MaritalStatus = 'M' AND T1.PayFrequency = ( SELECT PayFrequency FROM EmployeePayHistory ORDER BY PayFrequency DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the name of the state that Racine belongs to?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Address AS T1 INNER JOIN StateProvince AS T2 ON T1.StateProvinceID = T2.StateProvinceID WHERE T1.City = 'Racine'

question: What is the age of the oldest Marketing Specialist by 12/31/2015 and what is his/her hourly rate?
original_query: SELECT 2015 - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate), T2.Rate FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Marketing Specialist' ORDER BY 2015 - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many times is married non sales employees against single non-sales employees?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MaritalStatus = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'EM'

question: Who is the company's highest-paid single female employee? Include her full name and job title.
original_query: SELECT T3.FirstName, T3.MiddleName, T3.LastName, T1.JobTitle FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.MaritalStatus = 'S' AND T1.Gender = 'F' ORDER BY T2.Rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the sales tax records charged by multiple types of tax?
original_query: SELECT SalesTaxRateID FROM SalesTaxRate WHERE Name LIKE '%+%'

question: How frequently do the employee with the least number of sick leave hours get paid?
original_query: SELECT T2.PayFrequency FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeePayHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.SickLeaveHours ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the highest amount of difference between the ordered quantity and actual quantity received in a single purchase order and to which vendor was the purchase order made?
original_query: SELECT T2.OrderQty - T2.ReceivedQty, VendorID FROM PurchaseOrderHeader AS T1 INNER JOIN PurchaseOrderDetail AS T2 ON T1.PurchaseOrderID = T2.PurchaseOrderID ORDER BY T2.OrderQty - T2.ReceivedQty DESC LIMIT 1

question: Name the oldest employee who is working on night shift. How old is the employee?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.LastName , STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', BirthDate) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.ShiftId = 3 ORDER BY STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', BirthDate) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the profit for the product "792"?
original_query: SELECT T1.ListPrice - T2.StandardCost FROM ProductListPriceHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductID = 792

question: How many shipments by truck were made?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ShipMethod AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesOrderHeader AS T2 USING (ShipMethodID) WHERE T1.Name = 'XRQ - TRUCK GROUND'

question: How many employees who began working in 2009 or later had night shifts?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Shift AS T2 ON T1.ShiftId = T2.ShiftId WHERE T2.ShiftId = 3 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.StartTime) >= '2009'

question: Please list the phone numbers of all the store contacts.
original_query: SELECT T2.PhoneNumber FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN PersonPhone AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.PersonType = 'SC'

question: What is the average profit of all the low class universal road frames? Indicate how many variety of sizes are there and the available colors.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Size) , COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Style) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductSubcategory AS T2 ON T1.ProductSubcategoryID = T2.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE T1.Class = 'L' AND T2.Name = 'Road Frames' GROUP BY T1.Class, T1.Color

question: How many vendors are having their products ordered with an average delivery time of 25 days?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor WHERE AverageLeadTime = 25

question: Which department has the most number of night shifts?
original_query: SELECT T3.Name FROM Shift AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.ShiftId = T2.ShiftId INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID GROUP BY T2.DepartmentID ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Name = 'Night') DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the product with the most profit?
original_query: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM ProductListPriceHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID ORDER BY T1.ListPrice - T2.StandardCost DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the the average percentage of profit for the all the product?
original_query: SELECT AVG((T1.ListPrice - T2.StandardCost) * 100 / T2.StandardCost) FROM ProductListPriceHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID

question: For all the employees that have left the Engineering Department, what is the average time of their stay?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(365 * (STRFTIME('%Y', T1.EndDate) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.StartDate)) + 30 * (STRFTIME('%m', T1.EndDate) - STRFTIME('%m', T1.StartDate)) + STRFTIME('%d', T1.EndDate) - STRFTIME('%d', T1.StartDate)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID WHERE T2.Name = 'Engineering' AND T1.EndDate IS NOT NULL

question: List all the names of the stores assigned to the sales person with the id "277".
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Store WHERE SalesPersonID = 277

question: Which product has the highest profit on net? State the product name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID ORDER BY T2.LastReceiptCost - T2.StandardPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the salespeople's email addresses?
original_query: SELECT T2.EmailAddress FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.PersonType = 'SP'

question: How many employees working in the Engineering Department in 2007 would have their credit cards expired in the same year?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID INNER JOIN PersonCreditCard AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN CreditCard AS T4 ON T3.CreditCardID = T4.CreditCardID WHERE T4.ExpYear = 2007 AND T2.Name = 'Engineering'

question: Where can I find the Valley Bicycle Specialists store?
original_query: SELECT T2.AddressLine1, T2.AddressLine2 FROM BusinessEntityAddress AS T1 INNER JOIN Address AS T2 ON T1.AddressID = T2.AddressID INNER JOIN Store AS T3 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T3.Name = 'Valley Bicycle Specialists'

question: For all phone numbers, what percentage of the total is cell phone?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Name = 'Cell' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.Name) FROM PersonPhone AS T1 INNER JOIN PhoneNumberType AS T2 ON T1.PhoneNumberTypeID = T2.PhoneNumberTypeID

question: What is the job position of the oldest employee?
original_query: SELECT T2.PersonType FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY T1.BirthDate ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which product cost the least in 2013?
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM ProductCostHistory WHERE StartDate LIKE '2013%' ORDER BY StandardCost LIMIT 1

question: Among the active male employees, how many of them are paid with the highest frequency?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.BusinessEntityID) FROM EmployeePayHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.CurrentFlag = 1 AND T2.Gender = 'M' AND T1.PayFrequency = 2

question: What's Emma H Harris's Business Entity ID number?
original_query: SELECT BusinessEntityID FROM Person WHERE FirstName = 'Emma' AND LastName = 'Harris'

question: Please list the family names of any employees whose middle names begin with C.
original_query: SELECT LastName FROM Person WHERE PersonType = 'EM' AND MiddleName LIKE 'C%'

question: What is the current status of the order with the highest shipping cost?
original_query: SELECT Status FROM SalesOrderHeader ORDER BY Freight DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the price for the AWC Logo Cap?
original_query: SELECT T2.ListPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductListPriceHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Name = 'AWC Logo Cap'

question: List all the products with lower than average cost.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.ProductID FROM ProductCostHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.StandardCost < ( SELECT SUM(StandardCost) / COUNT(ProductID) FROM Product )

question: What is the email address of the Facilities Manager?
original_query: SELECT T3.EmailAddress FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN EmailAddress AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Facilities Manager'

question: What is the currency of Brazil?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Currency AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryRegionCurrency AS T2 ON T1.CurrencyCode = T2.CurrencyCode INNER JOIN CountryRegion AS T3 ON T2.CountryRegionCode = T3.CountryRegionCode WHERE T3.Name = 'Brazil'

question: Which work order transaction number has the highest product quantity?
original_query: SELECT TransactionID FROM TransactionHistory WHERE TransactionType = 'W' ORDER BY Quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the names of the products that get over 10 reviews and a salable.
original_query: SELECT T2.NAME FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.FinishedGoodsFlag = 1 GROUP BY T2.NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T1.comments) > 10

question: Which store sales person was reently hired? Indicate his/her full name and gender.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.MiddleName, T2.LastName, T1.Gender FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.PersonType = 'SP'

question: Which department has a worker who just recently started working?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.DepartmentID = T2.DepartmentID ORDER BY T2.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which product has the highest price in 2012?
original_query: SELECT ProductID FROM ProductListPriceHistory WHERE StartDate LIKE '2012%' ORDER BY ListPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which role has the most common contact among businesses?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM ContactType AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityContact AS T2 ON T1.ContactTypeID = T2.ContactTypeID GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Name) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the the percentage of profit for the product "858"?
original_query: SELECT (T1.ListPrice - T2.StandardCost) * 100 / T2.StandardCost FROM ProductListPriceHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductID = 858

question: What is the class of the product with the most reviews?
original_query: SELECT T2.Class FROM ProductReview AS T1 INNER JOIN Product AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID GROUP BY T2.Class ORDER BY COUNT(T1.ProductReviewID) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many transactions are there for product under the Mountain line?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.TransactionID) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ProductLine = 'M'

question: How much is the amount to be paid by the company for the purchase order with the third highest freight amount?
original_query: SELECT TotalDue FROM PurchaseOrderHeader ORDER BY Freight DESC LIMIT 2, 1

question: What job is person number 322 currently holding?
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM ContactType AS T1 INNER JOIN BusinessEntityContact AS T2 ON T1.ContactTypeID = T2.ContactTypeID WHERE T2.BusinessEntityID = 332

question: How much are the minimum orders of the vendors that are no longer used by the company?
original_query: SELECT T2.MinOrderQty FROM Vendor AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T1.ActiveFlag = 0 ORDER BY T2.MinOrderQty LIMIT 1

question: When did the Senior Tool Designer, who was 33 years old at the time he was hired, stopped working in the Engineering department?
original_query: SELECT T2.EndDate FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN EmployeeDepartmentHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Department AS T3 ON T2.DepartmentID = T3.DepartmentID WHERE T1.JobTitle = 'Senior Tool Designer' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.HireDate) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) = 33 AND T2.EndDate IS NOT NULL

question: Please tell the meaning of CultureID "fr".
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Culture WHERE CultureID = 'fr'

question: Which is Business Entity ID No.13626's phone number type?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM PersonPhone AS T1 INNER JOIN PhoneNumberType AS T2 USING (PhoneNumberTypeID) WHERE T1.BusinessEntityID = 13626

question: State the employee who are born in or after 1970 and with the least sick leave hour.
original_query: SELECT T2.FirstName, T2.LastName FROM Employee AS T1 INNER JOIN Person AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.BirthDate) > '1970' ORDER BY T1.SickLeaveHours LIMIT 1

question: How much is the tax amount of the purchase order with the biggest tax amount? Indicate the purchase order ID.
original_query: SELECT TaxAmt, PurchaseOrderID FROM PurchaseOrderHeader ORDER BY TaxAmt DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many sales orders did the salesperson David R. Campbell create?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.TotalDue) FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesOrderHeader AS T2 ON T1.ModifiedDate = T2.DueDate WHERE T1.FirstName = 'David' AND T1.MiddleName = 'R' AND T1.LastName = 'Campbell' AND T1.PersonType = 'SP'

question: Provide all the transactions whereby the quantiy is more than 10,000 pieces. State the product name and the selling price.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name, T1.ListPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN TransactionHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Quantity > 10000

question: What is the full name of the Document Control Manager who is in charge of all Level 1 approved documents?
original_query: SELECT T1.FirstName, T1.MiddleName, T1.LastName FROM Person AS T1 INNER JOIN Employee AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Document AS T3 ON T3.Owner = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE T2.JobTitle = 'Document Control Manager' AND T3.DocumentLevel = 1 AND T3.Status = 2 GROUP BY T1.FirstName, T1.MiddleName, T1.LastName

question: To the products which could make the profit as 21.9037, what were their list price after October of 2012?
original_query: SELECT T1.ListPrice FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductListPriceHistory AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.ListPrice - T1.StandardCost > 21.9037 AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', T2.StartDate) >= '2012-10-01'

question: How many cities are there in the country with the surface area of 652090?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T1.Name) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.SurfaceArea = 652090 GROUP BY T2.Name

question: List down the name of countries whereby English is their official language.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T'

question: Provide the language used by the people of Belize.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Belize'

question: List the names of the country that officially uses English as their language.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.IsOfficial = 'T' AND T1.Language = 'English'

question: In English speaking countries, provide the difference between the number of countries with republic and constitutional monarchy as its government form.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.GovernmentForm = 'Republic') - COUNT(T1.GovernmentForm = 'ConstitutionalMonarchy') FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English'

question: Among the countries that have GNP greater than 1500, what is the percentage of the countries have English as its language?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Language = 'English', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Code) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.GNP > 1500

question: List all the languages used in Europe.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Continent = 'Europe'

question: Among the cities with a population between 140000 and 150000, list the country that has life expectancy greater than 80% life expectancy of all countries.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Population BETWEEN 140000 AND 150000 GROUP BY T2.Name, LifeExpectancy HAVING LifeExpectancy < ( SELECT AVG(LifeExpectancy) FROM Country ) * 0.8

question: Give the head of the state of the country with the lowest percentage use of English as their language.
original_query: SELECT T1.HeadOfState FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English' ORDER BY T2.Percentage LIMIT 1

question: List down the cities that belong to the country with a life expectancy of 66.4.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.LifeExpectancy = 66.4

question: How many cities are there in England?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM City WHERE District = 'England'

question: In which continent does the country with the smallest surface area belongs?
original_query: SELECT Continent FROM Country ORDER BY SurfaceArea LIMIT 1

question: Which country has the shortest life expectancy?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY LifeExpectancy LIMIT 1

question: What city in Russia has the least population?
original_query: SELECT T2.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Russian Federation' ORDER BY T2.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the surface area of the country where Sutton Coldfield city belongs?
original_query: SELECT T1.SurfaceArea FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name = 'Sutton Coldfield'

question: Among the countries that use Italian as their language, what is the percentage of republic countries?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.GovernmentForm = 'Republic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Language = 'Italian'

question: How many cities are in the Philippines?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM City WHERE Name = 'PHL'

question: Provide the name, capital city and its official language of the country with the highest life expectancy.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T1.Capital, T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN City AS T3 ON T1.Code = T3.CountryCode WHERE T2.IsOfficial = 'T' ORDER BY T1.LifeExpectancy DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the life expectancy of the people living in Calama city?
original_query: SELECT T2.LifeExpectancy FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Calama'

question: Who is the head of state of the country where the city of Pyongyang is under?
original_query: SELECT T1.HeadOfState FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name = 'Pyongyang'

question: List down the languages of the countries that have population below 8000.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Population < 8000

question: What are the districts that belong to the country with the largest surface area?
original_query: SELECT T1.District FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = ( SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY SurfaceArea DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the official language of China?
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'China' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T'

question: Who is the head of the state where the most crowded city belongs?
original_query: SELECT T1.HeadOfState FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T2.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What city has the highest population?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM City ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all the official and unofficial languages used by the country that declared its independence in 1830.
original_query: SELECT T2.Language, T2.IsOfficial FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndepYear = 1830 GROUP BY T2.Language, T2.IsOfficial

question: Give the population of the country where Queimados city belongs.
original_query: SELECT T2.Population FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T1.Name = 'Queimados'

question: What is the year of independence of Brunei?
original_query: SELECT IndepYear FROM Country WHERE Name = 'Brunei'

question: What is the local name of Ukraine that they are also known for?
original_query: SELECT LocalName FROM Country WHERE Name = 'Ukraine'

question: Provide the name, located country, and life expectancy of the most populated city
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Code, T1.LifeExpectancy FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode ORDER BY T2.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: Within the 5 most crowded cities in the world, which country has the most languages used?
original_query: SELECT Name FROM ( SELECT T1.Name, T2.Language FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode GROUP BY T1.Name, T1.Population, T2.Language ORDER BY T1.Population DESC ) AS T3 GROUP BY t3.Name ORDER BY COUNT(Language) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the countries and their official languages in Antarctica.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name, T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Continent = 'Antarctica' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T'

question: List any five countries which use English as an official language.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language = 'English' AND T2.IsOfficial = 'T' LIMIT 5

question: In countries with constitutional monarchy, what is the percentage of cities located in the district of England?
original_query: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District = 'England' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.GovernmentForm = 'Constitutional Monarchy'

question: List down all cities of China.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.Name = 'China'

question: How many languages are there in the country where Tocantins district belongs?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Language) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.District = 'Tocantins'

question: What are the cities for country called "Â´Uman" in local name.
original_query: SELECT T1.Name FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.LocalName = 'Â´Uman'

question: What is the GNP growth rate by the country of Shanghai?
original_query: SELECT CAST((T1.GNP - T1.GNPOld) AS REAL) / T1.GNPOld FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name = 'Shanghai'

question: List down the languages of countries with an independence year between 1980 to 1995.
original_query: SELECT T2.Name, T1.Language FROM CountryLanguage AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.IndepYear BETWEEN 1980 AND 1995

question: Write down the name of the largest population country.
original_query: SELECT Name FROM Country ORDER BY Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many countries have a life expectancy of 75.1?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Country WHERE LifeExpectancy = 75.1

question: What is the percentage of English used in Australia?
original_query: SELECT T2.Percentage FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Australia' AND T2.Language = 'English'

question: What is the life expectancy of residents in the most crowded city?
original_query: SELECT T2.LifeExpectancy FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code ORDER BY T1.Population DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the official languages of the country where you can find the city with the least population?
original_query: SELECT T2.Language FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IsOfficial = 'T' ORDER BY T1.Population ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the districts that belong to the country with the lowest surface area?
original_query: SELECT T1.District FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code ORDER BY T2.SurfaceArea ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the capital city of the Philippines?
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN City AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Philipiines'

question: How many unofficial languages are used in Italy?
original_query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.IsOfficial = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name = 'Italy'

question: How many cities are there in the country ruled by Kostis Stefanopoulos?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Name) FROM City AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Code WHERE T2.HeadOfState = 'Kostis Stefanopoulos'

question: Describe the capital city and languages used in the country with the shortest life expectancy.
original_query: SELECT T1.Capital, T2.Language FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryLanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN City AS T3 ON T1.Code = T3.CountryCode ORDER BY T1.LifeExpectancy LIMIT 1

question: What country have its data estimated based on regression?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ShortName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Estimates are based on regression.'

question: What is the ratio between country with the highest number of infant deaths in 1971 and the lowest number of infant deaths in 1971? List the country with the highest number of infant deaths in 1971 and the lowest number of infant deaths in 1971.
original_query: SELECT CAST(MAX(value) AS REAL) / MIN(value) FROM indicators WHERE indicatorname = 'Number of infant deaths' AND year = '1971' UNION ALL SELECT countryname FROM ( SELECT countryname, MAX(value) FROM indicators WHERE indicatorname = 'Number of infant deaths' AND year = '1971' ) UNION SELECT countryname FROM ( SELECT countryname, MIN(value) FROM indicators WHERE indicatorname = 'Number of infant deaths' AND year = '1971' )

question: In which country's latest trade data and latest water withdrawal data were both updated in the year 2013? Give its long name and Alpha 2 code.
original_query: SELECT LongName, Alpha2Code FROM Country WHERE LatestTradeData = 2013 AND LatestWaterWithdrawalData = 2013

question: What is the topic of the series when the Total reserves minus gold (current US$) indicator of Haiti hit the value of 3,000,000 in 1961? Please include its series code and license type.
original_query: SELECT T2.Topic, T2.Seriescode, T2.LicenseType FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T1.Year = 1961 AND T1.CountryName = 'Haiti' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'Total reserves minus gold (current US$)' AND T1.Value = 3000000

question: What is the subject of the series SP.DYN.AMRT.MA and what does it pertain to?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Topic, T2.Description FROM Series AS T1 INNER JOIN SeriesNotes AS T2 ON T1.SeriesCode = T2.Seriescode WHERE T1.SeriesCode = 'SP.DYN.AMRT.MA'

question:
What country has the latest trade data with a series code of "SP.DYN.CDRT.IN
"? List the table name of the country.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.TableName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.LatestTradeData = 2013 AND T2.IndicatorCode = 'SP.DYN.CDRT.IN'

question: For how many consecutive years did Aruba get a footnote on the series code BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Year) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T2.Seriescode = 'BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD'

question: Which country had the highest value of indicator belongs to Private Sector & Trade: Exports topic? Please list the country name and indicator name.
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryName, T1.IndicatorName FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T2.Topic = 'Private Sector & Trade: Exports' ORDER BY T1.Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: List out the country name of lower earning countries
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.CountryName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'Low income'

question: List out the table name and currency unit of countries using series code as FP.CPI.TOTL
original_query: SELECT T1.TableName, T1.CurrencyUnit FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.SeriesCode = 'FP.CPI.TOTL'

question: What is the name of the country with the highest percentage of rural population in the overall total population? Indicate the rural population percentage of total population.
original_query: SELECT countryname, MAX(value) FROM indicators WHERE indicatorname = 'Rural population (% of total population)'

question: What's the lastest household survey in Angola and when did it take place?
original_query: SELECT LatestHouseholdSurvey, PppSurveyYear FROM Country WHERE ShortName = 'Angola'

question: Please list the countries under the lending category of the International Development Associations and have a external debt reporting finished by estimation.
original_query: SELECT ShortName, ExternalDebtReportingStatus FROM Country WHERE LendingCategory = 'IDA'

question: Which low income country has a series code of DT.DOD.DECT.CD? Name the country code of it.
original_query: SELECT T1.CountryCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'Low income' AND T2.Seriescode = 'DT.DOD.DECT.CD'

question: How much is the total urban population of middle income countries in 1960?
original_query: SELECT SUM(T2.Value) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup LIKE '%middle income' AND T2.Year = 1960 AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Urban population'

question: Which countries use Euro as their currency? List down the table name.
original_query: SELECT TableName FROM Country WHERE CurrencyUnit = 'Euro'

question: List out the table name of countries using series code as SP.DYN.TO65.MA.ZS
original_query: SELECT T1.TableName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Seriescode = 'SP.DYN.TO65.MA.ZS'

question: List out the long name of countries using series code as DT.DOD.DSTC.CD
original_query: SELECT T1.LongName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.SeriesCode = 'DT.DOD.DSTC.CD'

question: Among the countries who uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology, how many are in the Middle East & North Africa? Name the country with the highest CO2 emissions from solid fuel consumption in kiloton.
original_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CountryCode) FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' AND T2.SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology.' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions FROM solid fuel consumption (kt)' UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.CountryName FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' AND T2.SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology.' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions FROM solid fuel consumption (kt)' GROUP BY T1.CountryName ORDER BY SUM(T1.value) DESC LIMIT 1 )

question: Which country has the lowest percentage of arable land?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName LIKE 'Arable land (% of land area)' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: In Sub-Saharan Africa, how many female out-of-school children of primary school age are there in the country with the higest number of female out-of-school children of primary school age? Indicate the year of when it was recorded.
original_query: SELECT MAX(T1.value), T1.year FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Sub-Saharan Africa' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'Out-of-school children of primary school age, female (number)'

question: List out the series code of countries using Euro as their currency unit.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.SeriesCode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.CurrencyUnit = 'Euro'

question: How many footnotes have been made in year 1980 and what are the table names of these countries that made the footnotes?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T2.Description) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Year = 'YR1980' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT T1.TableName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Year = 'YR1980'

question: What is the lending category of the country with a cereal production of 6140000 metric tons for the year 1966?
original_query: SELECT T1.LendingCategory FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Cereal production (metric tons)' AND T2.Value = 6140000 AND T2.Year = 1966

question: Which country has the highest value of Merchandise imports by the reporting economy (current US$)?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName = 'Merchandise imports by the reporting economy (current US$)' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the indicator names belonging to Education: Inputs topic in 2000.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.IndicatorName FROM Footnotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.Seriescode = T2.SeriesCode WHERE T1.Year = 'YR2000' AND T2.Topic = 'Education: Inputs'

question: What are the subjects of series that have a restricted type of license?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT Topic FROM Series WHERE LicenseType = 'Restricted'

question: What are the sources for the data of children who finished primary school education in Latin America & Caribbean countries?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Source FROM Footnotes AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.Seriescode = T2.SeriesCode INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T1.Countrycode = T3.CountryCode WHERE T3.Region = 'Latin America & Caribbean' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Children out of school, primary'

question: Which high income group countries are from Asia?
original_query: SELECT CountryCode, Region FROM Country WHERE (IncomeGroup = 'High income: OECD' OR IncomeGroup = 'High income: nonOECD') AND Region LIKE '%Asia%'

question: List out the country name of upper middle income group. Which country has the earliest national account base year? List out the region where this country locates.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryName FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IncomeGroup = 'Upper middle income' UNION SELECT longname FROM ( SELECT longname FROM country WHERE NationalAccountsBaseYear <> '' ORDER BY NationalAccountsBaseYear ASC LIMIT 1 )

question: What is the average number of passengers carried via air transport per year by Bulgaria between 1970 to 1980? Indicate the country's system of trade.
original_query: SELECT AVG(T1.Value), T2.SystemOfTrade FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName = 'Air transport, passengers carried' AND T1.Year >= 1970 AND T1.Year < 1981 AND T1.CountryName = 'Bulgaria'

question: Please provide full name of any two countries using special trade system.
original_query: SELECT LongName FROM Country WHERE SystemOfTrade = 'Special trade system' LIMIT 2

question: Which indicator name uses the Weighted average method and has the lowest value?
original_query: SELECT T1.IndicatorName, MIN(T1.Value) FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Series AS T2 ON T1.IndicatorName = T2.IndicatorName WHERE T2.AggregationMethod = 'Weighted average'

question:
What upper middle income country under East Asia & Pacific region which covers the topic about Social Protection & Labor: Migration
? Indicate the short name of the said country.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ShortName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN footnotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN Series AS T3 ON T2.Seriescode = T3.SeriesCode WHERE T1.IncomeGroup = 'Upper middle income' AND T1.Region = 'East Asia & Pacific' AND T3.Topic = 'Social Protection & Labor: Migration'

question: On which years did Aruba got a footnote on the series code AG.LND.FRST.K2?
original_query: SELECT T2.Year FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.ShortName = 'Aruba' AND T2.Seriescode = 'AG.LND.FRST.K2'

question: What is the series code for number of infant deaths in year 1965 for the country whose full name is Islamic State of Afghanistan?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T3.Seriescode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T3 ON T2.CountryCode = T3.Countrycode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Number of infant deaths' AND T1.LongName = 'Islamic State of Afghanistan' AND T2.Year = 1965

question: How many countries using the 1993 System of National Accounts methodology?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(CountryCode) FROM Country WHERE SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1993 System of National Accounts methodology.'

question: List down the series codes in which the topic is about Environment: Emissions and the license type is restricted. Please include their alpha code.
original_query: SELECT SeriesCode FROM Series WHERE Topic = 'Environment: Emissions' AND LicenseType = 'Restricted'

question: Among the countries with note on the series code SM.POP.TOTL, how many of them are in the low-income group?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Countrycode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Seriescode = 'SM.POP.TOTL' AND T1.IncomeGroup = 'Low income'

question: From 1975 to 1980, how much is the total amount CO2 emmission in kiloton of the the world? Indicate which year the world recorded its highest CO2 emmissions.
original_query: SELECT SUM(T1.Value), T1.Year FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions (kt)' AND T1.Year >= 1975 AND T1.Year < 1981 AND T1.CountryCode = 'WLD' AND T2.SpecialNotes = 'World aggregate.'

question: Which nation completed its external debt reporting in 1980 and had a Land under cereal production value of 3018500?
original_query: SELECT T2.CountryCode FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.IndicatorName LIKE 'Land under cereal production%' AND T1.Value = 3018500 AND T1.Year = 1980 AND T2.ExternalDebtReportingStatus = 'Actual'

question: What was the deposit interest rate in the Commonwealth of Australia in 1979 in percentage?
original_query: SELECT T1.Value FROM Indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN Country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.LongName = 'Commonwealth of Australia' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'Deposit interest rate (%)' AND T1.Year = 1979

question: What is indicator code of Rural population?
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT IndicatorCode FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorName = 'Rural population'

question: Please calculate the percentage of Sub-Saharan African countries which are in the Special trade system.
original_query: SELECT  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Region = 'Sub-Saharan Africa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CountryCode) FROM Country WHERE SystemOfTrade = 'Special trade system'

question: What are the Indicator names and aggregation methods when the topic is Economic Policy & Debt: Balance of payments: Capital & financial account?
original_query: SELECT IndicatorName, AggregationMethod FROM Series WHERE Topic = 'Economic Policy & Debt: Balance of payments: Capital & financial account'

question: Please list the descriptions of the series code SM.POP.TOTL for all the countries that are under the lending category of the International Development Associations.
original_query: SELECT T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.LendingCategory = 'IDA' AND T2.Seriescode = 'SM.POP.TOTL'

question: Please list the countries in Latin America & Caribbean with a note on the series code SM.POP.TOTL.
original_query: SELECT T1.SHORTNAME, T2.Description FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.Region = 'Latin America & Caribbean' AND T2.Seriescode = 'SM.POP.TOTL'

question: From 1960 to 1965, which country had the highest Death rate, crude (per 1,000 people)?
original_query: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE Year BETWEEN 1960 AND 1965 AND IndicatorName = 'Death rate, crude (per 1,000 people)' ORDER BY Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: Please list the countries that got the footnote "Data are classified as official aid." on the series code DC.DAC.AUSL.CD in 2002.
original_query: SELECT T1.SHORTNAME FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T2.Description = 'Data are classified as official aid.' AND T2.Seriescode = 'DC.DAC.AUSL.CD' AND T2.Year LIKE '%2002%'

question: In the countries for which the latest trade data are from 2013, what was the GDP growth in 2014? List them in the ascending order of GDP.
original_query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CountryCode, T2.Value FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.LatestTradeData = 2013 AND T2.IndicatorName LIKE 'GDP growth (annual %)' AND T2.year = 2014 AND T2.Value > 0 ORDER BY T2.Value ASC

question: How many low-income countries under the lending category of the International Development Associations have a note on the series code SM.POP.TOTL?
original_query: SELECT COUNT(T1.Countrycode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN CountryNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.LendingCategory = 'IDA' AND T2.Seriescode = 'SM.POP.TOTL' AND IncomeGroup = 'Low income'

question: By how much did the indicator on Adolescent fertility rate increase from 1960 to 1961 in the country whose Alpha2Code is 1A?
original_query: SELECT ( SELECT T2.Value FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' AND T2.Year = 1961 ) - ( SELECT T2.Value FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Alpha2Code = '1A' AND T2.IndicatorName = 'Adolescent fertility rate (births per 1,000 women ages 15-19)' AND T2.Year = 1960 ) DIFF

question: Write down the description and series code of Benin in year 2005.
original_query: SELECT T2.Description, T2.Seriescode FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN FootNotes AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.Countrycode WHERE T1.TableName = 'Benin' AND T2.Year = 'YR2005'

question: Which country have completed vital registration? List all the countries.
original_query: SELECT ShortName FROM Country WHERE VitalRegistrationComplete = 'Yes'

question: What's the long name of the country that got 3000000 on the indicator Arms exports in 1960?
original_query: SELECT T1.LongName FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'Arms exports (SIPRI trend indicator values)' AND T2.Year = 1960 AND T2.Value = 3000000

question: In 2005, which series codes use the International Monetary Fund, Balance of Payments Statistics Yearbook and data files source?
